================================================
FILE: src/app/api/auth/bootstrap-workspace/route.ts
================================================
import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto"

import { eq } from "drizzle-orm"
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"

import { auth, isBetterAuthEnabled } from "@/lib/auth/better-auth-server"
import { db } from "@/lib/db/neon"
import { workspaceOrganizations } from "@/lib/db/auth-schema"

function slugifyWorkspaceName(value: string) {
  return value
    .toLowerCase()
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "")
    .slice(0, 48)
}

function getCachedWorkspaceSession(params: {
  activeOrganizationId: string | null | undefined
  cachedOrganizationId?: string
  cachedWorkspaceId?: string
}) {
  const { activeOrganizationId, cachedOrganizationId, cachedWorkspaceId } = params
  if (
    activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedOrganizationId === activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedWorkspaceId &&
    /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(cachedWorkspaceId)
  ) {
    return {
      organizationId: activeOrganizationId,
      workspaceId: cachedWorkspaceId,
    }
  }

  return null
}

async function ensureWorkspaceLink(organizationId: string) {
  const existing = await db
    .select({
      workspaceId: workspaceOrganizations.workspaceId,
    })
    .from(workspaceOrganizations)
    .where(eq(workspaceOrganizations.organizationId, organizationId))
    .limit(1)

  if (existing[0]?.workspaceId) {
    return existing[0].workspaceId
  }

  const workspaceId = randomUUID()

  await db.insert(workspaceOrganizations).values({
    workspaceId,
    organizationId,
  })

  return workspaceId
}

function buildWorkspaceCookies(response: NextResponse, organizationId: string, workspaceId: string) {
  const baseCookie = {
    httpOnly: true,
    sameSite: "lax" as const,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === "production",
    path: "/",
    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7,
  }

  response.cookies.set("anclora-org-id", organizationId, baseCookie)
  response.cookies.set("anclora-workspace-id", workspaceId, baseCookie)
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  if (!isBetterAuthEnabled) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        ok: false,
        message: "Better Auth no esta habilitado en este entorno.",
      },
      { status: 503 }
    )
  }

  const session = await auth.api.getSession({
    headers: request.headers,
  })

  if (!session?.user) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        ok: false,
        message: "Sesion requerida.",
      },
      { status: 401 }
    )
  }

  let organizationId = session.session?.activeOrganizationId ?? null

  const cachedSession = getCachedWorkspaceSession({
    activeOrganizationId: organizationId,
    cachedOrganizationId: request.cookies.get("anclora-org-id")?.value,
    cachedWorkspaceId: request.cookies.get("anclora-workspace-id")?.value,
  })

  if (cachedSession) {
    return NextResponse.json({
      ok: true,
      workspaceId: cachedSession.workspaceId,
      organizationId: cachedSession.organizationId,
    })
  }

  if (!organizationId) {
    const organizations = await auth.api.listOrganizations({
      headers: request.headers,
    })

    if (organizations.length > 0) {
      organizationId = organizations[0].id

      await auth.api.setActiveOrganization({
        headers: request.headers,
        body: {
          organizationId,
        },
      })
    } else {
      const baseName =
        session.user.name?.trim() ||
        session.user.email.split("@")[0] ||
        "Anclora Workspace"

      const createdOrganization = await auth.api.createOrganization({
        headers: request.headers,
        body: {
          name: `${baseName} Workspace`,
          slug: `${slugifyWorkspaceName(baseName)}-${session.user.id.slice(
            0,
            8
          )}`,
        },
      })

      organizationId = createdOrganization.id
    }
  }

  const workspaceId = await ensureWorkspaceLink(organizationId)

  const response = NextResponse.json({
    ok: true,
    workspaceId,
    organizationId,
  })

  buildWorkspaceCookies(response, organizationId, workspaceId)

  return response
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/automation/recommendations/route.ts
================================================
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

type RecommendationPriority = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium'
type RecommendationType =
  | 'review_backlog'
  | 'schedule_gap'
  | 'repurpose_winner'
  | 'cta_optimization'
  | 'knowledge_gap'
  | 'content_refresh'

type OperationalRecommendation = {
  id: string
  type: RecommendationType
  priority: RecommendationPriority
  title: string
  reason: string
  metric: string
  actionSummary: string
  expectedImpact: string
  href: string
  hrefLabel: string
}

function recommendationId(type: RecommendationType, suffix: string) {
  return `${type}:${suffix}`
}

function buildStudioHref(params: Record<string, string | undefined>) {
  const searchParams = new URLSearchParams()

  Object.entries(params).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    if (value) {
      searchParams.set(key, value)
    }
  })

  return `/dashboard/studio?${searchParams.toString()}`
}

export async function GET() {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()

    if (!process.env.DATABASE_URL) {
      return NextResponse.json({ success: true, recommendations: [] })
    }

    const { neon } = await import('@neondatabase/serverless')
    const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL)

    const [
      reviewBacklogResult,
      approvedBacklogResult,
      scheduledQueueResult,
      totalSourcesResult,
      businessWinnerResult,
      ctaOpportunityResult,
      stalePublishedResult,
    ] = await Promise.all([
      sql`
        SELECT id, title, content_type, updated_at
        FROM generated_content
        WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
          AND status = 'review'
        ORDER BY updated_at ASC
        LIMIT 1
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT id, title, content_type, updated_at
        FROM generated_content
        WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
          AND status = 'approved'
          AND scheduled_for IS NULL
        ORDER BY updated_at ASC
        LIMIT 1
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM scheduled_posts
        WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
          AND status = 'pending'
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS count
        FROM content_sources
        WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT
          gc.id,
          gc.title,
          gc.content_type,
          cm.platform,
          COALESCE(SUM(cm.leads_generated), 0) AS leads,
          COALESCE(SUM(cm.conversions), 0) AS conversions
        FROM content_metrics cm
        INNER JOIN generated_content gc ON gc.id = cm.content_id
        WHERE cm.workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
        GROUP BY gc.id, gc.title, gc.content_type, cm.platform
        ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(cm.conversions), 0) DESC,
                 COALESCE(SUM(cm.leads_generated), 0) DESC
        LIMIT 1
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT
          gc.id,
          gc.title,
          gc.content_type,
          COALESCE(SUM(cm.views), 0) AS views,
          COALESCE(SUM(cm.leads_generated), 0) AS leads
        FROM content_metrics cm
        INNER JOIN generated_content gc ON gc.id = cm.content_id
        WHERE cm.workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
        GROUP BY gc.id, gc.title, gc.content_type
        HAVING COALESCE(SUM(cm.views), 0) >= 100
           AND COALESCE(SUM(cm.leads_generated), 0) = 0
        ORDER BY COALESCE(SUM(cm.views), 0) DESC
        LIMIT 1
      `,
      sql`
        SELECT id, title, content_type, published_at
        FROM generated_content
        WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
          AND status = 'published'
          AND published_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '21 days'
        ORDER BY published_at ASC
        LIMIT 1
      `,
    ])

    const recommendations: OperationalRecommendation[] = []

    const reviewBacklog = reviewBacklogResult[0]
    if (reviewBacklog) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('review_backlog', String(reviewBacklog.id)),
        type: 'review_backlog',
        priority: 'critical',
        title: 'Desbloquear una pieza atascada en revisión',
        reason: `${String(reviewBacklog.title)} lleva tiempo esperando validación editorial y está frenando el flujo.`,
        metric: `Última actualización: ${new Date(String(reviewBacklog.updated_at)).toLocaleString('es-ES')}`,
        actionSummary: 'Revisa tesis, CTA y salida editorial antes de aprobar o devolver cambios.',
        expectedImpact: 'Reducir fricción editorial y devolver velocidad al pipeline.',
        href: buildStudioHref({
          contentId: String(reviewBacklog.id),
          automationSource: 'review_backlog',
          automationAction: 'Valida la tesis, el CTA y la salida editorial para desbloquear esta pieza.',
          automationImpact: 'Reducir fricción editorial y devolver velocidad al pipeline.',
        }),
        hrefLabel: 'Revisar pieza',
      })
    }

    const approvedBacklog = approvedBacklogResult[0]
    const scheduledQueueCount = Number(scheduledQueueResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
    if (approvedBacklog && scheduledQueueCount === 0) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('schedule_gap', String(approvedBacklog.id)),
        type: 'schedule_gap',
        priority: 'high',
        title: 'Cierra el hueco de programación',
        reason: `No hay cola programada activa y ${String(approvedBacklog.title)} ya está aprobada para salir.`,
        metric: 'Cola programada pendiente: 0',
        actionSummary: 'Asigna una fecha de salida y valida el canal antes de perder inercia editorial.',
        expectedImpact: 'Mantener cadencia visible y evitar semanas sin contenido publicado.',
        href: buildStudioHref({
          contentId: String(approvedBacklog.id),
          automationSource: 'schedule_gap',
          automationAction: 'Programa una ventana de salida para que la cadencia no se quede vacía.',
          automationImpact: 'Mantener cadencia visible y evitar semanas sin contenido publicado.',
        }),
        hrefLabel: 'Programar salida',
      })
    }

    const businessWinner = businessWinnerResult[0]
    if (businessWinner && Number(businessWinner.leads ?? 0) > 0) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('repurpose_winner', String(businessWinner.id)),
        type: 'repurpose_winner',
        priority: 'high',
        title: 'Deriva el contenido que ya está generando negocio',
        reason: `${String(businessWinner.title)} ya produce señal comercial; conviene reaprovechar su tesis en otro canal.`,
        metric: `${Number(businessWinner.leads ?? 0)} leads · ${Number(businessWinner.conversions ?? 0)} conversiones`,
        actionSummary: 'Abre una derivada con la misma tesis ganadora, pero empaquetada para un canal distinto.',
        expectedImpact: 'Aumentar alcance comercial reaprovechando una tesis ya validada por el mercado.',
        href: buildStudioHref({
          automationSource: 'repurpose_winner',
          automationAction: 'Convierte esta tesis ganadora en una derivada de canal con un CTA más directo.',
          automationImpact: 'Aumentar alcance comercial reaprovechando una tesis ya validada por el mercado.',
          title: `Derivada de ${String(businessWinner.title)}`,
          objective: `Reaprovechar una tesis que ya genera negocio en ${String(businessWinner.platform ?? 'otro canal')} sin perder foco comercial.`,
          audience: 'Inversores y compradores premium que ya han mostrado interes en contenidos de inteligencia inmobiliaria.',
          context: `${String(businessWinner.title)} ya ha generado ${Number(businessWinner.leads ?? 0)} leads y ${Number(businessWinner.conversions ?? 0)} conversiones. Mantener la misma hipotesis y reforzar el CTA.`,
          contentType: 'linkedin',
          tone: 'institucional',
        }),
        hrefLabel: 'Crear derivada',
      })
    }

    const ctaOpportunity = ctaOpportunityResult[0]
    if (ctaOpportunity) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('cta_optimization', String(ctaOpportunity.id)),
        type: 'cta_optimization',
        priority: 'medium',
        title: 'Optimiza una pieza con mucho tráfico y baja conversión',
        reason: `${String(ctaOpportunity.title)} atrae atención, pero no está convirtiendo ese interés en leads.`,
        metric: `${Number(ctaOpportunity.views ?? 0)} views · ${Number(ctaOpportunity.leads ?? 0)} leads`,
        actionSummary: 'Reabre la pieza y endurece propuesta de valor, CTA y cierre comercial.',
        expectedImpact: 'Mejorar eficiencia comercial sin necesidad de crear contenido nuevo.',
        href: buildStudioHref({
          contentId: String(ctaOpportunity.id),
          automationSource: 'cta_optimization',
          automationAction: 'Reescribe el cierre y el CTA para convertir atencion en conversacion comercial.',
          automationImpact: 'Mejorar eficiencia comercial sin necesidad de crear contenido nuevo.',
        }),
        hrefLabel: 'Reforzar CTA',
      })
    }

    const totalSources = Number(totalSourcesResult[0]?.count ?? 0)
    if (totalSources < 5) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('knowledge_gap', 'sources'),
        type: 'knowledge_gap',
        priority: 'medium',
        title: 'Refuerza la base de conocimiento',
        reason: 'El RAG sigue con una base documental pequeña y eso limita la calidad de las tesis editoriales.',
        metric: `${totalSources} fuentes activas`,
        actionSummary: 'Carga nuevas fuentes antes de abrir mas piezas para que el motor trabaje con contexto suficiente.',
        expectedImpact: 'Subir la calidad del razonamiento y reducir piezas débiles o demasiado genéricas.',
        href: '/dashboard/rag?automationSource=knowledge_gap',
        hrefLabel: 'Cargar fuentes',
      })
    }

    const stalePublished = stalePublishedResult[0]
    if (stalePublished) {
      recommendations.push({
        id: recommendationId('content_refresh', String(stalePublished.id)),
        type: 'content_refresh',
        priority: 'medium',
        title: 'Actualiza una pieza publicada que puede haber quedado obsoleta',
        reason: `${String(stalePublished.title)} lleva semanas publicado y puede necesitar refresh con contexto más reciente.`,
        metric: `Publicado: ${new Date(String(stalePublished.published_at)).toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}`,
        actionSummary: 'Reabre la pieza y actualiza tesis, datos y CTA con contexto más reciente.',
        expectedImpact: 'Recuperar autoridad y tráfico sobre un activo ya publicado sin partir desde cero.',
        href: buildStudioHref({
          contentId: String(stalePublished.id),
          automationSource: 'content_refresh',
          automationAction: 'Actualiza esta pieza publicada con datos mas recientes y una llamada a la accion renovada.',
          automationImpact: 'Recuperar autoridad y tráfico sobre un activo ya publicado sin partir desde cero.',
        }),
        hrefLabel: 'Actualizar pieza',
      })
    }

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, recommendations: recommendations.slice(0, 5) })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Automation Recommendations API] Error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, recommendations: [] })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/approve/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
import { complianceValidator, type DetailedComplianceReport } from '@/lib/agents/compliance-validator';
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types';
import { getJob, updateJob } from '@/lib/job-store';
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace';
import { getEditorialDraftById, upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store';
import { uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl } from '@/lib/editorial-assets';
import { getGenerationJobByJobId, updateGenerationJobProgress } from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store';

function deriveApprovalStatus(
  variants: ContentGenerationState['channelVariants']
): ContentGenerationState['approvalStatus'] {
  const statuses = variants?.map((variant) => variant.status) ?? []
  if (statuses.length === 0) return 'draft'
  if (statuses.every((status) => status === 'rejected')) return 'rejected'
  if (statuses.some((status) => status === 'approved')) return 'approved'
  return 'draft'
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    let workspaceId: string
    try {
      const auth = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
      workspaceId = auth.workspaceId
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
      }
      throw error
    }

    const body = await req.json();
    const { state, jobId, draftId, approvals } = body as {
      state: ContentGenerationState;
      jobId?: string;
      draftId?: string;
      approvals?: { 
        channel: string; 
        editedDraft?: string; 
        status: 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'edited'; 
        imageBase64?: string 
      }[];
    };

    const persistedJob = jobId ? await getGenerationJobByJobId(workspaceId, jobId) : null
    const currentJob = jobId ? getJob(jobId) : undefined;
    const stateFromJob =
      persistedJob?.resultState ??
      persistedJob?.inputState ??
      (currentJob?.result as ContentGenerationState | undefined);

    let persistedState: ContentGenerationState | undefined
    if (!state && !stateFromJob && draftId) {
      const persistedDraft = await getEditorialDraftById(workspaceId, draftId)
      if (persistedDraft) {
        persistedState = {
          topic: persistedDraft.topic ?? persistedDraft.headline ?? 'Sin tema',
          zone: (persistedDraft.zone ?? 'toda_mallorca') as ContentGenerationState['zone'],
          framing: (persistedDraft.framing ?? 'market_analysis') as ContentGenerationState['framing'],
          targetAudience: (persistedDraft.targetAudience ?? 'mixed_qualified_audience') as ContentGenerationState['targetAudience'],
          channels: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number]),
          workspaceId: persistedDraft.workspaceId,
          jobId: persistedDraft.jobId ?? persistedDraft.id,
          draftId: persistedDraft.id,
          contentDraft: persistedDraft.variants[0]?.editedDraft || persistedDraft.variants[0]?.draft || '',
          headline: persistedDraft.headline ?? persistedDraft.topic ?? undefined,
          channelVariants: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => ({
            channel: variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number],
            platform: variant.platform as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
            language: variant.language as 'es' | 'en',
            draft: variant.draft,
            editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? undefined,
            title: variant.title ?? undefined,
            excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? undefined,
            hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? undefined,
            seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? undefined,
            seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? undefined,
            charCount: variant.charCount,
            wordCount: variant.wordCount ?? undefined,
            optimizedAt: variant.updatedAt.toISOString(),
            imageBase64: undefined,
            status:
              variant.status === 'published'
                ? 'approved'
                : (variant.status as 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'),
            complianceWarnings: (variant.complianceWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
            qualityWarnings: (variant.qualityWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
          })),
          usageSummary: (persistedDraft.usageSummary ?? undefined) as ContentGenerationState['usageSummary'],
          approvalStatus:
            persistedDraft.status === 'published_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'published_partial'
              ? 'published'
              : persistedDraft.status === 'archived'
                ? 'rejected'
                : persistedDraft.status === 'approved_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'approved_partial'
                  ? 'approved'
                  : 'draft',
          phase: 'done',
          createdAt: persistedDraft.createdAt.toISOString(),
          errors: [],
        }
      }
    }

    if (!state && !stateFromJob && !persistedState) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Draft state, draftId or jobId required' }, { status: 400 });
    }

    let finalState = { ...(state ?? stateFromJob ?? persistedState) };
    const targetJobId = jobId || finalState.jobId;

    // If user provided specific approvals, update variants
    if (approvals && approvals.length > 0) {
      const originalVariants = [...(finalState.channelVariants ?? [])];
      const updatedVariants = originalVariants.map((v) => {
        const approval = approvals.find((a) => a.channel === v.channel);
        if (approval) {
          return { 
            ...v, 
            draft: approval.editedDraft || v.draft,
            editedDraft: approval.editedDraft,
            status: approval.status === 'edited' ? v.status : approval.status,
            imageBase64: approval.imageBase64 !== undefined ? approval.imageBase64 : v.imageBase64
          };
        }
        return v;
      });
      finalState = { ...finalState, channelVariants: updatedVariants };

      // Re-run compliance on edited approved drafts
      const approvedAndEdited = updatedVariants.filter(v => v.status === 'approved' && v.editedDraft);
      if (approvedAndEdited.length > 0) {
        const complianceResult = await complianceValidator({
          contentDraft: finalState.contentDraft ?? '',
          channelVariants: approvedAndEdited.map((variant) => ({
            channel: variant.channel,
            draft: variant.editedDraft ?? variant.draft,
            claims: variant.claims,
          })),
          allowQuantitativeData: finalState.allowQuantitativeData,
          sourceUrls: finalState.sourceUrls,
          evidenceMode: finalState.evidenceMode,
          ctaMode: finalState.ctaMode,
        })

        // Hard issues in edited content still block approval
        const detailedReport = complianceResult.output as DetailedComplianceReport
        if (detailedReport.hasHardIssues) {
          return NextResponse.json(
            {
              error: 'Edited content has hard compliance issues',
              complianceReport: complianceResult.output,
            },
            { status: 422 }
          )
        }
      }
    }

    let persistedDraft = await upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration(finalState)
    if (persistedDraft) {
      finalState.draftId = persistedDraft.id
    }

    if (approvals && approvals.length > 0 && persistedDraft) {
      const currentPersistedDraft = persistedDraft
      const uploadedAssets = await Promise.all(
        approvals
          .filter((approval) => approval.imageBase64 && approval.imageBase64.startsWith('data:'))
          .map(async (approval) => {
            const variant = currentPersistedDraft.variants.find((item) => item.channel === approval.channel)
            if (!variant || !approval.imageBase64) return null

            const uploaded = await uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl({
              workspaceId,
              draftId: currentPersistedDraft.id,
              variantId: variant.id,
              channel: approval.channel,
              dataUrl: approval.imageBase64,
            })

            return {
              channel: approval.channel,
              proxyUrl: uploaded.proxyUrl,
            }
          })
      )

      if (uploadedAssets.length > 0) {
        finalState = {
          ...finalState,
          channelVariants: (finalState.channelVariants ?? []).map((variant) => {
            const uploaded = uploadedAssets.find((item) => item?.channel === variant.channel)
            return uploaded
              ? { ...variant, imageBase64: uploaded.proxyUrl }
              : variant
          }),
        }
        persistedDraft = await upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration(finalState)
      }
    }

    finalState = {
      ...finalState,
      approvalStatus: deriveApprovalStatus(finalState.channelVariants),
    }

    if (currentJob) {
      updateJob(targetJobId, {
        status: 'completed',
        phase: 'done',
        result: finalState,
      });
    }

    const refreshedPersistedDraft = await upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration({
      ...finalState,
      draftId: persistedDraft?.id ?? finalState.draftId,
    })

    await updateGenerationJobProgress(targetJobId, {
      status: 'completed',
      phase: 'done',
      resultState: {
        ...finalState,
        draftId: refreshedPersistedDraft?.id ?? persistedDraft?.id ?? finalState.draftId,
      },
      draftId: refreshedPersistedDraft?.id ?? persistedDraft?.id ?? finalState.draftId ?? null,
      errorMessage: null,
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      jobId: finalState.jobId,
      draftId: refreshedPersistedDraft?.id ?? persistedDraft?.id ?? finalState.draftId,
      approvalStatus: finalState.approvalStatus,
      publicationUrls: finalState.publicationUrls,
      publishedAt: finalState.publishedAt,
      learningProposal: null,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[POST /api/content/approve]', error);
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Approval failed', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) },
      { status: 500 }
    );
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/assets/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { fetchEditorialBlob } from '@/lib/editorial-assets'
import { getEditorialAssetById } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  context: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const { id } = await context.params

    const asset = await getEditorialAssetById(workspaceId, id)
    if (!asset) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Asset not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const blobResult = await fetchEditorialBlob(asset.blobPath)
    if (!blobResult || blobResult.statusCode !== 200 || !blobResult.blob) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Asset not available' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    return new NextResponse(blobResult.stream as BodyInit, {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': blobResult.blob.contentType || asset.mimeType,
        'Cache-Control': 'private, max-age=60',
      },
    })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('GET /api/content/assets/[id] error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch asset' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/drafts/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import {
  createEditorialDraftFromGeneration,
  getEditorialDraftByJobId,
  listEditorialDrafts,
  upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration,
} from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { getGenerationJobByJobId } from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store'

function mapDraftStatusToQueueStatus(status: string) {
  switch (status) {
    case 'approved_all':
    case 'approved_partial':
      return 'approved'
    case 'published_all':
    case 'published_partial':
      return 'published'
    case 'archived':
      return 'rejected'
    case 'in_review':
      return 'pending_approval'
    default:
      return 'draft'
  }
}

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const searchParams = request.nextUrl.searchParams
    const status = searchParams.get('status') ?? undefined
    const zone = searchParams.get('zone') ?? undefined
    const framing = searchParams.get('framing') ?? undefined
    const limit = Number.parseInt(searchParams.get('limit') ?? '20', 10)

    const drafts = await listEditorialDrafts(workspaceId, {
      status: status as
        | 'draft'
        | 'in_review'
        | 'approved_partial'
        | 'approved_all'
        | 'published_partial'
        | 'published_all'
        | 'archived'
        | undefined,
      zone,
      framing,
      limit: Number.isNaN(limit) ? 20 : Math.min(Math.max(limit, 1), 100),
    })

    const items = drafts.map((draft) => {
      const primaryVariant = draft.variants[0]
      const effectiveText = primaryVariant?.editedDraft || primaryVariant?.draft || ''
      const complianceIssues = draft.variants.flatMap((variant) => variant.complianceWarnings ?? [])
      const previewAsset = draft.assets.find((asset) => asset.variantId === primaryVariant?.id) ?? draft.assets[0]

      return {
        id: draft.id,
        jobId: draft.jobId,
        topic: draft.topic || draft.headline || 'Sin tema',
        zone: draft.zone || 'n/a',
        framing: draft.framing || 'n/a',
        status: mapDraftStatusToQueueStatus(draft.status),
        wordCount: primaryVariant?.wordCount ?? 0,
        toneScore: 0,
        complianceIssues,
        contentDraft: effectiveText,
        headline: draft.headline || draft.topic || 'Sin titular',
        createdAt: draft.createdAt.toISOString(),
        updatedAt: draft.updatedAt.toISOString(),
        channels: draft.variants.map((variant) => variant.channel),
        variantsCount: draft.variants.length,
        assetsCount: draft.assets.length,
        previewAssetUrl: previewAsset ? `/api/content/assets/${previewAsset.id}` : null,
        variants: draft.variants.map((variant) => ({
          id: variant.id,
          channel: variant.channel,
          platform: variant.platform,
          language: variant.language,
          status: variant.status,
          title: variant.title,
          draft: variant.draft,
          editedDraft: variant.editedDraft,
        })),
        usageSummary: draft.usageSummary,
      }
    })

    return NextResponse.json(items, {
      status: 200,
      headers: {
        'Cache-Control': 'no-store, max-age=0',
      },
    })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('GET /api/content/drafts error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch drafts' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const body = await request.json()
    const { jobId, state } = body as {
      jobId?: string
      state?: ContentGenerationState
    }

    let draftState: ContentGenerationState | undefined = state

    if (!draftState && jobId) {
      const job = await getGenerationJobByJobId(workspaceId, jobId)
      draftState = job?.resultState ?? job?.inputState
    }

    if (!draftState) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'state or jobId required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    if (draftState.workspaceId !== workspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Draft not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const existing = await getEditorialDraftByJobId(workspaceId, draftState.jobId)
    const persisted = existing
      ? await upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration(draftState)
      : await createEditorialDraftFromGeneration(draftState)

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: true,
        draftId: persisted?.id,
        jobId: persisted?.jobId,
        status: persisted?.status,
      },
      { status: existing ? 200 : 201 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('POST /api/content/drafts error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to persist draft' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/drafts/[id]/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { getEditorialDraftById } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'

function mapPersistedDraftToGenerationState(
  draft: NonNullable<Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getEditorialDraftById>>>
): ContentGenerationState & { draftId: string } {
  const assetUrlByVariantId = new Map(
    draft.assets
      .filter((asset) => asset.variantId)
      .map((asset) => [asset.variantId!, `/api/content/assets/${asset.id}`])
  )

  const variants = draft.variants.map((variant) => ({
    channel: variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number],
    platform: variant.platform as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
    language: variant.language as 'es' | 'en',
    draft: variant.draft,
    editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? undefined,
    title: variant.title ?? undefined,
    excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? undefined,
    hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? undefined,
    seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? undefined,
    seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? undefined,
    charCount: variant.charCount,
    wordCount: variant.wordCount ?? undefined,
    optimizedAt: variant.updatedAt.toISOString(),
    imageBase64: assetUrlByVariantId.get(variant.id),
    status:
      variant.status === 'published'
        ? 'approved'
        : (variant.status as 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'),
    complianceWarnings: (variant.complianceWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
    qualityWarnings: (variant.qualityWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
  }))

  return {
    topic: draft.topic ?? draft.headline ?? 'Sin tema',
    zone: (draft.zone ?? 'toda_mallorca') as ContentGenerationState['zone'],
    framing: (draft.framing ?? 'market_analysis') as ContentGenerationState['framing'],
    targetAudience: (draft.targetAudience ?? 'mixed_qualified_audience') as ContentGenerationState['targetAudience'],
    channels: variants.map((variant) => variant.channel),
    workspaceId: draft.workspaceId,
    jobId: draft.jobId ?? draft.id,
    contentDraft: variants[0]?.editedDraft || variants[0]?.draft || '',
    headline: draft.headline ?? draft.topic ?? undefined,
    channelVariants: variants,
    publicationUrls: Object.fromEntries(
      draft.variants
        .filter((variant) => variant.publishedUrl)
        .map((variant) => [variant.channel, variant.publishedUrl as string])
    ),
    usageSummary: (draft.usageSummary ?? undefined) as ContentGenerationState['usageSummary'],
    approvalStatus:
      draft.status === 'published_all' || draft.status === 'published_partial'
        ? 'published'
        : draft.status === 'archived'
          ? 'rejected'
          : draft.status === 'approved_all' || draft.status === 'approved_partial'
            ? 'approved'
            : 'draft',
    phase: 'done',
    createdAt: draft.createdAt.toISOString(),
    errors: [],
    draftId: draft.id,
  }
}

export async function GET(
  _request: NextRequest,
  context: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const { id } = await context.params

    const draft = await getEditorialDraftById(workspaceId, id)
    if (!draft) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Draft not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      draftId: draft.id,
      result: mapPersistedDraftToGenerationState(draft),
    })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('GET /api/content/drafts/[id] error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch draft' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/drafts/[id]/assets/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { getEditorialDraftById } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl } from '@/lib/editorial-assets'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function POST(
  request: NextRequest,
  context: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const { id } = await context.params
    const body = await request.json()
    const { variantId, channel, dataUrl } = body as {
      variantId?: string
      channel?: string
      dataUrl?: string
    }

    if (!dataUrl || !channel) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'channel and dataUrl required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const draft = await getEditorialDraftById(workspaceId, id)
    if (!draft) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Draft not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const resolvedVariantId =
      variantId ?? draft.variants.find((variant) => variant.channel === channel)?.id

    const result = await uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl({
      workspaceId,
      draftId: draft.id,
      variantId: resolvedVariantId,
      channel,
      dataUrl,
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      assetId: result.asset?.id,
      assetUrl: result.proxyUrl,
    })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('POST /api/content/drafts/[id]/assets error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to upload asset' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/drafts/[id]/variants/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import {
  getEditorialDraftById,
  removeEditorialAssetsForVariant,
  updateEditorialDraftVariant,
} from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { deleteEditorialAssetsBlobs, uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl } from '@/lib/editorial-assets'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function PATCH(
  request: NextRequest,
  context: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }
) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const { id } = await context.params
    const body = await request.json()
    const {
      channel,
      editedDraft,
      imageBase64,
      removeImage,
    } = body as {
      channel?: string
      editedDraft?: string
      imageBase64?: string
      removeImage?: boolean
    }

    if (!channel) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'channel required' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const draft = await getEditorialDraftById(workspaceId, id)
    if (!draft) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Draft not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const variant = draft.variants.find((item) => item.channel === channel)
    if (!variant) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Variant not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const updatedVariant = await updateEditorialDraftVariant(workspaceId, draft.id, variant.id, {
      editedDraft: editedDraft ?? variant.editedDraft ?? variant.draft,
      status: 'edited',
    })

    let assetUrl: string | null = null

    if (removeImage) {
      const removedAssets = await removeEditorialAssetsForVariant(workspaceId, draft.id, variant.id)
      if (removedAssets.length > 0) {
        await deleteEditorialAssetsBlobs(removedAssets)
      }
    } else if (imageBase64?.startsWith('data:')) {
      const removedAssets = await removeEditorialAssetsForVariant(workspaceId, draft.id, variant.id)
      if (removedAssets.length > 0) {
        await deleteEditorialAssetsBlobs(removedAssets)
      }

      const uploaded = await uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl({
        workspaceId,
        draftId: draft.id,
        variantId: variant.id,
        channel,
        dataUrl: imageBase64,
      })
      assetUrl = uploaded.proxyUrl
    }

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      draftId: draft.id,
      variant: updatedVariant,
      assetUrl,
    })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('PATCH /api/content/drafts/[id]/variants error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to update draft variant' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/facebook/publish/route.ts
================================================
/**
 * POST /api/content/facebook/publish
 * Publish approved Facebook content after user review
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getJob, updateJob } from '@/lib/job-store'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { createLearningProposal } from '@/lib/learning-store'
import { getEditorialDraftById, updateEditorialDraftVariant } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { getGenerationJobByJobId, updateGenerationJobProgress } from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store'

interface PublishRequest {
  jobId: string
  draftId?: string
  channel: 'facebook_es' | 'facebook_en'
  content: string
}

async function publishFacebook(draft: string): Promise<string> {
  const token = process.env.FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN
  const pageId = process.env.FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID
  const apiVersion = process.env.FACEBOOK_GRAPH_API_VERSION || 'v24.0'

  if (!token || !pageId) {
    throw new Error('Facebook credentials not configured')
  }

  const body = new URLSearchParams({
    message: draft,
    access_token: token,
  })

  const res = await fetch(`https://graph.facebook.com/${apiVersion}/${pageId}/feed`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
    },
    body: body.toString(),
  })

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(`Facebook API error ${res.status}: ${await res.text()}`)
  }

  const data = (await res.json()) as { id?: string }
  if (!data.id) {
    throw new Error('Facebook API did not return a post id')
  }

  const [, postIdPart] = data.id.split('_')
  return postIdPart
    ? `https://www.facebook.com/${pageId}/posts/${postIdPart}`
    : `https://www.facebook.com/${data.id}`
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body: PublishRequest = await request.json()

    if (!body.jobId || !body.channel || !body.content) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Missing required fields: jobId, channel, content' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    let authenticatedWorkspaceId: string
    try {
      const auth = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
      authenticatedWorkspaceId = auth.workspaceId
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
      }
      throw error
    }

    const persistedJob = await getGenerationJobByJobId(authenticatedWorkspaceId, body.jobId)
    const existingJob = getJob(body.jobId)
    let state =
      persistedJob?.resultState ??
      persistedJob?.inputState ??
      (existingJob?.result as ContentGenerationState | undefined)

    const persistedDraft =
      body.draftId ? await getEditorialDraftById(authenticatedWorkspaceId, body.draftId) : null

    if (!state && persistedDraft) {
      state = {
        topic: persistedDraft.topic ?? persistedDraft.headline ?? 'Sin tema',
        zone: (persistedDraft.zone ?? 'toda_mallorca') as ContentGenerationState['zone'],
        framing: (persistedDraft.framing ?? 'market_analysis') as ContentGenerationState['framing'],
        targetAudience: (persistedDraft.targetAudience ?? 'mixed_qualified_audience') as ContentGenerationState['targetAudience'],
        channels: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number]),
        workspaceId: persistedDraft.workspaceId,
        jobId: persistedDraft.jobId ?? persistedDraft.id,
        draftId: persistedDraft.id,
        contentDraft: persistedDraft.variants[0]?.editedDraft || persistedDraft.variants[0]?.draft || '',
        headline: persistedDraft.headline ?? persistedDraft.topic ?? undefined,
        channelVariants: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => ({
          channel: variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number],
          platform: variant.platform as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
          language: variant.language as 'es' | 'en',
          draft: variant.draft,
          editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? undefined,
          title: variant.title ?? undefined,
          excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? undefined,
          hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? undefined,
          seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? undefined,
          seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? undefined,
          charCount: variant.charCount,
          wordCount: variant.wordCount ?? undefined,
          optimizedAt: variant.updatedAt.toISOString(),
          status:
            variant.status === 'published'
              ? 'approved'
              : (variant.status as 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'),
          complianceWarnings: (variant.complianceWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
          qualityWarnings: (variant.qualityWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
          imageBase64: undefined,
        })),
        usageSummary: (persistedDraft.usageSummary ?? undefined) as ContentGenerationState['usageSummary'],
        approvalStatus:
          persistedDraft.status === 'published_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'published_partial'
            ? 'published'
            : persistedDraft.status === 'approved_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'approved_partial'
              ? 'approved'
              : persistedDraft.status === 'archived'
                ? 'rejected'
                : 'draft',
        publicationUrls: Object.fromEntries(
          persistedDraft.variants
            .filter((variant) => variant.publishedUrl)
            .map((variant) => [variant.channel, variant.publishedUrl as string])
        ),
        phase: 'done',
        createdAt: persistedDraft.createdAt.toISOString(),
        errors: [],
      }
    }

    if (!state?.workspaceId || state.workspaceId !== authenticatedWorkspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Job not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    if (state.approvalStatus !== 'approved') {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Job not approved for publication' }, { status: 403 })
    }

    const variant = state.channelVariants?.find((v) => v.channel === body.channel)
    if (!variant) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Channel variant not found' }, { status: 403 })
    }
    if (variant.status !== 'approved') {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Channel variant not approved' }, { status: 403 })
    }

    const allowedDraft = variant.editedDraft || variant.draft
    if (body.content !== allowedDraft) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Content does not match approved draft' }, { status: 422 })
    }

    const url = await publishFacebook(body.content)

    const nextState: ContentGenerationState = {
      ...state,
      approvalStatus: 'published',
      publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      publicationUrls: {
        ...(state.publicationUrls ?? {}),
        [body.channel]: url,
      },
      channelVariants: (state.channelVariants ?? []).map((item) =>
        item.channel === body.channel
          ? { ...item, draft: body.content, charCount: body.content.length }
          : item
      ),
    }

    if (existingJob) {
      updateJob(body.jobId, {
        status: 'completed',
        phase: nextState.phase,
        result: nextState,
      })
    }

    if (persistedDraft) {
      const persistedVariant = persistedDraft.variants.find((item) => item.channel === body.channel)
      if (persistedVariant) {
        await updateEditorialDraftVariant(authenticatedWorkspaceId, persistedDraft.id, persistedVariant.id, {
          draft: body.content,
          editedDraft: body.content,
          status: 'published',
          publishedUrl: url,
          publishedAt: new Date(),
        })
      }
    }

    await updateGenerationJobProgress(body.jobId, {
      status: 'completed',
      phase: nextState.phase,
      resultState: {
        ...nextState,
        draftId: persistedDraft?.id ?? nextState.draftId,
      },
      draftId: persistedDraft?.id ?? nextState.draftId ?? null,
      errorMessage: null,
    })

    const learningProposal = await createLearningProposal({
      jobId: body.jobId,
      workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
      originalDrafts: (state.channelVariants ?? [])
        .filter((item) => item.channel === body.channel)
        .map((item) => ({ channel: item.channel, draft: item.draft })),
      editedDrafts: [{ channel: body.channel, draft: body.content }],
    })

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: true,
        jobId: body.jobId,
        channel: body.channel,
        url,
        publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        learningProposal,
      },
      { status: 200 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Publication failed'
    console.error('[API] Facebook publish error:', message)

    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: message },
      { status: error instanceof Error && message.includes('credentials') ? 401 : 500 }
    )
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/generate/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { start } from 'workflow/api'

import {
  initializeGraphState,
} from '@/lib/agents/content-generation-graph'
import type {
  ContentFraming,
  ContentZone,
  ModelOverride,
  PublishChannel,
  TargetAudience,
} from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getWorkspaceLearningGuidelines } from '@/lib/learning-store'
import { generateJobId } from '@/lib/utils'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import {
  type GenerationEngine,
} from '@/lib/hermes'
import {
  attachWorkflowRun,
  createGenerationJob,
  updateGenerationJobProgress,
} from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store'
import { processContentGenerationJob } from '@/workflows/content-generation'

export const maxDuration = 300

const VALID_ENGINES: GenerationEngine[] = ['current', 'hermes', 'hermes-mock']
const FIXED_APP_MODEL_ID = 'openai/gpt-4o-mini'

function buildFixedAppOverride(channels: PublishChannel[]): ModelOverride {
  return {
    modelId: FIXED_APP_MODEL_ID,
    scope: 'all',
    channels,
  }
}

export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await req.json()
    let workspaceId: string
    try {
      const auth = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
      workspaceId = auth.workspaceId
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
      }
      throw error
    }
    const {
      topic,
      zone,
      framing,
      targetAudience,
      channels,
      customGuidelines,
      linkedInImageBase64,
      contentObjective,
      signalType,
      claimRiskLevel,
      sourceUrls,
      allowQuantitativeData,
      allowCtaLink,
      language,
      coreThesis,
      investorLens,
      desiredReaderOutcome,
      ctaMode,
      evidenceMode,
      assertiveness,
      microzone,
      exampleOutput,
    } = body

    const engine = (body.engine ?? process.env.CONTENT_GENERATION_ENGINE ?? 'current') as GenerationEngine

    if (!VALID_ENGINES.includes(engine)) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: `Invalid engine. Allowed values: ${VALID_ENGINES.join(', ')}` },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    if (!topic || !zone || !framing || !targetAudience || !channels) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Missing required fields: topic, zone, framing, targetAudience, channels' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const jobId = generateJobId()
    const learnedGuidelines = await getWorkspaceLearningGuidelines(workspaceId)
    const mergedCustomGuidelines = [
      ...learnedGuidelines,
      ...((customGuidelines as typeof learnedGuidelines | undefined) ?? []),
    ]

    const initState = initializeGraphState({
      topic,
      zone: zone as ContentZone,
      framing: framing as ContentFraming,
      targetAudience: targetAudience as TargetAudience,
      channels: channels as PublishChannel[],
      contentObjective,
      signalType,
      claimRiskLevel,
      sourceUrls,
      allowQuantitativeData,
      allowCtaLink,
      language,
      customGuidelines: mergedCustomGuidelines.length > 0 ? mergedCustomGuidelines : undefined,
      overrideModel: buildFixedAppOverride(channels as PublishChannel[]),
      linkedInImageBase64,
      coreThesis,
      investorLens,
      desiredReaderOutcome,
      ctaMode,
      evidenceMode,
      assertiveness,
      microzone,
      exampleOutput,
      workspaceId,
      jobId,
    })

    await createGenerationJob({
      jobId,
      workspaceId,
      engine,
      inputState: initState,
    })

    try {
      const run = await start(processContentGenerationJob, [jobId])
      await attachWorkflowRun(jobId, run.runId)
    } catch (error) {
      await updateGenerationJobProgress(jobId, {
        status: 'failed',
        phase: 'error',
        resultState: {
          ...initState,
          phase: 'error',
          errors: [
            ...initState.errors,
            error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
          ],
        },
        errorMessage: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
        finishedAt: new Date(),
      })
      throw error
    }

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        jobId,
        engine,
        status: 'queued',
        phase: 'queued',
      },
      { status: 202 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[POST /api/content/generate]', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Internal server error', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

================================================
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { POST } from '../route'

const authMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getAuthenticatedWorkspace: vi.fn(),
}))

const learningStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getWorkspaceLearningGuidelines: vi.fn(),
}))

  initializeGraphState: vi.fn(),
  graphNodes: {
    research: vi.fn(),
    strategy: vi.fn(),
    optimize: vi.fn(),
    compliance: vi.fn(),
    error: vi.fn(),

      topic: state.topic,

    hermesMock.generateWithHermes.mockResolvedValue({
