        completionTokens: 0,
        estimatedCostUsd: 0,
        provider: 'test',
        model: 'hermes-test',
      },
      warnings: [],
      errors: [],
    })

    hermesMock.generateWithHermesMock.mockReset()
    hermesMock.generateWithHermesMock.mockResolvedValue({
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'blog_es',
          platform: 'blog',
          language: 'es',
          title: '[MOCK Hermes] Test Topic',
          draft: '[MOCK] Borrador Hermes',
        },
      ],
      usage: {
        totalTokens: 0,
        promptTokens: 0,
        completionTokens: 0,
        estimatedCostUsd: 0,
        provider: 'mock',
        model: 'hermes-mock',
      },
      warnings: [],
      errors: [],
    })

    hermesMock.mapHermesResponseToGenerationState.mockReset()
    hermesMock.mapHermesResponseToGenerationState.mockImplementation((state, response) => ({
      contentDraft: response.channelVariants[0]?.draft,
      headline: response.channelVariants[0]?.title ?? state.topic,
      channelVariants: response.channelVariants.map((variant: { channel: string; platform: 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook'; language: 'es' | 'en'; draft: string; title?: string }) => ({
        channel: variant.channel,
        platform: variant.platform,
        language: variant.language,
        draft: variant.draft,
        title: variant.title,
        charCount: variant.draft.length,
        wordCount: variant.draft.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
        optimizedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        status: 'draft',
      })),
      usageSummary: {
        modelsUsed: [response.usage?.model ?? 'hermes-mock'],
        totalTokens: response.usage?.totalTokens ?? 0,
        inputTokens: response.usage?.promptTokens ?? 0,
        outputTokens: response.usage?.completionTokens ?? 0,
        estimatedCostUsd: response.usage?.estimatedCostUsd ?? 0,
      },
      phase: 'compliance',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
      errors: [],
    }))
  })

  it('returns 400 when required fields are missing', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(400)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.error).toContain('Missing required fields')
    expect(data.error).not.toContain('workspaceId')
  })

  it('uses workspace from getAuthenticatedWorkspace, ignoring workspaceId in body', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
      workspaceId: 'different-workspace-id',
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.jobId).toBeTruthy()
    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
    expect(learningStoreMock.getWorkspaceLearningGuidelines).toHaveBeenCalledWith(mockWorkspaceId)
    expect(generationJobsStoreMock.createGenerationJob).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.objectContaining({
        jobId: data.jobId,
        workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
        engine: 'current',
        inputState: expect.objectContaining({
          workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
        }),
      })
    )
  })

  it('returns 401 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 401 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Unauthorized', 401)
    )

    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(401)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Unauthorized' })
  })

  it('returns 403 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 403 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Forbidden', 403)
    )

    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(403)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Forbidden' })
  })

  it('queues a valid request and returns a job id immediately', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Mandarin Oriental abre en Punta Negra (Calvià)',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data).toMatchObject({
      jobId: expect.any(String),
      status: 'queued',
      phase: 'queued',
    })

    expect(workflowMock.start).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.any(Function), [data.jobId])
    expect(generationJobsStoreMock.attachWorkflowRun).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      data.jobId,
      'wrun_test_123'
    )
  })

  it('uses the current pipeline by default when engine is omitted', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Default Engine Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.engine).toBe('current')
  })

  it('accepts optional fields and still queues the job', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'andratx',
      framing: 'luxury_investment',
      targetAudience: 'owners',
      channels: ['linkedin_es'],
      customGuidelines: [
        {
          scope: 'all',
          text: 'Keep it professional',
        },
      ],
      overrideModel: {
        modelId: 'google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview',
        scope: 'specific',
        channels: ['linkedin_es'],
      },
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.jobId).toBeTruthy()
    expect(data.phase).toBe('queued')
  })

  it('returns 400 for an invalid engine', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
      engine: 'invalid-engine',
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(400)
    await expect(response.json()).resolves.toMatchObject({
      error: expect.stringContaining('Invalid engine'),
    })
  })

  it('queues hermes-mock requests and exposes the selected engine', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
      engine: 'hermes-mock',
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data).toMatchObject({
      jobId: expect.any(String),
      status: 'queued',
      phase: 'queued',
      engine: 'hermes-mock',
    })
  })

  it('queues hermes requests for the workflow worker step', async () => {
    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
      engine: 'hermes',
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.engine).toBe('hermes')
    expect(generationJobsStoreMock.createGenerationJob).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.objectContaining({
        engine: 'hermes',
        workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
      })
    )
  })

  it('uses CONTENT_GENERATION_ENGINE when the request omits engine', async () => {
    process.env.CONTENT_GENERATION_ENGINE = 'hermes-mock'

    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Env Engine Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(202)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.engine).toBe('hermes-mock')
  })

  it('marks the persisted job as failed when workflow start fails', async () => {
    workflowMock.start.mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error('Workflow offline'))

    const req = createRequest({
      topic: 'Workflow failure topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
    })

    const response = await POST(req)
    expect(response.status).toBe(500)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data.error).toBe('Internal server error')
    expect(generationJobsStoreMock.updateGenerationJobProgress).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      expect.any(String),
      expect.objectContaining({
        status: 'failed',
        phase: 'error',
      })
    )
  })

  it('queues requests for every supported zone', async () => {
    const zones = [
      'calvià',
      'andratx',
      'palma',
      'suroeste_general',
      'toda_mallorca',
      'son_vida',
      'portals_bendinat',
      'port_dandratx',
      'santa_ponsa',
      'costa_de_la_calma_paguera',
    ]

    for (const zone of zones) {
      const req = createRequest({
        topic: `Content for ${zone}`,
        zone,
        framing: 'market_analysis',
        targetAudience: 'investors',
        channels: ['blog_es'],
      })

      const response = await POST(req)
      expect(response.status).toBe(202)
    }
  })

  it('queues requests for every supported framing', async () => {
    const framings = [
      'market_analysis',
      'market_signal',
      'investment_criteria',
      'luxury_investment',
      'lifestyle',
      'off_market',
      'owner_acquisition',
      'strategic_partners',
      'architecture_sustainability',
      'regulation_scarcity',
    ]

    for (const framing of framings) {
      const req = createRequest({
        topic: `Content with ${framing} framing`,
        zone: 'calvià',
        framing,
        targetAudience: 'investors',
        channels: ['blog_es'],
      })

      const response = await POST(req)
      expect(response.status).toBe(202)
    }
  })

  it('queues requests for every supported target audience', async () => {
    const audiences = [
      'investors',
      'owners',
      'partners',
      'international_buyers',
      'family_offices',
      'relocation_expat_premium',
      'mixed_qualified_audience',
    ]

    for (const targetAudience of audiences) {
      const req = createRequest({
        topic: `Content for ${targetAudience}`,
        zone: 'calvià',
        framing: 'market_analysis',
        targetAudience,
        channels: ['blog_es'],
      })

      const response = await POST(req)
      expect(response.status).toBe(202)
    }
  })
})



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/ingest/route.ts
================================================
/**
 * ANCLORA CONTENT GENERATOR AI - Ingest Content API (Neon)
 * Feature: ANCLORA-FEAT-API-ROUTES
 * Endpoint: POST /api/content/ingest-neon
 * Description: Ingesta documentos/URLs y genera chunks con embeddings (Neon)
 * Author: Anclorabot
 * Date: 2026-03-19
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { sourceCategoryEnum } from '@/lib/db/schema'
import { createIndexedSource } from '@/lib/rag/source-ingestion'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

interface IngestRequest {
  title: string
  sourceType: 'document' | 'url' | 'rss' | 'manual' | 'api'
  sourceCategory?: (typeof sourceCategoryEnum.enumValues)[number]
  content?: string
  sourceUrl?: string
  metadata?: Record<string, unknown>
}

function resolveSourceCategory(category?: string) {
  return sourceCategoryEnum.enumValues.includes(category as (typeof sourceCategoryEnum.enumValues)[number])
    ? (category as (typeof sourceCategoryEnum.enumValues)[number])
    : 'general'
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()

    // Parsear request
    const body: IngestRequest = await request.json()

    if (!body.title || !body.sourceType) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Faltan campos requeridos: title, sourceType' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    if (!body.content && !body.sourceUrl) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Debes proporcionar content o sourceUrl' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const source = await createIndexedSource({
      workspaceId,
      title: body.title,
      sourceType: body.sourceType,
      sourceCategory: resolveSourceCategory(body.sourceCategory),
      sourceUrl: body.sourceUrl,
      content: body.content || '',
      metadata: body.metadata || {},
    })

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      source,
    })

  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Ingest API] Error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Error interno del servidor', details: String(error) },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/learning/confirm/route.ts
================================================
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { confirmLearningProposal, getLearningProposal } from '@/lib/learning-store'

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body = await request.json()
    const { jobId, accept } = body as { jobId?: string; accept?: boolean }

    if (!jobId || typeof accept !== 'boolean') {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Missing required fields: jobId, accept' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    const proposal = await getLearningProposal(jobId)
    if (!proposal) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Learning proposal not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    const updated = await confirmLearningProposal(jobId, accept)

    return NextResponse.json({
      success: true,
      learningProposal: updated,
    })
  } catch (error) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Failed to confirm learning proposal', details: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error) },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/library/route.ts
================================================
import { and, asc, desc, eq, inArray, sql } from 'drizzle-orm'
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { db } from '@/lib/db/neon'
import { contentMetrics, generatedContent, leadTracking, scheduledPosts } from '@/lib/db/schema'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

type EditorialAction =
  | 'review'
  | 'approve'
  | 'publish'
  | 'schedule'
  | 'unschedule'
  | 'archive'
  | 'dispatch'
  | 'retry_delivery'

type UpdateRequest = {
  id?: string
  action?: EditorialAction
  scheduledFor?: string
}

function mapContentTypeToPlatform(contentType: string) {
  switch (contentType) {
    case 'linkedin':
    case 'instagram':
    case 'facebook':
    case 'blog':
    case 'newsletter':
      return contentType
    case 'custom':
    default:
      return 'blog'
  }
}

function clampLimit(rawLimit: string | null) {
  const parsed = Number.parseInt(rawLimit ?? '12', 10)
  if (Number.isNaN(parsed)) return 12
  return Math.min(Math.max(parsed, 1), 50)
}

function buildPlatformPostId(platform: string) {
  return `manual-${platform}-${Date.now()}`
}

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const limit = clampLimit(request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('limit'))
    const statusFilter = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('status')
    const contentTypeFilter = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('contentType')

    const contentConditions = [eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)]
    if (statusFilter) {
      contentConditions.push(eq(generatedContent.status, statusFilter as typeof generatedContent.status.enumValues[number]))
    }
    if (contentTypeFilter) {
      contentConditions.push(eq(generatedContent.contentType, contentTypeFilter as typeof generatedContent.contentType.enumValues[number]))
    }

    const [items, scheduledQueue, deliveryQueue] = await Promise.all([
      db.query.generatedContent.findMany({
        where: contentConditions.length === 1 ? contentConditions[0] : and(...contentConditions),
        orderBy: [desc(generatedContent.updatedAt)],
        limit,
        columns: {
          id: true,
          title: true,
          content: true,
          contentType: true,
          status: true,
          createdAt: true,
          updatedAt: true,
          scheduledFor: true,
          publishedAt: true,
          opportunityId: true,
          microZoneId: true,
        },
        with: {
          microZone: {
            columns: {
              id: true,
              name: true,
              municipality: true,
            },
          },
        },
      }),
      db
        .select({
          id: scheduledPosts.id,
          contentId: scheduledPosts.contentId,
          platform: scheduledPosts.platform,
          scheduledFor: scheduledPosts.scheduledFor,
          status: scheduledPosts.status,
          title: generatedContent.title,
          contentType: generatedContent.contentType,
        })
        .from(scheduledPosts)
        .innerJoin(generatedContent, eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, generatedContent.id))
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
            eq(scheduledPosts.status, 'pending')
          )
        )
        .orderBy(asc(scheduledPosts.scheduledFor))
        .limit(limit),
      db
        .select({
          id: scheduledPosts.id,
          contentId: scheduledPosts.contentId,
          platform: scheduledPosts.platform,
          scheduledFor: scheduledPosts.scheduledFor,
          status: scheduledPosts.status,
          retryCount: scheduledPosts.retryCount,
          lastError: scheduledPosts.lastError,
          publishedAt: scheduledPosts.publishedAt,
          platformPostId: scheduledPosts.platformPostId,
          title: generatedContent.title,
          contentType: generatedContent.contentType,
        })
        .from(scheduledPosts)
        .innerJoin(generatedContent, eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, generatedContent.id))
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
            inArray(scheduledPosts.status, ['pending', 'processing', 'failed', 'published'])
          )
        )
        .orderBy(desc(scheduledPosts.scheduledFor))
        .limit(limit),
    ])

    const contentIds = items.map((item) => item.id)

    const [performanceRows, leadRows] = contentIds.length
      ? await Promise.all([
          db
            .select({
              contentId: contentMetrics.contentId,
              views: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${contentMetrics.views}), 0)`,
              impressions: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${contentMetrics.impressions}), 0)`,
              clicks: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${contentMetrics.clicks}), 0)`,
              leadsGenerated: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${contentMetrics.leadsGenerated}), 0)`,
              conversions: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${contentMetrics.conversions}), 0)`,
              engagementRate: sql<number>`COALESCE(AVG(${contentMetrics.engagementRate}), 0)`,
            })
            .from(contentMetrics)
            .where(
              and(
                eq(contentMetrics.workspaceId, workspaceId),
                inArray(contentMetrics.contentId, contentIds)
              )
            )
            .groupBy(contentMetrics.contentId),
          db
            .select({
              contentId: leadTracking.contentId,
              leadsTracked: sql<number>`COUNT(*)`,
              convertedLeads: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.status} = 'converted')`,
              newLeads: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.status} = 'new')`,
              contactedLeads: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.status} = 'contacted')`,
              qualifiedLeads: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.status} = 'qualified')`,
              lostLeads: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.status} = 'lost')`,
              scoreA: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.score} = 'A')`,
              scoreB: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.score} = 'B')`,
              scoreC: sql<number>`COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ${leadTracking.score} = 'C')`,
            })
            .from(leadTracking)
            .where(
              and(
                eq(leadTracking.workspaceId, workspaceId),
                inArray(leadTracking.contentId, contentIds)
              )
            )
            .groupBy(leadTracking.contentId),
        ])
      : [[], []]

    const performanceByContent = new Map(
      performanceRows.map((row) => [
        row.contentId,
        {
          views: Number(row.views ?? 0),
          impressions: Number(row.impressions ?? 0),
          clicks: Number(row.clicks ?? 0),
          leadsGenerated: Number(row.leadsGenerated ?? 0),
          conversions: Number(row.conversions ?? 0),
          engagementRate: Number(row.engagementRate ?? 0),
        },
      ])
    )

    const leadsByContent = new Map(
      leadRows.map((row) => [
        row.contentId,
        {
          leadsTracked: Number(row.leadsTracked ?? 0),
          convertedLeads: Number(row.convertedLeads ?? 0),
          newLeads: Number(row.newLeads ?? 0),
          contactedLeads: Number(row.contactedLeads ?? 0),
          qualifiedLeads: Number(row.qualifiedLeads ?? 0),
          lostLeads: Number(row.lostLeads ?? 0),
          scoreA: Number(row.scoreA ?? 0),
          scoreB: Number(row.scoreB ?? 0),
          scoreC: Number(row.scoreC ?? 0),
        },
      ])
    )

    const enrichedItems = items.map((item) => ({
      ...item,
      microZone: item.microZone
        ? {
            id: item.microZone.id,
            name: item.microZone.name,
            municipality: item.microZone.municipality,
          }
        : null,
      performance: {
        views: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.views ?? 0,
        impressions: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.impressions ?? 0,
        clicks: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.clicks ?? 0,
        leadsGenerated: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.leadsGenerated ?? 0,
        conversions: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.conversions ?? 0,
        engagementRate: performanceByContent.get(item.id)?.engagementRate ?? 0,
        leadsTracked: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.leadsTracked ?? 0,
        convertedLeads: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.convertedLeads ?? 0,
        leadStatus: {
          new: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.newLeads ?? 0,
          contacted: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.contactedLeads ?? 0,
          qualified: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.qualifiedLeads ?? 0,
          lost: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.lostLeads ?? 0,
        },
        leadScore: {
          A: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.scoreA ?? 0,
          B: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.scoreB ?? 0,
          C: leadsByContent.get(item.id)?.scoreC ?? 0,
        },
      },
    }))

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, items: enrichedItems, scheduledQueue, deliveryQueue })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Content Library GET]', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Error al obtener la libreria editorial' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}

export async function PATCH(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const body = (await request.json()) as UpdateRequest

    if (!body.id || !body.action) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'id y action son requeridos' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const existing = await db.query.generatedContent.findFirst({
      where: and(
        eq(generatedContent.id, body.id),
        eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
      ),
      columns: {
        id: true,
        title: true,
        contentType: true,
        status: true,
        scheduledFor: true,
      },
    })

    if (!existing) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Pieza no encontrada' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    if (body.action === 'schedule') {
      if (!body.scheduledFor) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'scheduledFor es requerido para programar' }, { status: 400 })
      }

      const scheduledAt = new Date(body.scheduledFor)
      if (Number.isNaN(scheduledAt.getTime())) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'scheduledFor no es una fecha valida' }, { status: 400 })
      }

      const pendingSchedule = await db.query.scheduledPosts.findFirst({
        where: and(
          eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
          eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, existing.id),
          eq(scheduledPosts.status, 'pending')
        ),
        columns: {
          id: true,
        },
      })

      if (pendingSchedule) {
        await db
          .update(scheduledPosts)
          .set({
            platform: mapContentTypeToPlatform(existing.contentType),
            scheduledFor: scheduledAt,
            updatedAt: new Date(),
          })
          .where(
            and(
              eq(scheduledPosts.id, pendingSchedule.id),
              eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId)
            )
          )
      } else {
        await db.insert(scheduledPosts).values({
          workspaceId,
          contentId: existing.id,
          platform: mapContentTypeToPlatform(existing.contentType),
          scheduledFor: scheduledAt,
          status: 'pending',
        })
      }

      const [scheduled] = await db
        .update(generatedContent)
        .set({
          status: 'scheduled',
          scheduledFor: scheduledAt,
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(generatedContent.id, existing.id),
            eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )
        .returning()

      return NextResponse.json({ success: true, item: scheduled })
    }

    if (body.action === 'dispatch') {
      const queuedPost = await db.query.scheduledPosts.findFirst({
        where: and(
          eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
          eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, existing.id),
          inArray(scheduledPosts.status, ['pending', 'failed'])
        ),
        orderBy: [asc(scheduledPosts.scheduledFor)],
        columns: {
          id: true,
          platform: true,
          retryCount: true,
        },
      })

      if (!queuedPost) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No hay entrega pendiente o fallida para esta pieza' }, { status: 400 })
      }

      await db
        .update(scheduledPosts)
        .set({
          status: 'processing',
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.id, queuedPost.id),
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )

      const publishedAt = new Date()
      const platformPostId = buildPlatformPostId(queuedPost.platform)

      await db
        .update(scheduledPosts)
        .set({
          status: 'published',
          publishedAt,
          platformPostId,
          platformResponse: {
            mode: 'manual-assist',
            deliveredBy: 'operator',
            deliveredAt: publishedAt.toISOString(),
          },
          updatedAt: publishedAt,
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.id, queuedPost.id),
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )

      const [published] = await db
        .update(generatedContent)
        .set({
          status: 'published',
          publishedAt,
          scheduledFor: null,
          updatedAt: publishedAt,
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(generatedContent.id, existing.id),
            eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )
        .returning()

      return NextResponse.json({ success: true, item: published })
    }

    if (body.action === 'retry_delivery') {
      const failedPost = await db.query.scheduledPosts.findFirst({
        where: and(
          eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
          eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, existing.id),
          eq(scheduledPosts.status, 'failed')
        ),
        orderBy: [desc(scheduledPosts.updatedAt)],
        columns: {
          id: true,
          retryCount: true,
        },
      })

      if (!failedPost) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No hay una entrega fallida para reintentar' }, { status: 400 })
      }

      await db
        .update(scheduledPosts)
        .set({
          status: 'pending',
          retryCount: failedPost.retryCount + 1,
          lastError: null,
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.id, failedPost.id),
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )

      const [rescheduled] = await db
        .update(generatedContent)
        .set({
          status: 'scheduled',
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(generatedContent.id, existing.id),
            eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )
        .returning()

      return NextResponse.json({ success: true, item: rescheduled })
    }

    if (body.action === 'unschedule') {
      await db
        .update(scheduledPosts)
        .set({
          status: 'cancelled',
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
            eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, existing.id),
            eq(scheduledPosts.status, 'pending')
          )
        )

      const [unscheduled] = await db
        .update(generatedContent)
        .set({
          status: 'approved',
          scheduledFor: null,
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(generatedContent.id, existing.id),
            eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
          )
        )
        .returning()

      return NextResponse.json({ success: true, item: unscheduled })
    }

    const nextStatus =
      body.action === 'review'
        ? 'review'
        : body.action === 'approve'
        ? 'approved'
        : body.action === 'publish'
        ? 'published'
        : 'archived'

    if (body.action === 'publish' || body.action === 'archive') {
      await db
        .update(scheduledPosts)
        .set({
          status: 'cancelled',
          updatedAt: new Date(),
        })
        .where(
          and(
            eq(scheduledPosts.workspaceId, workspaceId),
            eq(scheduledPosts.contentId, existing.id),
            eq(scheduledPosts.status, 'pending')
          )
        )
    }

    const [updated] = await db
      .update(generatedContent)
      .set({
        status: nextStatus,
        publishedAt: body.action === 'publish' ? new Date() : null,
        scheduledFor: body.action === 'publish' || body.action === 'archive' ? null : undefined,
        updatedAt: new Date(),
      })
      .where(
        and(
          eq(generatedContent.id, existing.id),
          eq(generatedContent.workspaceId, workspaceId)
        )
      )
      .returning()

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, item: updated })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Content Library PATCH]', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Error al actualizar el estado editorial' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/linkedin/publish/route.ts
================================================
/**
 * POST /api/content/linkedin/publish
 * Publish approved LinkedIn content after user review
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getJob, updateJob } from '@/lib/job-store'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { createLearningProposal } from '@/lib/learning-store'
import { getEditorialDraftById, updateEditorialDraftVariant } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { getGenerationJobByJobId, updateGenerationJobProgress } from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store'

interface PublishRequest {
  jobId: string
  draftId?: string
  channel: 'linkedin_es' | 'linkedin_en'
  content: string
}

// LinkedIn Publisher
async function publishLinkedIn(draft: string): Promise<string> {
  const token = process.env.LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN
  const personId = process.env.LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID

  if (!token || !personId) {
    throw new Error('LinkedIn credentials not configured')
  }

  const body = {
    author: `urn:li:person:${personId}`,
    lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED',
    specificContent: {
      'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': {
        shareCommentary: { text: draft.slice(0, 2800) },
        shareMediaCategory: 'NONE',
      },
    },
    visibility: {
      'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC',
    },
  }

  const res = await fetch('https://api.linkedin.com/v2/ugcPosts', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'X-Restli-Protocol-Version': '2.0.0',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  })

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(`LinkedIn API error ${res.status}: ${await res.text()}`)
  }

  const data = await res.json()
  return `https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/${data.id}/`
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body: PublishRequest = await request.json()

    // Validate required fields
    if (!body.jobId || !body.channel || !body.content) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Missing required fields: jobId, channel, content' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // Validate content length
    if (body.content.length > 2800) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Content exceeds LinkedIn limit (2800 characters)' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // 1. Resolver workspace autenticado
    let authenticatedWorkspaceId: string
    try {
      const auth = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
      authenticatedWorkspaceId = auth.workspaceId
    } catch (error) {
      if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
        return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
      }
      throw error
    }

    // 2. Obtener job y validar pertenencia
    const persistedJob = await getGenerationJobByJobId(authenticatedWorkspaceId, body.jobId)
    const existingJob = getJob(body.jobId)
    let state =
      persistedJob?.resultState ??
      persistedJob?.inputState ??
      (existingJob?.result as ContentGenerationState | undefined)

    const persistedDraft =
      body.draftId ? await getEditorialDraftById(authenticatedWorkspaceId, body.draftId) : null

    if (!state && persistedDraft) {
      state = {
        topic: persistedDraft.topic ?? persistedDraft.headline ?? 'Sin tema',
        zone: (persistedDraft.zone ?? 'toda_mallorca') as ContentGenerationState['zone'],
        framing: (persistedDraft.framing ?? 'market_analysis') as ContentGenerationState['framing'],
        targetAudience: (persistedDraft.targetAudience ?? 'mixed_qualified_audience') as ContentGenerationState['targetAudience'],
        channels: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number]),
        workspaceId: persistedDraft.workspaceId,
        jobId: persistedDraft.jobId ?? persistedDraft.id,
        draftId: persistedDraft.id,
        contentDraft: persistedDraft.variants[0]?.editedDraft || persistedDraft.variants[0]?.draft || '',
        headline: persistedDraft.headline ?? persistedDraft.topic ?? undefined,
        channelVariants: persistedDraft.variants.map((variant) => ({
          channel: variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number],
          platform: variant.platform as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
          language: variant.language as 'es' | 'en',
          draft: variant.draft,
          editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? undefined,
          title: variant.title ?? undefined,
          excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? undefined,
          hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? undefined,
          seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? undefined,
          seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? undefined,
          charCount: variant.charCount,
          wordCount: variant.wordCount ?? undefined,
          optimizedAt: variant.updatedAt.toISOString(),
          status:
            variant.status === 'published'
              ? 'approved'
              : (variant.status as 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'),
          complianceWarnings: (variant.complianceWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
          qualityWarnings: (variant.qualityWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
          imageBase64: undefined,
        })),
        usageSummary: (persistedDraft.usageSummary ?? undefined) as ContentGenerationState['usageSummary'],
        approvalStatus:
          persistedDraft.status === 'published_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'published_partial'
            ? 'published'
            : persistedDraft.status === 'approved_all' || persistedDraft.status === 'approved_partial'
              ? 'approved'
              : persistedDraft.status === 'archived'
                ? 'rejected'
                : 'draft',
        publicationUrls: Object.fromEntries(
          persistedDraft.variants
            .filter((variant) => variant.publishedUrl)
            .map((variant) => [variant.channel, variant.publishedUrl as string])
        ),
        phase: 'done',
        createdAt: persistedDraft.createdAt.toISOString(),
        errors: [],
      }
    }

    if (!state?.workspaceId || state.workspaceId !== authenticatedWorkspaceId) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Job not found' }, { status: 404 })
    }

    // 3. Validar que el job está aprobado para publicación
    if (state.approvalStatus !== 'approved') {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Job not approved for publication' }, { status: 403 })
    }

    // 3.1 Validar que la variante del canal existe y está aprobada
    const variant = state.channelVariants?.find(v => v.channel === body.channel)
    if (!variant) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Channel variant not found' }, { status: 403 })
    }
    if (variant.status !== 'approved') {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Channel variant not approved' }, { status: 403 })
    }

    // 3.2 Validar que el contenido enviado coincide con el draft aprobado
    const allowedDraft = variant.editedDraft || variant.draft
    if (body.content !== allowedDraft) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Content does not match approved draft' }, { status: 422 })
    }

    // 4. Publicar en LinkedIn
    const url = await publishLinkedIn(body.content)

    if (state) {
      const nextState: ContentGenerationState = {
        ...state,
        approvalStatus: 'published',
        publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        publicationUrls: {
          ...(state.publicationUrls ?? {}),
          [body.channel]: url,
        },
        channelVariants: (state.channelVariants ?? []).map((variant) =>
          variant.channel === body.channel
            ? { ...variant, draft: body.content, charCount: body.content.length }
            : variant
        ),
      }

      if (existingJob) {
        updateJob(body.jobId, {
          status: 'completed',
          phase: nextState.phase,
          result: nextState,
        })
      }

      if (persistedDraft) {
        const persistedVariant = persistedDraft.variants.find((variant) => variant.channel === body.channel)
        if (persistedVariant) {
          await updateEditorialDraftVariant(authenticatedWorkspaceId, persistedDraft.id, persistedVariant.id, {
            draft: body.content,
            editedDraft: body.content,
            status: 'published',
            publishedUrl: url,
            publishedAt: new Date(),
          })
        }
      }

      await updateGenerationJobProgress(body.jobId, {
        status: 'completed',
        phase: nextState.phase,
        resultState: {
          ...nextState,
          draftId: persistedDraft?.id ?? nextState.draftId,
        },
        draftId: persistedDraft?.id ?? nextState.draftId ?? null,
        errorMessage: null,
      })

      const learningProposal = await createLearningProposal({
        jobId: body.jobId,
        workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
        originalDrafts: (state.channelVariants ?? [])
          .filter((variant) => variant.channel === body.channel)
          .map((variant) => ({ channel: variant.channel, draft: variant.draft })),
        editedDrafts: [{ channel: body.channel, draft: body.content }],
      })

      return NextResponse.json(
        {
          success: true,
          jobId: body.jobId,
          channel: body.channel,
          url,
          publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          learningProposal,
        },
        { status: 200 }
      )
    }

    console.log(`[API] LinkedIn published: ${body.channel} - ${body.jobId} - ${url}`)

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        success: true,
        jobId: body.jobId,
        channel: body.channel,
        url,
        publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      },
      { status: 200 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Publication failed'
    console.error('[API] LinkedIn publish error:', message)

    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: message },
      { status: error instanceof Error && message.includes('credentials') ? 401 : 500 }
    )
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/linkedin/publish/__tests__/publish.test.ts
================================================
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getAllJobs, getJob, setJob } from '@/lib/job-store'
import { createLearningProposal } from '@/lib/learning-store'
import { POST } from '../route'

const authMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getAuthenticatedWorkspace: vi.fn(),
}))

const learningStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  createLearningProposal: vi.fn(),
}))

const generationJobsStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getGenerationJobByJobId: vi.fn(),
  updateGenerationJobProgress: vi.fn(),
}))

vi.mock('@/lib/auth/workspace', () => {
  class MockWorkspaceAuthError extends Error {
    status: number

    constructor(message: string, status = 401) {
      super(message)
      this.name = 'WorkspaceAuthError'
      this.status = status
    }
  }

  return {
    WorkspaceAuthError: MockWorkspaceAuthError,
    getAuthenticatedWorkspace: authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace,
  }
})

vi.mock('@/lib/learning-store', () => ({
  createLearningProposal: learningStoreMock.createLearningProposal,
}))

vi.mock('@/lib/generation-jobs-store', () => ({
  getGenerationJobByJobId: generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId,
  updateGenerationJobProgress: generationJobsStoreMock.updateGenerationJobProgress,
}))

describe('POST /api/content/linkedin/publish', () => {
  const mockWorkspaceId = 'workspace-authenticated'
  const approvedContent = 'Approved LinkedIn content'

  const createRequest = (body: Record<string, unknown>) =>
    new NextRequest('http://localhost:3000/api/content/linkedin/publish', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
    })

  const createState = (
    overrides: Partial<ContentGenerationState> = {}
  ): ContentGenerationState =>
    ({
      jobId: 'job-approved',
      workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['linkedin_es'],
      researchDoc: undefined,
      citations: [],
      researchConfidence: 0,
      contentDraft: approvedContent,
      wordCount: approvedContent.split(/\s+/).length,
      toneScore: 0,
      headline: 'Test Topic',
      channelVariants: [
        {
            channel: 'linkedin_es',
            platform: 'linkedin',
            language: 'es',
            draft: approvedContent,
            status: 'approved',
            charCount: approvedContent.length,
            wordCount: approvedContent.split(/\s+/).length,
            optimizedAt: '2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z',
        },
        ],
      complianceReport: undefined,
      publicationUrls: {},
      publishedAt: undefined,
      usageSummary: {
        modelsUsed: [],
        totalTokens: 0,
        inputTokens: 0,
        outputTokens: 0,
        estimatedCostUsd: 0,
      },
      phase: 'done',
      approvalStatus: 'approved',
      createdAt: '2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z',
      errors: [],
      ...overrides,
    }) as ContentGenerationState

  const createJob = (
    jobId: string,
    stateOverrides: Partial<ContentGenerationState> = {}
  ) => {
    setJob(jobId, {
      id: jobId,
      status: 'completed',
      phase: 'done',
      result: createState({
        jobId,
        ...stateOverrides,
      }),
      createdAt: '2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z',
    })
  }

  beforeEach(() => {
    getAllJobs().clear()

    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockReset()
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockResolvedValue({
      userId: 'test-user',
      workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
    })

    learningStoreMock.createLearningProposal.mockReset()
    learningStoreMock.createLearningProposal.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'learning-proposal-1',
      jobId: 'job-approved',
    })

    generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId.mockReset()
    generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId.mockResolvedValue(null)
    generationJobsStoreMock.updateGenerationJobProgress.mockReset()
    generationJobsStoreMock.updateGenerationJobProgress.mockResolvedValue(null)

    process.env.LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN = 'test-linkedin-token'
    process.env.LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID = 'test-person-id'

    vi.stubGlobal(
      'fetch',
      vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({
        ok: true,
        json: async () => ({ id: 'urn:li:share:test-post' }),
      })
    )
  })

  it('returns 400 when required fields are missing', async () => {
    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-approved',
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(400)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
      error: 'Missing required fields: jobId, channel, content',
    })
    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 400 when content exceeds LinkedIn limit', async () => {
    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-approved',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: 'x'.repeat(2801),
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(400)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
      error: 'Content exceeds LinkedIn limit (2800 characters)',
    })
    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 401 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 401 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Unauthorized', 401)
    )

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-approved',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(401)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Unauthorized' })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 403 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 403 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Forbidden', 403)
    )

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-approved',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(403)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Forbidden' })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 404 when job does not exist', async () => {
    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'missing-job',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(404)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Job not found' })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 404 when job belongs to another workspace', async () => {
    createJob('job-other-workspace', {
      workspaceId: 'workspace-other',
    })

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-other-workspace',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(404)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Job not found' })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 403 when job is not approved for publication', async () => {
    createJob('job-draft', {
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
    })

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-draft',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(403)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
      error: 'Job not approved for publication',
    })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 403 when channel variant does not exist', async () => {
    createJob('job-no-variant', {
      channelVariants: [],
    })

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-no-variant',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(403)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
      error: 'Channel variant not found',
    })
    expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 403 when channel variant is not approved', async () => {
  createJob('job-variant-draft', {
    channelVariants: [
      {
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        platform: 'linkedin',
        language: 'es',
        draft: approvedContent,
        status: 'draft',
        charCount: approvedContent.length,
        wordCount: approvedContent.split(/\s+/).length,
        optimizedAt: '2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z',
      },
    ],
  })

  const response = await POST(
    createRequest({
      jobId: 'job-variant-draft',
      channel: 'linkedin_es',
      content: approvedContent,
    })
  )

  expect(response.status).toBe(403)
  expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
    error: 'Channel variant not approved',
  })
  expect(fetch).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
})

  it('publishes when job, workspace, approval and content match', async () => {
    createJob('job-approved')

    const response = await POST(
      createRequest({
        jobId: 'job-approved',
        channel: 'linkedin_es',
        content: approvedContent,
      })
    )

    expect(response.status).toBe(200)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data).toMatchObject({
      success: true,
      jobId: 'job-approved',
      channel: 'linkedin_es',
      url: 'https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:test-post/',
      learningProposal: {
        id: 'learning-proposal-1',
        jobId: 'job-approved',
      },
    })

    expect(fetch).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
    expect(createLearningProposal).toHaveBeenCalledWith({
      jobId: 'job-approved',
      workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
      originalDrafts: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          draft: approvedContent,
        },
      ],
      editedDrafts: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          draft: approvedContent,
        },
      ],
    })

    const updatedJob = getJob('job-approved')
    const updatedState = updatedJob?.result as ContentGenerationState

    expect(updatedJob?.status).toBe('completed')
    expect(updatedState.approvalStatus).toBe('published')
    expect(updatedState.publicationUrls?.linkedin_es).toBe(
      'https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/urn:li:share:test-post/'
    )
  })
})

/**
 * GET /api/content/metrics
 * Get analytics and engagement metrics for published content
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

interface MetricsResponse {
  publicationId?: string
  channel?: string
  linkedinLikes?: number
  linkedinComments?: number
  linkedinImpressions?: number
  emailOpens?: number
  emailClicks?: number
  blogPageviews?: number
  ctr?: number
  engagementRate?: number
  lastUpdated: string
}

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const searchParams = request.nextUrl.searchParams
    const publicationId = searchParams.get('publication_id')

    if (!publicationId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'publication_id parameter required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // TODO: Query metrics from database
    // TODO: Fetch real-time metrics from LinkedIn, SendGrid, GA4

    const mockMetrics: MetricsResponse = {
      publicationId,
      linkedinLikes: 42,
      linkedinComments: 8,
      linkedinImpressions: 1240,
      emailOpens: 156,
      emailClicks: 23,
      blogPageviews: 89,
      ctr: 14.7,
      engagementRate: 4.1,
      lastUpdated: new Date().toISOString(),
    }

    return NextResponse.json(mockMetrics, { status: 200 })
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('GET /api/content/metrics error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Failed to fetch metrics' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

/**
 * POST /api/content/reject
 * Reject a content draft with optional reason
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

interface RejectRequest {
  draftId: string
  reason?: string
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const body: RejectRequest = await request.json()

    if (!body.draftId) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'draftId required' },
        { status: 400 }
      )
    }

    // TODO: Update draft status in database
    // TODO: Store rejection reason
    // TODO: Notify content creator
    // TODO: Log rejection in audit log

    return NextResponse.json(
      {
        draftId: body.draftId,
        status: 'rejected',
        reason: body.reason || 'No reason provided',
        message: 'Draft rejected',
      },
      { status: 200 }
    )
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('POST /api/content/reject error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Rejection failed' },
      { status: 500 }
    )
  }
}

FILE: src/app/api/content/status/route.ts
================================================
/**
 * GET /api/content/status
 * Poll for content generation job status
 */

import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import { getLearningProposal } from '@/lib/learning-store'
import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { getEditorialDraftByJobId } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'
import { getGenerationJobByJobId } from '@/lib/generation-jobs-store'

function mapPersistedDraftToGenerationState(
  draft: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getEditorialDraftByJobId>> extends infer T
    ? NonNullable<T>
    : never
): ContentGenerationState & { draftId: string } {
  const assetUrlByVariantId = new Map(
    draft.assets
      .filter((asset) => asset.variantId)
      .map((asset) => [asset.variantId!, `/api/content/assets/${asset.id}`])
  )

  const variants = draft.variants.map((variant) => ({
    channel: variant.channel as ContentGenerationState['channels'][number],
    platform: variant.platform as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
    language: variant.language as 'es' | 'en',
    draft: variant.draft,
    editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? undefined,
    title: variant.title ?? undefined,
    excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? undefined,
    hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? undefined,
    seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? undefined,
    seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? undefined,
    charCount: variant.charCount,
    wordCount: variant.wordCount ?? undefined,
    optimizedAt: variant.updatedAt.toISOString(),
    imageBase64: assetUrlByVariantId.get(variant.id),
    status:
      variant.status === 'published'
        ? 'approved'
        : (variant.status as 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'),
    complianceWarnings: (variant.complianceWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
    qualityWarnings: (variant.qualityWarnings as string[] | null) ?? undefined,
  }))

  return {
    topic: draft.topic ?? draft.headline ?? 'Sin tema',
    zone: (draft.zone ?? 'toda_mallorca') as ContentGenerationState['zone'],
    framing: (draft.framing ?? 'market_analysis') as ContentGenerationState['framing'],
    targetAudience: (draft.targetAudience ?? 'mixed_qualified_audience') as ContentGenerationState['targetAudience'],
    channels: variants.map((variant) => variant.channel),
    workspaceId: draft.workspaceId,
    jobId: draft.jobId ?? draft.id,
    contentDraft: variants[0]?.editedDraft || variants[0]?.draft || '',
    headline: draft.headline ?? draft.topic ?? undefined,
    channelVariants: variants,
    publicationUrls: Object.fromEntries(
      draft.variants
        .filter((variant) => variant.publishedUrl)
        .map((variant) => [variant.channel, variant.publishedUrl as string])
    ),
    usageSummary: (draft.usageSummary ?? undefined) as ContentGenerationState['usageSummary'],
    approvalStatus:
      draft.status === 'published_all' || draft.status === 'published_partial'
        ? 'published'
        : draft.status === 'archived'
          ? 'rejected'
          : draft.status === 'approved_all' || draft.status === 'approved_partial'
            ? 'approved'
            : 'draft',
    phase: 'done',
    createdAt: draft.createdAt.toISOString(),
    errors: [],
    draftId: draft.id,
  }
}

export async function GET(request: NextRequest) {
  let authenticatedWorkspaceId: string
  const jobId = request.nextUrl.searchParams.get('job_id')

  if (!jobId) {
    return NextResponse.json(
      { error: 'Missing required query parameter: job_id' },
      { status: 400 }
    )
  }

  // 1. Resolver workspace autenticado
  try {
    const auth = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    authenticatedWorkspaceId = auth.workspaceId
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }
    throw error
  }

  // 2. Obtener job persistido
  const job = await getGenerationJobByJobId(authenticatedWorkspaceId, jobId)

  if (!job) {
    let persistedDraft: Awaited<ReturnType<typeof getEditorialDraftByJobId>> | null = null

    try {
      persistedDraft = await getEditorialDraftByJobId(authenticatedWorkspaceId, jobId)
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('[GET /api/content/status] persisted draft lookup failed', {
        jobId,
        workspaceId: authenticatedWorkspaceId,
        message: error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error),
      })
    }

    if (!persistedDraft) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { error: 'Job not found' },
        { status: 404 }
      )
    }

    const persistedState = mapPersistedDraftToGenerationState(persistedDraft)

    return NextResponse.json({
      jobId,
      draftId: persistedDraft.id,
      engine: 'current',
      status: 'completed',
      phase: 'done',
      result: persistedState,
      learningProposal: await getLearningProposal(jobId),
      error: null,
      createdAt: persistedDraft.createdAt.toISOString(),
    })
  }

  const state = job.resultState ?? job.inputState

  return NextResponse.json({
    jobId,
    workflowRunId: job.workflowRunId ?? undefined,
    draftId: job.draftId ?? state?.draftId,
    engine: job.engine,
    status:
      job.status === 'queued'
        ? 'in_progress'
        : job.status === 'running'
          ? 'in_progress'
          : job.status,
    phase: job.phase,
    result: state,
    learningProposal: await getLearningProposal(jobId),
    error: job.errorMessage,
    createdAt: job.createdAt.toISOString(),
  })
}

FILE: src/app/api/content/status/__tests__/status.test.ts
================================================
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'
import { NextRequest } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { GET } from '../route'

const authMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getAuthenticatedWorkspace: vi.fn(),
}))

const learningStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getLearningProposal: vi.fn(),
}))

const generationJobsStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getGenerationJobByJobId: vi.fn(),
}))

const draftsStoreMock = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  getEditorialDraftByJobId: vi.fn(),
}))

vi.mock('@/lib/auth/workspace', () => {
  class MockWorkspaceAuthError extends Error {
    status: number

    constructor(message: string, status = 401) {
      super(message)
      this.name = 'WorkspaceAuthError'
      this.status = status
    }
  }

  return {
    WorkspaceAuthError: MockWorkspaceAuthError,
    getAuthenticatedWorkspace: authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace,
  }
})

vi.mock('@/lib/learning-store', () => ({
  getLearningProposal: learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal,
}))

vi.mock('@/lib/generation-jobs-store', () => ({
  getGenerationJobByJobId: generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId,
}))

vi.mock('@/lib/editorial-drafts-store', () => ({
  getEditorialDraftByJobId: draftsStoreMock.getEditorialDraftByJobId,
}))

describe('GET /api/content/status', () => {
  const mockWorkspaceId = 'workspace-authenticated'

  const createRequest = (jobId?: string) => {
    const url = jobId
      ? `http://localhost:3000/api/content/status?job_id=${jobId}`
      : 'http://localhost:3000/api/content/status'

    return new NextRequest(url, {
      method: 'GET',
    })
  }

  const createJobState = (
    workspaceId: string,
    overrides: Partial<ContentGenerationState> = {}
  ): ContentGenerationState =>
    ({
      jobId: 'job-id',
      workspaceId,
      topic: 'Test Topic',
      zone: 'calvià',
      framing: 'market_analysis',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['blog_es'],
      researchDoc: undefined,
      citations: [],
      researchConfidence: 0,
      contentDraft: undefined,
      wordCount: 0,
      toneScore: 0,
      headline: 'Test Topic',
      channelVariants: [],
      complianceReport: undefined,
      publicationUrls: {},
      publishedAt: undefined,
      usageSummary: {
        modelsUsed: [],
        totalTokens: 0,
        inputTokens: 0,
        outputTokens: 0,
        estimatedCostUsd: 0,
      },
      phase: 'done',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
      createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      errors: [],
      ...overrides,
    }) as ContentGenerationState

  beforeEach(() => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockReset()
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockResolvedValue({
      userId: 'test-user',
      workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
    })

    learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal.mockReset()
    learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal.mockResolvedValue(null)

    generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId.mockReset()
    generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId.mockResolvedValue(null)

    draftsStoreMock.getEditorialDraftByJobId.mockReset()
    draftsStoreMock.getEditorialDraftByJobId.mockResolvedValue(null)
  })

  it('returns 400 when job_id is missing', async () => {
    const response = await GET(createRequest())

    expect(response.status).toBe(400)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({
      error: 'Missing required query parameter: job_id',
    })
    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 401 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 401 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Unauthorized', 401)
    )

    const response = await GET(createRequest('job-unauthorized'))

    expect(response.status).toBe(401)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Unauthorized' })
  })

  it('returns 403 when WorkspaceAuthError with status 403 is thrown', async () => {
    authMock.getAuthenticatedWorkspace.mockRejectedValue(
      new WorkspaceAuthError('Forbidden', 403)
    )

    const response = await GET(createRequest('job-forbidden'))

    expect(response.status).toBe(403)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Forbidden' })
  })

  it('returns 404 when job does not exist', async () => {
    const response = await GET(createRequest('missing-job'))

    expect(response.status).toBe(404)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Job not found' })
    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
  })

  it('returns 404 when job belongs to another workspace', async () => {
    const response = await GET(createRequest('job-other-workspace'))

    expect(response.status).toBe(404)
    expect(await response.json()).toMatchObject({ error: 'Job not found' })
    expect(learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('returns 200 when job belongs to authenticated workspace', async () => {
    const state = createJobState(mockWorkspaceId, {
      jobId: 'job-authenticated-workspace',
      phase: 'done',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
    })

    generationJobsStoreMock.getGenerationJobByJobId.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'generation-job-1',
      jobId: 'job-authenticated-workspace',
      workflowRunId: 'wrun_123',
      workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
      engine: 'current',
      status: 'completed',
      phase: 'done',
      inputState: state,
      resultState: state,
      draftId: null,
      errorMessage: null,
      startedAt: new Date('2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z'),
      finishedAt: new Date('2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z'),
      createdAt: new Date('2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z'),
      updatedAt: new Date('2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z'),
    })

    learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal.mockResolvedValue({
      id: 'learning-proposal-1',
      jobId: 'job-authenticated-workspace',
    })

    const response = await GET(createRequest('job-authenticated-workspace'))

    expect(response.status).toBe(200)

    const data = await response.json()
    expect(data).toMatchObject({
      jobId: 'job-authenticated-workspace',
      workflowRunId: 'wrun_123',
      status: 'completed',
      phase: 'done',
      result: {
        workspaceId: mockWorkspaceId,
      },
      learningProposal: {
        id: 'learning-proposal-1',
        jobId: 'job-authenticated-workspace',
      },
      createdAt: '2026-04-29T00:00:00.000Z',
    })

    expect(getAuthenticatedWorkspace).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
    expect(learningStoreMock.getLearningProposal).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      'job-authenticated-workspace'
    )
  })
})



================================================
FILE: src/app/api/content/templates/route.ts
================================================
import { asc, eq } from 'drizzle-orm'
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server'

import { getAuthenticatedWorkspace, WorkspaceAuthError } from '@/lib/auth/workspace'
import { db } from '@/lib/db/neon'
import { contentTemplates } from '@/lib/db/schema'

export const runtime = 'nodejs'

export async function GET() {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()

    const templates = await db.query.contentTemplates.findMany({
      where: eq(contentTemplates.workspaceId, workspaceId),
      orderBy: [asc(contentTemplates.name)],
    })

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, templates })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Content Templates API] GET error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No se pudieron cargar las plantillas' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}

export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
  try {
    const { workspaceId } = await getAuthenticatedWorkspace()
    const body = (await request.json()) as {
      name?: string
      contentType?: 'blog' | 'linkedin' | 'instagram' | 'facebook' | 'newsletter' | 'custom'
      systemPrompt?: string
      description?: string
    }

    if (!body.name?.trim() || !body.contentType || !body.systemPrompt?.trim()) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: 'name, contentType y systemPrompt son requeridos' }, { status: 400 })
    }

    const [created] = await db
      .insert(contentTemplates)
      .values({
        workspaceId,
        name: body.name.trim(),
        contentType: body.contentType,
        systemPrompt: body.systemPrompt.trim(),
        description: body.description?.trim() || null,
        config: {},
        isDefault: false,
      })
      .returning()

    return NextResponse.json({ success: true, template: created })
  } catch (error) {
    if (error instanceof WorkspaceAuthError) {
      return NextResponse.json({ error: error.message }, { status: error.status })
    }

    console.error('[Content Templates API] POST error:', error)
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'No se pudo guardar la plantilla' }, { status: 500 })
  }
}
