"use client"

import { useEffect, useState } from "react"
import Link from "next/link"
import {
  ArrowRight,
  BookOpen,
  CalendarClock,
  CheckCircle2,
  FileText,
  Radar,
  Sparkles,
  TrendingUp,
  MapPinned,
  TriangleAlert,
} from "lucide-react"

import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"
import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"
import { SurfaceCard } from "@/components/ui/surface-card"

interface DashboardMetrics {
  totalContent: number
  publishedContent: number
  draftContent: number
  reviewContent: number
  approvedContent: number
  avgTokensUsed: number
  totalKnowledgeChunks: number
  scheduledPosts?: number
  totalSources?: number
  totalLeadsGenerated?: number
  totalConversions?: number
  trackedLeads?: number
  convertedLeads?: number
  recentContent?: Array<{
    id: string
    title: string
    status: string
    contentType: string
    updatedAt: string
  }>
  scheduledQueue?: Array<{
    id: string
    contentId: string
    title: string
    platform: string
    contentType: string
    scheduledFor: string
  }>
  deliveryQueue?: Array<{
    id: string
    contentId: string
    title: string
    platform: string
    contentType: string
    scheduledFor: string
    status: string
    retryCount: number
    lastError: string | null
    publishedAt: string | null
    platformPostId: string | null
  }>
  microZonePerformance?: Array<{
    id: string
    name: string
    municipality: string
    totalContent: number
    publishedContent: number
    views: number
    leads: number
    conversions: number
    lastActivityAt: string | null
  }>
  editorialAlerts?: Array<{
    id: string
    tone: 'neutral' | 'warning' | 'critical'
    title: string
    description: string
    href: string
    hrefLabel: string
  }>
}

interface OperationalRecommendation {
  id: string
  type: 'review_backlog' | 'schedule_gap' | 'repurpose_winner' | 'cta_optimization' | 'knowledge_gap' | 'content_refresh'
  priority: 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium'
  title: string
  reason: string
  metric: string
  actionSummary: string
  expectedImpact: string
  href: string
  hrefLabel: string
}
const commandCards = [
  {
    title: "Briefing del dia",
    description: "Redacta una pieza ancla sobre oportunidades en Camp de Mar con soporte de micro-zona.",
    href: "/dashboard/studio",
    cta: "Abrir Studio",
  },
  {
    title: "Actualizar contexto",
    description: "Ingresa nuevas fuentes regulatorias y datos de mercado para mejorar el RAG.",
    href: "/dashboard/rag",
    cta: "Abrir Knowledge Base",
  },
  {
    title: "Refinar el sistema",
    description: "Ajusta plantillas, modelos y preferencias del workspace antes de escalar la cadencia.",
    href: "/dashboard/settings",
    cta: "Abrir Settings",
  },
] as const

const marketSignals = [
  {
    zone: "Camp de Mar",
    signal: "Ventana de reposicionamiento",
    detail: "Caida de precio visible vs maximos historicos. Requiere pieza explicativa con contexto de inventario.",
  },
  {
    zone: "Punta Negra",
    signal: "Narrativa de infraestructuras",
    detail: "El efecto hospitality premium puede empujar awareness y ticket medio en inversores internacionales.",
  },
  {
    zone: "Palmanova",
    signal: "Yield tension",
    detail: "La divergencia entre renta y venta pide una lectura clara para captar leads analiticos.",
  },
] as const

const publishingChecklist = [
  "Validar 3 fuentes recientes antes de publicar una pieza de inteligencia.",
  "Convertir el articulo principal en derivadas para LinkedIn, Instagram y newsletter.",
  "Conectar el contenido al siguiente CTA comercial dentro de Nexus.",
] as const

export default function DashboardPage() {
  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState<DashboardMetrics | null>(null)
  const [recommendations, setRecommendations] = useState<OperationalRecommendation[]>([])
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true)
  const [queueActionId, setQueueActionId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [deliveryActionId, setDeliveryActionId] = useState<string | null>(null)

  async function fetchMetrics() {
    try {
      const [metricsResponse, recommendationsResponse] = await Promise.all([
        fetch('/api/metrics/dashboard'),
        fetch('/api/automation/recommendations'),
      ])

      if (metricsResponse.ok) {
        const data = await metricsResponse.json()
        setMetrics(data.metrics)
      }

      if (recommendationsResponse.ok) {
        const data = await recommendationsResponse.json()
        setRecommendations(data.recommendations ?? [])
      }
    } catch {
      setMetrics(null)
      setRecommendations([])
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false)
    }
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    void fetchMetrics()
  }, [])

  async function handleUnschedule(contentId: string) {
    setQueueActionId(contentId)

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/content/library', {
        method: 'PATCH',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          id: contentId,
          action: 'unschedule',
        }),
      })

      if (response.ok) {
        await fetchMetrics()
      }
    } finally {
      setQueueActionId(null)
    }
  }

  async function handleDeliveryAction(contentId: string, action: 'dispatch' | 'retry_delivery') {
    setDeliveryActionId(contentId)

    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/content/library', {
        method: 'PATCH',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          id: contentId,
          action,
        }),
      })

      if (response.ok) {
        await fetchMetrics()
      }
    } finally {
      setDeliveryActionId(null)
    }
  }

  return (
    <div className="space-y-6">
      <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[1.6fr_1fr]">
        <Card className="border-primary/20 bg-[linear-gradient(135deg,hsla(var(--primary),0.14),transparent_65%)]">
          <CardHeader>
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
              <Badge className="border-primary/20 bg-primary/10 text-primary" variant="outline">
                Mission Control
              </Badge>
              <Badge variant="secondary">Mallorca premium real estate</Badge>
            </div>
            <CardTitle className="max-w-3xl text-2xl lg:text-4xl">
              Convierte senales de mercado en contenido que refuerce autoridad de marca y genere demanda cualificada.
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription className="max-w-2xl text-sm leading-relaxed lg:text-base">
              El valor del producto no esta en “publicar mas”, sino en detectar oportunidades antes, estructurar el contexto y empujar una narrativa consistente en todos los canales.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3">
            <Link href="/dashboard/studio">
              <Button size="lg">
                Abrir Content Studio
                <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4" />
              </Button>
            </Link>
            <Link href="/dashboard/rag">
              <Button size="lg" variant="outline">
                Revisar Knowledge Base
              </Button>
            </Link>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card className="bg-card/90">
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-lg">
              <Radar className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Estado operativo
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Una vista simple para saber si el sistema esta listo para escalar.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-4">
            {[
              {
                label: "Fuentes conectadas",
                value: metrics?.totalSources ?? 0,
                helper: "Cuantas entradas alimentan el contexto.",
              },
              {
                label: "Piezas en borrador",
                value: metrics?.draftContent ?? 0,
                helper: "Contenido listo para revisar y derivar.",
              },
              {
                label: "En revision",
                value: metrics?.reviewContent ?? 0,
                helper: "Piezas pendientes de aprobacion editorial.",
              },
              {
                label: "Publicaciones pendientes",
                value: metrics?.scheduledPosts ?? 0,
                helper: "Backlog de programacion pendiente.",
              },
            ].map((item) => (
              <SurfaceCard key={item.label} variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">{item.label}</p>
                <p className="mt-2 font-heading text-3xl font-semibold text-foreground">
                  {isLoading ? "..." : item.value}
                </p>
                <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{item.helper}</p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            ))}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>

      <section className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 2xl:grid-cols-6">
        {[
          {
            label: "Contenido total",
            value: metrics?.totalContent ?? 0,
            note: "Activos editoriales creados",
            icon: FileText,
          },
          {
            label: "Publicado",
            value: metrics?.publishedContent ?? 0,
            note: "Contenido ya empujando autoridad",
            icon: CheckCircle2,
          },
          {
            label: "Knowledge chunks",
            value: metrics?.totalKnowledgeChunks ?? 0,
            note: "Contexto reusable para el motor RAG",
            icon: BookOpen,
          },
          {
            label: "Promedio de tokens",
            value: metrics?.avgTokensUsed ?? 0,
            note: "Indicador de coste y densidad",
            icon: Sparkles,
          },
          {
            label: "Leads generados",
            value: metrics?.totalLeadsGenerated ?? 0,
            note: "Señal comercial atribuida al contenido",
            icon: TrendingUp,
          },
          {
            label: "Conversiones",
            value: metrics?.totalConversions ?? 0,
            note: "Acciones de negocio ya cerradas",
            icon: CheckCircle2,
          },
        ].map(({ label, value, note, icon: Icon }) => (
          <Card key={label}>
            <CardContent className="flex items-start justify-between gap-4 pt-4">
              <div>
                <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">{label}</p>
                <p className="mt-3 font-heading text-4xl font-semibold text-foreground">
                  {isLoading ? "..." : value}
                </p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-xs leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">{note}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="flex h-11 w-11 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-primary/10 text-primary">
                <Icon className="h-5 w-5" />
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </section>

      <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[1.15fr_1fr_1fr]">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <TrendingUp className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Recomendaciones automáticas
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Siguientes pasos sugeridos a partir del estado editorial y las métricas reales.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {recommendations.length ? (
              recommendations.map((item) => (
                <SurfaceCard key={item.id} variant="inner" className="border bg-muted/40 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <p className="font-medium text-foreground">{item.title}</p>
                    <Badge
                      variant="outline"
                      className={
                        item.priority === 'critical'
                          ? 'border-red-500/30 text-red-300'
                          : item.priority === 'high'
                          ? 'border-primary/30 text-primary'
                          : undefined
                      }
                    >
                      {item.priority}
                    </Badge>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                    {item.reason}
                  </p>
                  <p className="mt-3 text-xs text-muted-foreground">{item.metric}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs font-medium text-primary/90">{item.actionSummary}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">Impacto esperado: {item.expectedImpact}</p>
                  <div className="mt-3">
                    <Link href={item.href}>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
                        {item.hrefLabel}
                      </Button>
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              marketSignals.map((signal) => (
                <SurfaceCard key={signal.zone} variant="inner" className="border bg-muted/40 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <p className="font-medium text-foreground">{signal.zone}</p>
                    <Badge variant="outline">{signal.signal}</Badge>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                    {signal.detail}
                  </p>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <CalendarClock className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Cadencia editorial
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Una operacion que funciona necesita ritmo, no solo piezas aisladas.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {publishingChecklist.map((item, index) => (
              <SurfaceCard key={item} variant="inner" className="flex items-start gap-3 border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <div className="flex h-7 w-7 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-full bg-primary/10 text-xs font-semibold text-primary">
                  {index + 1}
                </div>
                <p className="text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">{item}</p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            ))}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle>Acciones prioritarias</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Atajos alineados con el flujo real del equipo.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {commandCards.map((item) => (
              <Link key={item.title} href={item.href} className="block">
                <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4 transition-colors hover:border-primary/30 hover:bg-primary/5">
                  <p className="font-medium text-foreground">{item.title}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                    {item.description}
                  </p>
                  <div className="mt-3 inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-sm font-medium text-primary">
                    {item.cta}
                    <ArrowRight className="h-4 w-4" />
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              </Link>
            ))}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>

      <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[0.9fr_1.1fr]">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <TriangleAlert className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Alertas editoriales
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Señales operativas que todavía requieren intervención humana para no perder cadencia ni calidad.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {metrics?.editorialAlerts?.length ? (
              metrics.editorialAlerts.map((alert) => (
                <SurfaceCard
                  key={alert.id}
                  variant="inner"
                  className={[
                    'border p-4',
                    alert.tone === 'critical'
                      ? 'border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10'
                      : alert.tone === 'warning'
                      ? 'border-primary/20 bg-primary/5'
                      : 'bg-background/70',
                  ].join(' ')}
                >
                  <p className="font-medium text-foreground">{alert.title}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">{alert.description}</p>
                  <div className="mt-3">
                    <Link href={alert.href}>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
                        {alert.hrefLabel}
                      </Button>
                    </Link>
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="font-medium text-foreground">Sin alertas críticas ahora mismo</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                  El pipeline editorial está razonablemente equilibrado entre revisión, programación y delivery.
                </p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <MapPinned className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Pulso por micro-zona
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Lectura hiperlocal de qué territorios ya tienen contenido, tracción y señales de negocio.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2">
            {metrics?.microZonePerformance?.length ? (
              metrics.microZonePerformance.map((zone) => (
                <SurfaceCard key={zone.id} variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <p className="font-medium text-foreground">{zone.name}</p>
                    <Badge variant="outline">{zone.municipality}</Badge>
                  </div>
                  <div className="mt-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-3 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    <div>
                      <p>Piezas</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{zone.totalContent}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p>Publicadas</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{zone.publishedContent}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p>Views</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{zone.views}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div>
                      <p>Leads</p>
                      <p className="mt-1 text-sm font-semibold text-foreground">{zone.leads}</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="font-medium text-foreground">Sin lectura territorial todavía</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                  Configura micro-zonas y enlaza nuevas piezas desde Studio para activar el análisis por territorio.
                </p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>

      <section className="grid gap-4 xl:grid-cols-[1.1fr_0.8fr_0.95fr]">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <FileText className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Pipeline editorial reciente
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Señales reales del flujo draft to review to approved to scheduled to published.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3">
            {metrics?.recentContent?.length ? (
              metrics.recentContent.map((item) => (
                <SurfaceCard
                  key={item.id}
                  variant="inner"
                  className="border bg-background/70 p-4"
                >
                  <div className="flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                    <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
                      <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-2">
                        <Badge variant="secondary">{item.contentType}</Badge>
                        <Badge variant="outline">{item.status}</Badge>
                      </div>
                      <p className="mt-3 line-clamp-2 font-medium text-foreground">{item.title}</p>
                      <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                        Actualizado {new Date(item.updatedAt).toLocaleString("es-ES")}
                      </p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex h-10 w-10 flex-shrink-0 items-center justify-center rounded-2xl bg-primary/10 text-primary">
                      <FileText className="h-4 w-4" />
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="font-medium text-foreground">Todavia no hay pipeline editorial visible</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                  Cuando generes y muevas piezas entre borrador, revision y aprobacion apareceran aqui.
                </p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <CalendarClock className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Cola programada
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Las siguientes piezas ya tienen ventana de salida asignada.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {metrics?.scheduledQueue?.length ? (
              metrics.scheduledQueue.map((item) => (
                <SurfaceCard key={item.id} variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <Badge variant="secondary">{item.platform}</Badge>
                    <Badge variant="outline">{item.contentType}</Badge>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-3 font-medium text-foreground">{item.title}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    Programado para {new Date(item.scheduledFor).toLocaleString("es-ES")}
                  </p>
                  <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                    <Link href={`/dashboard/studio?contentId=${item.contentId}`}>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
                        Abrir en Studio
                      </Button>
                    </Link>
                    <Button
                      size="sm"
                      variant="ghost"
                      disabled={queueActionId === item.contentId}
                      onClick={() => void handleUnschedule(item.contentId)}
                    >
                      {queueActionId === item.contentId ? "Cancelando..." : "Cancelar"}
                    </Button>
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="font-medium text-foreground">No hay publicaciones programadas</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                  Cuando apruebes una pieza y la lleves a scheduled aparecerá aquí con su fecha de salida.
                </p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>

        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
              <Radar className="h-4 w-4 text-primary" />
              Cola de ejecución
            </CardTitle>
            <CardDescription>
              Último estado operativo de las publicaciones programadas y ya entregadas.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-3">
            {metrics?.deliveryQueue?.length ? (
              metrics.deliveryQueue.map((item) => (
                <SurfaceCard key={item.id} variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                  <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2">
                    <Badge variant="secondary">{item.platform}</Badge>
                    <Badge variant="outline">{item.status}</Badge>
                  </div>
                  <p className="mt-3 font-medium text-foreground">{item.title}</p>
                  <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                    Ventana {new Date(item.scheduledFor).toLocaleString('es-ES')}
                  </p>
                  {item.publishedAt ? (
                    <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">
                      Entregado {new Date(item.publishedAt).toLocaleString('es-ES')}
                    </p>
                  ) : null}
                  {item.platformPostId ? (
                    <p className="mt-1 text-xs text-muted-foreground">Post ID {item.platformPostId}</p>
                  ) : null}
                  {item.lastError ? (
                    <p className="mt-2 text-xs text-red-300">{item.lastError}</p>
                  ) : null}
                  <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-2">
                    <Link href={`/dashboard/studio?contentId=${item.contentId}`}>
                      <Button size="sm" variant="outline">
                        Abrir pieza
                      </Button>
                    </Link>
                    {item.status === 'pending' ? (
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        disabled={deliveryActionId === item.contentId}
                        onClick={() => void handleDeliveryAction(item.contentId, 'dispatch')}
                      >
                        {deliveryActionId === item.contentId ? 'Ejecutando...' : 'Ejecutar'}
                      </Button>
                    ) : null}
                    {item.status === 'failed' ? (
                      <Button
                        size="sm"
                        disabled={deliveryActionId === item.contentId}
                        onClick={() => void handleDeliveryAction(item.contentId, 'retry_delivery')}
                      >
                        {deliveryActionId === item.contentId ? 'Reintentando...' : 'Reintentar'}
                      </Button>
                    ) : null}
                  </div>
                </SurfaceCard>
              ))
            ) : (
              <SurfaceCard variant="inner" className="border bg-background/70 p-4">
                <p className="font-medium text-foreground">Todavía no hay entregas en cola</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm leading-relaxed text-muted-foreground">
                  Cuando programes o ejecutes publicaciones aparecerán aquí con su estado operativo.
                </p>
              </SurfaceCard>
            )}
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </section>
    </div>
  )
}

FILE: src/app/dashboard/editorial-queue/ComplianceWarningPanel.tsx
================================================
// src/components/studio/ComplianceWarningPanel.tsx
// NEW COMPONENT — renders below the LinkedIn preview modal.
// Shows compliance issues grouped by severity (hard / soft).
// Hard issues disable the publish button; soft ones are advisory.

'use client';

import { AlertTriangle, Info, CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react';
import type { DetailedComplianceReport } from '@/lib/agents/compliance-validator';

interface Props {
  report: DetailedComplianceReport | null | undefined;
}

export function ComplianceWarningPanel({ report }: Props) {
  if (!report) return null;

  const hardIssues = report.typedIssues?.filter((i) => i.severity === 'hard') ?? [];
  const warningIssues = report.typedIssues?.filter((i) => i.severity === 'warning') ?? [];
  const infoIssues = report.typedIssues?.filter((i) => i.severity === 'info') ?? [];

  // All clear — compact success indicator
  if (hardIssues.length === 0 && warningIssues.length === 0 && infoIssues.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="mt-4 flex items-center gap-2 rounded-lg border border-[var(--color-success)]/30 bg-[var(--color-success)]/5 px-4 py-3 text-sm text-[var(--color-success)]">
        <CheckCircle2 className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
        <span>Contenido validado por compliance. No hay incidencias bloqueantes.</span>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <div className="mt-4 space-y-3">
      {/* ─── Hard issues ─────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {hardIssues.length > 0 && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-[var(--color-error)]/40 bg-[var(--color-error)]/5 px-4 py-3">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--color-error)]">
            <AlertTriangle className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
            <span>Riesgo crítico: debe corregirse antes de publicar.</span>
          </div>
          <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1">
            {hardIssues.map((issue, idx) => (
              <li key={idx} className="flex gap-2 text-xs text-[var(--color-error)]">
                <span className="mt-0.5 shrink-0">⚠️</span>
                <span>{issue.message}</span>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>
      )}

      {/* ─── Soft issues ─────────────────────────────────────── */}
      {warningIssues.length > 0 && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-[var(--color-warning)]/40 bg-[var(--color-warning)]/5 px-4 py-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--color-warning)]">
            <Info className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
            <span>Observación editorial: revisa antes de aprobar.</span>
          </div>
          <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1">
            {warningIssues.map((issue, idx) => (
              <li key={idx} className="flex gap-2 text-xs text-[var(--color-text-muted)]">
                <span className="mt-0.5 shrink-0">ℹ️</span>
                <span>{issue.message}</span>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
          {report.recommendations.length > 0 && (
            <p className="mt-2 text-xs italic text-[var(--color-text-muted)]">
              💡 {report.recommendations.join(' ')}
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      )}

      {infoIssues.length > 0 && (
        <div className="rounded-lg border border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] px-4 py-3">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--color-text)]">
            <Info className="h-4 w-4 shrink-0" />
            <span>Nota de control: no bloqueante.</span>
          </div>
          <ul className="mt-2 space-y-1">
            {infoIssues.map((issue, idx) => (
              <li key={idx} className="flex gap-2 text-xs text-[var(--color-text-muted)]">
                <span className="mt-0.5 shrink-0">•</span>
                <span>{issue.message}</span>
              </li>
            ))}
          </ul>
        </div>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/dashboard/editorial-queue/LinkedInPreviewModal.tsx
================================================
// src/components/studio/LinkedInPreviewModal.tsx
// CHANGE: Added ComplianceWarningPanel below draft textarea.
// CHANGE: Publish button disabled when hard compliance issues present.
// CHANGE: "Publicar" now calls POST /api/content/approve (HITL-safe).
// CHANGE: Removed any auto-publish logic triggered by generation.

'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { ComplianceWarningPanel } from './ComplianceWarningPanel';
import type { DetailedComplianceReport } from '@/lib/agents/compliance-validator';
import { Send, Pencil, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';

interface ChannelVariant {
  channel: string;
  draft: string;
  hashtags?: string[];
  estimatedReach?: number;
}

interface Props {
  open: boolean;
  onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void;
  jobId: string;
  variant: ChannelVariant | null;
  complianceReport: DetailedComplianceReport | null;
  onPublished?: (urls: Record<string, string>) => void;
}

export function LinkedInPreviewModal({
  open,
  onOpenChange,
  jobId,
  variant,
  complianceReport,
  onPublished,
}: Props) {
  const [draft, setDraft] = useState(variant?.draft ?? '');
  const [isEditing, setIsEditing] = useState(false);
  const [isPublishing, setIsPublishing] = useState(false);
  const [publishError, setPublishError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [published, setPublished] = useState(false);

  // CHANGE: derive blocking state from complianceReport — only hard issues block
  const hasHardIssues = complianceReport?.hasHardIssues ?? false;

  async function handlePublish() {
    if (hasHardIssues) return; // guard — UI button should already be disabled
    if (!jobId) return;

    setIsPublishing(true);
    setPublishError(null);

    try {
      // CHANGE: calls approve endpoint — the ONLY path to publication
      const res = await fetch('/api/content/approve', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          jobId,
          // Pass edited drafts if user modified the textarea
          ...(isEditing
            ? { editedDrafts: [{ channel: 'linkedines', draft }] }
            : {}),
        }),
      });

      const data = await res.json();

      if (!res.ok) {
        setPublishError(data.error ?? 'Error al publicar. Inténtalo de nuevo.');
        return;
      }

      setPublished(true);
      onPublished?.(data.publicationUrls ?? {});
      onOpenChange(false);
    } catch {
      setPublishError('Error de red. Comprueba tu conexión.');
    } finally {
      setIsPublishing(false);
    }
  }

  if (!variant) return null;

  return (
    <Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onOpenChange}>
      <DialogContent className="max-w-2xl max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <DialogHeader>
          <DialogTitle className="flex items-center gap-2 text-base">
            <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" className="text-[#0A66C2]">
              <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
            </svg>
            Vista previa — LinkedIn
          </DialogTitle>
        </DialogHeader>

        {/* ── Draft content ─────────────────────────────────── */}
        <div className="mt-4 rounded-lg border border-[var(--color-border)] bg-[var(--color-surface)] p-4">
          {/* LinkedIn mock header */}
          <div className="mb-3 flex items-center gap-2">
            <div className="h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-[var(--color-primary)]/20" />
            <div>
              <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--color-text)]">Anclora Group</p>
              <p className="text-xs text-[var(--color-text-muted)]">Publicando ahora</p>
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Editable draft */}
          {isEditing ? (
            <Textarea
              value={draft}
              onChange={(e) => setDraft(e.target.value)}
              className="min-h-[200px] w-full resize-y font-sans text-sm"
            />
          ) : (
            <p className="whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-relaxed text-[var(--color-text)]">
              {draft}
            </p>
          )}

          {/* Hashtags */}
          {variant.hashtags && variant.hashtags.length > 0 && (
            <div className="mt-3 flex flex-wrap gap-1">
              {variant.hashtags.map((tag) => (
                <span key={tag} className="text-xs text-[var(--color-primary)]">
                  #{tag}
                </span>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* ── Compliance panel (NEW — always rendered below preview) ── */}
        <ComplianceWarningPanel report={complianceReport} />

        {/* ── Error from approval API ───────────────────────── */}
        {publishError && (
          <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-[var(--color-error)]">{publishError}</p>
        )}

        {/* ── Actions ──────────────────────────────────────── */}
        <div className="mt-6 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            onClick={() => setIsEditing((p) => !p)}
            className="gap-2"
          >
            <Pencil className="h-4 w-4" />
            {isEditing ? 'Previsualizar' : 'Editar borrador'}
          </Button>

          <div className="flex gap-2">
            <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => onOpenChange(false)}>
              Cancelar
            </Button>

            {/* CHANGE: Disabled for hard compliance issues */}
            <Button
              size="sm"
              className="gap-2"
              onClick={handlePublish}
              disabled={hasHardIssues || isPublishing || published}
              title={
                hasHardIssues
                  ? 'Resuelve los problemas de compliance antes de publicar'
                  : 'Publicar en LinkedIn'
              }
            >
              {isPublishing ? (
                <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin" />
              ) : (
                <Send className="h-4 w-4" />
              )}
              {published ? 'Publicado ✓' : 'Publicar en LinkedIn'}
            </Button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {hasHardIssues && (
          <p className="mt-2 text-center text-xs text-[var(--color-error)]">
            La publicación está bloqueada hasta que los problemas marcados en rojo estén resueltos.
            Edita el borrador y vuelve a intentarlo.
          </p>
        )}
      </DialogContent>
    </Dialog>
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/dashboard/editorial-queue/page.tsx
================================================
'use client'

import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from 'react'
import { Card, CardContent } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { AlertCircle, CheckCircle2, Clock, Trash2 } from 'lucide-react'

interface ContentDraft {
  id: string
  topic: string
  zone: string
  framing: string
  status: 'draft' | 'pending_approval' | 'approved' | 'published' | 'rejected'
  wordCount: number
  toneScore: number
  complianceIssues: string[]
  contentDraft: string
  headline: string
  createdAt: string
  createdBy?: string
  approvalNote?: string
}

const statusColors: Record<ContentDraft['status'], string> = {
  draft: 'bg-blue-900 text-blue-100',
  pending_approval: 'bg-yellow-900 text-yellow-100',
  approved: 'bg-green-900 text-green-100',
  published: 'bg-emerald-900 text-emerald-100',
  rejected: 'bg-red-900 text-red-100',
}

const statusLabels: Record<ContentDraft['status'], string> = {
  draft: 'Borrador',
  pending_approval: 'En Revisión',
  approved: 'Aprobado',
  published: 'Publicado',
  rejected: 'Rechazado',
}

export default function EditorialQueue() {
  const [drafts, setDrafts] = useState<ContentDraft[]>([])
  const [selected, setSelected] = useState<ContentDraft | null>(null)
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true)
  const [approving, setApproving] = useState(false)
  const [rejectionNote, setRejectionNote] = useState('')
  const [showRejectionForm, setShowRejectionForm] = useState(false)

  const fetchDrafts = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true)
      const res = await fetch('/api/content/drafts')
      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`API error: ${res.status}`)
      const data = await res.json()
      setDrafts(Array.isArray(data) ? data : [])
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Failed to fetch drafts:', err)
      setDrafts([])
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchDrafts()
    const interval = setInterval(fetchDrafts, 30000) // Refresh every 30s
    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [fetchDrafts])

  const handleApprove = useCallback(
    async (draftId: string) => {
      try {
        setApproving(true)
        const res = await fetch('/api/content/approve', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ draftId }),
        })
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Approval failed: ${res.status}`)
        await fetchDrafts()
        setSelected(null)
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Approval error:', err)
      } finally {
        setApproving(false)
      }
    },
    [fetchDrafts]
  )

  const handleReject = useCallback(
    async (draftId: string) => {
      try {
        setApproving(true)
        const res = await fetch('/api/content/reject', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ draftId, reason: rejectionNote }),
        })
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`Rejection failed: ${res.status}`)
        await fetchDrafts()
        setSelected(null)
        setShowRejectionForm(false)
        setRejectionNote('')
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Rejection error:', err)
      } finally {
        setApproving(false)
      }
    },
    [rejectionNote, fetchDrafts]
  )

  if (loading && drafts.length === 0) {
    return (
      <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-screen text-gray-400">
        <div className="text-center">
          <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 animate-spin" />
          <p>Cargando solicitudes editoriales...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 h-screen overflow-hidden bg-slate-950 p-4">
      {/* Left Panel: Draft List */}
      <div className="md:col-span-1 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        <div className="border-b border-slate-700 p-4 bg-slate-800">
          <h2 className="text-lg font-bold text-slate-100">Cola Editorial</h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1">{drafts.length} solicitudes</p>
        </div>

        <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto">
          {drafts.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full text-slate-400 p-4">
              <div className="text-center">
                <p className="text-sm">No hay solicitudes pendientes</p>
                <p className="text-xs mt-2 text-slate-500">Los nuevos borradores aparecerán aquí</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-2 p-3">
              {drafts.map((draft) => (
                <Card
                  key={draft.id}
                  className={`cursor-pointer transition-all ${
                    selected?.id === draft.id
                      ? 'ring-2 ring-blue-500 border-blue-500'
                      : 'border-slate-700 hover:border-slate-600'
                  } bg-slate-800`}
                  onClick={() => setSelected(draft)}
                >
                  <CardContent className="p-3 space-y-2">
                    <div>
                      <p className="font-semibold text-sm text-slate-100 line-clamp-2">{draft.topic}</p>
                      <p className="text-xs text-slate-400 mt-1">{draft.zone}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                      <Badge className={`text-xs ${statusColors[draft.status]}`}>
                        {statusLabels[draft.status]}
                      </Badge>
                      {draft.complianceIssues.length > 0 && (
                        <AlertCircle className="w-4 h-4 text-red-500" />
                      )}
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-xs text-slate-400 pt-1 border-t border-slate-700">
                      <p>{draft.wordCount} palabras · Tone: {(draft.toneScore * 100).toFixed(0)}%</p>
                    </div>
                  </CardContent>
                </Card>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right Panel: Preview & Actions */}
      <div className="md:col-span-2 border border-slate-700 rounded-lg bg-slate-900 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
        {selected ? (
          <>
            {/* Header */}
            <div className="border-b border-slate-700 p-4 bg-slate-800">
              <div className="flex items-start justify-between mb-3">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <h3 className="text-xl font-bold text-slate-100">{selected.topic}</h3>
                  <p className="text-sm text-slate-400 mt-1">{selected.headline}</p>
                </div>
                <Badge className={`${statusColors[selected.status]}`}>{statusLabels[selected.status]}</Badge>
              </div>

              {/* Metadata */}
              <div className="grid grid-cols-4 gap-3 text-xs">
                <div className="bg-slate-700/50 rounded p-2">
                  <p className="text-slate-400">Zona</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-slate-100">{selected.zone}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-slate-700/50 rounded p-2">
                  <p className="text-slate-400">Framing</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-slate-100">{selected.framing}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-slate-700/50 rounded p-2">
                  <p className="text-slate-400">Palabras</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-slate-100">{selected.wordCount}</p>
                </div>
                <div className="bg-slate-700/50 rounded p-2">
                  <p className="text-slate-400">Tone Score</p>
                  <p className="font-semibold text-slate-100">{(selected.toneScore * 100).toFixed(0)}%</p>
                </div>
              </div>

              {/* Compliance Issues */}
              {selected.complianceIssues.length > 0 && (
                <div className="mt-3 bg-red-900/20 border border-red-700/50 rounded p-2">
                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-red-300 mb-1">⚠️ Problemas de Compliance:</p>
                  <ul className="text-xs text-red-200 space-y-1">
                    {selected.complianceIssues.map((issue, i) => (
                      <li key={i}>• {issue}</li>
                    ))}
                  </ul>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Content Preview */}
            <div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">
              <article className="prose prose-sm prose-invert max-w-none">
                <h2 className="text-slate-100 font-bold">{selected.headline}</h2>
                <div className="text-slate-300 whitespace-pre-wrap text-sm leading-relaxed">
                  {selected.contentDraft}
                </div>
              </article>
            </div>

            {/* Action Buttons */}
            <div className="border-t border-slate-700 p-4 bg-slate-800 space-y-3">
              {selected.status === 'draft' || selected.status === 'pending_approval' ? (
                <>
                  {!showRejectionForm ? (
                    <div className="flex gap-2">
                      <Button
                        onClick={() => handleApprove(selected.id)}
                        disabled={approving}
                        className="flex-1 bg-green-600 hover:bg-green-700 text-white"
                      >
                        <CheckCircle2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                        Aprobar & Publicar
                      </Button>
                      <Button
                        onClick={() => setShowRejectionForm(true)}
                        disabled={approving}
                        variant="destructive"
                        className="flex-1"
                      >
                        <Trash2 className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" />
                        Rechazar
                      </Button>
                    </div>
                  ) : (
                    <div className="space-y-2">
                      <textarea
                        value={rejectionNote}
                        onChange={(e) => setRejectionNote(e.target.value)}
                        placeholder="Motivo del rechazo (requerido)..."
                        className="w-full px-3 py-2 bg-slate-700 text-slate-100 rounded text-sm border border-slate-600 focus:border-red-500 focus:outline-none resize-none"
                        rows={3}
                      />
                      <div className="flex gap-2">
                        <Button
                          onClick={() => handleReject(selected.id)}
                          disabled={!rejectionNote.trim() || approving}
                          className="flex-1 bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700"
                        >
                          Confirmar Rechazo
                        </Button>
                        <Button
                          onClick={() => {
                            setShowRejectionForm(false)
                            setRejectionNote('')
                          }}
                          variant="outline"
                          className="flex-1"
                        >
                          Cancelar
                        </Button>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )}
                </>
              ) : (
                <div className="text-sm text-slate-400 text-center py-2">
                  {selected.status === 'published' && '✓ Contenido publicado'}
                  {selected.status === 'approved' && '✓ En publicación'}
                  {selected.status === 'rejected' && '✗ Rechazado'}
                </div>
              )}

              {/* Metadata Footer */}
              <div className="text-xs text-slate-500 border-t border-slate-700 pt-3">
                <p>Creado: {new Date(selected.createdAt).toLocaleDateString('es-ES')}</p>
                {selected.approvalNote && <p className="mt-1 text-slate-400">{selected.approvalNote}</p>}
              </div>
            </div>
          </>
        ) : (
          <div className="flex items-center justify-center h-full">
            <div className="text-center text-slate-400">
              <Clock className="w-12 h-12 mx-auto mb-4 text-slate-600" />
              <p className="text-base font-medium">Selecciona un borrador</p>
              <p className="text-sm text-slate-500 mt-1">para revisar y aprobar</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        )}
      </div>
    </div>
  )
}



================================================
FILE: src/app/dashboard/generation/page.tsx
================================================
'use client'

import { useState, useEffect } from 'react'
import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input'
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger } from '@/components/ui/select'
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Loader, AlertCircle, ChevronDown } from 'lucide-react'
import { CustomGuidelinesInput } from '@/components/content/CustomGuidelinesInput'
import {
  ASSERTIVENESS_OPTIONS,
  CLAIM_RISK_OPTIONS,
  CONTENT_FRAMING_OPTIONS as FRAMING_OPTIONS,
  CONTENT_OBJECTIVE_OPTIONS,
  CONTENT_ZONE_OPTIONS as ZONE_OPTIONS,
  CTA_MODE_OPTIONS,
  EVIDENCE_MODE_OPTIONS,
  INVESTOR_LENS_OPTIONS,
  LANGUAGE_OPTIONS,
  SIGNAL_TYPE_OPTIONS,
  TARGET_AUDIENCE_OPTIONS,
} from '@/lib/brand/profiles'
import type {
  ContentZone,
  ContentFraming,
  TargetAudience,
  PublishChannel,
  CustomGuideline,
  InvestorLens,
  CtaMode,
  EvidenceMode,
  AssertivenessLevel,
  ContentObjective,
  SignalType,
  ClaimRiskLevel,
  ContentLanguage,
  ChannelVariant,
} from '@/lib/agents/types'
import type { GenerationEngine } from '@/lib/hermes'

async function ensureWorkspaceSession() {
  const response = await fetch('/api/auth/bootstrap-workspace', {
    method: 'POST',
    credentials: 'include',
  })

  const data = await response.json().catch(() => null)

  if (!response.ok || !data?.ok) {
    throw new Error(
      data?.message ||
        data?.error ||
        'No se pudo preparar el workspace de la sesión.'
    )
  }

  return data as {
    ok: true
    workspaceId?: string
    organizationId?: string
  }
}

export default function ContentGenerationPage() {
  const router = useRouter()

  const [topic, setTopic] = useState('Mandarin Oriental abre en Punta Negra (Calvià)')
  const [zone, setZone] = useState<ContentZone>('calvià')
  const [framing, setFraming] = useState<ContentFraming>('market_analysis')
  const [targetAudience, setTargetAudience] = useState<TargetAudience>('investors')
  const [selectedChannels, setSelectedChannels] = useState<PublishChannel[]>(['linkedin_es'])
  const [customGuidelines, setCustomGuidelines] = useState<CustomGuideline[]>([])

  const [coreThesis, setCoreThesis] = useState('La entrada de una marca hotelera de ultra lujo en Punta Negra actúa como catalizador reputacional que refuerza la prima de prestigio de la microzona y anticipa presión alcista sobre activos residenciales cercanos.')
  const [investorLens, setInvestorLens] = useState<InvestorLens>('individual')
  const [desiredReaderOutcome, setDesiredReaderOutcome] = useState('Que el lector interprete la operación como SENAL DE OPORTUNIDAD (no como noticia hotelera) y considere Punta Negra antes de mayor comprensión de pricing.')
  const [ctaMode, setCtaMode] = useState<CtaMode>('soft_selective')
  const [evidenceMode, setEvidenceMode] = useState<EvidenceMode>('data_driven')
  const [assertiveness, setAssertiveness] = useState<AssertivenessLevel>('measured')
  const [microzone, setMicrozone] = useState('Punta Negra, Calvià (zona ultra premium Costa de la Calma)')
  const [exampleOutput, setExampleOutput] = useState('Las marcas de lujo no venden destinos; validan territorios. La entrada de Mandarin Oriental refuerza la narrativa de oportunidad sin afirmar causalidad automática.')
  const [contentObjective, setContentObjective] = useState<ContentObjective>('authority')
  const [signalType, setSignalType] = useState<SignalType>('brand_hotel')
  const [claimRiskLevel, setClaimRiskLevel] = useState<ClaimRiskLevel>('conservative')
  const [sourceUrls, setSourceUrls] = useState('')
  const [allowQuantitativeData, setAllowQuantitativeData] = useState(false)
  const [allowCtaLink, setAllowCtaLink] = useState(false)
  const [language, setLanguage] = useState<ContentLanguage>('bilingual')
  const [showAdvanced, setShowAdvanced] = useState(true)

  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false)
  const [jobId, setJobId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [generationPhase, setGenerationPhase] = useState<string>('')
  const [generationEngine, setGenerationEngine] = useState<GenerationEngine | null>(null)
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [activeModelId, setActiveModelId] = useState<string | null>(null)
  const [completedResult, setCompletedResult] = useState<{
    jobId: string
    draftId?: string
    headline?: string
    channelVariants: ChannelVariant[]
    usageSummary?: {
      modelsUsed?: string[]
      totalTokens?: number
      estimatedCostUsd?: number | null
    }
  } | null>(null)

  const phaseLabels: Record<string, string> = {
    queued: 'En cola',
    pending: 'Pendiente',
    normalizing_intent: 'Normalizando intención',
    researching: 'Investigando mercado',
    extracting_insights: 'Extrayendo insights',
    composing: 'Componiendo narrativa',
    strategizing: 'Definiendo estrategia',
    optimizing_channels: 'Optimizando canales',
    validating: 'Validando cumplimiento',
    scheduling: 'Programando publicación',
    research: 'Investigando mercado',
    strategy: 'Construyendo narrativa',
    optimize: 'Optimizando canales',
    compliance: 'Validando cumplimiento',
    done: 'Completado',
    error: 'Error',
    rejected: 'Rechazado',
    completed: 'Completado',
    failed: 'Falló',
  }

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!jobId) return

    const pollStatus = async () => {
      try {
        const res = await fetch(`/api/content/status?job_id=${jobId}`, {
          credentials: 'include',
        })

        if (!res.ok) {
          if (res.status === 404) {
            return
          }

          if (res.status === 401 || res.status === 403) {
            const data = await res.json().catch(() => null)
            setError(data?.error || 'La sesión no está preparada para consultar el estado.')
            setIsGenerating(false)
            return
          }

          throw new Error(`API responded with ${res.status}`)
        }

        const data = await res.json()

        if (data.phase) {
          setGenerationPhase(data.phase)
        }

        if (data.engine) {
          setGenerationEngine(data.engine as GenerationEngine)
        }

        const currentModelId =
          data.result?.usageSummary?.modelsUsed?.[0] ||
          ((data.engine ?? generationEngine) === 'hermes'
            ? 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'
            : (data.engine ?? generationEngine) === 'hermes-mock'
              ? 'hermes-worker-mock'
              : data.result?.overrideModel?.modelId)
        if (currentModelId) {
          setActiveModelId(currentModelId)
        }

        if (data.status === 'completed' || data.status === 'failed') {
          setIsGenerating(false)

          if (data.status === 'completed' && data.result) {
            setError(null)
            setCompletedResult({
              jobId,
              draftId: data.draftId ?? data.result?.draftId,
              headline: data.result.headline,
              channelVariants: data.result.channelVariants ?? [],
              usageSummary: data.result.usageSummary,
            })
            setGenerationPhase('done')
          } else {
            setError(`Generación fallida: ${data.error || data.result?.errors?.at?.(-1) || 'Error desconocido'}`)
          }
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Status poll error:', err)
      }
    }

    void pollStatus()

    const interval = setInterval(() => {
      void pollStatus()
    }, 4000)

    return () => clearInterval(interval)
  }, [generationEngine, jobId])

  const handleToggleChannel = (channel: PublishChannel) => {
    setSelectedChannels(prev =>
      prev.includes(channel)
        ? prev.filter(c => c !== channel)
        : [...prev, channel]
    )
  }

  const handleSelectAllES = () => {
    const esChannels: PublishChannel[] = ['linkedin_es', 'blog_es', 'facebook_es']
    setSelectedChannels(prev => Array.from(new Set([...prev, ...esChannels])))
  }

  const handleSelectAllEN = () => {
    const enChannels: PublishChannel[] = ['linkedin_en', 'blog_en', 'facebook_en']
    setSelectedChannels(prev => Array.from(new Set([...prev, ...enChannels])))
  }

  const handleInvestorLensChange = (value: string | null) => {
    if (value) setInvestorLens(value as InvestorLens)
  }

  const handleCtaModeChange = (value: string | null) => {
    if (value) setCtaMode(value as CtaMode)
  }

  const handleEvidenceModeChange = (value: string | null) => {
    if (value) setEvidenceMode(value as EvidenceMode)
  }

  const handleAssertivenessChange = (value: string | null) => {
    if (value) setAssertiveness(value as AssertivenessLevel)
  }

  const buildLabelMap = <T extends string>(options: readonly { value: T; label: string }[]) =>
    Object.fromEntries(options.map((option) => [option.value, option.label])) as Record<T, string>

  const ctaModeLabels = buildLabelMap(CTA_MODE_OPTIONS)
  const evidenceModeLabels = buildLabelMap(EVIDENCE_MODE_OPTIONS)
  const assertivenessLabels = buildLabelMap(ASSERTIVENESS_OPTIONS)
  const investorLensLabels = buildLabelMap(INVESTOR_LENS_OPTIONS)
  const zoneLabels = buildLabelMap(ZONE_OPTIONS)
  const framingLabels = buildLabelMap(FRAMING_OPTIONS)
  const audienceLabels = buildLabelMap(TARGET_AUDIENCE_OPTIONS)
  const contentObjectiveLabels = buildLabelMap(CONTENT_OBJECTIVE_OPTIONS)
  const signalTypeLabels = buildLabelMap(SIGNAL_TYPE_OPTIONS)
  const claimRiskLabels = buildLabelMap(CLAIM_RISK_OPTIONS)
  const languageLabels = buildLabelMap(LANGUAGE_OPTIONS)

  const handleGenerate = async () => {
    console.log('🔵 handleGenerate called')
    console.log('topic:', topic)
    console.log('selectedChannels:', selectedChannels)
    console.log('coreThesis:', coreThesis)
    console.log('desiredReaderOutcome:', desiredReaderOutcome)

    setError(null)
    setActiveModelId(null)
    setCompletedResult(null)
    setIsGenerating(true)
    setJobId(null)
    setGenerationPhase('queued')
    setGenerationEngine(null)

    if (!selectedChannels.length) {
      console.log('❌ No channels selected')
      setError('Please select at least one publication channel')
      setIsGenerating(false)
      return
    }

    try {
      console.log('📤 Preparing workspace session...')

      await ensureWorkspaceSession()

      console.log('📤 Sending fetch request...')

      const response = await fetch('/api/content/generate', {
        method: 'POST',
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          topic,
          zone,
          framing,
          targetAudience,
          channels: selectedChannels,
          contentObjective,
          signalType,
          claimRiskLevel,
          sourceUrls: sourceUrls.trim() || undefined,
          allowQuantitativeData,
          allowCtaLink,
          language,
          customGuidelines: customGuidelines.length > 0 ? customGuidelines : undefined,
          coreThesis: coreThesis.trim() ? coreThesis : undefined,
          investorLens,
          desiredReaderOutcome: desiredReaderOutcome.trim() ? desiredReaderOutcome : undefined,
          ctaMode,
          evidenceMode,
          assertiveness,
          microzone: microzone.trim() ? microzone : undefined,
          exampleOutput: exampleOutput.trim() ? exampleOutput : undefined,
        }),
      })

      console.log('✅ Response received:', response.status, response.ok)

      if (!response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json().catch(() => null)
        console.log('❌ Response error:', data)
        throw new Error(data?.error || data?.message || 'Generation request failed')
      }

      const data = await response.json()
      console.log('📦 Response data:', data)
      setJobId(data.jobId)
      setGenerationEngine((data.engine as GenerationEngine | undefined) ?? null)
      setGenerationPhase(data.phase || 'queued')
    } catch (err) {
      const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Unknown error'
      console.error('🔥 Error:', errorMsg, err)
      setError(errorMsg)
      setIsGenerating(false)
    }
  }

  if (isGenerating) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full flex items-center justify-center p-6">
        <div className="max-w-md text-center">
          <Loader className="mx-auto h-12 w-12 animate-spin text-primary" />
          <h2 className="mt-6 text-xl font-bold text-foreground">Generando contenido</h2>
          <p className="mt-2 text-secondary">
            Estamos preparando tu pieza y optimizando la mejor ruta para publicarla.
          </p>
          <p className="mt-1 text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            {jobId
              ? 'El sistema ya está trabajando y actualizaremos esta vista automáticamente.'
              : 'Preparando la sesión de workspace y arrancando el pipeline de generación.'}
          </p>
          {generationPhase && (
            <p className="mt-4 text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">
              {phaseLabels[generationPhase] || generationPhase}
            </p>
          )}
          {activeModelId && (
            <p className="mt-2 text-sm text-foreground">
              Modelo: <span className="font-medium">{activeModelId}</span>
            </p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>
    )
  }

  if (completedResult) {
    const primaryModel = completedResult.usageSummary?.modelsUsed?.join(', ')
    const totalTokens = completedResult.usageSummary?.totalTokens ?? 0
    const estimatedCostUsd = completedResult.usageSummary?.estimatedCostUsd

    const platforms = ['linkedin', 'blog', 'facebook']
    const platformLabels: Record<string, string> = {
      linkedin: 'LinkedIn',
      blog: 'Blog (Newsletter)',
      facebook: 'Facebook',
    }

    return (
      <div className="w-full space-y-6">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="text-2xl text-foreground">Generación completada</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription className="text-muted-foreground">
              Se han generado {completedResult.channelVariants.length} variantes para {completedResult.headline || topic}.
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>
          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            <div className="grid gap-3 md:grid-cols-3">
              <div className="rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/30 p-4">
                <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">Modelo usado</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{primaryModel || 'No disponible'}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/30 p-4">
                <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">Tokens consumidos</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">{totalTokens.toLocaleString('es-ES')}</p>
              </div>
              <div className="rounded-lg border border-border bg-muted/30 p-4">
                <p className="text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.18em] text-muted-foreground">Coste estimado</p>
                <p className="mt-2 text-sm font-medium text-foreground">
                  {estimatedCostUsd == null
                    ? 'No disponible'
                    : estimatedCostUsd === 0
                    ? '$0.00'
                    : `$${estimatedCostUsd.toFixed(4)}`}
                </p>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-6">
              <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground border-b border-border pb-2">Variantes generadas</h3>

              <div className="grid gap-6">
                {platforms.map(platform => {
                  const platformVariants = completedResult.channelVariants.filter(v => v.platform === platform)
                  if (platformVariants.length === 0) return null

                  return (
                    <div key={platform} className="space-y-3">
                      <h4 className="text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-primary">{platformLabels[platform]}</h4>
                      <div className="grid gap-4 md:grid-cols-2">
                        {platformVariants.map(variant => {
                          const variantWarnings = [
                            ...(variant.qualityWarnings ?? []),
                            ...(variant.complianceWarnings ?? []),
                          ]

                          return (
                          <Card key={variant.channel} className="bg-muted/20 border-border overflow-hidden">
                            <div className="p-4 space-y-3">
                              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
                                <span className="text-xs font-medium px-2 py-0.5 rounded bg-primary/10 text-primary uppercase">
                                  {variant.language === 'es' ? 'Español' : 'Inglés'}
                                </span>
                                <span className="text-[10px] text-muted-foreground">
                                  {variant.wordCount} palabras | {variant.charCount} caracteres
                                </span>
                              </div>
                              <p className="text-sm text-foreground line-clamp-4 italic">
                                &quot;{variant.draft}&quot;
                              </p>
                              {variantWarnings.length > 0 ? (
                                <div className="space-y-1.5 rounded-lg border border-amber-500/20 bg-amber-500/10 p-3">
                                  <div className="flex items-center gap-1.5 text-[10px] text-amber-500 font-medium">
                                    <AlertCircle className="h-3 w-3" />
                                    <span>{variantWarnings.length} aviso{variantWarnings.length > 1 ? 's' : ''} detectado{variantWarnings.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}</span>
                                  </div>
                                  <ul className="space-y-1 text-[11px] leading-5 text-amber-100/90">
                                    {variantWarnings.slice(0, 2).map((warning) => (
                                      <li key={warning}>• {warning}</li>
                                    ))}
                                  </ul>
                                </div>
                              ) : null}
                            </div>
                          </Card>
                        )})}
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  )
                })}
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3 pt-4">
              <Button
                onClick={() =>
                  router.push(
                    completedResult.draftId
                      ? `/content/review?draft_id=${completedResult.draftId}`
                      : `/content/review?job_id=${completedResult.jobId}`
                  )
                }
                size="lg"
                className="bg-primary hover:bg-primary/90 text-primary-foreground px-8"
              >
                Revisar y editar variantes
              </Button>
              <Button
                onClick={() => setCompletedResult(null)}
                variant="outline"
                size="lg"
                className="border-border text-foreground hover:bg-muted"
              >
                Generar otra pieza
              </Button>
            </div>
          </CardContent>
        </Card>
      </div>
    )
  }

  return (
    <div className="w-full">
      <div className="w-full">
        <Card>
          <CardHeader>
            <CardTitle className="text-2xl text-foreground">Generar Contenido</CardTitle>
            <CardDescription className="text-muted-foreground">
              Define el tema, zona, framing y audiencia para generar contenido optimizado por canal
            </CardDescription>
          </CardHeader>

          <CardContent className="space-y-6">
            {error && (
              <div className="rounded-lg bg-destructive/10 border border-destructive/30 p-4 flex gap-3">
                <AlertCircle className="h-5 w-5 text-destructive/80 flex-shrink-0 mt-0.5" />
                <p className="text-destructive-foreground/90 text-sm">{error}</p>
              </div>
            )}

            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label className="text-secondary">Tema de contenido</Label>
              <Input
                placeholder="Ej: Inversión inmobiliaria en Andratx 2026"
                value={topic}
                onChange={(e) => setTopic(e.target.value)}
                className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground placeholder-muted-foreground"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Zona territorial</Label>
                <Select value={zone} onValueChange={(v) => setZone(v as ContentZone)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{zoneLabels[zone] || zone}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {ZONE_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Enfoque editorial</Label>
                <Select value={framing} onValueChange={(v) => setFraming(v as ContentFraming)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{framingLabels[framing] || framing}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {FRAMING_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Audiencia objetivo</Label>
                <Select value={targetAudience} onValueChange={(v) => setTargetAudience(v as TargetAudience)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{audienceLabels[targetAudience] || targetAudience}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {TARGET_AUDIENCE_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 gap-4 md:grid-cols-3">
              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Objetivo del contenido</Label>
                <Select value={contentObjective} onValueChange={(value) => value && setContentObjective(value as ContentObjective)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{contentObjectiveLabels[contentObjective]}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {CONTENT_OBJECTIVE_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Tipo de señal</Label>
                <Select value={signalType} onValueChange={(value) => value && setSignalType(value as SignalType)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{signalTypeLabels[signalType]}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {SIGNAL_TYPE_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              <div className="space-y-2">
                <Label className="text-secondary">Nivel de riesgo del claim</Label>
                <Select value={claimRiskLevel} onValueChange={(value) => value && setClaimRiskLevel(value as ClaimRiskLevel)}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="bg-muted border-border text-foreground">
                    <span>{claimRiskLabels[claimRiskLevel]}</span>
                  </SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent className="bg-muted border-border">
                    {CLAIM_RISK_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                      <SelectItem key={opt.value} value={opt.value} className="text-foreground">
                        {opt.label}
                      </SelectItem>
                    ))}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="space-y-2">
              <Label className="text-secondary">Tesis Central <span className="text-destructive">*</span></Label>
              <textarea
                value={coreThesis}
                onChange={(e) => setCoreThesis(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Define la idea central que guiará el contenido..."
