"use client"

import { Tabs as TabsPrimitive } from "@base-ui/react/tabs"
import { cva, type VariantProps } from "class-variance-authority"

import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"

function Tabs({
  className,
  orientation = "horizontal",
  ...props
}: TabsPrimitive.Root.Props) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Root
      data-slot="tabs"
      data-orientation={orientation}
      className={cn(
        "group/tabs flex gap-2 data-horizontal:flex-col",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

const tabsListVariants = cva(
  "group/tabs-list inline-flex w-fit items-center justify-center rounded-lg p-[3px] text-muted-foreground group-data-horizontal/tabs:h-8 group-data-vertical/tabs:h-fit group-data-vertical/tabs:flex-col data-[variant=line]:rounded-none",
  {
    variants: {
      variant: {
        default: "bg-muted",
        line: "gap-1 bg-transparent",
      },
    },
    defaultVariants: {
      variant: "default",
    },
  }
)

function TabsList({
  className,
  variant = "default",
  ...props
}: TabsPrimitive.List.Props & VariantProps<typeof tabsListVariants>) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.List
      data-slot="tabs-list"
      data-variant={variant}
      className={cn(tabsListVariants({ variant }), className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function TabsTrigger({ className, ...props }: TabsPrimitive.Tab.Props) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Tab
      data-slot="tabs-trigger"
      className={cn(
        "relative inline-flex h-[calc(100%-1px)] flex-1 items-center justify-center gap-1.5 rounded-md border border-transparent px-1.5 py-0.5 text-sm font-medium whitespace-nowrap text-foreground/60 transition-all group-data-vertical/tabs:w-full group-data-vertical/tabs:justify-start hover:text-foreground focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-[3px] focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:outline-1 focus-visible:outline-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 aria-disabled:pointer-events-none aria-disabled:opacity-50 dark:text-muted-foreground dark:hover:text-foreground group-data-[variant=default]/tabs-list:data-active:shadow-sm group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:shadow-none [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg]:shrink-0 [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4",
        "group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:bg-transparent group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:bg-transparent dark:group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:border-transparent dark:group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:bg-transparent",
        "data-active:bg-background data-active:text-foreground dark:data-active:border-input dark:data-active:bg-input/30 dark:data-active:text-foreground",
        "after:absolute after:bg-foreground after:opacity-0 after:transition-opacity group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:inset-x-0 group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:bottom-[-5px] group-data-horizontal/tabs:after:h-0.5 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:inset-y-0 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:-right-1 group-data-vertical/tabs:after:w-0.5 group-data-[variant=line]/tabs-list:data-active:after:opacity-100",
        className
      )}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

function TabsContent({ className, ...props }: TabsPrimitive.Panel.Props) {
  return (
    <TabsPrimitive.Panel
      data-slot="tabs-content"
      className={cn("flex-1 text-sm outline-none", className)}
      {...props}
    />
  )
}

export { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent, tabsListVariants }

FILE: src/components/ui/__tests__/surface-card.test.tsx

import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

import { SurfaceCard } from '@/components/ui/surface-card'
import { renderWithProviders } from '@/test/render'

describe('SurfaceCard', () => {
  it('renders panel variant by default', () => {
    const { getByTestId } = renderWithProviders(
      <SurfaceCard data-testid="surface-card">Panel</SurfaceCard>
    )

    const card = getByTestId('surface-card')
    expect(card).toHaveAttribute('data-variant', 'panel')
    expect(card.className).toContain('surface-card-panel')
  })

  it('renders inner variant when requested', () => {
    const { getByTestId } = renderWithProviders(
      <SurfaceCard data-testid="surface-card" variant="inner">
        Inner
      </SurfaceCard>
    )

    const card = getByTestId('surface-card')
    expect(card).toHaveAttribute('data-variant', 'inner')
    expect(card.className).toContain('surface-card-inner')
  })
})

================================================
FILE: src/lib/editorial-assets.ts
================================================
import { del, get, put } from '@vercel/blob'

import type { EditorialAsset } from '@/lib/db/schema'
import { createEditorialAsset } from '@/lib/editorial-drafts-store'

function getBlobToken() {
  return process.env.BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN
}

function ensureBlobConfigured() {
  const token = getBlobToken()
  if (!token) {
    throw new Error('BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN is not configured')
  }
  return token
}

function sanitizeSegment(value: string) {
  return value
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9-_]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '')
    .slice(0, 64)
}

function extensionFromMimeType(mimeType: string) {
  switch (mimeType) {
    case 'image/jpeg':
      return 'jpg'
    case 'image/png':
      return 'png'
    case 'image/webp':
      return 'webp'
    case 'image/gif':
      return 'gif'
    default:
      return 'bin'
  }
}

function parseDataUrl(dataUrl: string) {
  const match = dataUrl.match(/^data:([^;]+);base64,(.+)$/)
  if (!match) {
    throw new Error('Invalid data URL')
  }

  const mimeType = match[1]
  const base64Payload = match[2]
  const buffer = Buffer.from(base64Payload, 'base64')

  return {
    mimeType,
    buffer,
    sizeBytes: buffer.byteLength,
  }
}

export function isBlobConfigured() {
  return Boolean(getBlobToken())
}

export async function uploadEditorialImageFromDataUrl(input: {
  workspaceId: string
  draftId: string
  variantId?: string | null
  channel: string
  dataUrl: string
}) {
  const token = ensureBlobConfigured()
  const { mimeType, buffer, sizeBytes } = parseDataUrl(input.dataUrl)
  const extension = extensionFromMimeType(mimeType)
  const pathname = [
    'editorial-drafts',
    sanitizeSegment(input.workspaceId),
    sanitizeSegment(input.draftId),
    sanitizeSegment(input.variantId ?? input.channel),
    `${sanitizeSegment(input.channel)}.${extension}`,
  ].join('/')

  const blob = await put(pathname, buffer, {
    access: 'private',
    contentType: mimeType,
    addRandomSuffix: true,
    token,
  })

  const asset = await createEditorialAsset({
    workspaceId: input.workspaceId,
    draftId: input.draftId,
    variantId: input.variantId ?? null,
    blobPath: blob.pathname,
    blobUrl: blob.url,
    mimeType,
    sizeBytes,
  })

  return {
    asset,
    proxyUrl: asset ? `/api/content/assets/${asset.id}` : blob.url,
  }
}

export async function fetchEditorialBlob(pathnameOrUrl: string) {
  const token = ensureBlobConfigured()
  return get(pathnameOrUrl, {
    access: 'private',
    token,
    useCache: true,
  })
}

export async function deleteEditorialBlob(pathnameOrUrl: string) {
  const token = ensureBlobConfigured()
  await del(pathnameOrUrl, { token })
}

export async function deleteEditorialAssetsBlobs(assets: EditorialAsset[]) {
  if (assets.length === 0) return

  const uniqueTargets = Array.from(
    new Set(
      assets
        .map((asset) => asset.blobPath || asset.blobUrl)
        .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value))
    )
  )

  if (uniqueTargets.length === 0) return

  const token = ensureBlobConfigured()
  await del(uniqueTargets, { token })
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/editorial-drafts-store.ts
================================================
import { and, desc, eq } from 'drizzle-orm'

import type { ChannelVariant, ContentGenerationState, GenerationUsageSummary } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { db } from '@/lib/db/neon'
import {
  editorialAssets,
  editorialDrafts,
  editorialDraftVariants,
  type EditorialAsset,
  type EditorialDraft,
  type EditorialDraftVariant,
} from '@/lib/db/schema'

type DraftStatus = typeof editorialDrafts.$inferSelect['status']
type VariantStatus = typeof editorialDraftVariants.$inferSelect['status']

export interface EditorialDraftWithRelations extends EditorialDraft {
  variants: EditorialDraftVariant[]
  assets: EditorialAsset[]
}

export interface EditorialDraftListFilters {
  status?: DraftStatus
  zone?: string
  framing?: string
  limit?: number
}

export interface CreateEditorialAssetInput {
  workspaceId: string
  draftId: string
  variantId?: string | null
  blobPath: string
  blobUrl: string
  mimeType: string
  sizeBytes?: number | null
  width?: number | null
  height?: number | null
}

export interface UpdateEditorialVariantInput {
  editedDraft?: string
  draft?: string
  title?: string | null
  excerpt?: string | null
  seoTitle?: string | null
  seoDescription?: string | null
  hashtags?: string[] | null
  status?: VariantStatus
  publishedUrl?: string | null
  publishedAt?: Date | null
  complianceWarnings?: string[]
  qualityWarnings?: string[]
}

function countWords(text: string) {
  return text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length
}

function deriveDraftStatusFromVariantStatuses(
  statuses: Array<EditorialDraftVariant['status'] | null | undefined>
): DraftStatus {
  const validStatuses = statuses.filter(Boolean) as EditorialDraftVariant['status'][]
  if (validStatuses.length === 0) return 'draft'

  const publishedCount = validStatuses.filter((status) => status === 'published').length
  if (publishedCount > 0 && publishedCount === validStatuses.length) return 'published_all'
  if (publishedCount > 0) return 'published_partial'

  const approvedCount = validStatuses.filter((status) => status === 'approved').length
  if (approvedCount > 0 && approvedCount === validStatuses.length) return 'approved_all'
  if (approvedCount > 0) return 'approved_partial'

  return 'in_review'
}

function mapVariantStatus(status: ChannelVariant['status']): VariantStatus {
  switch (status) {
    case 'approved':
      return 'approved'
    case 'rejected':
      return 'rejected'
    case 'edited':
      return 'edited'
    default:
      return 'draft'
  }
}

function deriveDraftStatus(variants: ChannelVariant[] | undefined): DraftStatus {
  if (!variants || variants.length === 0) return 'draft'

  const approvedCount = variants.filter((variant) => variant.status === 'approved').length

  if (approvedCount > 0 && approvedCount === variants.length) return 'approved_all'
  if (approvedCount > 0) return 'approved_partial'
  return 'in_review'
}

function mapGenerationMetadata(state: ContentGenerationState) {
  return {
    approvalStatus: state.approvalStatus,
    phase: state.phase,
    contentObjective: state.contentObjective,
    signalType: state.signalType,
    claimRiskLevel: state.claimRiskLevel,
    sourceUrls: state.sourceUrls,
    allowQuantitativeData: state.allowQuantitativeData,
    allowCtaLink: state.allowCtaLink,
    language: state.language,
    customGuidelines: state.customGuidelines ?? [],
    overrideModel: state.overrideModel ?? null,
    linkedInImageBase64: state.linkedInImageBase64 ?? null,
    coreThesis: state.coreThesis,
    investorLens: state.investorLens,
    desiredReaderOutcome: state.desiredReaderOutcome,
    ctaMode: state.ctaMode,
    evidenceMode: state.evidenceMode,
    assertiveness: state.assertiveness,
    microzone: state.microzone,
    exampleOutput: state.exampleOutput,
    researchConfidence: state.researchConfidence,
    citations: state.citations ?? [],
    errors: state.errors ?? [],
  }
}

function mapUsageSummary(summary: GenerationUsageSummary | undefined) {
  return summary ?? {}
}

function mapVariantInsert(draftId: string, variant: ChannelVariant) {
  const effectiveDraft = variant.editedDraft || variant.draft
  return {
    draftId,
    channel: variant.channel,
    platform: variant.platform,
    language: variant.language,
    title: variant.title ?? null,
    excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? null,
    draft: variant.draft,
    editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? null,
    seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? null,
    seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? null,
    hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? null,
    status: mapVariantStatus(variant.status),
    charCount: effectiveDraft.length,
    wordCount: countWords(effectiveDraft),
    complianceWarnings: variant.complianceWarnings ?? [],
    qualityWarnings: variant.qualityWarnings ?? [],
    publishedUrl: null,
    publishedAt: null,
  } satisfies typeof editorialDraftVariants.$inferInsert
}

function mapVariantUpdate(variant: ChannelVariant) {
  const effectiveDraft = variant.editedDraft || variant.draft
  return {
    platform: variant.platform,
    language: variant.language,
    title: variant.title ?? null,
    excerpt: variant.excerpt ?? null,
    draft: variant.draft,
    editedDraft: variant.editedDraft ?? null,
    seoTitle: variant.seoTitle ?? null,
    seoDescription: variant.seoDescription ?? null,
    hashtags: variant.hashtags ?? null,
    status: mapVariantStatus(variant.status),
    charCount: effectiveDraft.length,
    wordCount: countWords(effectiveDraft),
    complianceWarnings: variant.complianceWarnings ?? [],
    qualityWarnings: variant.qualityWarnings ?? [],
    updatedAt: new Date(),
  } satisfies Partial<typeof editorialDraftVariants.$inferInsert> & { updatedAt: Date }
}

export async function createEditorialDraftFromGeneration(state: ContentGenerationState) {
  const insertedDraft = await db
    .insert(editorialDrafts)
    .values({
      workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
      jobId: state.jobId,
      sourceType: 'ai_generation',
      topic: state.topic,
      headline: state.headline ?? state.topic,
      zone: state.zone,
      framing: state.framing,
      targetAudience: state.targetAudience,
      status: deriveDraftStatus(state.channelVariants),
      generationMetadata: mapGenerationMetadata(state),
      usageSummary: mapUsageSummary(state.usageSummary),
    })
    .returning()

  const draft = insertedDraft[0]
  const variants = state.channelVariants ?? []

  if (variants.length > 0) {
    await db.insert(editorialDraftVariants).values(
      variants.map((variant) => mapVariantInsert(draft.id, variant))
    )
  }

  return getEditorialDraftById(state.workspaceId, draft.id)
}

export async function upsertEditorialDraftFromGeneration(state: ContentGenerationState) {
  const existing = await getEditorialDraftByJobId(state.workspaceId, state.jobId)

  if (!existing) {
    return createEditorialDraftFromGeneration(state)
  }

  await db
    .update(editorialDrafts)
    .set({
      topic: state.topic,
      headline: state.headline ?? state.topic,
      zone: state.zone,
      framing: state.framing,
      targetAudience: state.targetAudience,
      status: deriveDraftStatus(state.channelVariants),
      generationMetadata: mapGenerationMetadata(state),
      usageSummary: mapUsageSummary(state.usageSummary),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, existing.id), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, state.workspaceId)))

  const existingVariantMap = new Map(existing.variants.map((variant) => [variant.channel, variant]))
  const variants = state.channelVariants ?? []

  for (const variant of variants) {
    const currentVariant = existingVariantMap.get(variant.channel)
    if (currentVariant) {
      await db
        .update(editorialDraftVariants)
        .set(mapVariantUpdate(variant))
        .where(eq(editorialDraftVariants.id, currentVariant.id))
      existingVariantMap.delete(variant.channel)
    } else {
      await db.insert(editorialDraftVariants).values(mapVariantInsert(existing.id, variant))
    }
  }

  for (const obsoleteVariant of existingVariantMap.values()) {
    await db.delete(editorialDraftVariants).where(eq(editorialDraftVariants.id, obsoleteVariant.id))
  }

  return getEditorialDraftById(state.workspaceId, existing.id)
}

export async function getEditorialDraftById(workspaceId: string, draftId: string): Promise<EditorialDraftWithRelations | null> {
  const draft = await db.query.editorialDrafts.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, draftId), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId)),
    with: {
      variants: true,
      assets: true,
    },
  })

  if (!draft) return null

  return {
    ...draft,
    variants: [...draft.variants].sort((left, right) => left.channel.localeCompare(right.channel)),
    assets: draft.assets,
  }
}

export async function getEditorialDraftByJobId(workspaceId: string, jobId: string): Promise<EditorialDraftWithRelations | null> {
  const draft = await db.query.editorialDrafts.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId), eq(editorialDrafts.jobId, jobId)),
    with: {
      variants: true,
      assets: true,
    },
  })

  if (!draft) return null

  return {
    ...draft,
    variants: [...draft.variants].sort((left, right) => left.channel.localeCompare(right.channel)),
    assets: draft.assets,
  }
}

export async function getEditorialAssetById(workspaceId: string, assetId: string) {
  return db.query.editorialAssets.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(editorialAssets.id, assetId), eq(editorialAssets.workspaceId, workspaceId)),
  })
}

export async function listEditorialDrafts(workspaceId: string, filters: EditorialDraftListFilters = {}) {
  const conditions = [eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId)]

  if (filters.status) {
    conditions.push(eq(editorialDrafts.status, filters.status))
  }
  if (filters.zone) {
    conditions.push(eq(editorialDrafts.zone, filters.zone))
  }
  if (filters.framing) {
    conditions.push(eq(editorialDrafts.framing, filters.framing))
  }

  return db.query.editorialDrafts.findMany({
    where: conditions.length === 1 ? conditions[0] : and(...conditions),
    orderBy: [desc(editorialDrafts.updatedAt)],
    limit: filters.limit ?? 20,
    with: {
      variants: true,
      assets: true,
    },
  })
}

export async function updateEditorialDraftStatus(workspaceId: string, draftId: string, status: DraftStatus) {
  const updated = await db
    .update(editorialDrafts)
    .set({
      status,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, draftId), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId)))
    .returning()

  return updated[0] ?? null
}

export async function updateEditorialDraftVariant(
  workspaceId: string,
  draftId: string,
  variantId: string,
  input: UpdateEditorialVariantInput
) {
  const draft = await db.query.editorialDrafts.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, draftId), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId)),
  })

  if (!draft) {
    return null
  }

  const currentVariant = await db.query.editorialDraftVariants.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(editorialDraftVariants.id, variantId), eq(editorialDraftVariants.draftId, draftId)),
  })

  if (!currentVariant) {
    return null
  }

  const nextEditedDraft =
    input.editedDraft !== undefined
      ? input.editedDraft
      : currentVariant.editedDraft

  const effectiveText = nextEditedDraft || input.draft || currentVariant.draft

  const updatedVariants = await db
    .update(editorialDraftVariants)
    .set({
      draft: input.draft ?? currentVariant.draft,
      editedDraft: nextEditedDraft ?? null,
      title: input.title !== undefined ? input.title : currentVariant.title,
      excerpt: input.excerpt !== undefined ? input.excerpt : currentVariant.excerpt,
      seoTitle: input.seoTitle !== undefined ? input.seoTitle : currentVariant.seoTitle,
      seoDescription:
        input.seoDescription !== undefined ? input.seoDescription : currentVariant.seoDescription,
      hashtags: input.hashtags !== undefined ? input.hashtags : currentVariant.hashtags,
      status: input.status ?? currentVariant.status,
      publishedUrl: input.publishedUrl !== undefined ? input.publishedUrl : currentVariant.publishedUrl,
      publishedAt: input.publishedAt !== undefined ? input.publishedAt : currentVariant.publishedAt,
      charCount: effectiveText.length,
      wordCount: countWords(effectiveText),
      complianceWarnings:
        input.complianceWarnings !== undefined
          ? input.complianceWarnings
          : currentVariant.complianceWarnings,
      qualityWarnings:
        input.qualityWarnings !== undefined
          ? input.qualityWarnings
          : currentVariant.qualityWarnings,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(and(eq(editorialDraftVariants.id, variantId), eq(editorialDraftVariants.draftId, draftId)))
    .returning()

  const allVariantStatuses = await db.query.editorialDraftVariants.findMany({
    where: eq(editorialDraftVariants.draftId, draftId),
    columns: {
      status: true,
    },
  })

  await db
    .update(editorialDrafts)
    .set({
      status: deriveDraftStatusFromVariantStatuses(allVariantStatuses.map((variant) => variant.status)),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(eq(editorialDrafts.id, draftId))

  return updatedVariants[0] ?? null
}

export async function removeEditorialAssetsForVariant(
  workspaceId: string,
  draftId: string,
  variantId: string
) {
  const removed = await db
    .delete(editorialAssets)
    .where(
      and(
        eq(editorialAssets.workspaceId, workspaceId),
        eq(editorialAssets.draftId, draftId),
        eq(editorialAssets.variantId, variantId)
      )
    )
    .returning()

  if (removed.length > 0) {
    await db
      .update(editorialDrafts)
      .set({ updatedAt: new Date() })
      .where(and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, draftId), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, workspaceId)))
  }

  return removed
}

export async function createEditorialAsset(input: CreateEditorialAssetInput) {
  const inserted = await db
    .insert(editorialAssets)
    .values({
      workspaceId: input.workspaceId,
      draftId: input.draftId,
      variantId: input.variantId ?? null,
      provider: 'vercel_blob',
      blobPath: input.blobPath,
      blobUrl: input.blobUrl,
      mimeType: input.mimeType,
      sizeBytes: input.sizeBytes ?? null,
      width: input.width ?? null,
      height: input.height ?? null,
    })
    .returning()

  await db
    .update(editorialDrafts)
    .set({ updatedAt: new Date() })
    .where(and(eq(editorialDrafts.id, input.draftId), eq(editorialDrafts.workspaceId, input.workspaceId)))

  return inserted[0] ?? null
}

import { and, desc, eq } from 'drizzle-orm'

import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { db } from '@/lib/db/neon'
import { generationJobs, type GenerationJob } from '@/lib/db/schema'
import type { GenerationEngine } from '@/lib/hermes'

export interface PersistedGenerationJob extends GenerationJob {
  inputState: ContentGenerationState
  resultState: ContentGenerationState | null
}

interface CreateGenerationJobInput {
  jobId: string
  workspaceId: string
  engine: GenerationEngine
  inputState: ContentGenerationState
}

type PersistedJobStatus = typeof generationJobs.$inferSelect['status']

function parseState(value: unknown): ContentGenerationState | null {
  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object') return null
  return value as ContentGenerationState
}

function mapJob(row: GenerationJob): PersistedGenerationJob {
  return {
    ...row,
    inputState: row.inputState as ContentGenerationState,
    resultState: parseState(row.resultState),
  }
}

export async function createGenerationJob(input: CreateGenerationJobInput) {
  const [row] = await db
    .insert(generationJobs)
    .values({
      jobId: input.jobId,
      workspaceId: input.workspaceId,
      engine: input.engine,
      status: 'queued',
      phase: 'queued',
      inputState: input.inputState,
      resultState: input.inputState,
    })
    .returning()

  return mapJob(row)
}

export async function getGenerationJobByJobId(workspaceId: string, jobId: string) {
  const row = await db.query.generationJobs.findFirst({
    where: and(eq(generationJobs.workspaceId, workspaceId), eq(generationJobs.jobId, jobId)),
  })

  return row ? mapJob(row) : null
}

export async function getGenerationJobByJobIdUnsafe(jobId: string) {
  const row = await db.query.generationJobs.findFirst({
    where: eq(generationJobs.jobId, jobId),
  })

  return row ? mapJob(row) : null
}

export async function attachWorkflowRun(jobId: string, workflowRunId: string) {
  const [row] = await db
    .update(generationJobs)
    .set({
      workflowRunId,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(eq(generationJobs.jobId, jobId))
    .returning()

  return row ? mapJob(row) : null
}

interface UpdateGenerationJobProgressInput {
  status?: PersistedJobStatus
  phase?: string
  resultState?: ContentGenerationState
  draftId?: string | null
  errorMessage?: string | null
  workflowRunId?: string | null
  startedAt?: Date | null
  finishedAt?: Date | null
}

export async function updateGenerationJobProgress(
  jobId: string,
  input: UpdateGenerationJobProgressInput
) {
  const [row] = await db
    .update(generationJobs)
    .set({
      status: input.status,
      phase: input.phase,
      resultState: input.resultState,
      draftId: input.draftId,
      errorMessage: input.errorMessage,
      workflowRunId: input.workflowRunId,
      startedAt: input.startedAt,
      finishedAt: input.finishedAt,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    })
    .where(eq(generationJobs.jobId, jobId))
    .returning()

  return row ? mapJob(row) : null
}

export async function listRecentGenerationJobs(workspaceId: string, limit = 20) {
  const rows = await db.query.generationJobs.findMany({
    where: eq(generationJobs.workspaceId, workspaceId),
    orderBy: [desc(generationJobs.updatedAt)],
    limit,
  })

  return rows.map(mapJob)
}

FILE: src/lib/job-store.ts

// Shared job store for content generation
// In production, this should be replaced with a database

export interface Job {
  id: string
  status: 'in_progress' | 'completed' | 'failed'
  phase: string
  result?: unknown
  error?: string
  createdAt: string
}

let jobStore: Map<string, Job> = new Map()

// Initialize global store on module load
if (typeof globalThis !== 'undefined') {
  const globalWithJobStore = globalThis as typeof globalThis & { __jobStore?: Map<string, Job> }
  if (!globalWithJobStore.__jobStore) {
    globalWithJobStore.__jobStore = new Map()
  }
  jobStore = globalWithJobStore.__jobStore
}

export function setJob(jobId: string, job: Job) {
  jobStore.set(jobId, job)
}

export function updateJob(jobId: string, partial: Partial<Job>) {
  const current = jobStore.get(jobId)
  if (!current) return

  jobStore.set(jobId, {
    ...current,
    ...partial,
  })
}

export function getJob(jobId: string): Job | undefined {
  return jobStore.get(jobId)
}

export function getAllJobs(): Map<string, Job> {
  return jobStore
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/learning-store.ts
================================================
import { eq } from 'drizzle-orm'

import type { CustomGuideline } from '@/lib/agents/types'

export interface LearningProposal {
  jobId: string
  workspaceId: string
  status: 'pending_confirmation' | 'accepted' | 'rejected'
  detectedAt: string
  summary: {
    tone?: string
    structure?: string
    cta?: string
    wordsPreferred?: string[]
    wordsToAvoid?: string[]
  }
  guidelineText: string
  requiresUserConfirmation: true
}

interface WorkspaceLearningProfile {
  workspaceId: string
  acceptedGuidelines: string[]
  updatedAt: string
}

let proposalStore = new Map<string, LearningProposal>()
let workspaceProfileStore = new Map<string, WorkspaceLearningProfile>()

if (typeof globalThis !== 'undefined') {
  const globalWithStores = globalThis as typeof globalThis & {
    __learningProposalStore?: Map<string, LearningProposal>
    __workspaceLearningStore?: Map<string, WorkspaceLearningProfile>
  }

  if (!globalWithStores.__learningProposalStore) {
    globalWithStores.__learningProposalStore = new Map()
  }
  if (!globalWithStores.__workspaceLearningStore) {
    globalWithStores.__workspaceLearningStore = new Map()
  }

  proposalStore = globalWithStores.__learningProposalStore
  workspaceProfileStore = globalWithStores.__workspaceLearningStore
}

const PRUDENT_WORDS = ['señal', 'fundamentos', 'escasez', 'liquidez', 'criterio']
const AVOID_WORDS = ['garantizado', 'subirá', 'imperdible', 'único', 'rentabilidad asegurada']

function countMatches(text: string, word: string): number {
  const matches = text.toLowerCase().match(new RegExp(`\\b${word.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&')}\\b`, 'g'))
  return matches?.length ?? 0
}

function buildLearningProposal(input: {
  jobId: string
  workspaceId: string
  originalDrafts: { channel: string; draft: string }[]
  editedDrafts: { channel: string; draft: string }[]
}): LearningProposal | null {
  const originalCombined = input.originalDrafts.map((draft) => draft.draft).join('\n\n')
  const editedCombined = input.editedDrafts.map((draft) => draft.draft).join('\n\n')
  if (!originalCombined.trim() || !editedCombined.trim() || originalCombined === editedCombined) {
    return null
  }

  const originalWordCount = originalCombined.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length
  const editedWordCount = editedCombined.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length

  const preferredWords = PRUDENT_WORDS.filter(
    (word) => countMatches(editedCombined, word) > countMatches(originalCombined, word)
  )
  const wordsToAvoid = AVOID_WORDS.filter(
    (word) => countMatches(originalCombined, word) > countMatches(editedCombined, word)
  )

  const tone =
    editedCombined.includes('podría') || editedCombined.includes('conviene') || editedCombined.includes('puede')
      ? 'El usuario prefiere formulaciones prudentes y menos categóricas.'
      : undefined

  const structure =
    editedWordCount < originalWordCount * 0.9
      ? 'El usuario suele compactar la pieza y priorizar versiones más concisas.'
      : editedCombined.includes('\n\n')
        ? 'El usuario mantiene una estructura aireada con párrafos cortos.'
        : undefined

  const cta = editedCombined.trim().endsWith('?')
    ? 'El usuario prefiere cierres reflexivos o conversacionales antes que llamadas directas.'
    : undefined

  const guidelineParts = [
    tone,
    structure,
    cta,
    preferredWords.length > 0 ? `Palabras preferidas: ${preferredWords.join(', ')}.` : undefined,
    wordsToAvoid.length > 0 ? `Evitar cuando sea posible: ${wordsToAvoid.join(', ')}.` : undefined,
  ].filter(Boolean)

  if (guidelineParts.length === 0) {
    return null
  }

  return {
    jobId: input.jobId,
    workspaceId: input.workspaceId,
    status: 'pending_confirmation',
    detectedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    summary: {
      tone,
      structure,
      cta,
      wordsPreferred: preferredWords,
      wordsToAvoid,
    },
    guidelineText: guidelineParts.join(' '),
    requiresUserConfirmation: true,
  }
}

function persistProposalToMemory(proposal: LearningProposal) {
  proposalStore.set(proposal.jobId, proposal)
}

function persistWorkspaceGuidelinesToMemory(workspaceId: string, guidelines: string[]) {
  workspaceProfileStore.set(workspaceId, {
    workspaceId,
    acceptedGuidelines: guidelines,
    updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  })
}

async function tryPersistProposalToDb(proposal: LearningProposal) {
  try {
    const { db } = await import('@/lib/db/neon')
    const { editorialLearningProposals } = await import('@/lib/db/schema')

    const existing = await db.query.editorialLearningProposals.findFirst({
      where: eq(editorialLearningProposals.jobId, proposal.jobId),
    })

    const values = {
      jobId: proposal.jobId,
      workspaceId: proposal.workspaceId,
      status: proposal.status,
      summary: proposal.summary,
      guidelineText: proposal.guidelineText,
      requiresUserConfirmation: proposal.requiresUserConfirmation,
      detectedAt: new Date(proposal.detectedAt),
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    }

    if (existing) {
      await db
        .update(editorialLearningProposals)
        .set(values)
        .where(eq(editorialLearningProposals.jobId, proposal.jobId))
    } else {
      await db.insert(editorialLearningProposals).values(values)
    }

    return true
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

async function tryLoadProposalFromDb(jobId: string): Promise<LearningProposal | undefined> {
  try {
    const { db } = await import('@/lib/db/neon')
    const { editorialLearningProposals } = await import('@/lib/db/schema')

    const row = await db.query.editorialLearningProposals.findFirst({
      where: eq(editorialLearningProposals.jobId, jobId),
    })

    if (!row) return undefined

    return {
      jobId: row.jobId,
      workspaceId: row.workspaceId,
      status: row.status,
      detectedAt: row.detectedAt.toISOString(),
      summary: (row.summary ?? {}) as LearningProposal['summary'],
      guidelineText: row.guidelineText,
      requiresUserConfirmation: true,
    }
  } catch {
    return undefined
  }
}

async function tryPersistWorkspaceGuidelinesToDb(workspaceId: string, guidelines: string[]) {
  try {
    const { db } = await import('@/lib/db/neon')
    const { workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles } = await import('@/lib/db/schema')

    const existing = await db.query.workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles.findFirst({
      where: eq(workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles.workspaceId, workspaceId),
    })

    const values = {
      workspaceId,
      acceptedGuidelines: guidelines,
      updatedAt: new Date(),
    }

    if (existing) {
      await db
        .update(workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles)
        .set(values)
        .where(eq(workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles.workspaceId, workspaceId))
    } else {
      await db.insert(workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles).values(values)
    }

    return true
  } catch {
    return false
  }
}

async function tryLoadWorkspaceGuidelinesFromDb(workspaceId: string): Promise<string[] | undefined> {
  try {
    const { db } = await import('@/lib/db/neon')
    const { workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles } = await import('@/lib/db/schema')

    const row = await db.query.workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles.findFirst({
      where: eq(workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles.workspaceId, workspaceId),
    })

    return row ? (row.acceptedGuidelines as string[] | null) ?? [] : undefined
  } catch {
    return undefined
  }
}

export async function createLearningProposal(input: {
  jobId: string
  workspaceId: string
  originalDrafts: { channel: string; draft: string }[]
  editedDrafts: { channel: string; draft: string }[]
}): Promise<LearningProposal | null> {
  const proposal = buildLearningProposal(input)
  if (!proposal) {
    return null
  }

  persistProposalToMemory(proposal)
  await tryPersistProposalToDb(proposal)
  return proposal
}

export async function getLearningProposal(jobId: string): Promise<LearningProposal | undefined> {
  const memoryProposal = proposalStore.get(jobId)
  if (memoryProposal) {
    return memoryProposal
  }

  const dbProposal = await tryLoadProposalFromDb(jobId)
  if (dbProposal) {
    proposalStore.set(jobId, dbProposal)
  }
  return dbProposal
}

export async function confirmLearningProposal(jobId: string, accept: boolean): Promise<LearningProposal | undefined> {
  const proposal = (await getLearningProposal(jobId)) ?? proposalStore.get(jobId)
  if (!proposal) return undefined

  const updatedProposal: LearningProposal = {
    ...proposal,
    status: accept ? 'accepted' : 'rejected',
  }

  persistProposalToMemory(updatedProposal)
  await tryPersistProposalToDb(updatedProposal)

  if (accept) {
    const existingGuidelines =
      (await tryLoadWorkspaceGuidelinesFromDb(proposal.workspaceId)) ??
      workspaceProfileStore.get(proposal.workspaceId)?.acceptedGuidelines ??
      []

    const acceptedGuidelines = Array.from(new Set([...existingGuidelines, proposal.guidelineText]))
    persistWorkspaceGuidelinesToMemory(proposal.workspaceId, acceptedGuidelines)
    await tryPersistWorkspaceGuidelinesToDb(proposal.workspaceId, acceptedGuidelines)
  }

  return updatedProposal
}

export async function getWorkspaceLearningGuidelines(workspaceId: string): Promise<CustomGuideline[]> {
  const dbGuidelines = await tryLoadWorkspaceGuidelinesFromDb(workspaceId)
  const acceptedGuidelines =
    dbGuidelines ?? workspaceProfileStore.get(workspaceId)?.acceptedGuidelines ?? []

  if (acceptedGuidelines.length === 0) {
    return []
  }

  persistWorkspaceGuidelinesToMemory(workspaceId, acceptedGuidelines)

  return [
    {
      scope: 'all',
      text: `Aprendizajes editoriales confirmados por el usuario: ${acceptedGuidelines.join(' ')}`,
    },
  ]
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/server-auth.ts
================================================
import { randomUUID } from "node:crypto"
import { eq } from "drizzle-orm"
import { cookies, headers } from "next/headers"

import { auth, isBetterAuthEnabled } from "@/lib/auth/better-auth-server"
import { db } from "@/lib/db/neon"
import { workspaceOrganizations } from "@/lib/db/auth-schema"

const AUTH_WORKSPACE_COOKIE = "anclora-workspace-id"
const AUTH_ORG_COOKIE = "anclora-org-id"

function slugifyWorkspaceName(value: string) {
  return value
    .toLowerCase()
    .normalize("NFD")
    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, "")
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, "-")
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, "")
    .slice(0, 48)
}

async function ensureWorkspaceLink(organizationId: string) {
  const existing = await db
    .select({
      workspaceId: workspaceOrganizations.workspaceId,
    })
    .from(workspaceOrganizations)
    .where(eq(workspaceOrganizations.organizationId, organizationId))
    .limit(1)

  if (existing[0]?.workspaceId) {
    return existing[0].workspaceId
  }

  const workspaceId = randomUUID()
  await db.insert(workspaceOrganizations).values({
    workspaceId,
    organizationId,
  })

  return workspaceId
}

function getCachedWorkspaceSession(params: {
  activeOrganizationId: string | null | undefined
  cachedOrganizationId?: string
  cachedWorkspaceId?: string
}) {
  const { activeOrganizationId, cachedOrganizationId, cachedWorkspaceId } = params
  if (
    activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedOrganizationId === activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedWorkspaceId &&
    /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(cachedWorkspaceId)
  ) {
    return {
      organizationId: activeOrganizationId,
      workspaceId: cachedWorkspaceId,
    }
  }

  return null
}

export async function bootstrapAuthSession() {
  if (!isBetterAuthEnabled) {
    return { user: null, organizationId: null, workspaceId: null }
  }

  try {
    const headersList = await headers()
    const cookieStore = await cookies()

    const session = await auth.api.getSession({
      headers: headersList,
    })

    if (!session?.user) {
      return { user: null, organizationId: null, workspaceId: null }
    }

    let organizationId = session.session?.activeOrganizationId ?? null
    const cachedSession = getCachedWorkspaceSession({
      activeOrganizationId: organizationId,
      cachedOrganizationId: cookieStore.get(AUTH_ORG_COOKIE)?.value,
      cachedWorkspaceId: cookieStore.get(AUTH_WORKSPACE_COOKIE)?.value,
    })

    if (cachedSession) {
      return {
        user: session.user,
        organizationId: cachedSession.organizationId,
        workspaceId: cachedSession.workspaceId,
      }
    }

    if (!organizationId) {
      const organizations = await auth.api.listOrganizations({
        headers: headersList,
      })

      if (organizations.length > 0) {
        organizationId = organizations[0].id

        await auth.api.setActiveOrganization({
          headers: headersList,
          body: {
            organizationId,
          },
        })
      } else {
        const baseName =
          session.user.name?.trim() ||
          session.user.email.split("@")[0] ||
          "Anclora Workspace"
        const createdOrganization = await auth.api.createOrganization({
          headers: headersList,
          body: {
            name: `${baseName} Workspace`,
            slug: `${slugifyWorkspaceName(baseName)}-${session.user.id.slice(
              0,
              8
            )}`,
          },
        })

        organizationId = createdOrganization.id
      }
    }

    const workspaceId = await ensureWorkspaceLink(organizationId)

    return {
      user: session.user,
      organizationId,
      workspaceId,
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error("Error bootstrapping auth session:", error)
    return { user: null, organizationId: null, workspaceId: null }
  }
}

import { clsx, type ClassValue } from "clsx"
import { twMerge } from "tailwind-merge"

export function cn(...inputs: ClassValue[]) {
  return twMerge(clsx(inputs))
}

export function generateJobId(): string {
  return `job-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).substring(2, 9)}`
}

/**
 * Agent 3: ChannelOptimizer
 * Adapts the main content draft to each publishing channel's format and limits.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS } from '@/lib/config/models'
import {
  BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX,
  CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS,
  GUARDRAIL_PATTERN,
} from '@/lib/brand/profiles'

const openrouter = createOpenAI({
  apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY || '',
  baseURL: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1',
})
import type { PublishChannel, ChannelVariant, AgentResult, CustomGuideline, ModelOverride } from './types'
import type { InsightBlock } from './schemas'

export interface ChannelOptimizerInput {
  contentDraft: string
  headline: string
  channels: PublishChannel[]
  customGuidelines?: CustomGuideline[]
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
  linkedInImageBase64?: string
  property_name?: string
  insight_blocks?: InsightBlock[]
  allowCtaLink?: boolean
  sourceUrls?: string
  evidenceMode?: string
  ctaMode?: string
  language?: string
}

export interface ChannelOptimizerOutput {
  channelVariants: ChannelVariant[]
}

interface ChannelSpec {
  maxChars: number
  name: string
  instructions: string
  reviewInstructions: string
}

interface AdaptedChannelResult {
  text: string
  usage?: {
    tokensUsed: number
    inputTokens: number
    outputTokens: number
    modelId?: string
  }
}

const CHANNEL_SPECS: Record<PublishChannel, ChannelSpec> = {
  linkedin_es: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_es.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_es.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_es.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_es.reviewPrompt,
  },
  linkedin_en: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_en.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_en.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_en.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.linkedin_en.reviewPrompt,
  },
  blog_es: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_es.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_es.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_es.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_es.reviewPrompt,
  },
  blog_en: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_en.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_en.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_en.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.blog_en.reviewPrompt,
  },
  facebook_es: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_es.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_es.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_es.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_es.reviewPrompt,
  },
  facebook_en: {
    maxChars: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_en.maxChars,
    name: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_en.name,
    instructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_en.generationPrompt,
    reviewInstructions: CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel.facebook_en.reviewPrompt,
  },
}

function shouldUseOverrideModelForChannel(channel: PublishChannel, override?: ModelOverride): boolean {
  if (!override) return false
  if (override.scope === 'all') return true
  if (override.scope === 'specific' && override.channels) {
    return override.channels.includes(channel)
  }
  return false
}

async function adaptToChannel(
  draft: string,
  headline: string,
  channel: PublishChannel,
  spec: ChannelSpec,
  customGuidelines?: CustomGuideline[],
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride,
  property_name?: string,
  insights?: InsightBlock[],
  allowCtaLink?: boolean,
  sourceUrls?: string,
  evidenceMode?: string,
  ctaMode?: string,
  language?: string
): Promise<AdaptedChannelResult> {
  const isFacebookChannel = channel.startsWith('facebook')
  const resolvedAllowCtaLink = isFacebookChannel ? false : allowCtaLink
  const resolvedCtaMode = isFacebookChannel ? 'conversational' : ctaMode

  // Build custom guidelines section
  const generalGuidelines = customGuidelines
    ?.find(g => g.scope === 'all')
    ?.text || ''
  const channelGuidelines = customGuidelines
    ?.find(g => g.scope === channel)
    ?.text || ''
  const guidelinesSection = [generalGuidelines, channelGuidelines]
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join('\n\n')

  const systemPrompt = `${BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX}

${CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.globalPreGeneration}

Adapta el siguiente contenido al formato específico de ${spec.name}.${property_name ? `\nPropiedad: ${property_name}` : ''}

INSTRUCCIONES DEL CANAL:
${spec.instructions}
${spec.reviewInstructions ? `\nREVISIÓN DEL CANAL:\n${spec.reviewInstructions}` : ''}

Límite de caracteres: ${spec.maxChars}
${typeof resolvedAllowCtaLink === 'boolean' ? `Permiso de enlace en CTA: ${resolvedAllowCtaLink ? 'sí' : 'no'}\n` : ''}${evidenceMode ? `Modo de evidencia: ${evidenceMode}\n` : ''}${resolvedCtaMode ? `Modo CTA: ${resolvedCtaMode}\n` : ''}${language ? `Idioma configurado: ${language}\n` : ''}${sourceUrls ? `Fuentes o URLs proporcionadas:\n${sourceUrls}\n` : ''}${isFacebookChannel ? 'REGLA ADICIONAL FACEBOOK: prioriza conversación, evita venta directa y no incluyas enlaces aunque otros canales sí los permitan.\n' : ''}Mantén el tono estratégico y analítico. No añadas urgencia artificial.${guidelinesSection ? `\n\nINSTRUCCIONES PERSONALIZADAS:\n${guidelinesSection}` : ''}

IMPORTANTE: El output debe ser SOLO el contenido del post, sin metadatos, sin notas internas, sin explicaciones técnicas. Formato limpio y listo para publicar.`

  const insights_context = insights
    ? `\n\nInsights disponibles:\n${insights.map((i) => `- ${i.title}: ${i.evidence.join(', ')}`).join('\n')}`
    : ''

  try {
    const overrideModelId = (overrideModel && shouldUseOverrideModelForChannel(channel, overrideModel))
      ? overrideModel.modelId
      : undefined
    let usedModelId: string | undefined
    let inputTokens = 0
    let outputTokens = 0
    const result = await generateWithFallback(
      (modelId, abortSignal) => generateText({
        model: openrouter(modelId),
        system: systemPrompt,
        prompt: `Titular: ${headline}\n\nContenido original:\n${draft.slice(0, 3000)}${insights_context}`,
        maxOutputTokens: 800,
        abortSignal,
      }),
      FREE_MODELS,
      undefined,
      overrideModelId,
      (modelId, usedResult) => {
        usedModelId = modelId
        inputTokens = usedResult.usage?.inputTokens || 0
        outputTokens = usedResult.usage?.outputTokens || 0
      }
    )
    const adaptedText = result.text.trim()
    if (!adaptedText) {
      throw new Error(`LLM returned empty channel draft for ${channel}`)
    }
    return {
      text: adaptedText.slice(0, spec.maxChars),
      usage: {
        tokensUsed: result.usage?.totalTokens || 0,
        inputTokens,
        outputTokens,
        modelId: usedModelId,
      },
    }
  } catch {
    // Fallback: truncate to channel max
    return {
      text: draft.slice(0, spec.maxChars),
    }
  }
}

export async function channelOptimizer(
  input: ChannelOptimizerInput
): Promise<AgentResult<ChannelOptimizerOutput>> {
  const start = Date.now()

  const variants: ChannelVariant[] = []
  let tokensUsed = 0
  let inputTokens = 0
  let outputTokens = 0
  const modelsUsed = new Set<string>()

  // Process channels sequentially to avoid rate limits
  for (const channel of input.channels) {
    const spec = CHANNEL_SPECS[channel]
    if (!spec) continue

    const adaptedResult = await adaptToChannel(
      input.contentDraft,
      input.headline,
      channel,
      spec,
      input.customGuidelines,
      input.overrideModel,
      input.property_name,
      input.insight_blocks,
      input.allowCtaLink,
      input.sourceUrls,
      input.evidenceMode,
      input.ctaMode,
      input.language
    )

    const usage = adaptedResult.usage
    tokensUsed += usage?.tokensUsed || 0
    inputTokens += usage?.inputTokens || 0
    outputTokens += usage?.outputTokens || 0
    if (usage?.modelId) {
      modelsUsed.add(usage.modelId)
    }

    let adapted = adaptedResult.text
    adapted = adapted.replace(GUARDRAIL_PATTERN, '[REDACTED]')

    const platform = channel.split('_')[0] as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook'
    const language = channel.split('_')[1] as 'es' | 'en'

    variants.push({
      channel,
      platform,
      language,
      draft: adapted,
      charCount: adapted.length,
      wordCount: adapted.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
      optimizedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      imageBase64: channel.startsWith('linkedin') ? input.linkedInImageBase64 : undefined,
      status: 'draft',
    })
  }

  return {
    output: { channelVariants: variants },
    tokensUsed,
    inputTokens,
    outputTokens,
    modelId: modelsUsed.size === 1 ? Array.from(modelsUsed)[0] : undefined,
    durationMs: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/compliance-validator.ts
================================================
import type {
  AgentResult,
  ComplianceIssue,
  ComplianceIssueCode,
  ComplianceReport,
  ComplianceReportV2,
  ContentGenerationState,
  PublishChannel,
} from './types'

export type ComplianceSeverity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'hard'

export type DetailedComplianceReport = ComplianceReport &
  ComplianceReportV2 & {
    hasWarningIssues: boolean
  }

export interface ComplianceInput {
  contentDraft: string
  channelVariants?: Array<{
    channel: PublishChannel
    draft: string
    claims?: Array<{
      text: string
      riskLevel: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
      requiresEvidence?: boolean
      source?: string
    }>
    warnings?: Array<{
      code?: string
      message: string
      severity?: 'info' | 'warning' | 'error'
    }>
  }>
  channel?: PublishChannel
  allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
  sourceUrls?: string
  evidenceMode?: ContentGenerationState['evidenceMode']
  ctaMode?: ContentGenerationState['ctaMode']
}

type VariantComplianceInput = NonNullable<ComplianceInput['channelVariants']>[number]

const HARD_PATTERNS_ES = [
  /\brentabilidad garantizada\b/i,
  /\bretorno garantizado\b/i,
  /\bbeneficio garantizado\b/i,
  /\binversi[oó]n sin riesgo\b/i,
  /\bsin ning[uú]n riesgo\b/i,
  /\bprecio garantizado\b/i,
  /\brevalorizaci[oó]n garantizada\b/i,
  /\bsubir[aá] seguro\b/i,
  /\brentabilidad asegurada\b/i,
]

const HARD_PATTERNS_EN = [
  /\bguaranteed return\b/i,
  /\bguaranteed profitability\b/i,
  /\brisk-free investment\b/i,
  /\bno risk\b/i,
  /\bguaranteed appreciation\b/i,
  /\bguaranteed price increase\b/i,
  /\bwill definitely increase\b/i,
]

const WARNING_PATTERNS_ES = [
  /\balta rentabilidad\b/i,
  /\bgran oportunidad de inversi[oó]n\b/i,
  /\bse revalorizar[aá]\b/i,
  /\bsubir[aá] de valor\b/i,
  /\binversi[oó]n segura\b/i,
  /\bactivo refugio\b/i,
  /\boportunidad [uú]nica\b/i,
  /\bimperdible\b/i,
  /\bm[aá]ximo potencial\b/i,
]

const WARNING_PATTERNS_EN = [
  /\bhigh return\b/i,
  /\bgreat investment opportunity\b/i,
  /\bwill appreciate\b/i,
  /\bsafe investment\b/i,
  /\bsafe haven asset\b/i,
  /\bunique opportunity\b/i,
  /\bmust-see opportunity\b/i,
  /\bmaximum potential\b/i,
]

const AGGRESSIVE_CTA_PATTERNS = [
  /\bescr[ií]beme ya\b/i,
  /\bcompra ahora\b/i,
  /\breserva ahora\b/i,
  /\bno pierdas esta oportunidad\b/i,
  /\b[uú]ltima oportunidad\b/i,
  /\bdm para cerrar\b/i,
  /\bbuy now\b/i,
  /\bbook now\b/i,
  /\blast opportunity\b/i,
  /\bdm to close\b/i,
]

const SENSITIVE_CLAIM_PATTERNS = [
  /\bprecio\b/i,
  /\brevalorizaci[oó]n\b/i,
  /\brentabilidad\b/i,
  /\byield\b/i,
  /\bliquidez\b/i,
  /\bdemanda internacional\b/i,
  /\bescasez de suelo\b/i,
  /\bfiscalidad\b/i,
  /\blicencias\b/i,
  /\bregulaci[oó]n\b/i,
  /\balquiler vacacional\b/i,
  /\bappreciation\b/i,
  /\bprice\b/i,
  /\binternational demand\b/i,
  /\bscarcity of land\b/i,
  /\btaxation\b/i,
  /\blicensing\b/i,
  /\bregulation\b/i,
  /\bholiday rentals?\b/i,
]

const NUMERIC_CLAIM_PATTERN =
  /(\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?)\s*(%|porcentaje|yield|roi|tir|irr|x veces|x|€\/m2|euros por metro cuadrado|m2)/i

const GUARANTEE_NUMERIC_PATTERN =
  /(\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?)\s*%\s*(?:de\s*)?(?:rentabilidad|yield|roi|tir|irr|return)|(?:guaranteed|garantizada?|asegurada?)\s+(?:return|rentabilidad|yield|roi|tir|irr)/i

const PRICE_FORECAST_PATTERN =
  /\b(?:precio|price)\s+(?:subir[aá]|bajar[aá]|caer[aá]|will rise|will increase|will fall)\b/i

function pushIssue(
  collection: ComplianceIssue[],
  seen: Set<string>,
  issue: ComplianceIssue
) {
  const key = [
    issue.channel ?? 'global',
    issue.code,
    issue.severity,
    issue.message,
    issue.matchedText ?? '',
  ].join('::')

  if (seen.has(key)) return
  seen.add(key)
  collection.push(issue)
}

function extractMatch(text: string, pattern: RegExp) {
  const match = text.match(pattern)
  return match?.[0]
}

function formatIssue(issue: ComplianceIssue) {
  return `[${issue.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${issue.message}`
}

function buildIssue(
  code: ComplianceIssueCode,
  severity: ComplianceSeverity,
  message: string,
  matchedText?: string,
  suggestion?: string,
  channel?: PublishChannel
): ComplianceIssue {
  return {
    code,
    severity,
    message,
    matchedText,
    suggestion,
    channel,
  }
}

function analyzeText(
  text: string,
  options: {
    channel?: PublishChannel
    allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
    sourceUrls?: string
    claims?: VariantComplianceInput['claims']
    hermesWarnings?: VariantComplianceInput['warnings']
  }
): ComplianceIssue[] {
  const issues: ComplianceIssue[] = []
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  const normalizedText = text.trim()
  const hasSourceUrls = Boolean(options.sourceUrls?.trim())

  for (const pattern of [...HARD_PATTERNS_ES, ...HARD_PATTERNS_EN]) {
    const matchedText = extractMatch(normalizedText, pattern)
    if (!matchedText) continue
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        'FORBIDDEN_GUARANTEE',
        'hard',
        'Contiene una promesa o garantía explícita que debe corregirse antes de publicar.',
        matchedText,
        'Reformula la frase como hipótesis o escenario no garantizado.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  if (PRICE_FORECAST_PATTERN.test(normalizedText)) {
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        'UNSUPPORTED_PRICE_FORECAST',
        'warning',
        'Revisa esta previsión de precio y respáldala con evidencia verificable.',
        extractMatch(normalizedText, PRICE_FORECAST_PATTERN),
        'Usa lenguaje condicional o añade una fuente contrastable.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  for (const pattern of [...WARNING_PATTERNS_ES, ...WARNING_PATTERNS_EN]) {
    const matchedText = extractMatch(normalizedText, pattern)
    if (!matchedText) continue
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        'ABSOLUTE_LANGUAGE',
        'warning',
        'El lenguaje promocional o demasiado concluyente debería revisarse antes de aprobar.',
        matchedText,
        'Sustituye la afirmación por una formulación más prudente.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  const numericMatch = extractMatch(normalizedText, NUMERIC_CLAIM_PATTERN)
  if (numericMatch) {
    const severity: ComplianceSeverity = GUARANTEE_NUMERIC_PATTERN.test(normalizedText)
      ? 'hard'
      : 'warning'
    const code: ComplianceIssueCode =
      severity === 'hard' ? 'UNSUPPORTED_RETURN_CLAIM' : 'UNSUPPORTED_NUMERIC_CLAIM'
    const message =
      severity === 'hard'
        ? 'Hay una promesa cuantitativa sensible que debe corregirse antes de publicar.'
        : options.allowQuantitativeData === false
          ? 'Se ha detectado un dato cuantitativo sin permiso explícito para usarlo.'
          : 'Revisa que el dato cuantitativo esté respaldado por una fuente o contexto suficiente.'
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        code,
        severity,
        message,
        numericMatch,
        'Añade fuente o elimina la cifra si no está verificada.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  for (const pattern of AGGRESSIVE_CTA_PATTERNS) {
    const matchedText = extractMatch(normalizedText, pattern)
    if (!matchedText) continue
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        options.channel?.startsWith('facebook') ? 'PLATFORM_RISK' : 'AGGRESSIVE_CTA',
        'warning',
        options.channel?.startsWith('facebook')
          ? 'CTA demasiado comercial para Facebook. Revísalo antes de aprobar.'
          : 'CTA agresiva detectada. Revísala antes de aprobar.',
        matchedText,
        'Lleva el cierre hacia una conversación consultiva, no a presión comercial.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  for (const pattern of SENSITIVE_CLAIM_PATTERNS) {
    const matchedText = extractMatch(normalizedText, pattern)
    if (!matchedText) continue
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        hasSourceUrls ? 'REAL_ESTATE_INVESTMENT_RISK' : 'MISSING_SOURCE_FOR_CLAIM',
        'warning',
        hasSourceUrls
          ? 'Revisa que esta afirmación sensible esté realmente respaldada por la evidencia disponible.'
          : 'Revisa que esta afirmación esté respaldada por una fuente o por evidencia verificable.',
        matchedText,
        'Añade fuente o reformula la afirmación como observación prudente.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  for (const claim of options.claims ?? []) {
    if (claim.requiresEvidence && !claim.source && !hasSourceUrls) {
      pushIssue(
        issues,
        seen,
        buildIssue(
          'MISSING_SOURCE_FOR_CLAIM',
          'warning',
          'Hermes ha marcado un claim que requiere evidencia y no tiene fuente asociada.',
          claim.text,
          'Añade la fuente o elimina el claim.',
          options.channel
        )
      )
    }

    if (claim.riskLevel === 'high') {
      pushIssue(
        issues,
        seen,
        buildIssue(
          'REAL_ESTATE_INVESTMENT_RISK',
          'warning',
          'Hermes ha marcado un claim de riesgo alto. Revisión humana recomendada.',
          claim.text,
          'Valida la afirmación antes de aprobar o publicar.',
          options.channel
        )
      )
    }
  }

  for (const warning of options.hermesWarnings ?? []) {
    pushIssue(
      issues,
      seen,
      buildIssue(
        'UNKNOWN',
        warning.severity === 'info' ? 'info' : 'warning',
        warning.message,
        undefined,
        'Revisión humana recomendada.',
        options.channel
      )
    )
  }

  return issues
}

export function validateComplianceForVariants(input: ComplianceInput): DetailedComplianceReport {
  const checkedAt = new Date().toISOString()
  const variantInputs =
    input.channelVariants && input.channelVariants.length > 0
      ? input.channelVariants
      : [
          {
            channel: input.channel ?? 'blog_es',
            draft: input.contentDraft,
          },
        ]

  const issuesByChannel: Partial<Record<PublishChannel, ComplianceIssue[]>> = {}
  const typedIssues: ComplianceIssue[] = []
  const seen = new Set<string>()

  for (const variant of variantInputs) {
    const variantIssues = analyzeText(variant.draft, {
      channel: variant.channel,
      allowQuantitativeData: input.allowQuantitativeData,
      sourceUrls: input.sourceUrls,
      claims: variant.claims,
      hermesWarnings: variant.warnings,
    })

    issuesByChannel[variant.channel] = variantIssues
    for (const issue of variantIssues) {
      pushIssue(typedIssues, seen, issue)
    }
  }

  const globalIssues = analyzeText(input.contentDraft, {
    allowQuantitativeData: input.allowQuantitativeData,
    sourceUrls: input.sourceUrls,
  }).map((issue) => ({
    ...issue,
    channel: issue.channel,
  }))

  for (const issue of globalIssues) {
    pushIssue(typedIssues, seen, issue)
  }

  const issues = typedIssues.map(formatIssue)
  const recommendations = typedIssues.length
    ? ['Revisión humana recomendada antes de aprobar o publicar.']
    : ['Sin incidencias bloqueantes detectadas.']

  return {
    isCompliant: !typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.severity === 'hard'),
    hasHardIssues: typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.severity === 'hard'),
    hasWarningIssues: typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.severity === 'warning'),
    typedIssues,
    issuesByChannel,
    issues,
    recommendations,
    checkedAt,
    source: 'rule_based',
  }
}

export async function complianceValidator(
  input: ComplianceInput
): Promise<AgentResult<DetailedComplianceReport>> {
  const report = validateComplianceForVariants(input)

  return {
    output: report,
    tokensUsed: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
    durationMs: 0,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/content-generation-graph.ts
================================================
// src/lib/agents/content-generation-graph.ts
// Compliance is now rule-based, deterministic and non-blocking for generation.
// Publication remains outside the automatic graph flow.

import { researchSpecialist, type ResearchInput } from './research-specialist';
import { contentStrategist, type StrategyInput } from './content-strategist';
import { channelOptimizer, type ChannelOptimizerInput } from './channel-optimizer';
import { complianceValidator } from './compliance-validator';
import { validateEditorialQuality, type EditorialValidationResult } from './editorial-quality-validator';
import { editorialPolisher } from './editorial-polisher';
import { type PublicationInput } from './publication-scheduler';
import type {
  ContentGenerationState,
  GenerationUsageSummary,
  PublishChannel,
  ContentZone,
  ContentFraming,
  TargetAudience,
  CustomGuideline,
  ModelOverride,
} from './types';
import { estimateModelCostUsd } from '@/lib/config/models';

function shouldUseOverrideModel(
  channel: PublishChannel,
  override?: ModelOverride
): boolean {
  if (!override) return false;
  if (override.scope === 'all') return true;
  if (override.scope === 'specific' && override.channels)
    return override.channels.includes(channel);
  return false;
}

export type GraphPhase =
  | 'research'
  | 'strategy'
  | 'optimize'
  | 'editorial_quality'
  | 'compliance'
  | 'done'
  | 'rejected'
  | 'error';

// ── State builder ────────────────────────────────────────────
export function initializeGraphState(input: {
  topic: string;
  zone: ContentZone;
  framing: ContentFraming;
  targetAudience: TargetAudience;
  channels: PublishChannel[];
  contentObjective?: ContentGenerationState['contentObjective'];
  signalType?: ContentGenerationState['signalType'];
  claimRiskLevel?: ContentGenerationState['claimRiskLevel'];
  sourceUrls?: ContentGenerationState['sourceUrls'];
  allowQuantitativeData?: ContentGenerationState['allowQuantitativeData'];
  allowCtaLink?: ContentGenerationState['allowCtaLink'];
  language?: ContentGenerationState['language'];
  coreThesis?: ContentGenerationState['coreThesis'];
  investorLens?: ContentGenerationState['investorLens'];
  desiredReaderOutcome?: ContentGenerationState['desiredReaderOutcome'];
  ctaMode?: ContentGenerationState['ctaMode'];
  evidenceMode?: ContentGenerationState['evidenceMode'];
  assertiveness?: ContentGenerationState['assertiveness'];
  microzone?: ContentGenerationState['microzone'];
  exampleOutput?: ContentGenerationState['exampleOutput'];
  customGuidelines?: CustomGuideline[];
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride;
  linkedInImageBase64?: string;
  workspaceId: string;
  jobId: string;
}): ContentGenerationState {
  return {
    ...input,
    researchDoc: undefined,
    citations: [],
    researchConfidence: 0,
    contentDraft: undefined,
    wordCount: 0,
    toneScore: 0,
    headline: input.topic,
    channelVariants: [],
    complianceReport: undefined,
    publicationUrls: {},
    publishedAt: undefined,
    usageSummary: {
      modelsUsed: [],
      totalTokens: 0,
      inputTokens: 0,
      outputTokens: 0,
      estimatedCostUsd: 0,
    },
    // CHANGE: pipeline always ends at 'compliance' (draft), never auto-publishes
    phase: 'research',
    approvalStatus: 'draft',
    createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    errors: [],
  };
}

function mergeUsageSummary(
  current: GenerationUsageSummary | undefined,
  usage: {
    modelId?: string
    tokensUsed?: number
    inputTokens?: number
    outputTokens?: number
  }
): GenerationUsageSummary {
  const currentSummary = current ?? {
    modelsUsed: [],
    totalTokens: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
    estimatedCostUsd: 0,
  }

  const modelsUsed = usage.modelId
    ? Array.from(new Set([...currentSummary.modelsUsed, usage.modelId]))
    : currentSummary.modelsUsed

  const inputTokens = currentSummary.inputTokens + (usage.inputTokens ?? 0)
  const outputTokens = currentSummary.outputTokens + (usage.outputTokens ?? 0)
  const totalTokens = currentSummary.totalTokens + (usage.tokensUsed ?? 0)
  const incrementalCostUsd = usage.modelId
    ? estimateModelCostUsd(
        usage.modelId,
        usage.inputTokens ?? 0,
        usage.outputTokens ?? 0
      )
    : null
  const estimatedCostUsd =
    incrementalCostUsd == null
      ? currentSummary.estimatedCostUsd
      : (currentSummary.estimatedCostUsd ?? 0) + incrementalCostUsd

  return {
    modelsUsed,
    totalTokens,
    inputTokens,
    outputTokens,
    estimatedCostUsd,
  }
}

function getPrimaryEditorialChannel(state: ContentGenerationState): PublishChannel {
  return state.channels.find((channel) => channel.startsWith('blog')) ?? state.channels[0] ?? 'linkedin_es';
}

// ── Research ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function researchNode(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  try {
    const primaryChannel = getPrimaryEditorialChannel(state);
    const input: ResearchInput = {
      topic: state.topic,
      zone: state.zone,
      framing: state.framing,
      workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
      overrideModel: shouldUseOverrideModel(primaryChannel, state.overrideModel)
        ? state.overrideModel
        : undefined,
    };
    const result = await researchSpecialist(input);
    return {
      researchDoc: result.output.researchDoc,
      citations: result.output.citations,
      researchConfidence: result.output.confidence,
      usageSummary: mergeUsageSummary(state.usageSummary, {
        modelId: result.modelId,
        tokensUsed: result.tokensUsed,
        inputTokens: result.inputTokens,
        outputTokens: result.outputTokens,
      }),
      phase: 'strategy',
    };
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    return { phase: 'error', errors: [...state.errors, `Research failed: ${errorMsg}`] };
  }
}

// ── Strategy ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function strategyNode(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  if (!state.researchDoc) {
    return { phase: 'error', errors: [...state.errors, 'No research doc available'] };
  }
  try {
    const primaryChannel = getPrimaryEditorialChannel(state);
    const input: StrategyInput = {
      topic: state.topic,
      researchDoc: state.researchDoc,
      targetAudience: state.targetAudience,
      publishingChannel: primaryChannel,
      contentObjective: state.contentObjective,
      signalType: state.signalType,
      claimRiskLevel: state.claimRiskLevel,
      sourceUrls: state.sourceUrls,
      allowQuantitativeData: state.allowQuantitativeData,
      allowCtaLink: state.allowCtaLink,
      language: state.language,
      coreThesis: state.coreThesis,
      investorLens: state.investorLens,
      desiredReaderOutcome: state.desiredReaderOutcome,
      ctaMode: state.ctaMode,
      evidenceMode: state.evidenceMode,
      assertiveness: state.assertiveness,
      microzone: state.microzone,
      exampleOutput: state.exampleOutput,
      customGuidelines: state.customGuidelines,
      overrideModel: shouldUseOverrideModel(primaryChannel, state.overrideModel)
        ? state.overrideModel
        : undefined,
    };
    const result = await contentStrategist(input);
    return {
      contentDraft: result.output.contentDraft,
      wordCount: result.output.wordCount,
      toneScore: result.output.toneScore,
      headline: result.output.headline,
      usageSummary: mergeUsageSummary(state.usageSummary, {
        modelId: result.modelId,
        tokensUsed: result.tokensUsed,
        inputTokens: result.inputTokens,
        outputTokens: result.outputTokens,
      }),
      phase: 'optimize',
    };
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    return { phase: 'error', errors: [...state.errors, `Strategy failed: ${errorMsg}`] };
  }
}

// ── Optimize ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function optimizeNode(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  if (!state.contentDraft) {
    return {
      phase: 'error',
      errors: [...state.errors, 'No content draft available for optimization'],
    };
  }
  try {
    const input: ChannelOptimizerInput = {
      contentDraft: state.contentDraft,
      headline: state.headline ?? state.topic,
      channels: state.channels,
      customGuidelines: state.customGuidelines,
      overrideModel: state.overrideModel,
      linkedInImageBase64: state.linkedInImageBase64,
      allowCtaLink: state.allowCtaLink,
      sourceUrls: state.sourceUrls,
      evidenceMode: state.evidenceMode,
      ctaMode: state.ctaMode,
      language: state.language,
    };
    const result = await channelOptimizer(input);
    return {
      channelVariants: result.output.channelVariants,
      usageSummary: mergeUsageSummary(state.usageSummary, {
        modelId: result.modelId,
        tokensUsed: result.tokensUsed,
        inputTokens: result.inputTokens,
        outputTokens: result.outputTokens,
      }),
      phase: 'editorial_quality',
    };
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    return { phase: 'error', errors: [...state.errors, `Optimization failed: ${errorMsg}`] };
  }
}

// ── Editorial Quality ────────────────────────────────────────
async function editorialQualityNode(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  if (!state.channelVariants || state.channelVariants.length === 0) {
    return { phase: 'compliance' };
  }

  try {
    const updatedVariants = [...state.channelVariants];
    const editorialValidation = {} as Record<PublishChannel, EditorialValidationResult>;
    let totalInputTokens = 0;
    let totalOutputTokens = 0;
    const modelsUsed: string[] = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < updatedVariants.length; i++) {
      const variant = updatedVariants[i];
      let currentText = variant.draft;

      // 1. Initial Validation
      let validation = validateEditorialQuality(
        currentText,
        variant.channel,
        state.allowQuantitativeData
      );

      // 2. Auto-regeneration if hard_fail
      if (validation.severity === 'hard_fail') {
        const polishResult = await editorialPolisher({
          text: currentText,
          channel: variant.channel,
          thesis: state.coreThesis,
        });

        currentText = polishResult.output.polishedText;
        totalInputTokens += polishResult.inputTokens || 0;
        totalOutputTokens += polishResult.outputTokens || 0;
        if (polishResult.modelId) modelsUsed.push(polishResult.modelId);

        validation = validateEditorialQuality(
          currentText,
          variant.channel,
          state.allowQuantitativeData
        );

        updatedVariants[i] = {
          ...variant,
          draft: currentText,
          charCount: currentText.length,
          wordCount: currentText.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
          qualityWarnings: validation.issues,
        };
      }
      // 3. Optional Final Polish for specific channels
      else if (variant.channel === 'linkedin_es' || variant.channel === 'facebook_es') {
        const polishResult = await editorialPolisher({
          text: currentText,
          channel: variant.channel,
          thesis: state.coreThesis,
        });

        currentText = polishResult.output.polishedText;
        totalInputTokens += polishResult.inputTokens || 0;
        totalOutputTokens += polishResult.outputTokens || 0;
        if (polishResult.modelId) modelsUsed.push(polishResult.modelId);

        validation = validateEditorialQuality(
          currentText,
          variant.channel,
          state.allowQuantitativeData
        );

        updatedVariants[i] = {
          ...variant,
          draft: currentText,
          charCount: currentText.length,
          wordCount: currentText.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
          qualityWarnings: validation.issues,
        };
      } else {
        updatedVariants[i] = {
          ...variant,
          qualityWarnings: validation.issues,
        };
      }

      editorialValidation[variant.channel] = validation;
    }

    return {
      channelVariants: updatedVariants,
      editorialValidation,
      usageSummary: mergeUsageSummary(state.usageSummary, {
        inputTokens: totalInputTokens,
        outputTokens: totalOutputTokens,
        tokensUsed: totalInputTokens + totalOutputTokens,
        modelId: modelsUsed.length > 0 ? modelsUsed[0] : undefined,
      }),
      phase: 'compliance',
    };
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
    return {
      phase: 'compliance',
      errors: [...state.errors, `Editorial Quality check failed: ${errorMsg}`],
    };
  }
}

// ── Compliance (single rule-based pass) ────────────────────────
async function complianceNode(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  if (!state.contentDraft || !state.channelVariants) {
    return {
      phase: 'error',
      errors: [...state.errors, 'Missing content or channel variants for compliance check'],
    };
  }
  try {
    const result = await complianceValidator({
      contentDraft: state.contentDraft,
      channelVariants: state.channelVariants.map((variant) => ({
        channel: variant.channel,
        draft: variant.editedDraft ?? variant.draft,
        claims: variant.claims,
      })),
      allowQuantitativeData: state.allowQuantitativeData,
      sourceUrls: state.sourceUrls,
      evidenceMode: state.evidenceMode,
      ctaMode: state.ctaMode,
    })
    const report = result.output
    const updatedVariants = state.channelVariants.map((variant) => ({
      ...variant,
      complianceWarnings:
        report.issuesByChannel?.[variant.channel]?.map((issue) => `[${issue.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${issue.message}`) ?? [],
    }))

    const issueCount = report.typedIssues.length
    const hardIssueCount = report.typedIssues.filter((issue) => issue.severity === 'hard').length
    const warningIssueCount = report.typedIssues.filter((issue) => issue.severity === 'warning').length

    console.info('[content-compliance]', {
      jobId: state.jobId,
      channels: state.channels,
      issueCount,
      hardIssueCount,
      warningIssueCount,
      source: 'rule_based',
    })

    return {
      channelVariants: updatedVariants,
      complianceReport: report,
      phase: 'done',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
    }
  } catch (err) {
    const errorMsg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)
    return {
      phase: 'done',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
      complianceReport: {
        isCompliant: true,
        hasHardIssues: false,
        hasWarningIssues: true,
        typedIssues: [],
        issuesByChannel: {},
        issues: [],
        recommendations: ['Compliance técnico no disponible. Revisión humana recomendada.'],
        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        source: 'rule_based',
      },
      errors: [...state.errors, `Compliance check failed: ${errorMsg}`],
    }
  }
}

// ── Error / Reject nodes ──────────────────────────────────────
async function errorNode(): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  return { phase: 'error', approvalStatus: 'rejected' };
}

async function rejectNode(): Promise<Partial<ContentGenerationState>> {
  return { phase: 'rejected', approvalStatus: 'rejected' };
}

// ── State merger ──────────────────────────────────────────────
function mergeState(
  current: ContentGenerationState,
  update: Partial<ContentGenerationState>
): ContentGenerationState {
  return { ...current, ...update };
}

// ── Main execution engine ─────────────────────────────────────
// CHANGE: Publication is NOT triggered here.
// The pipeline ends at 'done' with approvalStatus = 'draft' | 'rejected'.
// Publication is handled by POST /api/content/approve.
export async function executeContentGenerationGraph(
  initialState: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<ContentGenerationState> {
  let state = { ...initialState };

  if (state.phase === 'research') {
    const output = await researchNode(state);
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }
  if (state.phase === 'strategy') {
    const output = await strategyNode(state);
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }
  if (state.phase === 'optimize') {
    const output = await optimizeNode(state);
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }
  if (state.phase === 'editorial_quality') {
    const output = await editorialQualityNode(state);
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }
  if (state.phase === 'compliance') {
    const output = await complianceNode(state);
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }
  if (state.phase === 'error') {
    const output = await errorNode();
    state = mergeState(state, output);
  }

  return state;
}

// ── HITL: Human-initiated approval → triggers publication ─────
// Called from POST /api/content/approve
export async function approveDraftForPublication(
  state: ContentGenerationState
): Promise<ContentGenerationState> {
  if (state.phase !== 'done' || state.approvalStatus !== 'draft') {
    throw new Error(
      'Draft must be in "done" phase with "draft" approval status to approve.'
    );
  }

  // Import publicationScheduler lazily to avoid circular deps
  const { publicationScheduler } = await import('./publication-scheduler');

  const pubInput: PublicationInput = {
    contentId: state.jobId,
    channelVariants: state.channelVariants ?? [],
    publishAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
  };

  const result = await publicationScheduler(pubInput);

  return mergeState(state, {
