    publicationUrls: result.output.publicationUrls,
    publishedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
    approvalStatus: 'published',
  });
}

// ── HITL: Rejection ───────────────────────────────────────────
export async function rejectDraftFromPublication(
  state: ContentGenerationState,
  rejectionReason: string
): Promise<ContentGenerationState> {
  if (state.phase !== 'done' && state.phase !== 'compliance') {
    throw new Error('Can only reject drafts in done/compliance phase');
  }
  return mergeState(state, {
    phase: 'rejected',
    approvalStatus: 'rejected',
    errors: [...state.errors, `Rejected by editor: ${rejectionReason}`],
  });
}

export const graphNodes = {
  research: researchNode,
  strategy: strategyNode,
  optimize: optimizeNode,
  editorial_quality: editorialQualityNode,
  compliance: complianceNode,
  error: errorNode,
  reject: rejectNode,
};



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/content-strategist.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 2: ContentStrategist
 * Writes the main editorial draft from research output.
 * Applies brand tone matrix and content pillar framework.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS } from '@/lib/config/models'
import {
  BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX,
  CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS,
  CONTENT_PROFILE,
  GUARDRAIL_PATTERN,
} from '@/lib/brand/profiles'

const openrouter = createOpenAI({
  apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY || '',
  baseURL: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1',
})
import type {
  TargetAudience,
  AgentResult,
  CustomGuideline,
  ModelOverride,
  PublishChannel,
  ContentObjective,
  SignalType,
  ClaimRiskLevel,
  InvestorLens,
  CtaMode,
  EvidenceMode,
  AssertivenessLevel,
  ContentLanguage,
} from './types'
import type { InsightBlock, StructuredContent } from './schemas'

export interface StrategyInput {
  researchDoc?: string
  insight_blocks?: InsightBlock[]
  topic: string
  targetAudience: TargetAudience
  publishingChannel: PublishChannel
  customGuidelines?: CustomGuideline[]
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
  property_name?: string
  contentObjective?: ContentObjective
  signalType?: SignalType
  claimRiskLevel?: ClaimRiskLevel
  sourceUrls?: string
  allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
  allowCtaLink?: boolean
  language?: ContentLanguage
  coreThesis?: string
  investorLens?: InvestorLens
  desiredReaderOutcome?: string
  ctaMode?: CtaMode
  evidenceMode?: EvidenceMode
  assertiveness?: AssertivenessLevel
  microzone?: string
  exampleOutput?: string
}

export interface StrategyOutput {
  contentDraft: string
  wordCount: number
  toneScore: number
  headline: string
  subheadline: string
  structured_content?: StructuredContent
}

const AUDIENCE_MAP: Record<TargetAudience, string> = {
  investors: 'Inversores de alto patrimonio (HNW, +500k€) que buscan oportunidades, no listings. Valoran acceso anticipado y ventaja informacional.',
  owners: 'Propietarios de inmuebles premium que contemplan venta o repositionamiento. Buscan criterio y discreción.',
  partners: 'Partners estratégicos (brokers, family offices, gestores de patrimonio) interesados en colaboración.',
  international_buyers: 'Compradores internacionales que valoran Mallorca como destino patrimonial, residencial y estratégico.',
  family_offices: 'Family offices que buscan señales sólidas, documentación, discreción y oportunidades defendibles.',
  relocation_expat_premium: 'Perfil relocation y expat premium que combina estilo de vida, residencia, conectividad y seguridad jurídica.',
  mixed_qualified_audience: 'Audiencia cualificada mixta con foco en criterio, no en consumo aspiracional.',
}

function scoreTone(text: string): number {
  const positiveSignals = [
    'estratégic', 'analítico', 'selección', 'inteligencia', 'acceso',
    'oportunidad', 'criterio', 'exclusiv', 'mercado', 'posicionamiento',
  ]
  const negativeSignals = CONTENT_PROFILE.evitar.map(e => e.toLowerCase())

  const lower = text.toLowerCase()
  const positiveHits = positiveSignals.filter(s => lower.includes(s)).length
  const negativeHits = negativeSignals.filter(s => lower.includes(s)).length

  return Math.min(Math.max((positiveHits * 0.1) - (negativeHits * 0.2) + 0.5, 0), 1)
}

export async function contentStrategist(
  input: StrategyInput
): Promise<AgentResult<StrategyOutput>> {
  const start = Date.now()

  const audienceCtx = AUDIENCE_MAP[input.targetAudience] || AUDIENCE_MAP.investors
  const has_insights = input.insight_blocks && input.insight_blocks.length > 0
  const channelPrompt = CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.byChannel[input.publishingChannel]

  // Build custom guidelines section
  const generalGuidelines = input.customGuidelines
    ?.find(g => g.scope === 'all')
    ?.text || ''
  const channelGuidelines = input.customGuidelines
    ?.find(g => g.scope === input.publishingChannel)
    ?.text || ''
  const guidelinesSection = [generalGuidelines, channelGuidelines]
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join('\n\n')

  const systemPrompt = `${BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX}

${CHANNEL_CONTROL_PROMPTS.globalPreGeneration}
${guidelinesSection ? `\n\nINSTRUCCIONES ADICIONALES:\n${guidelinesSection}` : ''}

Como ContentStrategist, redactas el borrador editorial definitivo${has_insights ? ' desde insights estructurados' : ''}.

AUDIENCIA: ${audienceCtx}
CANAL DE PUBLICACIÓN: ${input.publishingChannel}
${input.property_name ? `PROPIEDAD: ${input.property_name}` : ''}
${input.contentObjective ? `OBJETIVO DEL CONTENIDO: ${input.contentObjective}` : ''}
${input.signalType ? `TIPO DE SEÑAL: ${input.signalType}` : ''}
${input.claimRiskLevel ? `RIESGO DEL CLAIM: ${input.claimRiskLevel}` : ''}
${typeof input.allowQuantitativeData === 'boolean' ? `DATOS CUANTITATIVOS PERMITIDOS: ${input.allowQuantitativeData ? 'sí' : 'no'}` : ''}
${typeof input.allowCtaLink === 'boolean' ? `CTA CON ENLACE PERMITIDO: ${input.allowCtaLink ? 'sí' : 'no'}` : ''}
${input.language ? `IDIOMA: ${input.language}` : ''}
${input.coreThesis ? `TESIS CENTRAL: ${input.coreThesis}` : ''}
${input.investorLens ? `PERSPECTIVA DEL LECTOR / DECISOR: ${input.investorLens}` : ''}
${input.desiredReaderOutcome ? `RESULTADO DESEADO DEL LECTOR: ${input.desiredReaderOutcome}` : ''}
${input.ctaMode ? `MODO CTA: ${input.ctaMode}` : ''}
${input.evidenceMode ? `MODO EVIDENCIA: ${input.evidenceMode}` : ''}
${input.assertiveness ? `NIVEL DE ASERTIVIDAD: ${input.assertiveness}` : ''}
${input.microzone ? `MICROZONA: ${input.microzone}` : ''}
${input.sourceUrls ? `FUENTES O URLS A PRIORIZAR:\n${input.sourceUrls}` : ''}
${input.exampleOutput ? `REFERENCIA DE TONO O ESTILO:\n${input.exampleOutput}` : ''}

ESTRUCTURA REQUERIDA:
1. Headline potente (sin clickbait, con sustancia)
2. Subtítulo que amplía el ángulo analítico
3. Cuerpo (introduce el insight → desarrolla con datos → cierra con posicionamiento)
4. CTA implícito e indirecto

PILARES DE CONTENIDO aplicables:
${Object.entries(CONTENT_PROFILE.pilares).map(([k, v]) => `- ${k}: ${v}`).join('\n')}

PROMPT DE CONTROL DEL CANAL:
${channelPrompt.generationPrompt}

No incluyas promesas de rentabilidad, urgencia artificial ni lenguaje comercial masivo.
Si no hay fuente verificable o el usuario ha prohibido datos cuantitativos, usa formulaciones cualitativas y prudentes.`

  let user_prompt = ''
  if (has_insights && input.insight_blocks) {
    const insights_text = input.insight_blocks
      .map((i) => `### ${i.category}: ${i.title}\n${i.evidence.join('\n')}`)
      .join('\n\n')
    user_prompt = `Tema: ${input.topic}
Canal destino: ${input.publishingChannel}

Insights estructurados disponibles:
${insights_text}`
  } else {
    user_prompt = `Tema: ${input.topic}
Canal destino: ${input.publishingChannel}

Investigación disponible:
${(input.researchDoc || '').slice(0, 3000)}`
  }

  let contentDraft = ''
  let tokensUsed = 0
  let inputTokens = 0
  let outputTokens = 0
  let modelId: string | undefined

  try {
    const result = await generateWithFallback(
      (modelId, abortSignal) => generateText({
        model: openrouter(modelId),
        system: systemPrompt,
        prompt: user_prompt,
        maxOutputTokens: 2000,
        abortSignal,
      }),
      FREE_MODELS,
      undefined,
      input.overrideModel?.modelId,
      (usedModelId, usedResult) => {
        modelId = usedModelId
        inputTokens = usedResult.usage?.inputTokens || 0
        outputTokens = usedResult.usage?.outputTokens || 0
      }
    )
    contentDraft = result.text.trim()
    if (!contentDraft) {
      throw new Error('LLM returned empty content draft')
    }
    tokensUsed = result.usage?.totalTokens || 0
  } catch {
    contentDraft = `# ${input.topic}

Una perspectiva estratégica sobre las dinámicas actuales del mercado inmobiliario premium en Mallorca.

${has_insights && input.insight_blocks ? input.insight_blocks[0]?.evidence.join('\n') : (input.researchDoc || '').slice(0, 800)}`
  }

  // Apply guardrails
  contentDraft = contentDraft.replace(GUARDRAIL_PATTERN, '[REDACTED]')

  // Extract headline from first H1 or first line
  const headlineMatch = contentDraft.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
  const headline = headlineMatch?.[1]?.trim() || input.topic
  const subheadlineMatch = contentDraft.match(/^##\s+(.+)$/m)
  const subheadline = subheadlineMatch?.[1]?.trim() || ''

  const wordCount = contentDraft.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length
  const toneScore = scoreTone(contentDraft)

  // Build structured content if insights available
  const structured_content: StructuredContent | undefined = has_insights
    ? {
        headline,
        teaser: subheadline,
        body_sections: {
          property_spec: input.insight_blocks?.find((i) => i.category === 'property_spec')?.evidence.join('. ') || '',
          market_analysis: input.insight_blocks?.find((i) => i.category === 'market_position')?.evidence.join('. ') || '',
          investment_thesis: input.insight_blocks?.find((i) => i.category === 'investment_thesis')?.evidence.join('. ') || '',
          risk_assessment: input.insight_blocks?.find((i) => i.category === 'risk_signal')?.evidence.join('. ') || '',
        },
        cta: 'Acceso anticipado a oportunidades pre-mercado',
        word_count: wordCount,
        insights_used: input.insight_blocks || [],
      }
    : undefined

  return {
    output: { contentDraft, wordCount, toneScore, headline, subheadline, structured_content },
    tokensUsed,
    inputTokens,
    outputTokens,
    modelId,
    durationMs: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/editorial-polisher.ts
================================================
import { generateText } from 'ai'
import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import { BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX } from '@/lib/brand/profiles'
import type { PublishChannel, AgentResult } from './types'

const openrouter = createOpenAI({
  apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY || '',
  baseURL: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1',
})

export interface EditorialPolisherInput {
  text: string
  channel: PublishChannel
  thesis?: string
}

/**
 * Editorial Polisher Agent
 * Fine-tunes the generated text to ensure premium linguistic quality,
 * correct Spanish/English, and strict removal of unwanted Markdown or artifacts.
 */
export async function editorialPolisher(
  input: EditorialPolisherInput
): Promise<AgentResult<{ polishedText: string }>> {
  const isSpanish = input.channel.endsWith('_es')
  const isSocial = input.channel.startsWith('linkedin') || input.channel.startsWith('facebook')

  const systemPrompt = `${BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX}

Actúa como un corrector de estilo premium de Anclora Private Estates.
Tu misión es pulir el texto generado para asegurar la máxima calidad lingüística y profesionalidad.

REGLAS DE ORO:
1. NO inventar datos. NO añadir información nueva.
2. Conservar íntegramente la tesis central y el tono analítico.
3. ${isSocial ? 'ELIMINAR CUALQUIER rastro de Markdown (negritas **, encabezados #, enlaces []()). NO USAR NEGRITAS.' : 'Mantener el formato adecuado para el canal.'}
4. Corregir errores ortográficos, gramaticales y puntuación.
5. Eliminar palabras que suenen artificiales, corruptas o inventadas (ej: Aiude, intelijo, mersas).
6. ${isSocial ? "Asegurar que NO haya saludos ('Hola a todos') ni despedidas ni frases tipo 'espero que este post'." : ''}
7. Listas en Social: usar únicamente el símbolo '•' para bullets.
8. Devolver ÚNICAMENTE el texto pulido, listo para publicar. Sin notas ni explicaciones.

${isSpanish ? 'Idioma: Español (Mallorca/España).' : 'Language: English (International).'}
Canal: ${input.channel}`

  const prompt = `Tesis Central: ${input.thesis || 'N/A'}\n\nTexto a pulir:\n${input.text}`

  try {
    const result = await generateText({
      model: openrouter('openai/gpt-4o-mini'),
      system: systemPrompt,
      prompt: prompt,
      maxOutputTokens: 1200,
    })

    return {
      output: { polishedText: result.text.trim() },
      tokensUsed: result.usage?.totalTokens,
      inputTokens: result.usage?.inputTokens,
      outputTokens: result.usage?.outputTokens,
      modelId: 'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    }
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('[Polisher] Failed:', error)
    return {
      output: { polishedText: input.text }, // Return original on failure
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/editorial-quality-validator.ts
================================================
import type { PublishChannel } from './types'

export interface EditorialValidationResult {
  passed: boolean
  severity: 'pass' | 'warning' | 'hard_fail'
  issues: string[]
  recommendedAction: 'accept' | 'revise' | 'regenerate_with_stronger_model'
}

const CORRUPTED_WORDS = [
  'Aiude',
  'habergirles',
  'intelijo',
  'mersas',
  'premios calvios',
  'caliviano',
]

const FORBIDDEN_MARKDOWN_PATTERNS = [
  /\*\*[^*]+\*\*/, // Bold
  /^#+ /m, // Headers
  /\[[^\]]+\]\([^)]+\)/, // Markdown Links
]

/**
 * Editorial Quality Validator
 * Detects linguistic corruption, forbidden Markdown in social channels,
 * and compliance issues related to brand voice.
 */
export function validateEditorialQuality(
  text: string,
  channel: PublishChannel,
  allowQuantitativeData: boolean = false
): EditorialValidationResult {
  const issues: string[] = []
  let severity: 'pass' | 'warning' | 'hard_fail' = 'pass'

  // 1. Check for corrupted words
  for (const word of CORRUPTED_WORDS) {
    const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${word}\\b`, 'i')
    if (regex.test(text)) {
      issues.push(`Palabra corrupta detectada: "${word}"`)
      severity = 'hard_fail'
    }
  }

  // 2. Specific linguistic rules for ES
  if (channel.endsWith('_es')) {
    if (/\binversionistas\b/i.test(text)) {
      issues.push('Usa "inversores" en lugar de "inversionistas" (español de España).')
      if (severity === 'pass') severity = 'warning'
    }
    
    if (/\bparroquia\b/i.test(text)) {
      const mallorcaContext = ['calvià', 'punta negra', 'mallorca', 'suroeste', 'andratx', 'son vida']
      if (mallorcaContext.some((c) => text.toLowerCase().includes(c))) {
        issues.push('Uso incorrecto de "parroquia" para contexto civil de Calvià/Mallorca.')
        severity = 'hard_fail'
      }
    }
  }

  // 3. Specific linguistic rules for EN
  if (channel.endsWith('_en')) {
    const forbiddenEnTerms = ['parish', 'neighborhood unit'] // If they come from literal translations
    for (const term of forbiddenEnTerms) {
      if (new RegExp(`\\b${term}\\b`, 'i').test(text)) {
        issues.push(`Avoid literal translations like "${term}" in English context.`)
        if (severity === 'pass') severity = 'warning'
      }
    }
  }

  // 4. Social Channel Restrictions (LinkedIn/Facebook)
  if (channel.startsWith('linkedin') || channel.startsWith('facebook')) {
    // Check for Markdown
    if (FORBIDDEN_MARKDOWN_PATTERNS.some((p) => p.test(text))) {
      issues.push(`Markdown prohibido detectado (negritas, encabezados o enlaces)`)
      if (severity !== 'hard_fail') severity = 'warning'
    }

    // Check for list bullets
    if (/^[ \t]*[-*] /m.test(text)) {
      issues.push(`Listas Markdown detectadas (- o *). Usa "•" en su lugar.`)
      if (severity !== 'hard_fail') severity = 'warning'
    }

    // Check for greetings/farewells
    const forbiddenPhrases = [
      'hola a todos',
      'espero que estén bien',
      'espero que estéis bien',
      'saludos cordiales',
      'atentamente',
      'un saludo',
      'espero que este post',
      'espero que esta información',
      'un fuerte abrazo',
    ]
    if (forbiddenPhrases.some((p) => text.toLowerCase().includes(p))) {
      issues.push(`Saludos o despedidas artificiales detectados`)
      if (severity !== 'hard_fail') severity = 'warning'
    }
  }

  // 4. Financial Claims without permission
  if (!allowQuantitativeData) {
    const financialPatterns = [
      /\d+%\s*(de\s*)?(rentabilidad|ROI|revalorización|retorno)/i,
      /garantizamos\s+\d+%/i,
      /ganancias\s+aseguradas/i,
    ]
    if (financialPatterns.some((p) => p.test(text))) {
      issues.push(`Claims financieros fuertes detectados sin permiso (allowQuantitativeData=false)`)
      severity = 'hard_fail'
    }
  }

  // 5. Basic length / incoherence
  if (text.length < 50) {
    issues.push(`Texto sospechosamente corto (${text.length} caracteres)`)
    if (severity === 'pass') severity = 'warning'
  }

  // 6. Bad hashtags
  const badHashtagPattern = /#\w*[^a-zA-Z0-9\s]\w*/
  if (badHashtagPattern.test(text)) {
    issues.push(`Hashtags con caracteres especiales o incoherentes`)
    if (severity === 'pass') severity = 'warning'
  }

  const passed = severity !== 'hard_fail'

  let recommendedAction: EditorialValidationResult['recommendedAction'] = 'accept'
  if (severity === 'hard_fail') {
    recommendedAction = 'regenerate_with_stronger_model'
  } else if (severity === 'warning') {
    recommendedAction = 'revise'
  }

  return {
    passed,
    severity,
    issues,
    recommendedAction,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/evidence-composer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 2: EvidenceComposer
 * Composes insights into coherent editorial narrative.
 * Applies narrative flow: context → property → market position → thesis → risks
 * Enforces brand tone and compliance guardrails.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import type { InsightBlock, AgentExecutionResult } from './schemas'
import { BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX, GUARDRAIL_PATTERN } from '@/lib/brand/profiles'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS, openrouter } from '@/lib/config/models'
import type { ModelOverride } from './types'

export interface EvidenceComposerInput {
  insight_blocks: InsightBlock[]
  property_name: string
  property_zone: string
  target_audience: string
  market_framing: string
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
}

function organizeInsightsByNarrative(
  insights: InsightBlock[]
): Record<string, InsightBlock[]> {
  const organized: Record<string, InsightBlock[]> = {
    property_spec: [],
    market_position: [],
    investment_thesis: [],
    risk_signal: [],
  }

  for (const insight of insights) {
    if (insight.category in organized) {
      organized[insight.category].push(insight)
    }
  }

  return organized
}

function createNarrativePrompt(
  organized: Record<string, InsightBlock[]>,
  property_name: string,
  property_zone: string,
  target_audience: string
): string {
  const property_insights = organized.property_spec.map((i) => i.evidence.join(', ')).join('. ')
  const market_insights = organized.market_position.map((i) => i.evidence.join(', ')).join('. ')
  const thesis_insights = organized.investment_thesis.map((i) => i.evidence.join(', ')).join('. ')
  const risk_insights = organized.risk_signal.map((i) => i.evidence.join(', ')).join('. ')

  return `Propiedad: ${property_name}
Zona: ${property_zone}
Audiencia: ${target_audience}

Especificaciones de Propiedad:
${property_insights}

Contexto de Mercado:
${market_insights}

Tesis de Inversión:
${thesis_insights}

Riesgos y Limitaciones:
${risk_insights}

Compone una narrativa coherente que:
1. Abre con contexto de zona y mercado
2. Presenta la propiedad con sus características
3. Posiciona dentro de mercado actual
4. Desarrolla tesis de inversión sin promesas de rentabilidad
5. Cierra con riesgos y limitaciones

Sin clickbait, garantías falsas ni urgencia artificial.`
}

export async function evidenceComposer(
  input: EvidenceComposerInput
): Promise<AgentExecutionResult<string>> {
  const start = Date.now()
  const organized = organizeInsightsByNarrative(input.insight_blocks)

  const system_prompt = `${BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX}

Como EvidenceComposer, compilas insights en narrativa editorial coherente.

FLUJO NARRATIVO REQUERIDO:
1. Apertura: Contexto de zona y dinámicas de mercado
2. Propiedad: Características, especificaciones, posicionamiento
3. Mercado: Dinámica local, tendencias, comparativas
4. Tesis: Oportunidades específicas de inversión
5. Riesgos: Limitaciones, regulaciones, sensibilidades

GUARDRAILS:
- Sin promesas de rentabilidad garantizada
- Sin declaraciones no verificables
- Sin urgencia artificial
- Sin comparativas nominales con competidores
- Tono: Sofisticado, analítico, selectivo

Escribe un borrador de 600-1000 palabras.`

  const narrative_prompt = createNarrativePrompt(
    organized,
    input.property_name,
    input.property_zone,
    input.target_audience
  )

  let composed_draft = ''

  try {
    const result = await generateWithFallback(
      (modelId, abortSignal) =>
        generateText({
          model: openrouter(modelId),
          system: system_prompt,
          prompt: narrative_prompt,
          maxOutputTokens: 1500,
          abortSignal,
        }),
      FREE_MODELS,
      undefined,
      input.overrideModel?.modelId
    )

    composed_draft = result.text
  } catch {
    // Fallback: manual composition from insights
    const sections: string[] = []

    if (organized.property_spec.length > 0) {
      sections.push(
        `## ${input.property_name}\n\n${organized.property_spec[0].evidence.join('. ')}`
      )
    }

    if (organized.market_position.length > 0) {
      sections.push(`## Contexto de Mercado\n\n${organized.market_position[0].evidence.join('. ')}`)
    }

    if (organized.investment_thesis.length > 0) {
      sections.push(`## Oportunidad de Inversión\n\n${organized.investment_thesis[0].evidence.join('. ')}`)
    }

    if (organized.risk_signal.length > 0) {
      sections.push(`## Consideraciones de Riesgo\n\n${organized.risk_signal[0].evidence.join('. ')}`)
    }

    composed_draft = sections.length > 0 ? sections.join('\n\n') : `Análisis de ${input.property_name}`
  }

  // Apply guardrails
  composed_draft = composed_draft.replace(GUARDRAIL_PATTERN, '[REDACTED]')

  // Ensure compliance
  if (GUARDRAIL_PATTERN.test(composed_draft)) {
    GUARDRAIL_PATTERN.lastIndex = 0
    throw new Error('Composed draft contains compliance violations')
  }
  GUARDRAIL_PATTERN.lastIndex = 0

  return {
    success: composed_draft.length > 0,
    data: composed_draft,
    tokens_used: 0,
    duration_ms: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/insight-extractor.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 1.5: InsightExtractor
 * Extracts property-specific insights from research output.
 * Transforms generic market analysis into property-focused insight blocks.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import type { InsightBlock, PropertyIntentRequest, AgentExecutionResult } from './schemas'
import { validateInsightBlock } from './schemas'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS, openrouter } from '@/lib/config/models'
import type { ModelOverride } from './types'

export interface InsightExtractorInput {
  research_doc: string
  property_context: PropertyIntentRequest
  market_framing: string
  target_audience: string
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
}

function generateInsightId(category: string, index: number): string {
  const timestamp = Date.now().toString(36)
  return `insight_${category}_${index}_${timestamp}`
}

function extractPropertyMetrics(text: string): string[] {
  const metrics: string[] = []
  const patterns = [
    /(\d+)\s*(habitaciones|bedrooms|rooms|bed)/gi,
    /(\d+)\s*(baños|bathrooms|bath)/gi,
    /(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)\s*(m²|sqm|square meters)/gi,
    /€?\s*(\d+(?:[,.]?\d+)*(?:M|k)?)\s*(euros?|€|price)/gi,
    /ocupación\s*(?:del|de)?\s*(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)%/gi,
    /revpar\s*(?:de)?\s*€?(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/gi,
  ]

  for (const pattern of patterns) {
    const matches = text.matchAll(pattern)
    for (const match of matches) {
      metrics.push(match[0])
    }
  }

  return [...new Set(metrics)]
}

function createDefaultInsights(
  property_context: PropertyIntentRequest,
  research_doc: string
): InsightBlock[] {
  const insights: InsightBlock[] = []
  const metrics = extractPropertyMetrics(research_doc)

  // Insight 1: Property Spec
  insights.push({
    id: generateInsightId('property_spec', 0),
    category: 'property_spec',
    title: `Caracterización: ${property_context.property_name}`,
    evidence: [
      `Tipo: ${property_context.property_type}`,
      `Zona: ${property_context.location_zone}`,
      ...metrics.slice(0, 3),
    ],
    source: 'llm',
    confidence: 1,
    property_specific: true,
  })

  // Insight 2: Market Position
  insights.push({
    id: generateInsightId('market_position', 1),
    category: 'market_position',
    title: `Posicionamiento en Mercado — ${property_context.location_zone}`,
    evidence: [
      'Análisis comparativo de zona de ubicación',
      'Dinámica de precios en segmento premium',
      'Tendencias recientes de mercado inmobiliario',
    ],
    source: 'llm',
    confidence: 1,
    property_specific: true,
  })

  // Insight 3: Investment Thesis
  insights.push({
    id: generateInsightId('investment_thesis', 2),
    category: 'investment_thesis',
    title: `Tesis de Inversión`,
    evidence: [
      'Oportunidades de reposicionamiento',
      'Potencial de apreciación a mediano plazo',
      'Acceso a mercado premium no saturado',
    ],
    source: 'llm',
    confidence: 0.7,
    property_specific: true,
  })

  // Insight 4: Risk Signal
  insights.push({
    id: generateInsightId('risk_signal', 3),
    category: 'risk_signal',
    title: `Señales de Riesgo y Limitaciones`,
    evidence: [
      'Factores regulatorios en costa',
      'Restricciones de desarrollo inmobiliario',
      'Sensibilidad a ciclos macroeconómicos',
    ],
    source: 'llm',
    confidence: 0.7,
    property_specific: true,
  })

  return insights
}

export async function insightExtractor(
  input: InsightExtractorInput
): Promise<AgentExecutionResult<InsightBlock[]>> {
  const start = Date.now()
  // Try to extract insights via LLM if confidence is high enough
  const system_prompt = `Eres InsightExtractor, especializado en extraer insights específicos de propiedad desde análisis de mercado genéricos.

Tu tarea:
1. Identificar hechos específicos de propiedad (características, métricas, especificaciones)
2. Extraer insights de mercado aplicados a la zona específica
3. Generar tesis de inversión basada en oportunidades reales
4. Señalar riesgos y limitaciones aplicables

Responde SOLO en JSON. Array de insight objects:
[
  {
    "id": "insight_CATEGORY_INDEX_TIMESTAMP",
    "category": "property_spec|market_position|investment_thesis|risk_signal",
    "title": "string",
    "evidence": ["evidence1", "evidence2", ...],
    "source": "rag|llm|hybrid",
    "confidence": number, // 0 to 1
    "property_specific": true|false
  }
]

CRITICAL: Cada insight DEBE tener property_specific=true para propiedad. Si no puedes confirmar que es específico de "${input.property_context.property_name}", usa property_specific=false.`

  const user_prompt = `Propiedad: ${input.property_context.property_name}
Tipo: ${input.property_context.property_type}
Zona: ${input.property_context.location_zone}
Audiencia: ${input.target_audience}
Framing: ${input.market_framing}

Análisis disponible (primeros 2000 chars):
${input.research_doc.slice(0, 2000)}

Extrae 4-5 insights estructurados sobre esta propiedad.`

  let extracted_insights: InsightBlock[] = []

  try {
    const result = await generateWithFallback(
      (modelId, abortSignal) =>
        generateText({
          model: openrouter(modelId),
          system: system_prompt,
          prompt: user_prompt,
          maxOutputTokens: 800,
          abortSignal,
        }),
      FREE_MODELS,
      undefined,
      input.overrideModel?.modelId
    )

    try {
      const json_match = result.text.match(/\[[\s\S]*\]/)
      if (json_match) {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(json_match[0])
        if (Array.isArray(parsed)) {
          extracted_insights = parsed.filter((insight: unknown) => validateInsightBlock(insight))
        }
      }
    } catch {
      // JSON parse failed, use defaults
    }
  } catch {
    // LLM unavailable, use template fallback
  }

  // If extraction failed or yielded nothing, use default template
  if (extracted_insights.length === 0) {
    extracted_insights = createDefaultInsights(input.property_context, input.research_doc)
  }

  // Ensure all insights are property_specific and validated
  const final_insights = extracted_insights
    .map((insight) => ({
      ...insight,
      property_specific: true,
    }))
    .filter((insight) => validateInsightBlock(insight))

  return {
    success: final_insights.length > 0,
    data: final_insights,
    tokens_used: 0,
    duration_ms: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/intent-normalizer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 0: IntentNormalizer
 * Extracts and normalizes user intent into structured property context.
 * Detects property mentions, maps zones, validates framing.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import type { NormalizedIntent, PropertyIntentRequest, AgentExecutionResult } from './schemas'
import { validateNormalizedIntent, sanitizeIntentInput } from './schemas'
import type {
  ContentFraming,
  TargetAudience,
  ContentZone,
  ModelOverride,
  InvestorLens,
  CtaMode,
  EvidenceMode,
  AssertivenessLevel,
  ContentObjective,
  SignalType,
  ClaimRiskLevel,
  ContentLanguage,
} from './types'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS, openrouter } from '@/lib/config/models'

export interface IntentNormalizerInput {
  user_request: string
  explicit_property?: string
  explicit_zone?: ContentZone
  explicit_framing?: ContentFraming
  explicit_audience?: TargetAudience
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
  // Phase 9: Editorial context fields
  coreThesis?: string
  investorLens?: InvestorLens
  desiredReaderOutcome?: string
  ctaMode?: CtaMode
  evidenceMode?: EvidenceMode
  assertiveness?: AssertivenessLevel
  microzone?: string
  exampleOutput?: string
  contentObjective?: ContentObjective
  signalType?: SignalType
  claimRiskLevel?: ClaimRiskLevel
  sourceUrls?: string
  allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
  allowCtaLink?: boolean
  language?: ContentLanguage
}

const KNOWN_PROPERTIES: Record<string, { name: string; zone: ContentZone; type: string }> = {
  'hotel mandarin': {
    name: 'Hotel Mandarin Punta Negra',
    zone: 'calvià',
    type: 'investment',
  },
  'mandarin punta negra': {
    name: 'Hotel Mandarin Punta Negra',
    zone: 'calvià',
    type: 'investment',
  },
}

const VALID_FRAMINGS: ContentFraming[] = [
  'market_analysis',
  'market_signal',
  'investment_criteria',
  'luxury_investment',
  'lifestyle',
  'off_market',
  'owner_acquisition',
  'strategic_partners',
  'architecture_sustainability',
  'regulation_scarcity',
]

const VALID_AUDIENCES: TargetAudience[] = [
  'investors',
  'owners',
  'partners',
  'international_buyers',
  'family_offices',
  'relocation_expat_premium',
  'mixed_qualified_audience',
]

const ZONE_KEYWORDS: Record<ContentZone, string[]> = {
  calvià: ['calvià', 'punta negra'],
  andratx: ['andratx', "port d'andratx", 'camp de mar'],
  suroeste_general: ['suroeste', 'southwest'],
  palma: ['palma', 'palma de mallorca', 'son armadans'],
  toda_mallorca: ['mallorca', 'isla'],
  son_vida: ['son vida'],
  portals_bendinat: ['portals', 'bendinat', 'puerto portals', 'portals nous'],
  port_dandratx: ["port d'andratx", 'puerto de andratx'],
  santa_ponsa: ['santa ponsa', 'santa ponça'],
  costa_de_la_calma_paguera: ['costa de la calma', 'paguera'],
}

function detectPropertyFromRequest(
  request: string
): { property?: PropertyIntentRequest; confidence: number } {
  const lower = request.toLowerCase()

  for (const [key, property] of Object.entries(KNOWN_PROPERTIES)) {
    if (lower.includes(key)) {
      return {
        property: {
          property_id: key.replace(/\s+/g, '_'),
          property_name: property.name,
          property_type: property.type as 'residential' | 'commercial' | 'investment',
          location_zone: property.zone,
          key_attributes: [],
        },
        confidence: 1,
      }
    }
  }

  return { confidence: 0 }
}

function detectZoneFromRequest(request: string): ContentZone | undefined {
  const lower = request.toLowerCase()

  for (const [zone, keywords] of Object.entries(ZONE_KEYWORDS)) {
    if (keywords.some((kw) => lower.includes(kw))) {
      return zone as ContentZone
    }
  }

  return undefined
}

function detectFramingFromRequest(request: string): ContentFraming | undefined {
  const lower = request.toLowerCase()

  if (lower.includes('investment') || lower.includes('inversión') || lower.includes('rentabilidad')) {
    return 'luxury_investment'
  }
  if (lower.includes('market') || lower.includes('mercado') || lower.includes('análisis')) {
    return 'market_analysis'
  }
  if (lower.includes('signal') || lower.includes('señal')) {
    return 'market_signal'
  }
  if (lower.includes('criteria') || lower.includes('criterio')) {
    return 'investment_criteria'
  }
  if (lower.includes('lifestyle') || lower.includes('estilo') || lower.includes('vida')) {
    return 'lifestyle'
  }
  if (lower.includes('off-market') || lower.includes('pre-market') || lower.includes('privado')) {
    return 'off_market'
  }
  if (lower.includes('propietario') || lower.includes('captación')) {
    return 'owner_acquisition'
  }
  if (lower.includes('partner') || lower.includes('socio estratégico')) {
    return 'strategic_partners'
  }
  if (lower.includes('arquitectura') || lower.includes('sostenibilidad')) {
    return 'architecture_sustainability'
  }
  if (lower.includes('regulación') || lower.includes('escasez')) {
    return 'regulation_scarcity'
  }

  return undefined
}

function detectAudienceFromRequest(request: string): TargetAudience | undefined {
  const lower = request.toLowerCase()

  if (lower.includes('investor') || lower.includes('inversor')) {
    return 'investors'
  }
  if (lower.includes('owner') || lower.includes('propietario')) {
    return 'owners'
  }
  if (lower.includes('partner') || lower.includes('socio') || lower.includes('broker')) {
    return 'partners'
  }
  if (lower.includes('family office')) {
    return 'family_offices'
  }
  if (lower.includes('international') || lower.includes('internacional')) {
    return 'international_buyers'
  }
  if (lower.includes('relocation') || lower.includes('expat')) {
    return 'relocation_expat_premium'
  }

  return undefined
}

export async function intentNormalizer(
  input: IntentNormalizerInput
): Promise<AgentExecutionResult<NormalizedIntent>> {
  const start = Date.now()
  const sanitized_request = sanitizeIntentInput(input.user_request)

  // Try to detect property, zone, framing from request
  const detected_property = detectPropertyFromRequest(sanitized_request)
  const detected_zone = detectZoneFromRequest(sanitized_request)
  const detected_framing = detectFramingFromRequest(sanitized_request)
  const detected_audience = detectAudienceFromRequest(sanitized_request)

  // Use explicit overrides if provided
  let property_context = detected_property.property
  const zone = input.explicit_zone || detected_zone || 'suroeste_general'
  const framing = input.explicit_framing || detected_framing || 'market_analysis'
  const target_audience = input.explicit_audience || detected_audience || 'investors'

  // Create default property context if Phase 9 fields are provided but no property was detected
  const hasPhase9Fields =
    input.coreThesis ||
    input.investorLens ||
    input.desiredReaderOutcome ||
    input.ctaMode ||
    input.evidenceMode ||
    input.assertiveness ||
    input.microzone ||
    input.exampleOutput

  if (!property_context && hasPhase9Fields) {
    property_context = {
      property_id: 'generic_content',
      property_name: 'Generic Property',
      property_type: 'investment' as const,
      location_zone: zone as ContentZone,
      key_attributes: [],
    }
  }

  // Add Phase 9 fields to property_context if provided
  if (property_context) {
    property_context = {
      ...property_context,
      core_thesis: input.coreThesis,
      investor_lens: input.investorLens,
      desired_reader_outcome: input.desiredReaderOutcome,
      cta_mode: input.ctaMode,
      evidence_mode: input.evidenceMode,
      assertiveness: input.assertiveness,
      microzone: input.microzone,
      example_output: input.exampleOutput,
      content_objective: input.contentObjective,
      signal_type: input.signalType,
      claim_risk_level: input.claimRiskLevel,
      source_urls: input.sourceUrls,
      allow_quantitative_data: input.allowQuantitativeData,
      allow_cta_link: input.allowCtaLink,
      language: input.language,
    }
  }

  // Calculate initial quality score based on detection confidence
  let quality_score = detected_property.confidence * 0.4
  quality_score += (detected_framing ? 0.3 : 0)
  quality_score += (detected_audience ? 0.3 : 0)

  // Use LLM to refine intent if confidence is low
  let refined_intent = `Topic: ${sanitized_request}\nProperty: ${property_context?.property_name || 'generic'}\nZone: ${zone}\nFraming: ${framing}\nAudience: ${target_audience}`

  if (quality_score < 0.7) {
    const system_prompt = `Eres IntentNormalizer, especializados en extraer intent estructurado de solicitudes de contenido.

Tu tarea:
1. Identificar si se menciona una propiedad específica
2. Detectar la zona geográfica (calvià, andratx, palma, suroeste_general, toda_mallorca, son_vida, portals_bendinat, port_dandratx, santa_ponsa, costa_de_la_calma_paguera)
3. Confirmar el framing (market_analysis, market_signal, investment_criteria, luxury_investment, lifestyle, off_market, owner_acquisition, strategic_partners, architecture_sustainability, regulation_scarcity)
4. Identificar la audiencia objetivo (investors, owners, partners, international_buyers, family_offices, relocation_expat_premium, mixed_qualified_audience)

Responde SOLO en JSON con este formato exacto:
{
  "detected_topic": "string",
  "property_name": "string|null",
  "zone": "calvià|andratx|palma|suroeste_general|toda_mallorca|son_vida|portals_bendinat|port_dandratx|santa_ponsa|costa_de_la_calma_paguera",
  "framing": "market_analysis|market_signal|investment_criteria|luxury_investment|lifestyle|off_market|owner_acquisition|strategic_partners|architecture_sustainability|regulation_scarcity",
  "target_audience": "investors|owners|partners|international_buyers|family_offices|relocation_expat_premium|mixed_qualified_audience",
  "confidence_score": number
}`

    try {
      const models = FREE_MODELS
      const result = await generateWithFallback(
        (modelId, abortSignal) =>
          generateText({
            model: openrouter(modelId),
            system: system_prompt,
            prompt: `Extrae intent de este request:\n\n${sanitized_request.slice(0, 1500)}`,
            maxOutputTokens: 300,
            abortSignal,
          }),
        models,
        undefined,
        input.overrideModel?.modelId
      )

      try {
        const json_match = result.text.match(/\{[\s\S]*\}/)
        if (json_match) {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(json_match[0])
          refined_intent = `Topic: ${parsed.detected_topic || sanitized_request}\nProperty: ${parsed.property_name || 'generic'}\nZone: ${parsed.zone}\nFraming: ${parsed.framing}\nAudience: ${parsed.target_audience}`
          quality_score = Math.min(parsed.confidence_score, 1)
        }
      } catch {
        // JSON parse failed, keep defaults
      }
    } catch {
      // LLM unavailable, keep detected intent
    }
  }

  // Ensure framing is valid
  const final_framing = VALID_FRAMINGS.includes(framing) ? framing : 'market_analysis'
  const final_audience = VALID_AUDIENCES.includes(target_audience) ? target_audience : 'investors'

  const normalized_intent: NormalizedIntent = {
    original_request: sanitized_request,
    extracted_topic: refined_intent.split('\n')[0].replace('Topic: ', ''),
    property_context: property_context,
    framing: final_framing,
    target_audience: final_audience,
    quality_score: Math.min(quality_score, 1),
    confidence: quality_score > 0.6 ? 1 : 0,
    extracted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
  }

  // Validate output
  if (!validateNormalizedIntent(normalized_intent)) {
    throw new Error('Invalid normalized intent generated')
  }

  return {
    success: true,
    data: normalized_intent,
    tokens_used: 0,
    duration_ms: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/publication-scheduler.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 5: PublicationScheduler
 * Dispatches approved channel variants to their respective platforms.
 * Implements retry logic with exponential backoff.
 */

import type { PublishChannel, AgentResult } from './types'

export interface PublicationInput {
  contentId: string
  channelVariants: { channel: PublishChannel; draft: string }[]
  publishAt: string  // ISO timestamp
  workspaceId: string
}

export interface PublicationOutput {
  publicationUrls: Record<string, string>
  jobId: string
  channelStatuses: Record<string, 'published' | 'queued' | 'failed' | 'skipped'>
}

// ── Exponential backoff helper ───────────────────────────────────────────────
async function withRetry<T>(
  fn: () => Promise<T>,
  maxRetries = 3,
  baseDelayMs = 1000
): Promise<T> {
  let lastError: Error | null = null
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt <= maxRetries; attempt++) {
    try {
      return await fn()
    } catch (err) {
      lastError = err as Error
      if (attempt < maxRetries) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, baseDelayMs * Math.pow(2, attempt)))
      }
    }
  }
  throw lastError
}

// ── LinkedIn Publisher ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function publishLinkedIn(draft: string): Promise<string> {
  const token = process.env.LINKEDIN_ACCESS_TOKEN
  const personId = process.env.LINKEDIN_PERSON_ID

  if (!token || !personId) {
    // Credentials not configured — log intent, return placeholder
    console.log('[PublicationScheduler] LinkedIn: credentials not configured, skipping')
    return 'linkedin://pending-credentials'
  }

  const body = {
    author: `urn:li:person:${personId}`,
    lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED',
    specificContent: {
      'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': {
        shareCommentary: { text: draft.slice(0, 2800) },
        shareMediaCategory: 'NONE',
      },
    },
    visibility: {
      'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC',
    },
  }

  const res = await fetch('https://api.linkedin.com/v2/ugcPosts', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      'X-Restli-Protocol-Version': '2.0.0',
    },
    body: JSON.stringify(body),
  })

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(`LinkedIn API error ${res.status}: ${await res.text()}`)
  }

  const data = await res.json()
  return `https://www.linkedin.com/feed/update/${data.id}/`
}

async function publishFacebook(draft: string): Promise<string> {
  const token = process.env.FACEBOOK_PAGE_ACCESS_TOKEN
  const pageId = process.env.FACEBOOK_PAGE_ID
  const apiVersion = process.env.FACEBOOK_GRAPH_API_VERSION || 'v24.0'

  if (!token || !pageId) {
    console.log('[PublicationScheduler] Facebook: credentials not configured, skipping')
    return 'facebook://pending-credentials'
  }

  const body = new URLSearchParams({
    message: draft,
    access_token: token,
  })

  const res = await fetch(`https://graph.facebook.com/${apiVersion}/${pageId}/feed`, {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
    },
    body: body.toString(),
  })

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(`Facebook API error ${res.status}: ${await res.text()}`)
  }

  const data = (await res.json()) as { id?: string }
  if (!data.id) {
    throw new Error('Facebook API did not return a post id')
  }

  const [, postIdPart] = data.id.split('_')
  return postIdPart
    ? `https://www.facebook.com/${pageId}/posts/${postIdPart}`
    : `https://www.facebook.com/${data.id}`
}

// ── Blog (GitHub) Publisher ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function publishBlog(draft: string, title: string): Promise<string> {
  const token = process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN
  const owner = process.env.GITHUB_BLOG_OWNER || 'ToniIAPro73'
  const repo = process.env.GITHUB_BLOG_REPO || 'anclora-blog'

  if (!token) {
    console.log('[PublicationScheduler] GitHub: token not configured, skipping')
    return 'blog://pending-credentials'
  }

  const slug = title
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9\s-]/g, '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, '-')
    .slice(0, 60)
  const date = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]
  const path = `posts/${date}-${slug}.md`

  const frontmatter = `---\ntitle: "${title}"\ndate: "${date}"\nauthor: "Anclora Intelligence Engine"\ntags: ["real-estate", "mallorca", "premium"]\n---\n\n`
  const fileContent = `${frontmatter}${draft}`
  const encoded = Buffer.from(fileContent).toString('base64')

  const res = await fetch(
    `https://api.github.com/repos/${owner}/${repo}/contents/${path}`,
    {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        message: `Publish: ${title}`,
        content: encoded,
      }),
    }
  )

  if (!res.ok) {
    throw new Error(`GitHub API error ${res.status}: ${await res.text()}`)
  }

  return `https://${owner}.github.io/${repo}/${slug}/`
}

// ── Main scheduler ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// LINKEDIN PUBLICATION DISABLED — Authorization required before enabling
const LINKEDIN_PUBLICATION_ENABLED = false

export async function publicationScheduler(
  input: PublicationInput
): Promise<AgentResult<PublicationOutput>> {
  const start = Date.now()
  const jobId = `job_${Date.now()}_${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)}`
  const publicationUrls: Record<string, string> = {}
  const channelStatuses: Record<string, 'published' | 'queued' | 'failed' | 'skipped'> = {}

  for (const variant of input.channelVariants) {
    const { channel, draft } = variant
    try {
      let url = ''
      if (channel === 'linkedin_es' || channel === 'linkedin_en') {
        if (!LINKEDIN_PUBLICATION_ENABLED) {
          channelStatuses[channel] = 'skipped'
          continue
        }
        url = await withRetry(() => publishLinkedIn(draft))
      } else if (channel === 'blog_es' || channel === 'blog_en') {
        const titleMatch = draft.match(/^#\s+(.+)$/m)
        const title = titleMatch?.[1] || input.contentId
        url = await withRetry(() => publishBlog(draft, title))
      } else if (channel === 'facebook_es' || channel === 'facebook_en') {
        url = await withRetry(() => publishFacebook(draft))
      } else {
        channelStatuses[channel] = 'skipped'
        continue
      }

      publicationUrls[channel] = url
      channelStatuses[channel] = url.includes('://pending-credentials') ? 'queued' : 'published'
    } catch (err) {
      console.error(`[PublicationScheduler] ${channel} failed:`, err)
      channelStatuses[channel] = 'failed'
    }
  }

  return {
    output: { publicationUrls, jobId, channelStatuses },
    durationMs: Date.now() - start,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/research-specialist.ts
================================================
/**
 * Agent 1: ResearchSpecialist
 * Compiles territorial intelligence and market data for a given zone + framing.
 * Uses LLM synthesis (OpenRouter) with territorial context.
 */

import { generateText } from 'ai'
import { BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX } from '@/lib/brand/profiles'
import { generateWithFallback, FREE_MODELS, openrouter } from '@/lib/config/models'
import type { ContentZone, ContentFraming, AgentResult, ModelOverride } from './types'
import type { NormalizedIntent, PropertyIntentRequest } from './schemas'

export interface ResearchInput {
  topic: string
  zone: ContentZone
  framing: ContentFraming
  workspaceId: string
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
  normalized_intent?: NormalizedIntent
}

export interface ResearchOutput {
  researchDoc: string
  citations: string[]
  methodology: string
  confidence: number
  property_context?: PropertyIntentRequest
  property_specific: boolean
}

const ZONE_CONTEXT: Record<ContentZone, string> = {
  'calvià': 'Municipio de Calvià — mayor densidad de propiedades premium en Mallorca, Costa de la Calma, Santa Ponça, Magaluf reconvertido',
  andratx: 'Puerto de Andratx y Andratx — zona de máxima exclusividad del suroeste, con demanda internacional y fuerte componente patrimonial',
  palma: 'Palma de Mallorca — mercado urbano premium con foco en centro histórico, Son Armadans y demanda internacional estable',
  suroeste_general: 'Suroeste de Mallorca — franja Calvià–Andratx, mercado más dinámico de la isla fuera de Palma',
  toda_mallorca: 'Mallorca completa — visión estratégica de la isla, comparativa de zonas y tendencias macro',
  son_vida: 'Son Vida — enclave residencial prime con barrera de entrada alta, reputación internacional y escasez estructural',
  portals_bendinat: 'Portals / Bendinat — microzona premium apoyada en náutica, colegios internacionales, servicios y proximidad a Palma',
  port_dandratx: "Port d'Andratx — puerto residencial de alto prestigio, oferta limitada y fuerte narrativa lifestyle + inversión",
  santa_ponsa: 'Santa Ponsa — mix de residencial premium, golf, náutica y reposicionamiento de demanda internacional',
  costa_de_la_calma_paguera: 'Costa de la Calma / Paguera — tramo con lectura mixta de lifestyle, accesibilidad y oportunidades selectivas de reposicionamiento',
}

const FRAMING_CONTEXT: Record<ContentFraming, string> = {
  market_analysis: 'Foco en señales de mercado, dinámica de precios y tendencias territoriales',
  market_signal: 'Foco en interpretar una señal concreta y explicar por qué importa para el real estate premium',
  investment_criteria: 'Foco en marcos de decisión, criterios patrimoniales y lectura disciplinada de oportunidades',
  luxury_investment: 'Foco en posicionamiento premium, fundamentos defendibles y lectura patrimonial de activos singulares',
  lifestyle: 'Foco en el estilo de vida, infraestructura, calidad del entorno y atracción de perfil HNW',
  off_market: 'Foco en oportunidades pre-mercado, propietarios motivados y ventana de acceso anticipado',
  owner_acquisition: 'Foco en cómo un propietario premium debería interpretar posicionamiento, timing y encaje de demanda',
  strategic_partners: 'Foco en colaboración cualificada, flujo de oportunidades y lenguaje útil para partners premium',
  architecture_sustainability: 'Foco en arquitectura, sostenibilidad, diseño y defendibilidad del activo o territorio',
  regulation_scarcity: 'Foco en regulación, escasez estructural, barreras de oferta y efectos de largo plazo',
}

export async function researchSpecialist(
  input: ResearchInput
): Promise<AgentResult<ResearchOutput>> {
  const start = Date.now()

  const zoneCtx = ZONE_CONTEXT[input.zone] || ZONE_CONTEXT.suroeste_general
  const framingCtx = FRAMING_CONTEXT[input.framing] || FRAMING_CONTEXT.market_analysis

  const property_context = input.normalized_intent?.property_context
  const is_property_specific = property_context !== undefined

  const systemPrompt = `${BRAND_SYSTEM_PREFIX}

Como ResearchSpecialist, tu tarea es compilar inteligencia territorial y datos de mercado${is_property_specific ? ' específicos de propiedad' : ''}.
Zona de análisis: ${zoneCtx}
Enfoque estratégico: ${framingCtx}
${is_property_specific ? `Propiedad de enfoque: ${property_context.property_name}` : ''}

Produce un dossier estructurado con:
1. Señales de mercado actuales (precios, tendencias, DOM)
2. Contexto territorial (infraestructura, regulación, demografía)
3. ${is_property_specific ? 'Análisis específico de propiedad y su posición en mercado' : 'Oportunidades identificadas'}
4. Riesgos o señales de alerta
5. Fuentes y metodología`

  const userPrompt = is_property_specific
    ? `Propiedad: ${property_context.property_name}
Tipo: ${property_context.property_type}
Zona: ${input.zone}
Tema: ${input.topic}`
    : `Tema: ${input.topic}
Zona: ${input.zone}`

  let researchDoc = ''
  let tokensUsed = 0
  let inputTokens = 0
  let outputTokens = 0
  let modelId: string | undefined

  try {
    const result = await generateWithFallback(
      (modelId, abortSignal) => generateText({
        model: openrouter(modelId),
        system: systemPrompt,
        prompt: userPrompt,
        maxOutputTokens: 1500,
        abortSignal,
      }),
      FREE_MODELS,
      undefined,
      input.overrideModel?.modelId,
      (usedModelId, usedResult) => {
        modelId = usedModelId
        inputTokens = usedResult.usage?.inputTokens || 0
        outputTokens = usedResult.usage?.outputTokens || 0
      }
    )
    researchDoc = result.text
    tokensUsed = result.usage?.totalTokens || 0
  } catch {
    // Fallback template when no API key or all models fail
    researchDoc = `# Research: ${is_property_specific ? property_context.property_name : input.topic} — ${input.zone}

## Señales de Mercado
Análisis del mercado inmobiliario premium en ${zoneCtx}.
Framing estratégico: ${framingCtx}.
${is_property_specific ? `Propiedad: ${property_context.property_name} (${property_context.property_type})` : ''}

(Nota: El sistema no pudo generar una síntesis dinámica. Se recomienda revisión manual del mercado en esta zona.)`
  }

  return {
    output: {
      researchDoc,
      citations: [],
      methodology: 'LLM Territorial Intelligence Synthesis',
      confidence: 0.7,
      property_context: property_context,
      property_specific: is_property_specific,
    },
    tokensUsed,
    inputTokens,
    outputTokens,
    modelId,
    durationMs: Date.now() - start,
  }
}

/**
 * Content Generation Pipeline — Shared Types
 * Follows the StateGraph pattern (LangGraph-compatible interface).
 */

export type ContentZone =
  | 'calvià'
  | 'andratx'
  | 'palma'
  | 'suroeste_general'
  | 'toda_mallorca'
  | 'son_vida'
  | 'portals_bendinat'
  | 'port_dandratx'
  | 'santa_ponsa'
  | 'costa_de_la_calma_paguera'
export type ContentFraming =
  | 'market_analysis'
  | 'market_signal'
  | 'investment_criteria'
  | 'luxury_investment'
  | 'lifestyle'
  | 'off_market'
  | 'owner_acquisition'
  | 'strategic_partners'
  | 'architecture_sustainability'
  | 'regulation_scarcity'
export type TargetAudience =
  | 'investors'
  | 'owners'
  | 'partners'
  | 'international_buyers'
  | 'family_offices'
  | 'relocation_expat_premium'
  | 'mixed_qualified_audience'
export type PublishChannel =
  | 'linkedin_es'
  | 'linkedin_en'
  | 'blog_es'
  | 'blog_en'
  | 'facebook_es'
  | 'facebook_en'
export type GuidelineScope = 'all' | PublishChannel
export type ContentObjective =
  | 'authority'
  | 'conversation'
  | 'soft_capture'
  | 'strategic_education'
  | 'seo'
  | 'thesis_validation'
  | 'partner_attraction'
export type SignalType =
  | 'brand_hotel'
  | 'infrastructure'
  | 'regulation'
  | 'land_scarcity'
  | 'international_demand'
  | 'new_development'
  | 'architecture_sustainability'
  | 'nautical_services'
  | 'tax_relocation'
  | 'price_liquidity'
export type ClaimRiskLevel = 'conservative' | 'moderate' | 'cautious_opinionated'
export type InvestorLens =
  | 'individual'
  | 'institutional'
  | 'family_office'
  | 'developer'
  | 'seller_owner'
  | 'lifestyle_investment_buyer'
  | 'professional_partner'
export type CtaMode =
  | 'no_cta'
  | 'soft_selective'
  | 'consultative'
  | 'conversational'
  | 'private_application'
  | 'direct_contact'
  | 'lead_magnet_report'
  | 'strategic_advisory'
export type EvidenceMode =
  | 'data_driven'
  | 'official_source_based'
  | 'qualitative_signals'
  | 'case_studies'
  | 'narrative'
  | 'mixed'
  | 'no_numeric_data'
export type AssertivenessLevel =
  | 'conservative'
  | 'measured'
  | 'analytical'
  | 'confident'
  | 'provocative'
  | 'prudent_contrarian'
  | 'humble'
export type ContentLanguage = 'es' | 'en' | 'bilingual'

export interface ModelOverride {
  modelId: string
  scope: 'all' | 'specific'
  channels?: PublishChannel[]
}

export interface GenerationUsageSummary {
  modelsUsed: string[]
  totalTokens: number
  inputTokens: number
  outputTokens: number
  estimatedCostUsd: number | null
}

export interface CustomGuideline {
  scope: GuidelineScope
  text: string
}

export type PublishPlatform = 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook'
export type PublishLanguage = 'es' | 'en'

export interface ChannelVariant {
  channel: PublishChannel
  platform: PublishPlatform
  language: PublishLanguage
  draft: string
  editedDraft?: string
  title?: string
  excerpt?: string
  claims?: Array<{
    text: string
    riskLevel: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
    requiresEvidence?: boolean
    source?: string
  }>
  hashtags?: string[]
  seoTitle?: string
  seoDescription?: string
  charCount: number
  wordCount?: number
  optimizedAt: string
  imageBase64?: string
  status: 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected'
  complianceWarnings?: string[]
  qualityWarnings?: string[]
}

export type ComplianceIssueCode =
  | 'FORBIDDEN_GUARANTEE'
  | 'UNSUPPORTED_RETURN_CLAIM'
  | 'UNSUPPORTED_PRICE_FORECAST'
  | 'UNSUPPORTED_NUMERIC_CLAIM'
  | 'ABSOLUTE_LANGUAGE'
  | 'AGGRESSIVE_CTA'
  | 'MISSING_SOURCE_FOR_CLAIM'
  | 'PLATFORM_RISK'
  | 'REAL_ESTATE_INVESTMENT_RISK'
  | 'UNKNOWN'

export type ComplianceIssueSeverity = 'hard' | 'warning' | 'info'

export interface ComplianceIssue {
  code: ComplianceIssueCode
  message: string
  severity: ComplianceIssueSeverity
  matchedText?: string
  suggestion?: string
  channel?: string
}

export interface ComplianceReportV2 {
  isCompliant: boolean
  hasHardIssues: boolean
  hasWarningIssues: boolean
  typedIssues: ComplianceIssue[]
  issuesByChannel?: Partial<Record<PublishChannel, ComplianceIssue[]>>
  issues: string[]
  recommendations: string[]
  checkedAt: string
  source: 'rule_based'
}

export interface ComplianceReport {
  isCompliant: boolean
  issues: string[]
  recommendations: string[]
  checkedAt: string
}

export interface EditorialValidationResult {
  passed: boolean
  severity: 'pass' | 'warning' | 'hard_fail'
  issues: string[]
  recommendedAction: 'accept' | 'revise' | 'regenerate_with_stronger_model'
}

export interface ContentGenerationState {
  // Input
  topic: string
  zone: ContentZone
  framing: ContentFraming
  targetAudience: TargetAudience
  channels: PublishChannel[]
  contentObjective?: ContentObjective
  signalType?: SignalType
  claimRiskLevel?: ClaimRiskLevel
  sourceUrls?: string
  allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
  allowCtaLink?: boolean
  language?: ContentLanguage
  customGuidelines?: CustomGuideline[]
  overrideModel?: ModelOverride
  linkedInImageBase64?: string
  coreThesis?: string
  investorLens?: InvestorLens
  desiredReaderOutcome?: string
  ctaMode?: CtaMode
  evidenceMode?: EvidenceMode
  assertiveness?: AssertivenessLevel
  microzone?: string
  exampleOutput?: string
  workspaceId: string
  jobId: string
  draftId?: string

  // Agent outputs (populated sequentially)
  researchDoc?: string
  citations?: string[]
  researchConfidence?: number

  contentDraft?: string
  wordCount?: number
  toneScore?: number
  headline?: string
  subheadline?: string

  channelVariants?: ChannelVariant[]

  complianceReport?: ComplianceReportV2
  complianceReportV2?: ComplianceReportV2
  editorialValidation?: Record<PublishChannel, EditorialValidationResult>

  publicationUrls?: Record<string, string>
  publishedAt?: string
  usageSummary?: GenerationUsageSummary

  // Lifecycle
  phase: 'research' | 'strategy' | 'optimize' | 'editorial_quality' | 'compliance' | 'publish' | 'done' | 'rejected' | 'error'
  approvalStatus: 'draft' | 'approved' | 'published' | 'rejected'

  createdAt: string
  errors: string[]
}

export interface AgentResult<T> {
  output: T
  tokensUsed?: number
  inputTokens?: number
  outputTokens?: number
  modelId?: string
  durationMs?: number
}

FILE: src/lib/agents/__tests__/compliance-validator.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

import { complianceValidator, validateComplianceForVariants } from '../compliance-validator'

describe('compliance-validator', () => {
  it('does not mark prudent content as hard', () => {
    const report = validateComplianceForVariants({
      contentDraft:
        'La apertura puede interpretarse como una señal de mercado que merece seguimiento por parte de inversores prudentes.',
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          draft:
            'La apertura puede interpretarse como una señal de mercado que merece seguimiento por parte de inversores prudentes.',
        },
      ],
    })

    expect(report.hasHardIssues).toBe(false)
  })

  it('marks "rentabilidad garantizada" as hard', () => {
    const report = validateComplianceForVariants({
      contentDraft: 'Esta operación ofrece rentabilidad garantizada para el comprador.',
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          draft: 'Esta operación ofrece rentabilidad garantizada para el comprador.',
        },
      ],
    })

    expect(report.hasHardIssues).toBe(true)
    expect(report.typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.code === 'FORBIDDEN_GUARANTEE')).toBe(true)
  })

  it('marks percentage claims as warning when allowQuantitativeData=false', () => {
    const report = validateComplianceForVariants({
      contentDraft: 'La zona puede aportar un 12% según cierta lectura del mercado.',
      allowQuantitativeData: false,
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          draft: 'La zona puede aportar un 12% según cierta lectura del mercado.',
        },
      ],
    })

    expect(report.typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.code === 'UNSUPPORTED_NUMERIC_CLAIM')).toBe(true)
  })

  it('does not rewrite the original text', async () => {
    const draft = 'Texto original con oportunidad única.'
    const result = await complianceValidator({
      contentDraft: draft,
      channelVariants: [{ channel: 'linkedin_es', draft }],
    })

    expect(draft).toBe('Texto original con oportunidad única.')
    expect(result.output.issues.length).toBeGreaterThan(0)
  })

  it('detects aggressive CTA on Facebook as warning', () => {
    const report = validateComplianceForVariants({
      contentDraft: 'Escríbeme ya y reserva ahora.',
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'facebook_es',
          draft: 'Escríbeme ya y reserva ahora.',
        },
      ],
    })

    expect(
      report.typedIssues.some(
        (issue) => issue.code === 'PLATFORM_RISK' && issue.severity === 'warning'
      )
    ).toBe(true)
  })

  it('detects sensitive investment claims as warning', () => {
    const report = validateComplianceForVariants({
      contentDraft: 'La liquidez y la demanda internacional sostienen esta tesis.',
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'blog_es',
          draft: 'La liquidez y la demanda internacional sostienen esta tesis.',
        },
      ],
    })

    expect(
      report.typedIssues.some((issue) => issue.code === 'MISSING_SOURCE_FOR_CLAIM')
    ).toBe(true)
  })

  it('returns source rule_based', async () => {
    const result = await complianceValidator({
      contentDraft: 'Texto prudente.',
      channelVariants: [{ channel: 'linkedin_es', draft: 'Texto prudente.' }],
    })

    expect(result.output.source).toBe('rule_based')
  })

  it('does not perform any LLM calls', async () => {
    const result = await complianceValidator({
      contentDraft: 'Texto prudente.',
      channelVariants: [{ channel: 'linkedin_es', draft: 'Texto prudente.' }],
    })

    expect(result.tokensUsed).toBe(0)
    expect(result.modelId).toBeUndefined()
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/agents/__tests__/content-generation-graph.test.ts
================================================
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'

import {
  executeContentGenerationGraph,
  initializeGraphState,
  rejectDraftFromPublication,
} from '../content-generation-graph'
import type { ContentGenerationState } from '../types'

const { complianceValidatorMock, publicationSchedulerMock } = vi.hoisted(() => ({
  complianceValidatorMock: vi.fn(),
  publicationSchedulerMock: vi.fn(),
}))

vi.mock('../research-specialist', () => ({
  researchSpecialist: vi.fn(async () => ({
    output: {
      researchDoc: 'Research completed',
      citations: ['source1.com'],
      confidence: 0.85,
    },
    tokensUsed: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
  })),
}))

vi.mock('../content-strategist', () => ({
  contentStrategist: vi.fn(async () => ({
    output: {
      contentDraft: 'Borrador prudente sobre mercado inmobiliario en Mallorca.',
      wordCount: 120,
      toneScore: 0.92,
      headline: 'Market Opportunities in Real Estate',
    },
    tokensUsed: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
  })),
}))

vi.mock('../channel-optimizer', () => ({
  channelOptimizer: vi.fn(async () => ({
    output: {
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          platform: 'linkedin',
          language: 'es',
          draft: 'Texto prudente para LinkedIn.',
          charCount: 28,
          wordCount: 4,
          optimizedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          status: 'draft',
        },
        {
          channel: 'blog_es',
          platform: 'blog',
          language: 'es',
          draft: 'Texto prudente para Blog.',
          charCount: 24,
          wordCount: 4,
          optimizedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
          status: 'draft',
        },
      ],
    },
    tokensUsed: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
  })),
}))

vi.mock('../compliance-validator', () => ({
  complianceValidator: complianceValidatorMock,
}))

vi.mock('../publication-scheduler', () => ({
  publicationScheduler: publicationSchedulerMock,
}))

describe('Content Generation Graph', () => {
  let initialState: ContentGenerationState

  beforeEach(() => {
    complianceValidatorMock.mockReset()
    publicationSchedulerMock.mockReset()
    complianceValidatorMock.mockResolvedValue({
      output: {
        isCompliant: true,
        hasHardIssues: false,
        hasWarningIssues: true,
        typedIssues: [
          {
            code: 'REAL_ESTATE_INVESTMENT_RISK',
            severity: 'warning',
            message: 'Revisa que esta afirmación esté respaldada por una fuente o por evidencia verificable.',
            channel: 'linkedin_es',
          },
        ],
        issuesByChannel: {
          linkedin_es: [
            {
              code: 'REAL_ESTATE_INVESTMENT_RISK',
              severity: 'warning',
              message: 'Revisa que esta afirmación esté respaldada por una fuente o por evidencia verificable.',
              channel: 'linkedin_es',
            },
          ],
          blog_es: [],
        },
        issues: ['[WARNING] Revisa que esta afirmación esté respaldada por una fuente o por evidencia verificable.'],
        recommendations: ['Revisión humana recomendada antes de aprobar o publicar.'],
        checkedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
        source: 'rule_based',
      },
      tokensUsed: 0,
      inputTokens: 0,
      outputTokens: 0,
    })

    initialState = initializeGraphState({
      topic: 'Oportunidades Q2 2026',
      zone: 'andratx',
      framing: 'luxury_investment',
      targetAudience: 'investors',
      channels: ['linkedin_es', 'blog_es'],
      workspaceId: 'ws_test_123',
      jobId: 'job_test_456',
    })
  })

  it('initializes state correctly', () => {
    expect(initialState.phase).toBe('research')
    expect(initialState.approvalStatus).toBe('draft')
    expect(initialState.errors).toEqual([])
  })

  it('finishes generation with phase done even when compliance returns warnings', async () => {
    const result = await executeContentGenerationGraph(initialState)

    expect(result.phase).toBe('done')
    expect(result.approvalStatus).toBe('draft')
    expect(result.complianceReport?.hasHardIssues).toBe(false)
    expect(result.channelVariants?.[0].complianceWarnings).toEqual([
      '[WARNING] Revisa que esta afirmación esté respaldada por una fuente o por evidencia verificable.',
    ])
  })

  it('preserves the original variant drafts', async () => {
    const result = await executeContentGenerationGraph(initialState)

    expect(result.channelVariants?.[0].draft).toBe('Texto prudente para LinkedIn.')
    expect(result.channelVariants?.[1].draft).toBe('Texto prudente para Blog.')
  })

  it('runs compliance only once for the whole batch', async () => {
    await executeContentGenerationGraph(initialState)

    expect(complianceValidatorMock).toHaveBeenCalledTimes(1)
  })

  it('does not call publication automatically', async () => {
    await executeContentGenerationGraph(initialState)

    expect(publicationSchedulerMock).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
  })

  it('keeps content available as draft when compliance throws a technical error', async () => {
    complianceValidatorMock.mockRejectedValueOnce(new Error('rule engine unavailable'))

    const result = await executeContentGenerationGraph(initialState)

    expect(result.phase).toBe('done')
    expect(result.approvalStatus).toBe('draft')
    expect(result.channelVariants?.length).toBe(2)
    expect(result.errors).toContain('Compliance check failed: rule engine unavailable')
  })

  it('supports manual rejection path', async () => {
    const rejected = await rejectDraftFromPublication(
      { ...initialState, phase: 'compliance', approvalStatus: 'draft' },
      'Contains restricted keywords'
    )

    expect(rejected.phase).toBe('rejected')
    expect(rejected.approvalStatus).toBe('rejected')
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/agents/__tests__/editorial-quality-validator.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest'
import { validateEditorialQuality } from '../editorial-quality-validator'

describe('validateEditorialQuality', () => {
  it('should pass for a clean post in Spanish', () => {
    const text = 'La entrada de una marca de ultra lujo en el suroeste de Mallorca refuerza la narrativa de oportunidad para inversores cualificados. Punta Negra se consolida como microzona premium.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.passed).toBe(true)
    expect(result.severity).toBe('pass')
    expect(result.issues).toHaveLength(0)
  })

  it('should fail for corrupted words like "Aiude"', () => {
    const text = 'Aiude a los inversores a entender el mercado de Calvià.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.passed).toBe(false)
    expect(result.severity).toBe('hard_fail')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Palabra corrupta detectada: "Aiude"')
  })

  it('should fail for "premios calvios"', () => {
    const text = 'Mallorca ha recibido premios calvios por su hotelería.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.severity).toBe('hard_fail')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Palabra corrupta detectada: "premios calvios"')
  })

  it('should fail for "habergirles"', () => {
    const text = 'Es necesario habergirles el acceso a los datos.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.severity).toBe('hard_fail')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Palabra corrupta detectada: "habergirles"')
  })

  it('should fail for "parroquia Punta Negra"', () => {
    const text = 'La parroquia Punta Negra atrae a nuevos residentes.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.severity).toBe('hard_fail')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Uso incorrecto de "parroquia" para contexto civil de Calvià/Mallorca.')
  })

  it('should warn for Markdown bold in LinkedIn', () => {
    const text = 'Este es un post con **negritas** que no deberían estar aquí.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.passed).toBe(true)
    expect(result.severity).toBe('warning')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Markdown prohibido detectado (negritas, encabezados o enlaces)')
  })

  it('should warn for greetings like "Hola a todos"', () => {
    const text = 'Hola a todos, hoy analizamos el mercado de Andratx.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.severity).toBe('warning')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Saludos o despedidas artificiales detectados')
  })

  it('should fail for strong financial claims without permission', () => {
    const text = 'Garantizamos un 15% de rentabilidad en su inversión inmobiliaria.'
    const result = validateEditorialQuality(text, 'linkedin_es', false)
    
    expect(result.severity).toBe('hard_fail')
    expect(result.issues).toContain('Claims financieros fuertes detectados sin permiso (allowQuantitativeData=false)')
  })
})
