/**
 * Schemas module — Extended types and validation for 7-agent pipeline
 */

export type {
  PropertyIntentRequest,
  NormalizedIntent,
  InsightBlock,
  QualityGate,
  StructuredContent,
  ChannelVariant,
  PipelineExecutionState,
  AgentExecutionResult,
} from './types'

export {
  validatePropertyIntentRequest,
  validateNormalizedIntent,
  validateInsightBlock,
  validateQualityGate,
  validateStructuredContent,
  validateChannelVariant,
  validatePipelineExecutionState,
  sanitizeIntentInput,
} from './validation'



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/schemas/types.ts
================================================
/**
 * Extended type system for 7-agent pipeline with property-specific intent normalization
 * Supports Property-ID driven content generation and quality gates
 */

import type {
  ContentZone,
  ContentFraming,
  TargetAudience,
  PublishChannel,
  ContentObjective,
  SignalType,
  ClaimRiskLevel,
  InvestorLens,
  CtaMode,
  EvidenceMode,
  AssertivenessLevel,
  ContentLanguage,
} from '../types'

/** Request to extract and normalize user intent into structured property context */
export interface PropertyIntentRequest {
  property_id: string
  property_name: string
  property_type: 'residential' | 'commercial' | 'investment'
  location_zone: ContentZone
  target_price_range?: [number, number]
  key_attributes: string[]
  additional_context?: string
  // Phase 9: Editorial context fields
  core_thesis?: string
  investor_lens?: InvestorLens
  desired_reader_outcome?: string
  cta_mode?: CtaMode
  evidence_mode?: EvidenceMode
  assertiveness?: AssertivenessLevel
  microzone?: string
  example_output?: string
  content_objective?: ContentObjective
  signal_type?: SignalType
  claim_risk_level?: ClaimRiskLevel
  source_urls?: string
  allow_quantitative_data?: boolean
  allow_cta_link?: boolean
  language?: ContentLanguage
}

/** Normalized intent extracted by IntentNormalizer agent */
export interface NormalizedIntent {
  original_request: string
  extracted_topic: string
  property_context?: PropertyIntentRequest
  framing: ContentFraming
  target_audience: TargetAudience
  quality_score: number
  confidence: 0 | 1
  extracted_at: string
}

/** Single insight block extracted by InsightExtractor agent */
export interface InsightBlock {
  id: string
  category: 'property_spec' | 'market_position' | 'investment_thesis' | 'risk_signal'
  title: string
  evidence: string[]
  source: 'rag' | 'llm' | 'hybrid'
  confidence: number
  property_specific: boolean
}

/** Quality gate result for pipeline progression */
export interface QualityGate {
  gate_name: string
  passed: boolean
  score: number // 0-1
  reason?: string
  timestamp: string
}

/** Structured content output after composition */
export interface StructuredContent {
  headline: string
  teaser: string
  body_sections: {
    property_spec: string
    market_analysis: string
    investment_thesis: string
    risk_assessment: string
  }
  cta: string
  word_count: number
  insights_used: InsightBlock[]
}

/** Channel-specific variant of structured content */
export interface ChannelVariant {
  channel: PublishChannel
  draft: string
  charCount: number
  optimizedAt: string
}

/** Full pipeline execution state and progress tracking */
export interface PipelineExecutionState {
  job_id: string
  status: 'pending' | 'normalizing_intent' | 'researching' | 'extracting_insights' | 'composing' | 'strategizing' | 'optimizing_channels' | 'validating' | 'scheduling' | 'completed' | 'failed'
  current_phase: number
  total_phases: number

  // Results from each agent in pipeline
  normalized_intent?: NormalizedIntent
  research_doc?: string
  insight_blocks?: InsightBlock[]
  composed_content?: string
  structured_content?: StructuredContent
  channel_variants?: ChannelVariant[]

  // Quality gates and validation
  quality_gates: QualityGate[]
  compliance_report?: {
    isCompliant: boolean
    issues: string[]
    recommendations: string[]
    checkedAt: string
  }

  // Execution metrics
  tokens_used: number
  duration_ms: number
  started_at: string
  completed_at?: string

  // Error tracking
  errors: string[]
  last_error?: string
}

/** Agent execution result wrapper */
export interface AgentExecutionResult<T> {
  success: boolean
  data: T
  tokens_used: number
  duration_ms: number
  error?: string
  gate_results?: QualityGate[]
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/agents/schemas/validation.ts
================================================
/**
 * Runtime validation functions for extended agent pipeline types
 * Lightweight validation without external schema library dependency
 */

import type {
  PropertyIntentRequest,
  NormalizedIntent,
  InsightBlock,
  QualityGate,
  StructuredContent,
  ChannelVariant,
  PipelineExecutionState,
} from './types'
import type { ContentZone, ContentFraming, TargetAudience } from '../types'

const VALID_CONTENT_ZONES: ContentZone[] = [
  'calvià',
  'andratx',
  'palma',
  'suroeste_general',
  'toda_mallorca',
  'son_vida',
  'portals_bendinat',
  'port_dandratx',
  'santa_ponsa',
  'costa_de_la_calma_paguera',
]

const VALID_CONTENT_FRAMINGS: ContentFraming[] = [
  'market_analysis',
  'market_signal',
  'investment_criteria',
  'luxury_investment',
  'lifestyle',
  'off_market',
  'owner_acquisition',
  'strategic_partners',
  'architecture_sustainability',
  'regulation_scarcity',
]

const VALID_TARGET_AUDIENCES: TargetAudience[] = [
  'investors',
  'owners',
  'partners',
  'international_buyers',
  'family_offices',
  'relocation_expat_premium',
  'mixed_qualified_audience',
]

const VALID_PROPERTY_TYPES = ['residential', 'commercial', 'investment']
const VALID_INSIGHT_CATEGORIES = ['property_spec', 'market_position', 'investment_thesis', 'risk_signal']
const VALID_INSIGHT_SOURCES = ['rag', 'llm', 'hybrid']
const VALID_CHANNELS = ['linkedin_es', 'linkedin_en', 'blog_es', 'blog_en', 'facebook_es', 'facebook_en']
const VALID_PIPELINE_STATUSES = [
  'pending',
  'normalizing_intent',
  'researching',
  'extracting_insights',
  'composing',
  'strategizing',
  'optimizing_channels',
  'validating',
  'scheduling',
  'completed',
  'failed',
]

export function validatePropertyIntentRequest(data: unknown): data is PropertyIntentRequest {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    typeof obj.property_id === 'string' &&
    obj.property_id.length > 0 &&
    typeof obj.property_name === 'string' &&
    obj.property_name.length > 0 &&
    VALID_PROPERTY_TYPES.includes(obj.property_type as string) &&
    VALID_CONTENT_ZONES.includes(obj.location_zone as ContentZone) &&
    Array.isArray(obj.key_attributes) &&
    obj.key_attributes.every((attr: unknown) => typeof attr === 'string')
  )
}

export function validateNormalizedIntent(data: unknown): data is NormalizedIntent {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    typeof obj.original_request === 'string' &&
    obj.original_request.length > 0 &&
    typeof obj.extracted_topic === 'string' &&
    VALID_CONTENT_FRAMINGS.includes(obj.framing as ContentFraming) &&
    VALID_TARGET_AUDIENCES.includes(obj.target_audience as TargetAudience) &&
    typeof obj.quality_score === 'number' &&
    obj.quality_score >= 0 &&
    obj.quality_score <= 1 &&
    (obj.confidence === 0 || obj.confidence === 1) &&
    typeof obj.extracted_at === 'string'
  )
}

export function validateInsightBlock(data: unknown): data is InsightBlock {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    typeof obj.id === 'string' &&
    obj.id.length > 0 &&
    VALID_INSIGHT_CATEGORIES.includes(obj.category as string) &&
    typeof obj.title === 'string' &&
    obj.title.length > 0 &&
    Array.isArray(obj.evidence) &&
    obj.evidence.every((e: unknown) => typeof e === 'string') &&
    VALID_INSIGHT_SOURCES.includes(obj.source as string) &&
    typeof obj.confidence === 'number' &&
    obj.confidence >= 0 &&
    obj.confidence <= 1 &&
    typeof obj.property_specific === 'boolean'
  )
}

export function validateQualityGate(data: unknown): data is QualityGate {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    typeof obj.gate_name === 'string' &&
    obj.gate_name.length > 0 &&
    typeof obj.passed === 'boolean' &&
    typeof obj.score === 'number' &&
    obj.score >= 0 &&
    obj.score <= 1 &&
    typeof obj.timestamp === 'string'
  )
}

export function validateStructuredContent(data: unknown): data is StructuredContent {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  const bodySections = obj.body_sections as Record<string, unknown>
  return (
    typeof obj.headline === 'string' &&
    obj.headline.length > 0 &&
    typeof obj.teaser === 'string' &&
    typeof bodySections === 'object' &&
    bodySections !== null &&
    typeof bodySections.property_spec === 'string' &&
    typeof bodySections.market_analysis === 'string' &&
    typeof bodySections.investment_thesis === 'string' &&
    typeof bodySections.risk_assessment === 'string' &&
    typeof obj.cta === 'string' &&
    typeof obj.word_count === 'number' &&
    obj.word_count > 0 &&
    Array.isArray(obj.insights_used) &&
    obj.insights_used.every((insight: unknown) => validateInsightBlock(insight))
  )
}

export function validateChannelVariant(data: unknown): data is ChannelVariant {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    VALID_CHANNELS.includes(obj.channel as string) &&
    typeof obj.draft === 'string' &&
    obj.draft.length > 0 &&
    typeof obj.char_count === 'number' &&
    obj.char_count > 0 &&
    typeof obj.optimized_for === 'string'
  )
}

export function validatePipelineExecutionState(data: unknown): data is PipelineExecutionState {
  if (typeof data !== 'object' || data === null) return false
  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>

  return (
    typeof obj.job_id === 'string' &&
    obj.job_id.length > 0 &&
    VALID_PIPELINE_STATUSES.includes(obj.status as string) &&
    typeof obj.current_phase === 'number' &&
    obj.current_phase >= 0 &&
    typeof obj.total_phases === 'number' &&
    obj.total_phases > 0 &&
    Array.isArray(obj.quality_gates) &&
    obj.quality_gates.every((gate: unknown) => validateQualityGate(gate)) &&
    typeof obj.tokens_used === 'number' &&
    obj.tokens_used >= 0 &&
    typeof obj.duration_ms === 'number' &&
    obj.duration_ms >= 0 &&
    typeof obj.started_at === 'string' &&
    Array.isArray(obj.errors)
  )
}

export function sanitizeIntentInput(input: string): string {
  return input
    .trim()
    .slice(0, 2000)
    .replace(/[<>\"'`]/g, '')
    .replace(/\n\n+/g, '\n')
}

import type { AncloraLocale } from './locales'

export type AncloraAppGroup = 'ultra-premium' | 'premium' | 'internal' | 'portfolio'

export const LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP: Record<AncloraAppGroup, AncloraLocale[]> = {
  'ultra-premium': ['es', 'ca', 'de', 'en', 'sv', 'fr', 'it', 'da', 'nl', 'no', 'pt'],
  premium: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de', 'fr', 'it', 'pt'],
  internal: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'],
  portfolio: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'],
}

export const DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP: Record<AncloraAppGroup, AncloraLocale> = {
  'ultra-premium': 'es',
  premium: 'es',
  internal: 'es',
  portfolio: 'es',
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-i18n/language-detection.ts
================================================
import {
  DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP,
  LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP,
  type AncloraAppGroup,
} from './app-groups'
import { normalizeAncloraLocale, type AncloraLocale } from './locales'

function normalizeAllowedLocale(value: string | null | undefined, allowed: AncloraLocale[]) {
  const locale = normalizeAncloraLocale(value)
  return locale && allowed.includes(locale) ? locale : undefined
}

export function resolveInitialLocale(input: {
  appGroup: AncloraAppGroup
  urlLocale?: string | null
  persistedLocale?: string | null
  browserLocales?: string[]
}): AncloraLocale {
  const allowed = LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP[input.appGroup]

  const urlLocale = normalizeAllowedLocale(input.urlLocale, allowed)
  if (urlLocale) return urlLocale

  const persistedLocale = normalizeAllowedLocale(input.persistedLocale, allowed)
  if (persistedLocale) return persistedLocale

  for (const browserLocale of input.browserLocales ?? []) {
    const locale = normalizeAllowedLocale(browserLocale, allowed)
    if (locale) return locale
  }

  return DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP[input.appGroup]
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-i18n/language-toggle-contract.ts
================================================
import {
  DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP,
  LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP,
  type AncloraAppGroup,
} from './app-groups'
import { normalizeAncloraLocale, type AncloraLocale } from './locales'

export type LanguageToggleMode = 'segmented' | 'modal-popover'

export function getLocalesForAppGroup(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): AncloraLocale[] {
  return [...LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup]]
}

export function getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): AncloraLocale {
  return DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup]
}

export function isLocaleAllowedForAppGroup(
  locale: string | null | undefined,
  appGroup: AncloraAppGroup,
): locale is AncloraLocale {
  const normalized = normalizeAncloraLocale(locale)
  return Boolean(normalized && LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup].includes(normalized))
}

export function getLanguageToggleMode(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): LanguageToggleMode {
  if (appGroup === 'ultra-premium') return 'modal-popover'
  return LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup].length <= 3 ? 'segmented' : 'modal-popover'
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-i18n/locales.ts
================================================
export type AncloraLocale =
  | 'es'
  | 'ca'
  | 'en'
  | 'de'
  | 'fr'
  | 'it'
  | 'pt'
  | 'sv'
  | 'da'
  | 'nl'
  | 'no'

export interface AncloraLocaleMeta {
  code: AncloraLocale
  short: string
  nativeName: string
  englishName: string
}

export const ANCLORA_LOCALES: Record<AncloraLocale, AncloraLocaleMeta> = {
  es: { code: 'es', short: 'ES', nativeName: 'Español', englishName: 'Spanish' },
  ca: { code: 'ca', short: 'CA', nativeName: 'Català', englishName: 'Catalan' },
  en: { code: 'en', short: 'EN', nativeName: 'English', englishName: 'English' },
  de: { code: 'de', short: 'DE', nativeName: 'Deutsch', englishName: 'German' },
  fr: { code: 'fr', short: 'FR', nativeName: 'Français', englishName: 'French' },
  it: { code: 'it', short: 'IT', nativeName: 'Italiano', englishName: 'Italian' },
  pt: { code: 'pt', short: 'PT', nativeName: 'Português', englishName: 'Portuguese' },
  sv: { code: 'sv', short: 'SV', nativeName: 'Svenska', englishName: 'Swedish' },
  da: { code: 'da', short: 'DA', nativeName: 'Dansk', englishName: 'Danish' },
  nl: { code: 'nl', short: 'NL', nativeName: 'Nederlands', englishName: 'Dutch' },
  no: { code: 'no', short: 'NO', nativeName: 'Norsk', englishName: 'Norwegian' },
}

export function normalizeAncloraLocale(locale: string | null | undefined): AncloraLocale | undefined {
  if (!locale) return undefined
  const normalized = locale.trim().toLowerCase().split(/[_-]/)[0]
  return normalized in ANCLORA_LOCALES ? (normalized as AncloraLocale) : undefined
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-i18n/__tests__/language-detection.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { resolveInitialLocale } from '../language-detection'

describe('resolveInitialLocale', () => {
  it('maps en-US browser locale to EN', () => {
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'premium', browserLocales: ['en-US'] })).toBe('en')
  })

  it('maps de-CH browser locale to DE', () => {
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'ultra-premium', browserLocales: ['de-CH'] })).toBe('de')
  })

  it('resolves fr-CH in Ultra Premium and Premium but not Internal', () => {
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'ultra-premium', browserLocales: ['fr-CH'] })).toBe('fr')
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'premium', browserLocales: ['fr-CH'] })).toBe('fr')
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'internal', browserLocales: ['fr-CH'] })).toBe('es')
  })

  it('lets persisted preference win over browser locale', () => {
    expect(
      resolveInitialLocale({
        appGroup: 'premium',
        persistedLocale: 'ca',
        browserLocales: ['de-DE'],
      }),
    ).toBe('ca')
  })

  it('lets URL locale win over persisted preference', () => {
    expect(
      resolveInitialLocale({
        appGroup: 'premium',
        urlLocale: 'it',
        persistedLocale: 'ca',
        browserLocales: ['de-DE'],
      }),
    ).toBe('it')
  })

  it('falls back to default when locale is not allowed', () => {
    expect(
      resolveInitialLocale({
        appGroup: 'internal',
        urlLocale: 'ru',
        persistedLocale: 'fr',
        browserLocales: ['it-IT'],
      }),
    ).toBe('es')
  })
})



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-i18n/__tests__/locales.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP, DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP } from '../app-groups'
import { getLanguageToggleMode, isLocaleAllowedForAppGroup } from '../language-toggle-contract'

describe('Anclora language toggle contract', () => {
  it('returns Ultra Premium locales in governance order', () => {
    expect(LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP['ultra-premium']).toEqual([
      'es',
      'ca',
      'de',
      'en',
      'sv',
      'fr',
      'it',
      'da',
      'nl',
      'no',
      'pt',
    ])
  })

  it('returns Premium locales in governance order', () => {
    expect(LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP.premium).toEqual(['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de', 'fr', 'it', 'pt'])
  })

  it('returns Internal locales without Russian', () => {
    expect(LOCALES_BY_APP_GROUP.internal).toEqual(['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'])
    expect(isLocaleAllowedForAppGroup('ru', 'internal')).toBe(false)
  })

  it('uses Spanish as default for every app group', () => {
    expect(DEFAULT_LOCALE_BY_APP_GROUP).toEqual({
      'ultra-premium': 'es',
      premium: 'es',
      internal: 'es',
      portfolio: 'es',
    })
  })

  it('requires modal/popover for Ultra Premium and groups with more than three locales', () => {
    expect(getLanguageToggleMode('ultra-premium')).toBe('modal-popover')
    expect(getLanguageToggleMode('internal')).toBe('modal-popover')
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/app-groups.ts

import type { AncloraLocale } from './locales'

export type AncloraAppGroup = 'ultra-premium' | 'premium' | 'internal' | 'portfolio'

export const GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP = {
  'ultra-premium': {
    themeToggle: false,
    locales: ['es', 'ca', 'de', 'en', 'sv', 'fr', 'it', 'da', 'nl', 'no', 'pt'],
    defaultLocale: 'es',
  },
  premium: {
    themeToggle: true,
    locales: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de', 'fr', 'it', 'pt'],
    defaultLocale: 'es',
  },
  internal: {
    themeToggle: true,
    locales: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'],
    defaultLocale: 'es',
  },
  portfolio: {
    themeToggle: true,
    locales: ['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'],
    defaultLocale: 'es',
  },
} as const satisfies Record<
  AncloraAppGroup,
  { themeToggle: boolean; locales: readonly AncloraLocale[]; defaultLocale: AncloraLocale }
>

export function getLocalesForAppGroup(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): AncloraLocale[] {
  return [...GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup].locales]
}

export function getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): AncloraLocale {
  return GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup].defaultLocale
}

export function appGroupHasThemeToggle(appGroup: AncloraAppGroup): boolean {
  return GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP[appGroup].themeToggle
}

export type AncloraCurrency = 'EUR' | 'USD' | 'GBP' | 'CHF' | 'SEK' | 'DKK' | 'NOK'

export interface AncloraCurrencyMeta {
  code: AncloraCurrency
  label: string
  symbol: string
}

export const ANCLORA_CURRENCIES: Record<AncloraCurrency, AncloraCurrencyMeta> = {
  EUR: { code: 'EUR', label: 'Euro', symbol: '€' },
  USD: { code: 'USD', label: 'US Dollar', symbol: '$' },
  GBP: { code: 'GBP', label: 'Pound sterling', symbol: '£' },
  CHF: { code: 'CHF', label: 'Swiss franc', symbol: 'CHF' },
  SEK: { code: 'SEK', label: 'Swedish krona', symbol: 'SEK kr' },
  DKK: { code: 'DKK', label: 'Danish krone', symbol: 'DKK kr' },
  NOK: { code: 'NOK', label: 'Norwegian krone', symbol: 'NOK kr' },
}

export const DEFAULT_ANCLORA_CURRENCY: AncloraCurrency = 'EUR'

export function normalizeAncloraCurrency(currency: string | null | undefined): AncloraCurrency | undefined {
  if (!currency) return undefined
  const normalized = currency.trim().toUpperCase()
  return normalized in ANCLORA_CURRENCIES ? (normalized as AncloraCurrency) : undefined
}

FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/measure-units.ts

import type { AncloraLocale } from './locales'

export type AncloraMeasureSystem = 'metric' | 'imperial'

export interface AncloraMeasureUnitMeta {
  code: AncloraMeasureSystem
  label: string
  compactByLocale: Partial<Record<AncloraLocale, string>> & { default: string }
}

export const ANCLORA_MEASURE_UNITS: Record<AncloraMeasureSystem, AncloraMeasureUnitMeta> = {
  metric: {
    code: 'metric',
    label: 'Square Meter — m² / Hectare — Ha',
    compactByLocale: { es: 'm²', ca: 'm²', default: 'Sqm' },
  },
  imperial: {
    code: 'imperial',
    label: 'Square Foot — sqft / Acre — ac',
    compactByLocale: { es: 'sqft', ca: 'sqft', default: 'Sqft' },
  },
}

export const DEFAULT_ANCLORA_MEASURE_SYSTEM: AncloraMeasureSystem = 'metric'

export function normalizeAncloraMeasureSystem(value: string | null | undefined): AncloraMeasureSystem | undefined {
  return value === 'metric' || value === 'imperial' ? value : undefined
}

export function getCompactMeasureLabel(measureSystem: AncloraMeasureSystem, locale: AncloraLocale): string {
  const meta = ANCLORA_MEASURE_UNITS[measureSystem]
  return meta.compactByLocale[locale] ?? meta.compactByLocale.default
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/preferences-contract.ts
================================================
import type { AncloraAppGroup } from './app-groups'
import { appGroupHasThemeToggle, getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup, getLocalesForAppGroup } from './app-groups'
import type { AncloraCurrency } from './currencies'
import type { AncloraLocale } from './locales'
import type { AncloraMeasureSystem } from './measure-units'

export type AncloraThemeMode = 'light' | 'dark' | 'system'

export interface AppPreferenceCapabilities {
  hasLanguage: boolean
  hasCurrency: boolean
  hasMeasureUnits: boolean
  hasTheme: boolean
}

export interface AppPreferenceContract {
  appGroup: AncloraAppGroup
  locales: AncloraLocale[]
  defaultLocale: AncloraLocale
  themeToggle: boolean
  capabilities: AppPreferenceCapabilities
}

export interface BuildAppPreferenceContractInput {
  appGroup: AncloraAppGroup
  hasLanguage?: boolean
  hasCurrency?: boolean
  hasMeasureUnits?: boolean
}

export function buildAppPreferenceContract(input: BuildAppPreferenceContractInput): AppPreferenceContract {
  const themeToggle = appGroupHasThemeToggle(input.appGroup)
  return {
    appGroup: input.appGroup,
    locales: getLocalesForAppGroup(input.appGroup),
    defaultLocale: getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup(input.appGroup),
    themeToggle,
    capabilities: {
      hasLanguage: input.hasLanguage ?? true,
      hasCurrency: input.hasCurrency ?? false,
      hasMeasureUnits: input.hasMeasureUnits ?? false,
      hasTheme: themeToggle,
    },
  }
}

export interface GlobalPreferencesState {
  locale: AncloraLocale
  currency?: AncloraCurrency
  measureSystem?: AncloraMeasureSystem
  theme?: AncloraThemeMode
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/resolve-preferences.ts
================================================
import { getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup, getLocalesForAppGroup, type AncloraAppGroup } from './app-groups'
import { DEFAULT_ANCLORA_CURRENCY, normalizeAncloraCurrency, type AncloraCurrency } from './currencies'
import { ANCLORA_LOCALES, normalizeAncloraLocale, type AncloraLocale } from './locales'
import {
  DEFAULT_ANCLORA_MEASURE_SYSTEM,
  getCompactMeasureLabel,
  normalizeAncloraMeasureSystem,
  type AncloraMeasureSystem,
} from './measure-units'
import type { AppPreferenceCapabilities } from './preferences-contract'

function normalizeAllowedLocale(value: string | null | undefined, allowed: readonly AncloraLocale[]) {
  const locale = normalizeAncloraLocale(value)
  return locale && allowed.includes(locale) ? locale : undefined
}

export function resolveInitialLocale(input: {
  appGroup: AncloraAppGroup
  manualLocale?: string | null
  urlLocale?: string | null
  persistedLocale?: string | null
  browserLocales?: readonly string[]
}): AncloraLocale {
  const allowed = getLocalesForAppGroup(input.appGroup)
  const manualLocale = normalizeAllowedLocale(input.manualLocale, allowed)
  if (manualLocale) return manualLocale

  const urlLocale = normalizeAllowedLocale(input.urlLocale, allowed)
  if (urlLocale) return urlLocale

  const persistedLocale = normalizeAllowedLocale(input.persistedLocale, allowed)
  if (persistedLocale) return persistedLocale

  for (const browserLocale of input.browserLocales ?? []) {
    const locale = normalizeAllowedLocale(browserLocale, allowed)
    if (locale) return locale
  }

  return getDefaultLocaleForAppGroup(input.appGroup)
}

export function resolveCurrency(input: { manualCurrency?: string | null; persistedCurrency?: string | null }): AncloraCurrency {
  return normalizeAncloraCurrency(input.manualCurrency) ?? normalizeAncloraCurrency(input.persistedCurrency) ?? DEFAULT_ANCLORA_CURRENCY
}

export function resolveMeasureSystem(input: {
  manualMeasureSystem?: string | null
  persistedMeasureSystem?: string | null
}): AncloraMeasureSystem {
  return (
    normalizeAncloraMeasureSystem(input.manualMeasureSystem) ??
    normalizeAncloraMeasureSystem(input.persistedMeasureSystem) ??
    DEFAULT_ANCLORA_MEASURE_SYSTEM
  )
}

export function getGlobalPreferencesSummary(input: {
  locale: AncloraLocale
  currency?: AncloraCurrency
  measureSystem?: AncloraMeasureSystem
  capabilities: AppPreferenceCapabilities
  displayLocale?: string
}): string {
  const parts: string[] = []

  if (input.capabilities.hasLanguage) {
    parts.push(input.displayLocale ?? ANCLORA_LOCALES[input.locale].nativeName)
  }

  if (input.capabilities.hasCurrency && input.currency) {
    parts.push(input.currency)
  }

  if (input.capabilities.hasMeasureUnits && input.measureSystem) {
    parts.push(getCompactMeasureLabel(input.measureSystem, input.locale))
  }

  return parts.join(' · ')
}

FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/__tests__/preferences-contract.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP } from '../app-groups'
import { buildAppPreferenceContract } from '../preferences-contract'

describe('global preferences contract', () => {
  it('does not render theme toggle for Ultra Premium', () => {
    expect(GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP['ultra-premium'].themeToggle).toBe(false)
    expect(buildAppPreferenceContract({ appGroup: 'ultra-premium' }).capabilities.hasTheme).toBe(false)
  })

  it('renders theme toggle for Premium, Internal and Portfolio', () => {
    expect(buildAppPreferenceContract({ appGroup: 'premium' }).themeToggle).toBe(true)
    expect(buildAppPreferenceContract({ appGroup: 'internal' }).themeToggle).toBe(true)
    expect(buildAppPreferenceContract({ appGroup: 'portfolio' }).themeToggle).toBe(true)
  })

  it('keeps Russian out of Internal locales', () => {
    expect(GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP.internal.locales).toEqual(['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de'])
    expect(GLOBAL_PREFERENCES_BY_APP_GROUP.internal.locales).not.toContain('ru')
  })

  it('activates currency and units only through app capabilities', () => {
    const contract = buildAppPreferenceContract({
      appGroup: 'premium',
      hasCurrency: true,
      hasMeasureUnits: true,
    })
    expect(contract.capabilities).toMatchObject({
      hasLanguage: true,
      hasCurrency: true,
      hasMeasureUnits: true,
      hasTheme: true,
    })
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/anclora-preferences/__tests__/resolve-preferences.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { getGlobalPreferencesSummary, resolveInitialLocale } from '../resolve-preferences'

describe('resolve preferences', () => {
  it('lets manual locale win over url, persisted and browser locale', () => {
    expect(
      resolveInitialLocale({
        appGroup: 'premium',
        manualLocale: 'de',
        urlLocale: 'en',
        persistedLocale: 'ca',
        browserLocales: ['fr-FR'],
      }),
    ).toBe('de')
  })

  it('falls back to group default when locale is not allowed', () => {
    expect(resolveInitialLocale({ appGroup: 'internal', manualLocale: 'ru', browserLocales: ['it-IT'] })).toBe('es')
  })

  it('shows only language when only language applies', () => {
    expect(
      getGlobalPreferencesSummary({
        locale: 'es',
        capabilities: { hasLanguage: true, hasCurrency: false, hasMeasureUnits: false, hasTheme: true },
      }),
    ).toBe('Español')
  })

  it('shows language, currency and unit when all regional capabilities apply', () => {
    expect(
      getGlobalPreferencesSummary({
        locale: 'es',
        currency: 'EUR',
        measureSystem: 'metric',
        capabilities: { hasLanguage: true, hasCurrency: true, hasMeasureUnits: true, hasTheme: true },
      }),
    ).toBe('Español · EUR · m²')
  })

  it('localizes the compact imperial unit in English', () => {
    expect(
      getGlobalPreferencesSummary({
        locale: 'en',
        currency: 'USD',
        measureSystem: 'imperial',
        capabilities: { hasLanguage: true, hasCurrency: true, hasMeasureUnits: true, hasTheme: true },
      }),
    ).toBe('English · USD · Sqft')
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/auth/better-auth-client.ts

"use client"

import { createAuthClient } from "better-auth/react"
import { organizationClient } from "better-auth/client/plugins"

function resolveBetterAuthBaseURL() {
  if (typeof window !== "undefined") {
    return window.location.origin
  }

  const vercelUrl = process.env.VERCEL_PROJECT_PRODUCTION_URL ?? process.env.VERCEL_URL
  if (vercelUrl) {
    return `https://${vercelUrl}`
  }

  return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? "http://localhost:3000"
}

export const betterAuthClient = createAuthClient({
  baseURL: resolveBetterAuthBaseURL(),
  basePath: "/api/auth",
  plugins: [organizationClient()],
})

export type BetterAuthSession = typeof betterAuthClient.$Infer.Session



================================================
FILE: src/lib/auth/better-auth-server.ts
================================================
import { betterAuth as createBetterAuth } from "better-auth"
import { drizzleAdapter } from "better-auth/adapters/drizzle"
import { toNextJsHandler, nextCookies } from "better-auth/next-js"
import { organization } from "better-auth/plugins"

import { db } from "@/lib/db/neon"
import {
  authAccounts,
  authInvitations,
  authMembers,
  authOrganizations,
  authSessions,
  authUsers,
  authVerifications,
} from "@/lib/db/auth-schema"

const betterAuthSecret =
  process.env.BETTER_AUTH_SECRET ??
  "anclora-dev-secret-change-me-before-enabling-better-auth"

function resolveBetterAuthBaseURL() {
  if (process.env.BETTER_AUTH_URL) {
    return process.env.BETTER_AUTH_URL
  }

  if (process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL && !process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL.includes("localhost")) {
    return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
  }

  const vercelUrl = process.env.VERCEL_PROJECT_PRODUCTION_URL ?? process.env.VERCEL_URL
  if (vercelUrl) {
    return `https://${vercelUrl}`
  }

  return process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL ?? "http://localhost:3000"
}

const betterAuthBaseURL = resolveBetterAuthBaseURL()

export const isBetterAuthEnabled = process.env.BETTER_AUTH_ENABLED === "true"
  || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BETTER_AUTH_ENABLED === "true"

/**
 * Skeleton coexistente de Better Auth.
 * En esta iteracion queda instalado y disponible, pero no sustituye todavia
 * el flujo productivo existente hasta completar tablas y migracion de sesion.
 */
export const auth = createBetterAuth({
  appName: "Anclora Content Generator AI",
  baseURL: betterAuthBaseURL,
  secret: betterAuthSecret,
  basePath: "/api/auth",
  database: drizzleAdapter(db, {
    provider: "pg",
    schema: {
      user: authUsers,
      session: authSessions,
      account: authAccounts,
      verification: authVerifications,
      organization: authOrganizations,
      member: authMembers,
      invitation: authInvitations,
    },
  }),
  emailAndPassword: {
    enabled: true,
    autoSignIn: false,
  },
  session: {
    cookieCache: {
      enabled: true,
      maxAge: 5 * 60,
    },
  },
  plugins: [
    nextCookies(),
    organization({
      allowUserToCreateOrganization: true,
    }),
  ],
})

const liveHandler = toNextJsHandler(auth)

function disabledResponse() {
  return Response.json(
    {
      ok: false,
      message:
        "Better Auth esta instalado pero aun no esta habilitado para produccion en este repo.",
    },
    { status: 503 }
  )
}

export const betterAuthRouteHandlers = {
  GET: async (request: Request) =>
    isBetterAuthEnabled ? liveHandler.GET(request) : disabledResponse(),
  POST: async (request: Request) =>
    isBetterAuthEnabled ? liveHandler.POST(request) : disabledResponse(),
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/auth/workspace.ts
================================================
import { cookies, headers } from 'next/headers'
import { eq } from 'drizzle-orm'

import { auth, isBetterAuthEnabled } from '@/lib/auth/better-auth-server'
import { db } from '@/lib/db/neon'
import { workspaceOrganizations } from '@/lib/db/auth-schema'

export class WorkspaceAuthError extends Error {
  status: number

  constructor(message: string, status = 401) {
    super(message)
    this.name = 'WorkspaceAuthError'
    this.status = status
  }
}

function getCachedWorkspaceSession(params: {
  activeOrganizationId: string | null | undefined
  cachedOrganizationId?: string
  cachedWorkspaceId?: string
}) {
  const { activeOrganizationId, cachedOrganizationId, cachedWorkspaceId } = params
  if (
    activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedOrganizationId === activeOrganizationId &&
    cachedWorkspaceId &&
    /^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-[1-5][0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$/i.test(cachedWorkspaceId)
  ) {
    return {
      organizationId: activeOrganizationId,
      workspaceId: cachedWorkspaceId,
    }
  }

  return null
}

export async function getAuthenticatedWorkspace() {
  if (!isBetterAuthEnabled) {
    throw new WorkspaceAuthError(
      'Better Auth debe estar habilitado para resolver el workspace autenticado',
      500
    )
  }

  const session = await auth.api.getSession({
    headers: await headers(),
  })

  if (!session?.user) {
    throw new WorkspaceAuthError('Sesion requerida', 401)
  }

  const activeOrganizationId = session.session?.activeOrganizationId
  if (!activeOrganizationId) {
    throw new WorkspaceAuthError(
      'La sesion no tiene una organizacion activa asociada',
      403
    )
  }

  const cookieStore = await cookies()
  const cachedSession = getCachedWorkspaceSession({
    activeOrganizationId,
    cachedOrganizationId: cookieStore.get('anclora-org-id')?.value,
    cachedWorkspaceId: cookieStore.get('anclora-workspace-id')?.value,
  })

  if (cachedSession) {
    return {
      userId: session.user.id,
      workspaceId: cachedSession.workspaceId,
    }
  }

  const workspaceLink = await db
    .select({
      workspaceId: workspaceOrganizations.workspaceId,
    })
    .from(workspaceOrganizations)
    .where(eq(workspaceOrganizations.organizationId, activeOrganizationId))
    .limit(1)

  const resolvedWorkspaceId = workspaceLink[0]?.workspaceId
  if (!resolvedWorkspaceId) {
    throw new WorkspaceAuthError(
      'No existe mapeo entre la organizacion activa y un workspace de negocio',
      403
    )
  }

  const baseCookie = {
    httpOnly: true,
    sameSite: 'lax' as const,
    secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production',
    path: '/',
    maxAge: 60 * 60 * 24 * 7,
  }

  try {
    cookieStore.set('anclora-org-id', activeOrganizationId, baseCookie)
    cookieStore.set('anclora-workspace-id', resolvedWorkspaceId, baseCookie)
  } catch {
    // Silently ignore: Next.js can throw when trying to set cookies
    // outside contexts that allow response mutation.
  }

  return {
    userId: session.user.id,
    workspaceId: resolvedWorkspaceId,
  }
}

Pregunta abierta.\nRestricciones:\n- 90 a 180 palabras.\n- NO usar Markdown (ni negritas, ni encabezados).\n- NO saludos, despedidas ni frases tipo 'espero que...'.\n- Devolver únicamente el texto final listo para preview.\n- Sin venta directa.\n- 0 a 3 hashtags.\n- Evitar afirmaciones financieras sin fuente.",
    "review_prompt": "Verifica ausencia de Markdown, saludos y tono promocional excesivo."
  },
  "facebook_en": {
    "generation_prompt": "Generate a Facebook post in English.\nThe tone must be conversational, useful and community-first.\nStructure:\n1. Simple market observation.\n2. Why it matters.\n3. Open question.\nRestrictions:\n- 80 to 170 words.\n- NO Markdown (no bold, no headers).\n- NO greetings, farewells or 'I hope' phrases.\n- Return ONLY final text ready for preview.\n- No direct selling.\n- 0 to 3 hashtags.\n- No unsupported investment claims.",
    "review_prompt": "Verify NO Markdown, NO greetings, and professional but conversational tone."
  },
  "learning_prompt": "Compara la versión generada por el LLM con la versión aprobada/editada por el usuario.\nExtrae únicamente aprendizajes reutilizables:\n- Cambios de tono\n- Cambios de longitud\n- Palabras sustituidas\n- Palabras eliminadas\n- Estructura preferida\n- Nivel de CTA aceptado\n- Grado de asertividad\n- Correcciones de claims\nDevuelve una propuesta de actualización del perfil en formato JSON Patch.\nNo actualices el perfil automáticamente salvo que el usuario confirme.\nNo guardes datos sensibles, oportunidades privadas ni información confidencial."
}


================================================
FILE: src/lib/config/models.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

import {
  FREE_MODELS,
  PAID_FALLBACK_MODEL,
  buildModelFallbackChain,
} from './models'

describe('model fallback chain', () => {
  it('uses the configured free model as the first free-router attempt', () => {
    expect(FREE_MODELS).toEqual(['deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'])
  })

  it('deduplicates the paid fallback model when it matches the free model', () => {
    const chain = buildModelFallbackChain()

    expect(chain).toEqual(['deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'])
  })

  it('keeps an override model first without duplicating the paid fallback model', () => {
    const chain = buildModelFallbackChain([PAID_FALLBACK_MODEL])

    expect(chain).toEqual([PAID_FALLBACK_MODEL])
  })
})


================================================
FILE: src/lib/config/models.ts
================================================
/**
 * LLM Model Configuration for Content Generation
 * App path: fixed primary model, then Hermes model as deterministic fallback.
 */

import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai'
import type { PublishChannel } from '@/lib/agents/types'

const MODEL_TIMEOUT_MS = 12000

// Centralized OpenRouter client with recommended headers
export const openrouter = createOpenAI({
  apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY || '',
  baseURL: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1',
  headers: {
    'HTTP-Referer': process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://anclora.ai',
    'X-Title': 'Anclora Content Generator',
  },
})

// The application always starts on GPT-4o Mini and falls back to the Hermes model.
export const FREE_MODELS: string[] = ['deepseek/deepseek-v3.2']

// Deterministic secondary model used when no override is provided.
export const PAID_FALLBACK_MODEL = 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'

export const MODEL_PRICING_USD_PER_MILLION_TOKENS: Record<
  string,
  { input: number; output: number }
> = {
  'google/gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview': { input: 0.25, output: 1.5 },
  'openai/gpt-4o-mini': { input: 0.15, output: 0.6 },
  'anthropic/claude-3.7-sonnet': { input: 3, output: 15 },
}

// Fixed channel chains for the current application pipeline.
export const PAID_MODELS_BY_CHANNEL: Record<PublishChannel, string[]> = {
  linkedin_es: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
  linkedin_en: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
  blog_es: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
  blog_en: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
  facebook_es: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
  facebook_en: [
    'openai/gpt-4o-mini',
    'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
  ],
}

export function getModelsForChannel(
  channel: PublishChannel,
  usePaidModels: boolean = true
): string[] {
  if (usePaidModels) {
    return PAID_MODELS_BY_CHANNEL[channel] || buildModelFallbackChain()
  }

  return buildModelFallbackChain()
}

export function buildModelFallbackChain(
  models: string[] = FREE_MODELS,
  overrideModelId?: string
): string[] {
  const baseChain = [...models, PAID_FALLBACK_MODEL]
  const dedupedBaseChain = Array.from(new Set(baseChain))

  if (!overrideModelId) {
    return dedupedBaseChain
  }

  return [overrideModelId, ...dedupedBaseChain.filter((modelId) => modelId !== overrideModelId)]
}

export function estimateModelCostUsd(
  modelId: string,
  inputTokens: number,
  outputTokens: number
): number | null {
  if (modelId.includes(':free') || modelId === 'openrouter/free') {
    return 0
  }

  const pricing = MODEL_PRICING_USD_PER_MILLION_TOKENS[modelId]
  if (!pricing) {
    return null
  }

  return (inputTokens / 1_000_000) * pricing.input + (outputTokens / 1_000_000) * pricing.output
}

/**
 * One attempt per model. Each provider call is cancellable via AbortSignal.timeout.
 * Source: AI SDK docs show generateText supports abortSignal cancellation.
 */
export async function generateWithFallback<T>(
  fn: (modelId: string, abortSignal: AbortSignal) => Promise<T>,
  models: string[] = FREE_MODELS,
  maxAttempts?: number,
  overrideModelId?: string,
  onSuccess?: (modelId: string, result: T) => void
): Promise<T> {
  const finalModels = buildModelFallbackChain(models, overrideModelId)
  const attemptLimit = Math.min(finalModels.length, maxAttempts ?? finalModels.length)
  let lastError: unknown

  for (let i = 0; i < attemptLimit; i++) {
    const modelId = finalModels[i]

    try {
      const result = await fn(modelId, AbortSignal.timeout(MODEL_TIMEOUT_MS))
      onSuccess?.(modelId, result)

      if (i > 0 || overrideModelId) {
        console.log(`[LLM] Model used: ${modelId}${i > 0 ? ' (fallback)' : ''}`)
      }

      return result
    } catch (err) {
      lastError = err
      const isLastAttempt = i === attemptLimit - 1
      console.warn(
        `[LLM] Model failed: ${modelId} (attempt ${i + 1}/${attemptLimit}):`,
        err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err),
        isLastAttempt ? '— all models exhausted' : '— trying next...'
      )

      if (isLastAttempt) {
        throw err
      }
    }
  }

  throw lastError || new Error(`All models exhausted (${attemptLimit} tried)`)
}

FILE: src/lib/db/auth-schema.ts

import { relations } from "drizzle-orm"
import {
  boolean,
  index,
  pgTable,
  text,
  timestamp,
  uniqueIndex,
  uuid,
} from "drizzle-orm/pg-core"

/**
 * Tablas de Better Auth generadas a partir del CLI oficial y
 * adaptadas al esquema del repo para convivir con el dominio actual.
 */
export const authUsers = pgTable("user", {
  id: text("id").primaryKey(),
  name: text("name").notNull(),
  email: text("email").notNull().unique(),
  emailVerified: boolean("email_verified").default(false).notNull(),
  image: text("image"),
  createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true })
    .defaultNow()
    .$onUpdate(() => new Date())
    .notNull(),
})

export const authSessions = pgTable(
  "session",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull(),
    token: text("token").notNull().unique(),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true })
      .defaultNow()
      .$onUpdate(() => new Date())
      .notNull(),
    ipAddress: text("ip_address"),
    userAgent: text("user_agent"),
    userId: text("user_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authUsers.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    activeOrganizationId: text("active_organization_id"),
  },
  (table) => [index("session_userId_idx").on(table.userId)]
)

export const authAccounts = pgTable(
  "account",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    accountId: text("account_id").notNull(),
    providerId: text("provider_id").notNull(),
    userId: text("user_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authUsers.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    accessToken: text("access_token"),
    refreshToken: text("refresh_token"),
    idToken: text("id_token"),
    accessTokenExpiresAt: timestamp("access_token_expires_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    refreshTokenExpiresAt: timestamp("refresh_token_expires_at", { withTimezone: true }),
    scope: text("scope"),
    password: text("password"),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true })
      .defaultNow()
      .$onUpdate(() => new Date())
      .notNull(),
  },
  (table) => [index("account_userId_idx").on(table.userId)]
)

export const authVerifications = pgTable(
  "verification",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    identifier: text("identifier").notNull(),
    value: text("value").notNull(),
    expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull(),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true })
      .defaultNow()
      .$onUpdate(() => new Date())
      .notNull(),
  },
  (table) => [index("verification_identifier_idx").on(table.identifier)]
)

export const authOrganizations = pgTable(
  "organization",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    name: text("name").notNull(),
    slug: text("slug").notNull().unique(),
    logo: text("logo"),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    metadata: text("metadata"),
  },
  (table) => [uniqueIndex("organization_slug_uidx").on(table.slug)]
)

export const authMembers = pgTable(
  "member",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    organizationId: text("organization_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authOrganizations.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    userId: text("user_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authUsers.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    role: text("role").default("member").notNull(),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("member_organizationId_idx").on(table.organizationId),
    index("member_userId_idx").on(table.userId),
  ]
)

export const authInvitations = pgTable(
  "invitation",
  {
    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    organizationId: text("organization_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authOrganizations.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    email: text("email").notNull(),
    role: text("role"),
    status: text("status").default("pending").notNull(),
    expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at", { withTimezone: true }).notNull(),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    inviterId: text("inviter_id")
      .notNull()
      .references(() => authUsers.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("invitation_organizationId_idx").on(table.organizationId),
    index("invitation_email_idx").on(table.email),
  ]
)

/**
 * Puente de compatibilidad entre el tenancy historico de negocio basado en UUID
 * y la organizacion activa de Better Auth.
 */
export const workspaceOrganizations = pgTable(
  "workspace_organizations",
  {
    workspaceId: uuid("workspace_id").primaryKey(),
    organizationId: text("organization_id")
      .notNull()
      .unique()
      .references(() => authOrganizations.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { withTimezone: true })
      .defaultNow()
      .$onUpdate(() => new Date())
      .notNull(),
  },
  (table) => [
    index("workspace_organizations_organization_id_idx").on(table.organizationId),
  ]
)

export const authUsersRelations = relations(authUsers, ({ many }) => ({
  sessions: many(authSessions),
  accounts: many(authAccounts),
  members: many(authMembers),
  invitations: many(authInvitations),
}))

export const authSessionsRelations = relations(authSessions, ({ one }) => ({
  user: one(authUsers, {
    fields: [authSessions.userId],
    references: [authUsers.id],
  }),
}))

export const authAccountsRelations = relations(authAccounts, ({ one }) => ({
  user: one(authUsers, {
    fields: [authAccounts.userId],
    references: [authUsers.id],
  }),
}))

export const authOrganizationsRelations = relations(authOrganizations, ({ many, one }) => ({
  members: many(authMembers),
  invitations: many(authInvitations),
  workspaceLink: one(workspaceOrganizations, {
    fields: [authOrganizations.id],
    references: [workspaceOrganizations.organizationId],
  }),
}))

export const authMembersRelations = relations(authMembers, ({ one }) => ({
  organization: one(authOrganizations, {
    fields: [authMembers.organizationId],
    references: [authOrganizations.id],
  }),
  user: one(authUsers, {
    fields: [authMembers.userId],
    references: [authUsers.id],
  }),
}))

export const authInvitationsRelations = relations(authInvitations, ({ one }) => ({
  organization: one(authOrganizations, {
    fields: [authInvitations.organizationId],
    references: [authOrganizations.id],
  }),
  user: one(authUsers, {
    fields: [authInvitations.inviterId],
    references: [authUsers.id],
  }),
}))

export const workspaceOrganizationsRelations = relations(
  workspaceOrganizations,
  ({ one }) => ({
    organization: one(authOrganizations, {
      fields: [workspaceOrganizations.organizationId],
      references: [authOrganizations.id],
    }),
  })
)

FILE: src/lib/db/neon.ts
================================================
/**
 * ANCLORA CONTENT GENERATOR AI - Neon Client
 * Serverless PostgreSQL client with pgvector support
 * Author: Anclorabot
 * Date: 2026-03-19
 */

import { neon } from '@neondatabase/serverless'
import { drizzle } from 'drizzle-orm/neon-http'
import * as schema from './schema'

/**
 * Cliente SQL directo de Neon (para queries raw)
 * Note: fetchConnectionCache is now always true by default
 */
export const sql = neon(process.env.DATABASE_URL!)

/**
 * Cliente Drizzle ORM (para queries tipadas)
 */
export const db = drizzle(sql, { schema })

/**
 * Helper para ejecutar queries vectoriales
 * @example
 * const results = await vectorSearch({
 *   embedding: [0.1, 0.2, ...],
 *   workspaceId: '...',
 *   limit: 5
 * })
 */
export async function vectorSearch(params: {
  embedding: number[]
  workspaceId: string
  limit?: number
  threshold?: number
}) {
  const { embedding, workspaceId, limit = 5, threshold = 0.7 } = params

  // Convertir embedding a string de PostgreSQL
  const embeddingStr = `[${embedding.join(',')}]`

  const results = await sql`
    SELECT
      id,
      content,
      source_id,
      metadata,
      1 - (embedding <=> ${embeddingStr}::vector) as similarity
    FROM knowledge_chunks
    WHERE workspace_id = ${workspaceId}
      AND 1 - (embedding <=> ${embeddingStr}::vector) > ${threshold}
    ORDER BY embedding <=> ${embeddingStr}::vector
    LIMIT ${limit}
  `

  return results as Array<{
    id: string
    content: string
    source_id: string
    metadata: Record<string, unknown>
    similarity: number
  }>
}

/**
 * Helper para insertar chunks con embeddings
 */
export async function insertChunks(params: {
  workspaceId: string
  sourceId: string
  chunks: Array<{
    content: string
    chunkIndex: number
    embedding: number[]
    metadata?: Record<string, unknown>
    tokenCount?: number
  }>
}) {
  const { workspaceId, sourceId, chunks } = params

  // Construir valores para bulk insert
  const values = chunks.map(chunk => ({
    workspace_id: workspaceId,
    source_id: sourceId,
    content: chunk.content,
    chunk_index: chunk.chunkIndex,
    embedding: `[${chunk.embedding.join(',')}]`,
    metadata: JSON.stringify(chunk.metadata || {}),
    token_count: chunk.tokenCount || null
  }))

  // Bulk insert usando múltiples queries (más simple y seguro)
  for (const v of values) {
    await sql`
      INSERT INTO knowledge_chunks
      (workspace_id, source_id, content, chunk_index, embedding, metadata, token_count)
      VALUES (
        ${v.workspace_id},
        ${v.source_id},
        ${v.content},
        ${v.chunk_index},
        ${v.embedding}::vector,
        ${v.metadata}::jsonb,
        ${v.token_count}
      )
    `
  }

  return chunks.length
}

/**
 * ANCLORA CONTENT GENERATOR AI - Drizzle Schema
 * Migration to Neon PostgreSQL with Drizzle ORM
 * Author: Anclorabot
 * Date: 2026-03-19
 */

import { pgTable, uuid, text, timestamp, integer, jsonb, boolean, real, pgEnum, date, vector, index, uniqueIndex } from 'drizzle-orm/pg-core'
import { relations } from 'drizzle-orm'
import { sql } from 'drizzle-orm'
export * from './auth-schema'

// =====================================================
// ENUMS
// =====================================================

export const sourceTypeEnum = pgEnum('source_type', ['document', 'url', 'rss', 'manual', 'api', 'agentic_research_pack', 'notebooklm_notebook', 'curated_brief'])
export const sourceCategoryEnum = pgEnum('source_category', ['market', 'regulation', 'lifestyle', 'infrastructure', 'editorial', 'general'])
export const sourceStatusEnum = pgEnum('source_status', ['pending', 'processing', 'completed', 'error'])
export const contentTypeEnum = pgEnum('content_type', ['blog', 'linkedin', 'instagram', 'facebook', 'newsletter', 'custom'])
export const contentStatusEnum = pgEnum('content_status', ['draft', 'review', 'approved', 'scheduled', 'published', 'archived'])
export const platformTypeEnum = pgEnum('platform_type', ['linkedin', 'facebook', 'instagram', 'blog', 'newsletter'])
export const postStatusEnum = pgEnum('post_status', ['pending', 'processing', 'published', 'failed', 'cancelled'])
export const leadScoreEnum = pgEnum('lead_score', ['A', 'B', 'C', 'D', 'F'])
export const leadStatusEnum = pgEnum('lead_status', ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'converted', 'lost'])
export const knowledgePackTypeEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_pack_type', ['agentic_research_pack', 'notebooklm_notebook', 'curated_brief'])
export const knowledgePackStatusEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_pack_status', ['queued', 'processing', 'completed', 'failed'])
export const knowledgeClaimTypeEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_claim_type', ['market_signal', 'thesis', 'recommendation', 'risk'])
export const knowledgeSupportLevelEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_support_level', ['high', 'medium', 'low'])
export const knowledgeEvidenceTypeEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_evidence_type', ['prompt', 'notebook', 'manual', 'derived', 'workflow'])
export const knowledgeIngestionTriggerEnum = pgEnum('knowledge_ingestion_trigger', ['prompt', 'notebooklm', 'manual'])
export const contentOpportunityStatusEnum = pgEnum('content_opportunity_status', ['new', 'accepted', 'converted', 'dismissed'])
export const editorialLearningProposalStatusEnum = pgEnum('editorial_learning_proposal_status', ['pending_confirmation', 'accepted', 'rejected'])
export const editorialDraftStatusEnum = pgEnum('editorial_draft_status', ['draft', 'in_review', 'approved_partial', 'approved_all', 'published_partial', 'published_all', 'archived'])
export const editorialDraftVariantStatusEnum = pgEnum('editorial_draft_variant_status', ['draft', 'edited', 'approved', 'rejected', 'published'])
export const editorialAssetProviderEnum = pgEnum('editorial_asset_provider', ['vercel_blob'])
export const generationJobStatusEnum = pgEnum('generation_job_status', ['queued', 'running', 'completed', 'failed', 'cancelled'])

// =====================================================
// TABLES
// =====================================================

export const contentSources = pgTable('content_sources', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  sourceType: sourceTypeEnum('source_type').notNull(),
  sourceCategory: sourceCategoryEnum('source_category').default('general').notNull(),
  sourceUrl: text('source_url'),
  content: text('content'),
  metadata: jsonb('metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  status: sourceStatusEnum('status').default('pending').notNull(),
  errorMessage: text('error_message'),
  chunksCount: integer('chunks_count').default(0).notNull(),
  processedAt: timestamp('processed_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const knowledgeChunks = pgTable('knowledge_chunks', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  sourceId: uuid('source_id').notNull().references(() => contentSources.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  content: text('content').notNull(),
  chunkIndex: integer('chunk_index').notNull(),
  embedding: vector('embedding', { dimensions: 384 }),
  metadata: jsonb('metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  tokenCount: integer('token_count'),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const knowledgePacks = pgTable('knowledge_packs', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  sourceId: uuid('source_id').references(() => contentSources.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  sourceType: sourceTypeEnum('source_type').notNull(),
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  summary: text('summary').notNull(),
  status: knowledgePackStatusEnum('status').default('queued').notNull(),
  packType: knowledgePackTypeEnum('pack_type').notNull(),
  inputPrompt: text('input_prompt'),
  createdByUserId: text('created_by_user_id').notNull(),
  freshnessDate: date('freshness_date'),
  confidenceScore: real('confidence_score'),
  tags: jsonb('tags').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  topics: jsonb('topics').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  entities: jsonb('entities').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  recommendedUses: jsonb('recommended_uses').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  rawPayload: jsonb('raw_payload').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  normalizedPayload: jsonb('normalized_payload').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const knowledgePackEvidence = pgTable('knowledge_pack_evidence', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  knowledgePackId: uuid('knowledge_pack_id').notNull().references(() => knowledgePacks.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  url: text('url'),
  sourceLabel: text('source_label').notNull(),
  excerpt: text('excerpt').notNull(),
  evidenceType: knowledgeEvidenceTypeEnum('evidence_type').notNull(),
  publishedAt: timestamp('published_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  confidenceScore: real('confidence_score'),
  position: integer('position').default(0).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const knowledgePackClaims = pgTable('knowledge_pack_claims', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  knowledgePackId: uuid('knowledge_pack_id').notNull().references(() => knowledgePacks.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  claimType: knowledgeClaimTypeEnum('claim_type').notNull(),
  statement: text('statement').notNull(),
  supportLevel: knowledgeSupportLevelEnum('support_level').notNull(),
  evidenceRefs: jsonb('evidence_refs').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  position: integer('position').default(0).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const knowledgeIngestionJobs = pgTable('knowledge_ingestion_jobs', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  knowledgePackId: uuid('knowledge_pack_id').references(() => knowledgePacks.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  triggerType: knowledgeIngestionTriggerEnum('trigger_type').notNull(),
  status: knowledgePackStatusEnum('status').default('queued').notNull(),
  inputPayload: jsonb('input_payload').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  orchestrator: text('orchestrator').default('anclorabot-core').notNull(),
  errorMessage: text('error_message'),
  startedAt: timestamp('started_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  finishedAt: timestamp('finished_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const contentOpportunities = pgTable('content_opportunities', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  sourceId: uuid('source_id').references(() => contentSources.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  knowledgePackId: uuid('knowledge_pack_id').references(() => knowledgePacks.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  angle: text('angle').notNull(),
  rationale: text('rationale').notNull(),
  audience: text('audience'),
  recommendedFormat: text('recommended_format').notNull(),
  confidenceScore: real('confidence_score'),
  status: contentOpportunityStatusEnum('status').default('new').notNull(),
  metadata: jsonb('metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const contentTemplates = pgTable('content_templates', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  contentType: contentTypeEnum('content_type').notNull(),
  systemPrompt: text('system_prompt').notNull(),
  config: jsonb('config').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  description: text('description'),
  isDefault: boolean('is_default').default(false).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const workspaceSettings = pgTable('workspace_settings', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull().unique(),
  workspaceName: text('workspace_name').notNull(),
  workspaceDescription: text('workspace_description'),
  editorialSystemPrompt: text('editorial_system_prompt').notNull(),
  defaultProvider: text('default_provider').default('anthropic').notNull(),
  defaultModel: text('default_model').default('claude-sonnet-4-6').notNull(),
  defaultTemperature: real('default_temperature').default(0.7).notNull(),
  defaultTopP: real('default_top_p').default(0.9).notNull(),
  ragChunkSize: integer('rag_chunk_size').default(512).notNull(),
  ragTopK: integer('rag_top_k').default(5).notNull(),
  similarityThreshold: real('similarity_threshold').default(0.7).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const generatedContent = pgTable('generated_content', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  templateId: uuid('template_id').references(() => contentTemplates.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  opportunityId: uuid('opportunity_id').references(() => contentOpportunities.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  microZoneId: uuid('micro_zone_id').references(() => microZones.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  title: text('title').notNull(),
  content: text('content').notNull(),
  contentType: contentTypeEnum('content_type').notNull(),
  status: contentStatusEnum('status').default('draft').notNull(),
  generationMetadata: jsonb('generation_metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  metaTitle: text('meta_title'),
  metaDescription: text('meta_description'),
  keywords: text('keywords').array(),
  scheduledFor: timestamp('scheduled_for', { withTimezone: true }),
  publishedAt: timestamp('published_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  platformPostIds: jsonb('platform_post_ids').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const scheduledPosts = pgTable('scheduled_posts', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  contentId: uuid('content_id').notNull().references(() => generatedContent.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  platform: platformTypeEnum('platform').notNull(),
  scheduledFor: timestamp('scheduled_for', { withTimezone: true }).notNull(),
  status: postStatusEnum('status').default('pending').notNull(),
  retryCount: integer('retry_count').default(0).notNull(),
  maxRetries: integer('max_retries').default(3).notNull(),
  lastError: text('last_error'),
  platformPostId: text('platform_post_id'),
  platformResponse: jsonb('platform_response'),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  publishedAt: timestamp('published_at', { withTimezone: true }),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const contentMetrics = pgTable('content_metrics', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  contentId: uuid('content_id').notNull().references(() => generatedContent.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
  platform: text('platform').notNull(),
  views: integer('views').default(0).notNull(),
  impressions: integer('impressions').default(0).notNull(),
  clicks: integer('clicks').default(0).notNull(),
  likes: integer('likes').default(0).notNull(),
  comments: integer('comments').default(0).notNull(),
  shares: integer('shares').default(0).notNull(),
  saves: integer('saves').default(0).notNull(),
  leadsGenerated: integer('leads_generated').default(0).notNull(),
  conversions: integer('conversions').default(0).notNull(),
  engagementRate: real('engagement_rate'),
  snapshotDate: date('snapshot_date').defaultNow().notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const microZones = pgTable('micro_zones', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  name: text('name').notNull(),
  code: text('code').notNull(),
  municipality: text('municipality').notNull(),
  region: text('region').default('Southwest Mallorca').notNull(),
  marketData: jsonb('market_data').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  description: text('description'),
  tags: text('tags').array(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const leadTracking = pgTable('lead_tracking', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
  contentId: uuid('content_id').references(() => generatedContent.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
  email: text('email'),
  phone: text('phone'),
  name: text('name'),
  sourcePlatform: text('source_platform'),
  sourceUrl: text('source_url'),
  utmParams: jsonb('utm_params'),
  score: leadScoreEnum('score'),
  status: leadStatusEnum('status').default('new').notNull(),
  notes: text('notes'),
  metadata: jsonb('metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const editorialDrafts = pgTable(
  'editorial_drafts',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
    jobId: text('job_id').unique(),
    sourceType: text('source_type').default('ai_generation').notNull(),
    topic: text('topic'),
    headline: text('headline'),
    zone: text('zone'),
    framing: text('framing'),
    targetAudience: text('target_audience'),
    status: editorialDraftStatusEnum('status').default('draft').notNull(),
    generationMetadata: jsonb('generation_metadata').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    usageSummary: jsonb('usage_summary').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  },
  (table) => ({
    workspaceUpdatedIdx: index('editorial_drafts_workspace_updated_idx').on(table.workspaceId, table.updatedAt),
    workspaceStatusIdx: index('editorial_drafts_workspace_status_idx').on(table.workspaceId, table.status),
    jobIdIdx: uniqueIndex('editorial_drafts_job_id_idx').on(table.jobId),
  })
)

export const editorialDraftVariants = pgTable(
  'editorial_draft_variants',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    draftId: uuid('draft_id').notNull().references(() => editorialDrafts.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    channel: text('channel').notNull(),
    platform: text('platform').notNull(),
    language: text('language').notNull(),
    title: text('title'),
    excerpt: text('excerpt'),
    draft: text('draft').notNull(),
    editedDraft: text('edited_draft'),
    seoTitle: text('seo_title'),
    seoDescription: text('seo_description'),
    hashtags: text('hashtags').array(),
    status: editorialDraftVariantStatusEnum('status').default('draft').notNull(),
    charCount: integer('char_count').default(0).notNull(),
    wordCount: integer('word_count'),
    complianceWarnings: jsonb('compliance_warnings').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    qualityWarnings: jsonb('quality_warnings').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    publishedUrl: text('published_url'),
    publishedAt: timestamp('published_at', { withTimezone: true }),
    createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  },
  (table) => ({
    draftChannelIdx: uniqueIndex('editorial_draft_variants_draft_channel_idx').on(table.draftId, table.channel),
    draftStatusIdx: index('editorial_draft_variants_draft_status_idx').on(table.draftId, table.status),
  })
)

export const editorialAssets = pgTable(
  'editorial_assets',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
    draftId: uuid('draft_id').notNull().references(() => editorialDrafts.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    variantId: uuid('variant_id').references(() => editorialDraftVariants.id, { onDelete: 'cascade' }),
    provider: editorialAssetProviderEnum('provider').default('vercel_blob').notNull(),
    blobPath: text('blob_path').notNull(),
    blobUrl: text('blob_url').notNull(),
    mimeType: text('mime_type').notNull(),
    sizeBytes: integer('size_bytes'),
    width: integer('width'),
    height: integer('height'),
    createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  },
  (table) => ({
    draftIdx: index('editorial_assets_draft_idx').on(table.draftId),
    variantIdx: index('editorial_assets_variant_idx').on(table.variantId),
  })
)

export const generationJobs = pgTable(
  'generation_jobs',
  {
    id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
    jobId: text('job_id').notNull().unique(),
    workflowRunId: text('workflow_run_id'),
    workspaceId: uuid('workspace_id').notNull(),
    engine: text('engine').notNull(),
    status: generationJobStatusEnum('status').default('queued').notNull(),
    phase: text('phase').default('queued').notNull(),
    inputState: jsonb('input_state').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    resultState: jsonb('result_state').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
    draftId: uuid('draft_id').references(() => editorialDrafts.id, { onDelete: 'set null' }),
    errorMessage: text('error_message'),
    startedAt: timestamp('started_at', { withTimezone: true }),
    finishedAt: timestamp('finished_at', { withTimezone: true }),
    createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
    updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  },
  (table) => ({
    jobIdIdx: uniqueIndex('generation_jobs_job_id_idx').on(table.jobId),
    workflowRunIdIdx: index('generation_jobs_workflow_run_id_idx').on(table.workflowRunId),
    workspaceStatusIdx: index('generation_jobs_workspace_status_idx').on(table.workspaceId, table.status),
    workspaceUpdatedIdx: index('generation_jobs_workspace_updated_idx').on(table.workspaceId, table.updatedAt),
  })
)

export const editorialLearningProposals = pgTable('editorial_learning_proposals', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  jobId: text('job_id').notNull().unique(),
  workspaceId: text('workspace_id').notNull(),
  status: editorialLearningProposalStatusEnum('status').default('pending_confirmation').notNull(),
  summary: jsonb('summary').default(sql`'{}'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  guidelineText: text('guideline_text').notNull(),
  requiresUserConfirmation: boolean('requires_user_confirmation').default(true).notNull(),
  detectedAt: timestamp('detected_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const workspaceEditorialLearningProfiles = pgTable('workspace_editorial_learning_profiles', {
  id: uuid('id').defaultRandom().primaryKey(),
  workspaceId: text('workspace_id').notNull().unique(),
  acceptedGuidelines: jsonb('accepted_guidelines').default(sql`'[]'::jsonb`).notNull(),
  createdAt: timestamp('created_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
  updatedAt: timestamp('updated_at', { withTimezone: true }).defaultNow().notNull(),
})

export const microZonesRelations = relations(microZones, ({ many }) => ({
  generatedContent: many(generatedContent),
}))

export const generatedContentRelations = relations(generatedContent, ({ one }) => ({
  microZone: one(microZones, {
    fields: [generatedContent.microZoneId],
    references: [microZones.id],
  }),
  template: one(contentTemplates, {
    fields: [generatedContent.templateId],
    references: [contentTemplates.id],
  }),
}))

export const editorialDraftsRelations = relations(editorialDrafts, ({ many }) => ({
  variants: many(editorialDraftVariants),
  assets: many(editorialAssets),
}))

export const editorialDraftVariantsRelations = relations(editorialDraftVariants, ({ one, many }) => ({
  draft: one(editorialDrafts, {
    fields: [editorialDraftVariants.draftId],
    references: [editorialDrafts.id],
  }),
  assets: many(editorialAssets),
}))

export const editorialAssetsRelations = relations(editorialAssets, ({ one }) => ({
  draft: one(editorialDrafts, {
    fields: [editorialAssets.draftId],
    references: [editorialDrafts.id],
  }),
  variant: one(editorialDraftVariants, {
    fields: [editorialAssets.variantId],
    references: [editorialDraftVariants.id],
  }),
}))

export const generationJobsRelations = relations(generationJobs, ({ one }) => ({
  draft: one(editorialDrafts, {
    fields: [generationJobs.draftId],
    references: [editorialDrafts.id],
  }),
}))
