/**
 * ANCLORA CONTENT GENERATOR AI - Database Types
 * Feature: ANCLORA-FEAT-DB-SCHEMA
 * Legacy TypeScript types kept for compatibility during database transition
 * Author: Agent A (Database Architect)
 * Date: 2026-03-19
 */

// =====================================================
// ENUMS
// =====================================================

export type SourceType = 'document' | 'url' | 'rss' | 'manual' | 'api'
export type SourceStatus = 'pending' | 'processing' | 'completed' | 'error'
export type ContentType = 'blog' | 'linkedin' | 'instagram' | 'facebook' | 'newsletter' | 'custom'
export type ContentStatus = 'draft' | 'review' | 'approved' | 'scheduled' | 'published' | 'archived'
export type PlatformType = 'linkedin' | 'facebook' | 'instagram' | 'blog' | 'newsletter'
export type PostStatus = 'pending' | 'processing' | 'published' | 'failed' | 'cancelled'
export type LeadScore = 'A' | 'B' | 'C' | 'D' | 'F'
export type LeadStatus = 'new' | 'contacted' | 'qualified' | 'converted' | 'lost'
export type EditorialDraftStatus =
  | 'draft'
  | 'in_review'
  | 'approved_partial'
  | 'approved_all'
  | 'published_partial'
  | 'published_all'
  | 'archived'
export type EditorialDraftVariantStatus = 'draft' | 'edited' | 'approved' | 'rejected' | 'published'
export type EditorialAssetProvider = 'vercel_blob'

// =====================================================
// TABLES
// =====================================================

export interface ContentSource {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  title: string
  source_type: SourceType
  source_url?: string
  content?: string
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>
  status: SourceStatus
  error_message?: string
  chunks_count: number
  processed_at?: string
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface KnowledgeChunk {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  source_id: string
  content: string
  chunk_index: number
  embedding: number[] // vector(384)
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>
  token_count?: number
  created_at: string
}

export interface ContentTemplate {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  name: string
  content_type: ContentType
  system_prompt: string
  config: TemplateConfig
  description?: string
  is_default: boolean
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface WorkspaceSettings {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  workspace_name: string
  workspace_description?: string
  editorial_system_prompt: string
  default_provider: string
  default_model: string
  default_temperature: number
  default_top_p: number
  rag_chunk_size: number
  rag_top_k: number
  similarity_threshold: number
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface TemplateConfig {
  max_tokens?: number
  temperature?: number
  model?: string
  [key: string]: unknown
}

export interface GeneratedContent {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  template_id?: string
  title: string
  content: string
  content_type: ContentType
  status: ContentStatus
  generation_metadata: GenerationMetadata
  meta_title?: string
  meta_description?: string
  keywords?: string[]
  scheduled_for?: string
  published_at?: string
  platform_post_ids: Record<string, string>
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface EditorialDraft {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  job_id?: string
  source_type: string
  topic?: string
  headline?: string
  zone?: string
  framing?: string
  target_audience?: string
  status: EditorialDraftStatus
  generation_metadata: Record<string, unknown>
  usage_summary: Record<string, unknown>
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface EditorialDraftVariant {
  id: string
  draft_id: string
  channel: string
  platform: string
  language: string
  title?: string
  excerpt?: string
  draft: string
  edited_draft?: string
  seo_title?: string
  seo_description?: string
  hashtags?: string[]
  status: EditorialDraftVariantStatus
  char_count: number
  word_count?: number
  compliance_warnings: string[]
  quality_warnings: string[]
  published_url?: string
  published_at?: string
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface EditorialAsset {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  draft_id: string
  variant_id?: string
  provider: EditorialAssetProvider
  blob_path: string
  blob_url: string
  mime_type: string
  size_bytes?: number
  width?: number
  height?: number
  created_at: string
}

export interface GenerationMetadata {
  model?: string
  tokens_used?: number
  temperature?: number
  rag_sources?: string[]
  [key: string]: unknown
}

export interface ScheduledPost {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  content_id: string
  platform: PlatformType
  scheduled_for: string
  status: PostStatus
  retry_count: number
  max_retries: number
  last_error?: string
  platform_post_id?: string
  platform_response?: Record<string, unknown>
  created_at: string
  published_at?: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface ContentMetrics {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  content_id: string
  platform: string
  views: number
  impressions: number
  clicks: number
  likes: number
  comments: number
  shares: number
  saves: number
  leads_generated: number
  conversions: number
  engagement_rate?: number
  snapshot_date: string
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface MicroZone {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  name: string
  code: string
  municipality: string
  region: string
  market_data: MarketData
  description?: string
  tags?: string[]
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

export interface MarketData {
  avg_price_m2?: number
  avg_property_price?: number
  inventory?: number
  avg_days_market?: number
  [key: string]: unknown
}

export interface LeadTracking {
  id: string
  workspace_id: string
  content_id?: string
  email?: string
  phone?: string
  name?: string
  source_platform?: string
  source_url?: string
  utm_params?: Record<string, unknown>
  score?: LeadScore
  status: LeadStatus
  notes?: string
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>
  created_at: string
  updated_at: string
}

// =====================================================
// INSERT/UPDATE TYPES (sin campos auto-generados)
// =====================================================

export type ContentSourceInsert = Omit<ContentSource, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at' | 'chunks_count' | 'processed_at'>
export type ContentSourceUpdate = Partial<ContentSourceInsert>

export type KnowledgeChunkInsert = Omit<KnowledgeChunk, 'id' | 'created_at'>
export type KnowledgeChunkUpdate = Partial<KnowledgeChunkInsert>

export type ContentTemplateInsert = Omit<ContentTemplate, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type ContentTemplateUpdate = Partial<ContentTemplateInsert>

export type WorkspaceSettingsInsert = Omit<WorkspaceSettings, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type WorkspaceSettingsUpdate = Partial<WorkspaceSettingsInsert>

export type GeneratedContentInsert = Omit<GeneratedContent, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type GeneratedContentUpdate = Partial<GeneratedContentInsert>

export type EditorialDraftInsert = Omit<EditorialDraft, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type EditorialDraftUpdate = Partial<EditorialDraftInsert>

export type EditorialDraftVariantInsert = Omit<EditorialDraftVariant, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type EditorialDraftVariantUpdate = Partial<EditorialDraftVariantInsert>

export type EditorialAssetInsert = Omit<EditorialAsset, 'id' | 'created_at'>
export type EditorialAssetUpdate = Partial<EditorialAssetInsert>

export type ScheduledPostInsert = Omit<ScheduledPost, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at' | 'published_at'>
export type ScheduledPostUpdate = Partial<ScheduledPostInsert>

export type ContentMetricsInsert = Omit<ContentMetrics, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at' | 'engagement_rate'>
export type ContentMetricsUpdate = Partial<ContentMetricsInsert>

export type MicroZoneInsert = Omit<MicroZone, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type MicroZoneUpdate = Partial<MicroZoneInsert>

export type LeadTrackingInsert = Omit<LeadTracking, 'id' | 'created_at' | 'updated_at'>
export type LeadTrackingUpdate = Partial<LeadTrackingInsert>

// =====================================================
// FUNCTION RETURN TYPES
// =====================================================

export interface SimilarChunk {
  id: string
  content: string
  source_id: string
  similarity: number
  metadata: Record<string, unknown>
}

// =====================================================
// DATABASE TYPE (para Supabase Client)
// =====================================================

export interface Database {
  public: {
    Tables: {
      content_sources: {
        Row: ContentSource
        Insert: ContentSourceInsert
        Update: ContentSourceUpdate
      }
      knowledge_chunks: {
        Row: KnowledgeChunk
        Insert: KnowledgeChunkInsert
        Update: KnowledgeChunkUpdate
      }
      content_templates: {
        Row: ContentTemplate
        Insert: ContentTemplateInsert
        Update: ContentTemplateUpdate
      }
      workspace_settings: {
        Row: WorkspaceSettings
        Insert: WorkspaceSettingsInsert
        Update: WorkspaceSettingsUpdate
      }
      generated_content: {
        Row: GeneratedContent
        Insert: GeneratedContentInsert
        Update: GeneratedContentUpdate
      }
      scheduled_posts: {
        Row: ScheduledPost
        Insert: ScheduledPostInsert
        Update: ScheduledPostUpdate
      }
      content_metrics: {
        Row: ContentMetrics
        Insert: ContentMetricsInsert
        Update: ContentMetricsUpdate
      }
      micro_zones: {
        Row: MicroZone
        Insert: MicroZoneInsert
        Update: MicroZoneUpdate
      }
      lead_tracking: {
        Row: LeadTracking
        Insert: LeadTrackingInsert
        Update: LeadTrackingUpdate
      }
    }
    Functions: {
      search_similar_chunks: {
        Args: {
          query_embedding: number[]
          match_threshold?: number
          match_count?: number
          filter_workspace_id?: string
        }
        Returns: SimilarChunk[]
      }
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/hermesClient.ts
================================================
import { validateHermesResponse } from './schemas'
import type { HermesContentRequest, HermesContentResponse } from './types'

const HERMES_TIMEOUT_MS = 45_000

export class HermesClientError extends Error {
  constructor(
    message: string,
    public readonly code:
      | 'missing_endpoint'
      | 'request_failed'
      | 'timeout'
      | 'invalid_response'
  ) {
    super(message)
    this.name = 'HermesClientError'
  }
}

function redactSensitive(value: string) {
  let redacted = value
    .replace(/Bearer\s+[A-Za-z0-9._~+/=-]+/gi, 'Bearer [REDACTED]')
    .replace(/sk-or-v1-[A-Za-z0-9._~+/=-]+/gi, 'sk-or-v1-[REDACTED]')
    .replace(/(HERMES_API_KEY|WORKER_API_KEY|OPENROUTER_API_KEY)=\S+/gi, '$1=[REDACTED]')

  for (const secret of [
    process.env.HERMES_API_KEY,
    process.env.WORKER_API_KEY,
    process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY,
  ]) {
    if (secret && secret.length >= 8) {
      redacted = redacted.split(secret).join('[REDACTED]')
    }
  }

  return redacted
}

function buildCandidateEndpoints(rawEndpoint: string) {
  const trimmed = rawEndpoint.trim()
  const normalized = trimmed.replace(/\/+$/, '')

  const candidates = new Set<string>()

  candidates.add(trimmed)
  candidates.add(normalized)

  try {
    const url = new URL(normalized)
    const pathname = url.pathname.replace(/\/+$/, '') || '/'

    if (pathname === '/' || pathname === '') {
      candidates.add(`${url.origin}/generate`)
      candidates.add(`${url.origin}/api/generate`)
    } else if (pathname === '/generate') {
      candidates.add(`${url.origin}/api/generate`)
    } else if (pathname === '/api/generate') {
      candidates.add(`${url.origin}/generate`)
    }
  } catch {
    if (!normalized.endsWith('/generate')) {
      candidates.add(`${normalized}/generate`)
    }
    if (!normalized.endsWith('/api/generate')) {
      candidates.add(`${normalized}/api/generate`)
    }
  }

  return Array.from(candidates)
}

export async function generateWithHermes(
  input: HermesContentRequest
): Promise<HermesContentResponse> {
  const endpoint = process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT

  if (!endpoint) {
    throw new HermesClientError('HERMES_ENDPOINT is not configured', 'missing_endpoint')
  }

  const headers: Record<string, string> = {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  }

  if (process.env.HERMES_API_KEY) {
    headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${process.env.HERMES_API_KEY}`
  }

  const startedAt = Date.now()
  const candidateEndpoints = buildCandidateEndpoints(endpoint)
  let lastError: Error | null = null

  for (const candidateEndpoint of candidateEndpoints) {
    let response: Response

    try {
      response = await fetch(candidateEndpoint, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers,
        body: JSON.stringify(input),
        signal: AbortSignal.timeout(HERMES_TIMEOUT_MS),
      })
    } catch (error) {
      const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error)
      lastError = new HermesClientError(
        `Hermes request failed at ${candidateEndpoint}: ${redactSensitive(message)}`,
        error instanceof DOMException && error.name === 'TimeoutError' ? 'timeout' : 'request_failed'
      )
      throw lastError
    }

    if (!response.ok) {
      const responseText = await response.text().catch(() => '')
      lastError = new HermesClientError(
        `Hermes request failed with status ${response.status} at ${candidateEndpoint}${
          responseText ? `: ${redactSensitive(responseText).slice(0, 200)}` : ''
        }`,
        'request_failed'
      )

      if (response.status === 404 && candidateEndpoint !== candidateEndpoints.at(-1)) {
        continue
      }

      throw lastError
    }

    let json: unknown
    try {
      json = await response.json()
    } catch (error) {
      throw new HermesClientError(
        `Hermes response was not valid JSON: ${
          error instanceof Error ? redactSensitive(error.message) : 'Unknown parse error'
        }`,
        'invalid_response'
      )
    }
    let parsed: HermesContentResponse

    try {
      parsed = validateHermesResponse(json, input.channels)
    } catch (error) {
      throw new HermesClientError(
        `Hermes response schema validation failed: ${
          error instanceof Error ? redactSensitive(error.message) : 'Unknown validation error'
        }`,
        'invalid_response'
      )
    }

    return {
      ...parsed,
      usage: {
        ...parsed.usage,
        latencyMs: parsed.usage?.latencyMs ?? Date.now() - startedAt,
      },
    }
  }

  throw lastError ?? new HermesClientError('Hermes request failed before receiving a response', 'request_failed')
}

import type { HermesContentRequest, HermesContentResponse } from './types'

function platformFromChannel(channel: string) {
  if (channel.startsWith('linkedin')) return 'linkedin'
  if (channel.startsWith('blog')) return 'blog'
  if (channel.startsWith('facebook')) return 'facebook'
  return 'blog'
}

function languageFromChannel(channel: string) {
  return channel.endsWith('_en') ? 'en' : 'es'
}

export async function generateWithHermesMock(
  input: HermesContentRequest
): Promise<HermesContentResponse> {
  const channelVariants = input.channels.map((channel) => ({
    channel,
    platform: platformFromChannel(channel) as 'linkedin' | 'blog' | 'facebook',
    language: languageFromChannel(channel) as 'es' | 'en',
    title: `[MOCK Hermes] ${input.topic}`,
    draft:
      languageFromChannel(channel) === 'en'
        ? `[MOCK] Hermes draft for ${channel}. Topic: ${input.topic}. This is a controlled test output for Anclora.`
        : `[MOCK] Borrador Hermes para ${channel}. Tema: ${input.topic}. Este es un output controlado de prueba para Anclora.`,
    claims: [],
    qualityWarnings: [],
    complianceWarnings: [],
    rationale: 'Mock local para validar integración Hermes sin coste.',
  }))

  return {
    engine: 'hermes-worker',
    model: 'hermes-mock',
    title: channelVariants[0]?.title ?? `[MOCK Hermes] ${input.topic}`,
    content: channelVariants[0]?.draft ?? '',
    channelVariants,
    usage: {
      totalTokens: 0,
      promptTokens: 0,
      completionTokens: 0,
      estimatedCostUsd: 0,
      provider: 'mock',
      model: 'hermes-mock',
      latencyMs: 0,
    },
    warnings: [],
    errors: [],
    rationale: 'Respuesta mock local.',
  }
}

import type { ContentGenerationState, PublishChannel } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import type {
  HermesChannel,
  HermesContentRequest,
  HermesContentResponse,
  HermesMappedState,
} from './types'

export function mapAppChannelsToHermesChannels(channels: PublishChannel[]): HermesChannel[] {
  return [...channels]
}

export function mapHermesChannelToAppChannel(channel: HermesChannel): PublishChannel {
  return channel
}

export function buildHermesRequest(
  state: ContentGenerationState,
  learnedGuidelines: Array<{ scope: string; text: string }>
): HermesContentRequest {
  return {
    requestId: state.jobId,
    workspaceId: state.workspaceId,
    jobId: state.jobId,
    contentType: 'custom',
    title: state.headline ?? state.topic,
    userPrompt: state.topic,
    microZone: state.microzone ?? state.zone,
    tone: state.assertiveness,
    topic: state.topic,
    zone: state.zone,
    framing: state.framing,
    targetAudience: state.targetAudience,
    channels: mapAppChannelsToHermesChannels(state.channels),
    language: state.language,
    contentObjective: state.contentObjective,
    signalType: state.signalType,
    claimRiskLevel: state.claimRiskLevel,
    sourceUrls: state.sourceUrls,
    allowQuantitativeData: state.allowQuantitativeData,
    allowCtaLink: state.allowCtaLink,
    coreThesis: state.coreThesis,
    investorLens: state.investorLens,
    desiredReaderOutcome: state.desiredReaderOutcome,
    ctaMode: state.ctaMode,
    evidenceMode: state.evidenceMode,
    assertiveness: state.assertiveness,
    microzone: state.microzone,
    exampleOutput: state.exampleOutput,
    customGuidelines: state.customGuidelines?.map((guideline) => ({
      scope: guideline.scope,
      text: guideline.text,
    })),
    learnedGuidelines,
  }
}

export function mapHermesResponseToGenerationState(
  initialState: ContentGenerationState,
  response: HermesContentResponse
): HermesMappedState {
  const channelVariants = response.channelVariants.map((variant) => {
    const draft = (variant.draft || variant.content || '').trim()
    return {
      channel: mapHermesChannelToAppChannel(variant.channel),
      platform: variant.platform,
      language: variant.language,
      draft,
      title: variant.title,
      excerpt: variant.hook,
      hashtags: variant.hashtags,
      claims: variant.claims,
      charCount: draft.length,
      wordCount: draft.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length,
      optimizedAt: new Date().toISOString(),
      status: 'draft' as const,
      complianceWarnings: variant.complianceWarnings?.map((warning) => `[${warning.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${warning.message}`),
      qualityWarnings: variant.qualityWarnings?.map((warning) => `[${warning.severity.toUpperCase()}] ${warning.message}`),
    }
  })

  const firstVariant = channelVariants[0]
  const errorMessages = response.errors?.map((error) => error.message) ?? []

  return {
    contentDraft: firstVariant?.draft ?? initialState.contentDraft,
    headline: firstVariant?.title ?? initialState.headline ?? initialState.topic,
    channelVariants,
    usageSummary: response.usage
      ? {
          modelsUsed: response.usage.model ? [response.usage.model] : [],
          totalTokens: response.usage.totalTokens ?? 0,
          inputTokens: response.usage.inputTokens ?? response.usage.promptTokens ?? 0,
          outputTokens: response.usage.outputTokens ?? response.usage.completionTokens ?? 0,
          estimatedCostUsd: response.usage.estimatedCostUsd ?? 0,
        }
      : initialState.usageSummary,
    phase: 'compliance',
    approvalStatus: 'draft',
    errors: errorMessages,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/schemas.ts
================================================
import type {
  HermesChannel,
  HermesClaim,
  HermesContentResponse,
  HermesPlatform,
  HermesWarning,
} from './types'

const VALID_CHANNELS: HermesChannel[] = [
  'linkedin_es',
  'linkedin_en',
  'blog_es',
  'blog_en',
  'facebook_es',
  'facebook_en',
]

const VALID_PLATFORMS: HermesPlatform[] = ['linkedin', 'blog', 'facebook']
const VALID_LANGUAGES = ['es', 'en'] as const
const FORBIDDEN_FIELDS = ['publicationUrls', 'publishedAt', 'approvalStatus', 'workspaceId', 'jobId']

function isObject(value: unknown): value is Record<string, unknown> {
  return typeof value === 'object' && value !== null && !Array.isArray(value)
}

function assertNoForbiddenFields(value: Record<string, unknown>, path: string) {
  for (const field of FORBIDDEN_FIELDS) {
    if (field in value) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes response contains forbidden field "${path}${field}"`)
    }
  }
}

function normalizeRiskLevel(value: unknown): HermesClaim['riskLevel'] {
  if (value === 'low' || value === 'medium' || value === 'high') {
    return value
  }

  return 'medium'
}

function normalizeWarningSeverity(value: unknown): HermesWarning['severity'] {
  if (value === 'info' || value === 'warning' || value === 'error') {
    return value
  }

  return 'warning'
}

export function validateHermesResponse(
  payload: unknown,
  requestedChannels: HermesChannel[]
): HermesContentResponse {
  if (!isObject(payload)) {
    throw new Error('Hermes response must be an object')
  }

  assertNoForbiddenFields(payload, '')

  if (!Array.isArray(payload.channelVariants)) {
    throw new Error('Hermes response must include channelVariants array')
  }

  const requestedSet = new Set(requestedChannels)
  const seenChannels = new Set<string>()

  const channelVariants = payload.channelVariants.map((variant, index) => {
    if (!isObject(variant)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes variant at index ${index} must be an object`)
    }

    assertNoForbiddenFields(variant, `channelVariants[${index}].`)

    const channel = variant.channel
    const platform = variant.platform
    const language = variant.language
    const draft = typeof variant.draft === 'string' ? variant.draft : variant.content

    if (typeof channel !== 'string' || !VALID_CHANNELS.includes(channel as HermesChannel)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes variant at index ${index} has invalid channel`)
    }
    if (!requestedSet.has(channel as HermesChannel)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes returned unexpected channel "${channel}"`)
    }
    if (seenChannels.has(channel)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes returned duplicated channel "${channel}"`)
    }
    seenChannels.add(channel)

    if (typeof platform !== 'string' || !VALID_PLATFORMS.includes(platform as HermesPlatform)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes variant "${channel}" has invalid platform`)
    }
    if (typeof language !== 'string' || !VALID_LANGUAGES.includes(language as 'es' | 'en')) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes variant "${channel}" has invalid language`)
    }
    if (typeof draft !== 'string' || draft.trim().length === 0) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes variant "${channel}" must include a non-empty draft`)
    }

    return {
      channel: channel as HermesChannel,
      platform: platform as HermesPlatform,
      language: language as 'es' | 'en',
      title: typeof variant.title === 'string' ? variant.title : undefined,
      draft: draft.trim(),
      content: typeof variant.content === 'string' ? variant.content.trim() : draft.trim(),
      hashtags: Array.isArray(variant.hashtags)
        ? variant.hashtags
            .filter((tag): tag is string => typeof tag === 'string')
            .map((tag) => tag.trim())
            .filter((tag) => tag.length > 0)
        : [],
      hook: typeof variant.hook === 'string' ? variant.hook : undefined,
      cta: typeof variant.cta === 'string' ? variant.cta : undefined,
      claims: Array.isArray(variant.claims)
        ? variant.claims
            .filter(isObject)
            .map((claim) => ({
              text: typeof claim.text === 'string' ? claim.text : '',
              riskLevel: normalizeRiskLevel(claim.riskLevel),
              requiresEvidence:
                typeof claim.requiresEvidence === 'boolean' ? claim.requiresEvidence : undefined,
              source: typeof claim.source === 'string' ? claim.source : undefined,
            }))
            .filter((claim) => claim.text.length > 0)
        : [],
      qualityWarnings: Array.isArray(variant.qualityWarnings)
        ? variant.qualityWarnings
            .filter(isObject)
            .map((warning) => ({
              code: typeof warning.code === 'string' ? warning.code : 'quality_warning',
              message: typeof warning.message === 'string' ? warning.message : 'Hermes quality warning',
              severity: normalizeWarningSeverity(warning.severity),
              channel: typeof warning.channel === 'string' ? (warning.channel as HermesChannel) : undefined,
            }))
        : [],
      complianceWarnings: Array.isArray(variant.complianceWarnings)
        ? variant.complianceWarnings
            .filter(isObject)
            .map((warning) => ({
              code: typeof warning.code === 'string' ? warning.code : 'compliance_warning',
              message: typeof warning.message === 'string' ? warning.message : 'Hermes compliance warning',
              severity: normalizeWarningSeverity(warning.severity),
              channel: typeof warning.channel === 'string' ? (warning.channel as HermesChannel) : undefined,
            }))
        : [],
      rationale: typeof variant.rationale === 'string' ? variant.rationale : undefined,
    }
  })

  for (const channel of requestedChannels) {
    if (!seenChannels.has(channel)) {
      throw new Error(`Hermes did not return requested channel "${channel}"`)
    }
  }

  const usage = isObject(payload.usage)
    ? {
        totalTokens: typeof payload.usage.totalTokens === 'number' ? payload.usage.totalTokens : undefined,
        inputTokens: typeof payload.usage.inputTokens === 'number' ? payload.usage.inputTokens : undefined,
        outputTokens: typeof payload.usage.outputTokens === 'number' ? payload.usage.outputTokens : undefined,
        promptTokens: typeof payload.usage.promptTokens === 'number' ? payload.usage.promptTokens : undefined,
        completionTokens:
          typeof payload.usage.completionTokens === 'number' ? payload.usage.completionTokens : undefined,
        estimatedCostUsd:
          typeof payload.usage.estimatedCostUsd === 'number' ? payload.usage.estimatedCostUsd : undefined,
        latencyMs: typeof payload.usage.latencyMs === 'number' ? payload.usage.latencyMs : undefined,
        model: typeof payload.usage.model === 'string' ? payload.usage.model : undefined,
        provider: typeof payload.usage.provider === 'string' ? payload.usage.provider : undefined,
      }
    : undefined

  const normalizeTopWarnings = (value: unknown) =>
    Array.isArray(value)
      ? value
          .filter(isObject)
          .map((warning) => ({
            code: typeof warning.code === 'string' ? warning.code : 'hermes_warning',
            message: typeof warning.message === 'string' ? warning.message : 'Hermes warning',
            severity: normalizeWarningSeverity(warning.severity),
            channel: typeof warning.channel === 'string' ? (warning.channel as HermesChannel) : undefined,
          }))
      : []

  return {
    engine: payload.engine === 'hermes-worker' ? 'hermes-worker' : undefined,
    model: typeof payload.model === 'string' ? payload.model : usage?.model,
    title: typeof payload.title === 'string' ? payload.title : undefined,
    content: typeof payload.content === 'string' ? payload.content : undefined,
    channelVariants,
    usage,
    warnings: normalizeTopWarnings(payload.warnings),
    errors: normalizeTopWarnings(payload.errors),
    rationale: typeof payload.rationale === 'string' ? payload.rationale : undefined,
  }
}

import type {
  ContentGenerationState,
  PublishChannel,
  PublishLanguage,
  PublishPlatform,
} from '@/lib/agents/types'

export type GenerationEngine = 'current' | 'hermes' | 'hermes-mock'

export type HermesChannel = PublishChannel
export type HermesPlatform = PublishPlatform
export type HermesLanguage = PublishLanguage

export type HermesClaim = {
  text: string
  riskLevel: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
  requiresEvidence?: boolean
  source?: string
}

export type HermesWarning = {
  code: string
  message: string
  severity: 'info' | 'warning' | 'error'
  channel?: HermesChannel
}

export type HermesChannelVariant = {
  channel: HermesChannel
  platform: HermesPlatform
  language: HermesLanguage
  title?: string
  draft: string
  content?: string
  hashtags?: string[]
  hook?: string
  cta?: string
  claims?: HermesClaim[]
  qualityWarnings?: HermesWarning[]
  complianceWarnings?: HermesWarning[]
  rationale?: string
}

export type HermesUsage = {
  totalTokens?: number
  promptTokens?: number
  completionTokens?: number
  inputTokens?: number
  outputTokens?: number
  estimatedCostUsd?: number
  latencyMs?: number
  model?: string
  provider?: string
}

export type HermesContentRequest = {
  requestId?: string
  workspaceId?: string
  jobId?: string
  contentType?: 'blog' | 'linkedin' | 'instagram' | 'facebook' | 'newsletter' | 'custom'
  title?: string
  userPrompt?: string
  ragContext?: string
  microZone?: string
  brandProfile?: unknown
  channel?: string
  tone?: string
  constraints?: string[]
  topic: string
  zone?: string
  framing?: string
  targetAudience?: string
  channels: HermesChannel[]
  language?: string
  contentObjective?: string
  signalType?: string
  claimRiskLevel?: string
  sourceUrls?: string
  allowQuantitativeData?: boolean
  allowCtaLink?: boolean
  coreThesis?: string
  investorLens?: string
  desiredReaderOutcome?: string
  ctaMode?: string
  evidenceMode?: string
  assertiveness?: string
  microzone?: string
  exampleOutput?: string
  customGuidelines?: Array<{
    scope: string
    text: string
  }>
  learnedGuidelines?: Array<{
    scope: string
    text: string
  }>
  contextBundle?: {
    strategicProfile?: unknown
    multichannelProfile?: unknown
    channelPrompts?: unknown
  }
}

export type HermesContentResponse = {
  engine?: 'hermes-worker'
  model?: string
  title?: string
  content?: string
  channelVariants: HermesChannelVariant[]
  usage?: HermesUsage
  warnings?: HermesWarning[]
  errors?: HermesWarning[]
  rationale?: string
}

export type HermesMappedState = Pick<
  ContentGenerationState,
  | 'contentDraft'
  | 'headline'
  | 'channelVariants'
  | 'usageSummary'
  | 'phase'
  | 'approvalStatus'
  | 'errors'
>

FILE: src/lib/hermes/__tests__/hermesClient.test.ts

import type { HermesContentRequest } from '../types'
import { afterEach, beforeEach, describe, expect, it, vi } from 'vitest'

import { generateWithHermes } from '../hermesClient'

const baseRequest: HermesContentRequest = {
  workspaceId: 'ws_123',
  jobId: 'job_123',
  topic: 'Mandarin Oriental',
  channels: ['linkedin_es'],
}

describe('generateWithHermes', () => {
  const originalFetch = global.fetch
  const originalEndpoint = process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT
  const originalApiKey = process.env.HERMES_API_KEY

  beforeEach(() => {
    process.env.HERMES_API_KEY = 'test-worker-key'
  })

  afterEach(() => {
    global.fetch = originalFetch
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = originalEndpoint
    process.env.HERMES_API_KEY = originalApiKey
    vi.restoreAllMocks()
  })

  it('tries /generate when HERMES_ENDPOINT is a bare service URL', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com'

    const fetchMock = vi
      .fn()
      .mockResolvedValueOnce(
        new Response('not found', { status: 404 })
      )
      .mockResolvedValueOnce(
        new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            channelVariants: [
              {
                channel: 'linkedin_es',
                platform: 'linkedin',
                language: 'es',
                draft: 'Contenido de prueba',
              },
            ],
            usage: {
              model: 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
              provider: 'openrouter',
            },
          }),
          { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
        )
      )

    global.fetch = fetchMock as typeof fetch

    const result = await generateWithHermes(baseRequest)

    expect(result.channelVariants).toHaveLength(1)
    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(
      1,
      'https://worker.example.com',
      expect.any(Object)
    )
    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(
      2,
      'https://worker.example.com/generate',
      expect.any(Object)
    )
  })

  it('tries /api/generate when /generate returns 404', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'

    const fetchMock = vi
      .fn()
      .mockResolvedValueOnce(
        new Response('not found', { status: 404 })
      )
      .mockResolvedValueOnce(
        new Response(
          JSON.stringify({
            channelVariants: [
              {
                channel: 'linkedin_es',
                platform: 'linkedin',
                language: 'es',
                draft: 'Contenido de prueba',
              },
            ],
          }),
          { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
        )
      )

    global.fetch = fetchMock as typeof fetch

    await generateWithHermes(baseRequest)

    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(
      1,
      'https://worker.example.com/generate',
      expect.any(Object)
    )
    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenNthCalledWith(
      2,
      'https://worker.example.com/api/generate',
      expect.any(Object)
    )
  })

  it('includes the failing endpoint in the thrown error', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'

    global.fetch = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
      new Response('forbidden', { status: 403 })
    ) as typeof fetch

    await expect(generateWithHermes(baseRequest)).rejects.toThrow(
      /https:\/\/worker\.example\.com\/generate/
    )
  })

  it('sends Authorization Bearer with the configured API key', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'

    const fetchMock = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
      new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          engine: 'hermes-worker',
          model: 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
          title: 'Test',
          content: 'Contenido de prueba',
          channelVariants: [
            {
              channel: 'linkedin_es',
              platform: 'linkedin',
              language: 'es',
              content: 'Contenido de prueba',
            },
          ],
        }),
        { status: 200, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' } }
      )
    )

    global.fetch = fetchMock as typeof fetch

    await generateWithHermes(baseRequest)

    expect(fetchMock).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
      'https://worker.example.com/generate',
      expect.objectContaining({
        headers: expect.objectContaining({
          Authorization: 'Bearer test-worker-key',
        }),
      })
    )
  })

  it('rejects invalid Hermes response schemas', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'

    global.fetch = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
      new Response(JSON.stringify({ channelVariants: [] }), {
        status: 200,
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      })
    ) as typeof fetch

    await expect(generateWithHermes(baseRequest)).rejects.toThrow(/schema validation/i)
  })

  it('handles request timeouts as typed Hermes errors', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'

    global.fetch = vi.fn().mockRejectedValue(
      new DOMException('The operation was aborted due to timeout', 'TimeoutError')
    ) as typeof fetch

    await expect(generateWithHermes(baseRequest)).rejects.toMatchObject({
      name: 'HermesClientError',
      code: 'timeout',
    })
  })

  it('redacts API keys from worker error messages', async () => {
    process.env.HERMES_ENDPOINT = 'https://worker.example.com/generate'
    process.env.HERMES_API_KEY = 'test-api-key-redacted'

    global.fetch = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(
      new Response('invalid key test-api-key-redacted', { status: 401 })
    ) as typeof fetch

    await expect(generateWithHermes(baseRequest)).rejects.not.toThrow(/test-api-key-redacted/)
  })
})

import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

import type { ContentGenerationState } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { buildHermesRequest, mapAppChannelsToHermesChannels, mapHermesResponseToGenerationState } from '../mapper'

const baseState: ContentGenerationState = {
  topic: 'Mandarin Oriental abre en Punta Negra',
  zone: 'calvià',
  framing: 'market_analysis',
  targetAudience: 'investors',
  channels: ['linkedin_es', 'blog_es'],
  workspaceId: 'ws_123',
  jobId: 'job_123',
  contentDraft: '',
  researchDoc: '',
  citations: [],
  researchConfidence: 0,
  wordCount: 0,
  toneScore: 0,
  headline: 'Headline',
  channelVariants: [],
  publicationUrls: {},
  usageSummary: {
    modelsUsed: [],
    totalTokens: 0,
    inputTokens: 0,
    outputTokens: 0,
    estimatedCostUsd: 0,
  },
  phase: 'research',
  approvalStatus: 'draft',
  createdAt: new Date().toISOString(),
  errors: [],
}

describe('Hermes mapper', () => {
  it('maps app channels to Hermes channels without changing values', () => {
    expect(mapAppChannelsToHermesChannels(['linkedin_es', 'facebook_en'])).toEqual([
      'linkedin_es',
      'facebook_en',
    ])
  })

  it('builds a sanitized Hermes request from state', () => {
    const request = buildHermesRequest(baseState, [{ scope: 'all', text: 'Guideline' }])

    expect(request).toMatchObject({
      workspaceId: 'ws_123',
      jobId: 'job_123',
      requestId: 'job_123',
      contentType: 'custom',
      userPrompt: baseState.topic,
      topic: baseState.topic,
      channels: ['linkedin_es', 'blog_es'],
      learnedGuidelines: [{ scope: 'all', text: 'Guideline' }],
    })
  })

  it('maps Hermes response into a compatible generation state fragment', () => {
    const mapped = mapHermesResponseToGenerationState(baseState, {
      channelVariants: [
        {
          channel: 'linkedin_es',
          platform: 'linkedin',
          language: 'es',
          title: 'Hermes title',
          draft: 'Texto Hermes',
          hashtags: ['#Mallorca', '#PuntaNegra'],
          qualityWarnings: [{ code: 'tone', message: 'Tone', severity: 'warning' }],
          complianceWarnings: [{ code: 'claim', message: 'Claim', severity: 'info' }],
        },
      ],
      usage: {
        totalTokens: 200,
        inputTokens: 120,
        outputTokens: 80,
        estimatedCostUsd: 0.001,
        model: 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
      },
      errors: [],
    })

    expect(mapped).toMatchObject({
      contentDraft: 'Texto Hermes',
      headline: 'Hermes title',
      phase: 'compliance',
      approvalStatus: 'draft',
      usageSummary: {
        modelsUsed: ['deepseek/deepseek-v3.2'],
        totalTokens: 200,
        inputTokens: 120,
        outputTokens: 80,
      },
    })
    expect(mapped.channelVariants?.[0]).toMatchObject({
      channel: 'linkedin_es',
      status: 'draft',
      hashtags: ['#Mallorca', '#PuntaNegra'],
      qualityWarnings: ['[WARNING] Tone'],
      complianceWarnings: ['[INFO] Claim'],
    })
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/hermes/__tests__/schemas.test.ts

import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

import { validateHermesResponse } from '../schemas'

describe('validateHermesResponse', () => {
  it('accepts a valid Hermes payload for requested channels', () => {
    const result = validateHermesResponse(
      {
        channelVariants: [
          {
            channel: 'linkedin_es',
            platform: 'linkedin',
            language: 'es',
            title: 'Test title',
            draft: 'Contenido válido de prueba',
            hashtags: ['#Mallorca', '#PuntaNegra'],
            claims: [{ text: 'Claim', riskLevel: 'high' }],
            qualityWarnings: [{ code: 'tone', message: 'Review tone', severity: 'warning' }],
            complianceWarnings: [{ code: 'claim', message: 'Check source', severity: 'info' }],
          },
        ],
      },
      ['linkedin_es']
    )

    expect(result.channelVariants).toHaveLength(1)
    expect(result.channelVariants[0]).toMatchObject({
      channel: 'linkedin_es',
      platform: 'linkedin',
      language: 'es',
      draft: 'Contenido válido de prueba',
      hashtags: ['#Mallorca', '#PuntaNegra'],
    })
  })

  it('rejects responses with channels that were not requested', () => {
    expect(() =>
      validateHermesResponse(
        {
          channelVariants: [
            {
              channel: 'blog_en',
              platform: 'blog',
              language: 'en',
              draft: 'Unexpected variant',
            },
          ],
        },
        ['blog_es']
      )
    ).toThrow(/unexpected channel/i)
  })

  it('rejects variants without a non-empty draft', () => {
    expect(() =>
      validateHermesResponse(
        {
          channelVariants: [
            {
              channel: 'blog_es',
              platform: 'blog',
              language: 'es',
              draft: '   ',
            },
          ],
        },
        ['blog_es']
      )
    ).toThrow(/non-empty draft/i)
  })

  it('rejects forbidden operational fields', () => {
    expect(() =>
      validateHermesResponse(
        {
          channelVariants: [
            {
              channel: 'facebook_es',
              platform: 'facebook',
              language: 'es',
              draft: 'Contenido',
              approvalStatus: 'approved',
            },
          ],
        },
        ['facebook_es']
      )
    ).toThrow(/forbidden field/i)
  })

  it('accepts the Hermes Content Worker v0.14 response contract', () => {
    const result = validateHermesResponse(
      {
        engine: 'hermes-worker',
        model: 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
        title: 'Worker title',
        content: 'Worker content',
        channelVariants: [
          {
            channel: 'linkedin_es',
            platform: 'linkedin',
            language: 'es',
            content: 'Worker variant content',
            rationale: 'Channel-specific adaptation',
          },
        ],
        usage: {
          inputTokens: 10,
          outputTokens: 20,
          totalTokens: 30,
        },
      },
      ['linkedin_es']
    )

    expect(result).toMatchObject({
      engine: 'hermes-worker',
      model: 'deepseek/deepseek-v3.2',
      title: 'Worker title',
      content: 'Worker content',
      usage: {
        inputTokens: 10,
        outputTokens: 20,
        totalTokens: 30,
      },
    })
    expect(result.channelVariants[0]).toMatchObject({
      draft: 'Worker variant content',
      content: 'Worker variant content',
    })
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/ai-sdk-provider.ts
================================================
import { generateText } from 'ai';
import { createOpenAI } from '@ai-sdk/openai';
import { LLMProvider } from './copy-curator-agent';

export class AISDKProvider implements LLMProvider {
  constructor(private modelId: string = 'openai/gpt-4o-mini') {}

  async complete(prompt: string): Promise<string> {
    try {
      const openrouter = createOpenAI({
        apiKey: process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY || '',
        baseURL: 'https://openrouter.ai/api/v1',
        headers: {
          'HTTP-Referer': process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL || 'https://anclora.ai',
          'X-Title': 'Anclora Content Generator',
        },
      });

      const result = await generateText({
        model: openrouter(this.modelId),
        prompt: prompt,
        maxOutputTokens: 1500,
        temperature: 0.1,
      });

      return result.text.trim();
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('[Hermes AISDKProvider] Error:', error);
      throw error;
    }
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/context-alignment.ts
================================================
export const CONTEXT_CONSTRAINT_MISMATCH = 'context_constraint_mismatch';

const BUYER_TERMS = [
  /\bcomprador(?:a|as|es)?\b/i,
  /\bclientela\s+compradora\b/i,
  /\bpoder\s+adquisitivo\s+comprador\b/i,
  /\bbuyers?\b/i,
  /\bpurchasers?\b/i,
];

const BUYER_EXCLUSION_PATTERNS = [
  /\bno\s+quiero\s+que[\s\S]{0,90}\bcomprador(?:a|as|es)?\b/i,
  /\bno\s+(?:se\s+)?centr(?:ar|e|arse|ado|ada|ados|adas)[\s\S]{0,60}\bcomprador(?:a|as|es)?\b/i,
  /\bno\s+(?:se\s+)?enfoc(?:ar|e|arse|ado|ada|ados|adas)[\s\S]{0,60}\bcomprador(?:a|as|es)?\b/i,
  /\bno\s+solo\s+comprador(?:a|as|es)?\b/i,
  /\bnot\s+(?:focus|center|centre)[\s\S]{0,60}\bbuyers?\b/i,
  /\bnot\s+only\s+buyers?\b/i,
];

function normalizeForConstraintChecks(value: string) {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase();
}

export function contextDeemphasizesBuyers(context?: string) {
  if (!context?.trim()) return false;
  const normalizedContext = normalizeForConstraintChecks(context);
  return BUYER_EXCLUSION_PATTERNS.some((pattern) => pattern.test(normalizedContext));
}

export function validateContextAlignment(alternativeText: string, context?: string): string[] {
  if (!contextDeemphasizesBuyers(context)) return [];

  const normalizedText = normalizeForConstraintChecks(alternativeText);
  const mentionsBuyers = BUYER_TERMS.some((term) => term.test(normalizedText));

  return mentionsBuyers ? [CONTEXT_CONSTRAINT_MISMATCH] : [];
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/copy-curator-agent.ts
================================================
import {
  CopyCandidate,
  CopyCuratorFinding,
  GeneratedContentCurationInput,
  GeneratedContentCurationResult,
  AncloraAppGroup
} from './types';
import { resolveAncloraAppGroup } from './repo-groups';
import { extractCopyCandidatesFromFile } from './copy-detector';
import { countCharacters, countWords, VISUAL_BUDGET_BY_COPY_TYPE, estimateVisualRisk } from './visual-fit';
import { buildCopyCuratorPrompt, buildGeneratedContentCurationPrompt } from './prompt-builder';
import { parseCopyCuratorOutput, parseGeneratedContentCurationOutput } from './output-parser';
import { validateContextAlignment } from './context-alignment';

type ParsedCopyCuratorOutput = ReturnType<typeof parseCopyCuratorOutput>;

export interface LLMProvider {
  complete(prompt: string): Promise<string>;
}

export class CopyCuratorAgent {
  constructor(private llm: LLMProvider) {}

  async reviewRepo(repoPath: string, files: Array<{ path: string; content: string }>, options: { maxFindings?: number } = {}): Promise<CopyCuratorFinding[]> {
    const repoName = repoPath.split('/').pop() || 'unknown';
    const group = resolveAncloraAppGroup(repoName);
    
    const candidates: CopyCandidate[] = [];
    for (const file of files) {
      candidates.push(...extractCopyCandidatesFromFile(file.path, file.content, repoName));
    }

    // Usar límite dinámico si se proporciona, fallback a 10
    const limit = options.maxFindings ?? 10;
    const limitedCandidates = candidates.slice(0, limit);
    
    const findings: CopyCuratorFinding[] = [];
    for (const candidate of limitedCandidates) {
      findings.push(await this.reviewSingle(candidate, group));
    }

    return findings;
  }

  async reviewSingle(candidate: CopyCandidate, group: AncloraAppGroup = 'premium'): Promise<CopyCuratorFinding> {
    const prompt = buildCopyCuratorPrompt({
      group,
      copyType: candidate.type,
      original: candidate.text,
      locale: candidate.locale,
      repo: candidate.repo,
      context: candidate.context
    });

    const output = await this.llm.complete(prompt);
    let parsed = parseCopyCuratorOutput(output, candidate.text, candidate.type);

    const repairReasons = getCopyCuratorRepairReasons(parsed, candidate);
    if (repairReasons.length > 0) {
      const repairedOutput = await this.llm.complete(buildRepairPrompt(prompt, repairReasons));
      parsed = parseCopyCuratorOutput(repairedOutput, candidate.text, candidate.type);
    }

    return {
      id: candidate.id,
      repo: candidate.repo,
      group,
      filePath: candidate.filePath,
      line: candidate.line,
      copyType: candidate.type,
      locale: candidate.locale,
      impact: candidate.type === 'title' || candidate.type === 'headline' || candidate.type === 'cta' ? 'high' : 'medium',
      original: candidate.text,
      originalLength: {
        characters: countCharacters(candidate.text),
        words: countWords(candidate.text)
      },
      visualContext: {
        probableContainer: 'unknown',
        maxRecommendedExpansionPercent: VISUAL_BUDGET_BY_COPY_TYPE[candidate.type] || 15,
        initialVisualRisk: 'low'
      },
      diagnosis: parsed.diagnosis,
      variations: parsed.variations,
      recommendation: parsed.recommendation,
      implementationNotes: [
        `Revisar longitud visual en ${candidate.locale}`,
        `Validar en componente ${candidate.type}`
      ]
    };
  }

  async curateGeneratedContent(input: GeneratedContentCurationInput): Promise<GeneratedContentCurationResult> {
    const prompt = buildGeneratedContentCurationPrompt(input);
    const output = await this.llm.complete(prompt);
    const parsed = parseGeneratedContentCurationOutput(output);

    return {
      finalContent: parsed.finalContent,
      appliedAdjustments: parsed.appliedAdjustments,
      rationale: parsed.rationale,
      warnings: [],
      editorialRisk: estimateVisualRisk({ 
        copyType: 'other', 
        original: input.generatedContent, 
        variation: parsed.finalContent 
      }),
      claimsRisk: 'low'
    };
  }
}

function normalizeCopy(value: string) {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .replace(/[“”"'.!,;:()]/g, '')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase();
}

function getCopyCuratorRepairReasons(parsed: ParsedCopyCuratorOutput, candidate: CopyCandidate) {
  const variations = [
    parsed.variations.clearHuman.text,
    parsed.variations.premiumSober.text,
    parsed.variations.conversionAction.text,
  ];
  const normalizedOriginal = normalizeCopy(candidate.text);
  const normalizedVariations = variations.map(normalizeCopy);
  const reasons: string[] = [];

  if (normalizedVariations.some((variation) => variation === normalizedOriginal)) {
    reasons.push('alguna variación replica el copy original');
  }

  if (new Set(normalizedVariations).size !== normalizedVariations.length) {
    reasons.push('las variaciones son duplicadas o demasiado similares entre sí');
  }

  if (variations.some((variation) => validateContextAlignment(variation, candidate.context).length > 0)) {
    reasons.push('alguna variación contradice restricciones obligatorias del briefing');
  }

  return reasons;
}

function buildRepairPrompt(originalPrompt: string, reasons: string[]) {
  return `${originalPrompt}

REPARACIÓN OBLIGATORIA:
La respuesta anterior no es válida porque ${reasons.join('; ')}.

Devuelve una nueva respuesta completa usando exactamente el formato Markdown solicitado.
Las 3 variaciones deben ser distintas entre sí, no pueden repetir el copy original y deben cumplir todas las restricciones del briefing.
Si el briefing pide no centrar el mensaje en compradores, evita buyer/buyers/purchasers/compradores como eje del copy.
No expliques la reparación fuera del formato solicitado.`.trim();
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/copy-detector.ts
================================================
import { CopyCandidate, CopyType } from './types';
import { detectLocaleFromPath, detectLocaleFromContent } from './locale-detector';

const MIN_COPY_LENGTH = 12;
const MAX_COPY_LENGTH = 600;

export function isUserFacingCopy(value: string): boolean {
  if (!value) return false;
  
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  
  // Ignorar muy cortos salvo que parezcan CTAs (se maneja en classification)
  if (trimmed.length < MIN_COPY_LENGTH) return false;
  if (trimmed.length > MAX_COPY_LENGTH) return false;
  
  // Ignorar ruidos técnicos
  if (/^[a-z0-9._-]+$/i.test(trimmed)) return false; // IDs, variables
  if (/^<.+>$/.test(trimmed)) return false; // Tags HTML
  if (/^# [0-9a-f]{3,6}$/i.test(trimmed)) return false; // Colores
  if (/^(http|https):\/\//.test(trimmed)) return false; // URLs
  if (/^[a-z0-9._%+-]+@[a-z0-9.-]+\.[a-z]{2,}$/i.test(trimmed)) return false; // Emails
  if (/^\.?[a-z-]+(\.[a-z-]+)*$/.test(trimmed)) return false; // Clases CSS o dot notation
  
  // Debe contener al menos un espacio para ser una frase (heurística simple)
  if (!trimmed.includes(' ')) return false;

  return true;
}

export function classifyCopyType(value: string, context?: string): CopyType {
  const text = value.toLowerCase();
  const ctx = context?.toLowerCase() || '';

  if (ctx.includes('placeholder')) return 'placeholder';
  if (ctx.includes('label') && !ctx.includes('cta') && !ctx.includes('aria')) return 'form-label';
  if (ctx.includes('error')) return 'error-message';

  if (ctx.includes('button') || ctx.includes('cta') || ctx.includes('link') || ctx.includes('aria-label') || text.length < 20) {
    return 'cta';
  }

  if (ctx.includes('h1') || ctx.includes('h2') || ctx.includes('title') || ctx.includes('headline')) {
    return 'headline';
  }
  
  if (ctx.includes('email_subject') || ctx.includes('asunto')) return 'email_subject';
  if (ctx.includes('email_body') || ctx.includes('cuerpo')) return 'email_body';
  
  if (ctx.includes('card_title') || (ctx.includes('card') && text.length < 40)) return 'card_title';
  if (ctx.includes('card_description') || (ctx.includes('card') && text.length >= 40)) return 'card_description';
  
  if (ctx.includes('nav') || ctx.includes('menu')) return 'navbar_item';
  if (ctx.includes('legal') || ctx.includes('terms') || ctx.includes('aviso')) return 'legal';
  
  if (ctx.includes('modal')) return 'modal-copy';
  if (ctx.includes('dashboard')) return 'dashboard-copy';

  if (text.length > 100 || ctx.includes('subtitle')) return 'subtitle';

  return 'other';
}

export function extractCopyCandidatesFromFile(
  filePath: string,
  content: string,
  repo: string
): CopyCandidate[] {
  const candidates: CopyCandidate[] = [];
  const fileName = filePath.split('/').pop() || '';
  const fileLocale = detectLocaleFromPath(filePath);

  if (fileName.endsWith('.json')) {
    try {
      const parsed = JSON.parse(content);
      const extractFromJson = (obj: Record<string, unknown>, path: string = '') => {
        for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(obj)) {
          const currentPath = path ? `${path}.${key}` : key;
          if (typeof value === 'string') {
            if (isUserFacingCopy(value) || (value.length > 3 && (key.includes('cta') || key.includes('title')))) {
              candidates.push({
                id: `${filePath}:${currentPath}`,
                text: value,
                repo,
                filePath,
                type: classifyCopyType(value, key),
                locale: fileLocale || detectLocaleFromContent(value).locale
              });
            }
          } else if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
            extractFromJson(value as Record<string, unknown>, currentPath);
          }
        }
      };
      extractFromJson(parsed);
    } catch {
      // Ignorar errores de parseo
    }
  } else if (fileName.endsWith('.tsx') || fileName.endsWith('.jsx')) {
    // Regex para strings en JSX: >Texto< o prop="Texto"
    const jsxTextRegex = />([^<>{}\n]{4,})</g;
    const propTextRegex = /(?:label|title|placeholder|description|text)="([^"]{4,})"/g;
    
    let match;
    while ((match = jsxTextRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      const text = match[1].trim();
      if (isUserFacingCopy(text)) {
        candidates.push({
          id: `${filePath}:L${content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length}`,
          text,
          repo,
          filePath,
          line: content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length,
          type: classifyCopyType(text, 'jsx-text'),
          locale: fileLocale || detectLocaleFromContent(text).locale
        });
      }
    }
    
    while ((match = propTextRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      const text = match[1].trim();
      if (isUserFacingCopy(text)) {
        candidates.push({
          id: `${filePath}:L${content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length}`,
          text,
          repo,
          filePath,
          line: content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length,
          type: classifyCopyType(text, match[0]),
          locale: fileLocale || detectLocaleFromContent(text).locale
        });
      }
    }
  } else if (fileName.endsWith('.md') || fileName.endsWith('.mdx')) {
    // Regex para párrafos en Markdown
    const mdParagraphRegex = /^(?!#|!|\[|>|- |\* )[^\n]{10,}$/gm;
    let match;
    while ((match = mdParagraphRegex.exec(content)) !== null) {
      const text = match[0].trim();
      if (isUserFacingCopy(text)) {
        candidates.push({
          id: `${filePath}:L${content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length}`,
          text,
          repo,
          filePath,
          line: content.substring(0, match.index).split('\n').length,
          type: classifyCopyType(text, 'markdown'),
          locale: fileLocale || detectLocaleFromContent(text).locale
        });
      }
    }
  }

  return candidates;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/generated-content-localization.ts
================================================
import type { ChannelVariant, ContentGenerationState, PublishLanguage } from '@/lib/agents/types'
import { detectLiteralismRisk } from './literalism-detector'
import type { SupportedLocale } from './locale-style-guide'
import { localizeCopyNaturally } from './localizer'

function toSupportedLocale(language: PublishLanguage): SupportedLocale {
  return language === 'en' ? 'en' : 'es'
}

function isMicrocopy(value?: string) {
  if (!value) return false
  return value.length <= 180
}

async function validateVariant(variant: ChannelVariant): Promise<ChannelVariant> {
  const locale = toSupportedLocale(variant.language)
  const qualityWarnings = [...(variant.qualityWarnings ?? [])]

  const titleResult = isMicrocopy(variant.title)
    ? await localizeCopyNaturally({
        sourceText: variant.title ?? '',
        sourceLocale: locale,
        targetLocale: locale,
        surface: 'title',
        preservePlaceholders: true,
      })
    : undefined

  if (titleResult) {
    for (const warning of titleResult.warnings) {
      qualityWarnings.push(`[${warning.severity.toUpperCase()}] Locale Copy Guardian: ${warning.message}`)
    }
  }

  const literalismFindings = detectLiteralismRisk({
    text: [variant.title, variant.excerpt, variant.draft].filter(Boolean).join('\n'),
    locale,
  })

  for (const finding of literalismFindings) {
    qualityWarnings.push(
      `[${finding.severity.toUpperCase()}] Locale Copy Guardian: ${finding.message}${finding.suggestion ? ` Suggested: ${finding.suggestion}` : ''}`,
    )
  }

  return {
    ...variant,
    title: titleResult?.autoApplySafe ? titleResult.text : variant.title,
    qualityWarnings: Array.from(new Set(qualityWarnings)),
  }
}

export async function validateLocalizedGeneratedContent(
  state: ContentGenerationState,
): Promise<ContentGenerationState> {
  if (!state.channelVariants?.length) return state

  const channelVariants = await Promise.all(state.channelVariants.map(validateVariant))
  return {
    ...state,
    channelVariants,
    contentDraft: channelVariants[0]?.draft ?? state.contentDraft,
    headline: channelVariants[0]?.title ?? state.headline,
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/i18n-key-detector.ts
================================================
import path from 'path'
import ts from 'typescript'
import { normalizeSupportedLocale, type SupportedLocale } from './locale-style-guide'

export interface I18nTextEntry {
  filePath: string
  keyPath: string
  locale?: SupportedLocale
  text: string
  line: number
}

const LOCALE_SEGMENT = '(es|en|de|fr|it|pt|ca|nl|sv|no|da|fi|pl)'
const LOCALE_SEGMENT_RE = new RegExp(`(^|/)${LOCALE_SEGMENT}(/|\\.)`, 'i')
const TOP_LEVEL_LOCALES = new Set(['es', 'en', 'de'])

function lineForOffset(content: string, offset: number) {
  return content.slice(0, offset).split('\n').length
}

export function normalizeI18nResourceKey(filePath: string, keyPath: string, locale?: string) {
  const normalizedLocale = locale ? normalizeSupportedLocale(locale) : undefined
  let normalizedPath = filePath.replaceAll(path.sep, '/')

  if (normalizedLocale) {
    normalizedPath = normalizedPath
      .replace(new RegExp(`/${normalizedLocale}/`, 'i'), '/[locale]/')
      .replace(new RegExp(`/${normalizedLocale}\\.(json|ts|tsx|js|jsx)$`, 'i'), '/[locale].$1')
      .replace(new RegExp(`\\.${normalizedLocale}\\.(json|ts|tsx|js|jsx)$`, 'i'), '.[locale].$1')
  }

  return `${normalizedPath}:${keyPath}`
}

export function detectLocaleFromI18nPath(filePath: string): SupportedLocale | undefined {
  const normalized = filePath.replaceAll(path.sep, '/')
  const match = normalized.match(LOCALE_SEGMENT_RE)
  return match ? normalizeSupportedLocale(match[2]) : undefined
}

function collectJsonEntries(
  value: unknown,
  params: {
    filePath: string
    content: string
    basePath: string[]
    locale?: SupportedLocale
    entries: I18nTextEntry[]
  },
) {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    const keyPath = params.basePath.join('.')
    const index = params.content.indexOf(JSON.stringify(value))
    params.entries.push({
      filePath: params.filePath,
      keyPath,
      locale: params.locale,
      text: value,
      line: index >= 0 ? lineForOffset(params.content, index) : 1,
    })
    return
  }

  if (!value || typeof value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(value)) return

  for (const [key, child] of Object.entries(value)) {
    collectJsonEntries(child, {
      ...params,
      basePath: [...params.basePath, key],
    })
  }
}

export function extractJsonI18nEntries(filePath: string, content: string): I18nTextEntry[] {
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(content) as unknown
    const pathLocale = detectLocaleFromI18nPath(filePath)
    const entries: I18nTextEntry[] = []

    if (!pathLocale && parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' && !Array.isArray(parsed)) {
      for (const [topLevelKey, value] of Object.entries(parsed)) {
        const topLevelLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(topLevelKey)
        if (topLevelLocale && TOP_LEVEL_LOCALES.has(topLevelLocale)) {
          collectJsonEntries(value, {
            filePath,
            content,
            basePath: [],
            locale: topLevelLocale,
            entries,
          })
        }
      }
    }

    if (entries.length > 0) return entries

    collectJsonEntries(parsed, {
      filePath,
      content,
      basePath: [],
      locale: pathLocale,
      entries,
    })

    return entries
  } catch {
    return []
  }
}

function propertyNameToString(name: ts.PropertyName) {
  if (ts.isIdentifier(name) || ts.isStringLiteral(name) || ts.isNumericLiteral(name)) {
    return name.text
  }
  return undefined
}

function collectTsObjectEntries(
  node: ts.Node,
  params: {
    sourceFile: ts.SourceFile
    filePath: string
    basePath: string[]
    locale?: SupportedLocale
    entries: I18nTextEntry[]
  },
) {
  if (!ts.isObjectLiteralExpression(node)) return

  for (const property of node.properties) {
    if (!ts.isPropertyAssignment(property)) continue
    const key = propertyNameToString(property.name)
    if (!key) continue

    const nextPath = [...params.basePath, key]
    const initializer = property.initializer
    if (ts.isStringLiteral(initializer) || ts.isNoSubstitutionTemplateLiteral(initializer)) {
      const { line } = params.sourceFile.getLineAndCharacterOfPosition(initializer.getStart(params.sourceFile))
      params.entries.push({
        filePath: params.filePath,
        keyPath: nextPath.join('.'),
        locale: params.locale,
        text: initializer.text,
        line: line + 1,
      })
    } else if (ts.isObjectLiteralExpression(initializer)) {
      collectTsObjectEntries(initializer, {
        ...params,
        basePath: nextPath,
      })
    }
  }
}

export function extractTypeScriptI18nEntries(filePath: string, content: string): I18nTextEntry[] {
  const sourceFile = ts.createSourceFile(filePath, content, ts.ScriptTarget.Latest, true)
  const entries: I18nTextEntry[] = []
  const pathLocale = detectLocaleFromI18nPath(filePath)

  const visit = (node: ts.Node) => {
    if (ts.isObjectLiteralExpression(node)) {
      if (!pathLocale) {
        for (const property of node.properties) {
          if (!ts.isPropertyAssignment(property)) continue
          const key = propertyNameToString(property.name)
          const locale = key ? normalizeSupportedLocale(key) : undefined
          if (locale && TOP_LEVEL_LOCALES.has(locale) && ts.isObjectLiteralExpression(property.initializer)) {
            collectTsObjectEntries(property.initializer, {
              sourceFile,
              filePath,
              basePath: [],
              locale,
              entries,
            })
          }
        }
      }

      if (pathLocale) {
        collectTsObjectEntries(node, {
          sourceFile,
          filePath,
          basePath: [],
          locale: pathLocale,
          entries,
        })
      }
    }

    ts.forEachChild(node, visit)
  }

  visit(sourceFile)
  return dedupeEntries(entries)
}

function dedupeEntries(entries: I18nTextEntry[]) {
  const seen = new Set<string>()
  return entries.filter((entry) => {
    const key = `${entry.filePath}:${entry.locale}:${entry.keyPath}:${entry.text}:${entry.line}`
    if (seen.has(key)) return false
    seen.add(key)
    return true
  })
}

export function extractI18nTextEntries(filePath: string, content: string): I18nTextEntry[] {
  if (filePath.endsWith('.json')) return extractJsonI18nEntries(filePath, content)
  if (/\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$/.test(filePath)) return extractTypeScriptI18nEntries(filePath, content)
  return []
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/language-tool.ts
================================================
import type { SupportedLocale } from './locale-style-guide'

export interface LanguageToolFinding {
  locale: SupportedLocale
  message: string
  shortMessage?: string
  offset?: number
  length?: number
  replacements?: string[]
  ruleId?: string
}

const languageToolLocales: Record<SupportedLocale, string> = {
  es: 'es',
  ca: 'ca-ES',
  en: 'en-US',
  de: 'de-DE',
  fr: 'fr',
  it: 'it',
  pt: 'pt-PT',
  sv: 'sv',
  da: 'da',
  nl: 'nl',
  no: 'no',
}

export async function runLanguageToolCheck(input: {
  text: string
  locale: SupportedLocale
}): Promise<LanguageToolFinding[]> {
  if (process.env.HERMES_LANGUAGE_QA !== 'enabled' || !process.env.LANGUAGETOOL_URL) {
    return []
  }

  try {
    const body = new URLSearchParams({
      text: input.text,
      language: languageToolLocales[input.locale],
    })

    const response = await fetch(process.env.LANGUAGETOOL_URL, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded',
      },
      body,
    })

    if (!response.ok) return []

    const payload = await response.json() as {
      matches?: Array<{
        message?: string
        shortMessage?: string
        offset?: number
        length?: number
        replacements?: Array<{ value?: string }>
        rule?: { id?: string }
      }>
    }

    return (payload.matches ?? []).map((match) => ({
      locale: input.locale,
      message: match.message ?? 'LanguageTool warning',
      shortMessage: match.shortMessage,
      offset: match.offset,
      length: match.length,
      replacements: match.replacements?.map((replacement) => replacement.value ?? '').filter(Boolean),
      ruleId: match.rule?.id,
    }))
  } catch {
    return []
  }
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/literalism-detector.ts
