import type { SupportedLocale } from './locale-style-guide'

export type LiteralismSeverity = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical'

export interface LiteralismFinding {
  locale: SupportedLocale
  severity: LiteralismSeverity
  pattern: string
  message: string
  suggestion?: string
}

type LiteralismRule = {
  pattern: RegExp
  label: string
  severity: LiteralismSeverity
  message: string
  suggestion?: string
}

const literalismRules: Record<SupportedLocale, LiteralismRule[]> = {
  es: [
    {
      pattern: /damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas/i,
      label: 'Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'La frase suena como calco literal del inglés y no como español comercial natural.',
      suggestion: 'Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta',
    },
    {
      pattern: /si[eé]ntete libre de/i,
      label: 'siéntete libre de',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'Calco literal de "feel free to"; conviene usar una fórmula más natural.',
      suggestion: 'Puedes contactar con nuestro equipo',
    },
    {
      pattern: /no dudes en contactarnos/i,
      label: 'no dudes en contactarnos',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Fórmula correcta pero genérica; puede rebajarse a una expresión más sobria.',
      suggestion: 'Contacta con nuestro equipo',
    },
    {
      pattern: /propiedades [uú]nicas/i,
      label: 'propiedades únicas',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Puede sonar literal o genérico en contexto inmobiliario premium.',
      suggestion: 'propiedades singulares',
    },
    {
      pattern: /explora nuestras propiedades [uú]nicas/i,
      label: 'explora nuestras propiedades únicas',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'La combinación parece traducción directa y reduce naturalidad de marca.',
      suggestion: 'Descubre propiedades singulares',
    },
  ],
  en: [
    {
      pattern: /we welcome your questions/i,
      label: 'We welcome your questions',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Understandable, but stiff for premium UI copy.',
      suggestion: 'Our team is available for any questions',
    },
    {
      pattern: /unique properties/i,
      label: 'unique properties',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Common luxury cliché; use only when context justifies it.',
      suggestion: 'selected properties',
    },
  ],
  de: [
    {
      pattern: /wir begr[üu]ßen ihre fragen/i,
      label: 'Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'Wörtlicher Anglizismus; klingt nicht natürlich im Deutschen.',
      suggestion: 'Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da',
    },
    {
      pattern: /f[üu]hlen sie sich frei/i,
      label: 'fühlen Sie sich frei',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'Wörtliche Übertragung von "feel free"; im Deutschen unpassend.',
      suggestion: 'Gerne können Sie unser Team kontaktieren',
    },
    {
      pattern: /z[öo]gern sie nicht/i,
      label: 'zögern Sie nicht',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Verständlich, aber generisch und oft als Übersetzung erkennbar.',
      suggestion: 'Unser Team steht Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung',
    },
    {
      pattern: /einzigartige eigenschaften/i,
      label: 'Einzigartige Eigenschaften',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'Falscher Immobilienkontext: "properties" wurde als Eigenschaften statt Immobilien übertragen.',
      suggestion: 'ausgewählte Immobilien',
    },
  ],
  ca: [
    {
      pattern: /benvingudes? les teves preguntes/i,
      label: 'Benvingudes les teves preguntes',
      severity: 'high',
      message: 'La frase sona com un calc artificial i no com a català natural en context Mallorca.',
      suggestion: 'Som a la teva disposició per a qualsevol consulta',
    },
    {
      pattern: /sent-te lliure/i,
      label: 'sent-te lliure',
      severity: 'medium',
      message: 'Calc de "feel free"; convé una fórmula més natural.',
      suggestion: 'Pots contactar amb el nostre equip',
    },
  ],
  fr: [],
  it: [],
  pt: [],
  sv: [],
  da: [],
  nl: [],
  no: [],
}

export function detectLiteralismRisk(input: {
  text: string
  locale: SupportedLocale
  sourceText?: string
}): LiteralismFinding[] {
  const findings = literalismRules[input.locale]
    .filter((rule) => rule.pattern.test(input.text))
    .map((rule) => ({
      locale: input.locale,
      severity: rule.severity,
      pattern: rule.label,
      message: rule.message,
      suggestion: rule.suggestion,
    }))

  if (
    input.locale !== 'en' &&
    input.sourceText &&
    /we welcome your questions/i.test(input.sourceText) &&
    /preguntas|fragen|preguntes|questions|domande|perguntas|frågor|spørgsmål|vragen/i.test(input.text) &&
    findings.length === 0
  ) {
    findings.push({
      locale: input.locale,
      severity: 'medium',
      pattern: 'question-formula-calque',
      message: 'La fórmula de contacto puede estar siguiendo demasiado de cerca el inglés original.',
      suggestion:
        input.locale === 'es'
          ? 'Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta'
          : input.locale === 'de'
            ? 'Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da'
            : undefined,
    })
  }

  return findings
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/locale-detector.ts
================================================
export function normalizeLocale(locale: string): string {
  const normalized = locale.toLowerCase().split(/[_-]/)[0];
  return normalized;
}

export function detectLocaleFromPath(filePath: string): string | undefined {
  if (!filePath) return undefined;

  const parts = filePath.split('/');
  
  // Buscar patrones como /es/, /en/, /locales/es.json, etc.
  for (const part of parts) {
    const cleanPart = part.replace(/\.(json|ts|tsx|js|yml|yaml|md|mdx)$/, '');
    
    // Si la parte es exactamente un código de idioma de 2 letras
    if (/^[a-z]{2}$/.test(cleanPart)) {
      return normalizeLocale(cleanPart);
    }
  }

  return undefined;
}

export function detectLocalesFromFiles(files: Array<{ path: string; content?: string }>): string[] {
  const locales = new Set<string>();

  for (const file of files) {
    const fromPath = detectLocaleFromPath(file.path);
    if (fromPath) {
      locales.add(fromPath);
    }

    if (file.content) {
      // Intentar detectar si el contenido es un JSON de i18n con claves de idioma en la raíz
      try {
        if (file.path.endsWith('.json')) {
          const parsed = JSON.parse(file.content);
          for (const key of Object.keys(parsed)) {
            if (/^[a-z]{2}([_-][A-Z]{2})?$/.test(key)) {
              locales.add(normalizeLocale(key));
            }
          }
        }
      } catch {
        // Ignorar errores de parseo
      }
    }
  }

  return Array.from(locales);
}

export function detectLocaleFromContent(value: string): {
  locale: string;
  confidence: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
} {
  // Una implementación muy básica para Fase 1
  // En una fase real usaríamos una librería de detección de lenguaje
  
  const text = value.toLowerCase();
  
  const patterns: Record<string, string[]> = {
    es: ['el', 'la', 'los', 'las', 'un', 'una', 'y', 'con', 'para', 'por', 'que', 'es', 'de'],
    en: ['the', 'a', 'an', 'and', 'with', 'for', 'of', 'to', 'in', 'is', 'that', 'it'],
    de: ['der', 'die', 'das', 'ein', 'eine', 'und', 'mit', 'für', 'von', 'ist', 'dass', 'es'],
  };

  let bestLocale = 'unknown';
  let maxMatches = 0;

  for (const [locale, words] of Object.entries(patterns)) {
    let matches = 0;
    for (const word of words) {
      const regex = new RegExp(`\\b${word}\\b`, 'gi');
      const count = (text.match(regex) || []).length;
      matches += count;
    }
    
    if (matches > maxMatches) {
      maxMatches = matches;
      bestLocale = locale;
    }
  }

  return {
    locale: bestLocale,
    confidence: maxMatches > 3 ? 'high' : maxMatches > 0 ? 'medium' : 'low',
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/locale-style-guide.ts
================================================
export type SupportedLocale =
  | 'es'
  | 'ca'
  | 'en'
  | 'de'
  | 'fr'
  | 'it'
  | 'pt'
  | 'sv'
  | 'da'
  | 'nl'
  | 'no'

export interface LocaleStyleGuide {
  locale: SupportedLocale
  register: string
  avoid: string[]
  prefer: string[]
  notes: string[]
}

export const supportedLocales: SupportedLocale[] = [
  'es',
  'ca',
  'en',
  'de',
  'fr',
  'it',
  'pt',
  'sv',
  'da',
  'nl',
  'no',
]

export function isSupportedLocale(locale: string): locale is SupportedLocale {
  return supportedLocales.includes(locale.toLowerCase() as SupportedLocale)
}

export function normalizeSupportedLocale(locale: string): SupportedLocale | undefined {
  const normalized = locale.toLowerCase().split(/[_-]/)[0]
  return isSupportedLocale(normalized) ? normalized : undefined
}

export const localeStyleGuides: Record<SupportedLocale, LocaleStyleGuide> = {
  es: {
    locale: 'es',
    register: 'natural-premium',
    avoid: [
      'Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas',
      'propiedades únicas',
      'siéntete libre de',
      'no dudes en contactarnos',
      'explora nuestras propiedades únicas',
    ],
    prefer: [
      'Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta',
      'propiedades singulares',
      'una cuidada selección de propiedades',
      'Contacta con nuestro equipo',
      'estaremos encantados de atenderte',
    ],
    notes: [
      'Evitar calcos del inglés.',
      'Usar un español natural, sobrio y premium.',
      'Evitar fórmulas excesivamente promocionales.',
    ],
  },
  ca: {
    locale: 'ca',
    register: 'mallorca-premium',
    avoid: [
      'Benvingudes les teves preguntes',
      'propietats úniques',
      'sent-te lliure de',
    ],
    prefer: [
      'Som a la teva disposició per a qualsevol consulta',
      'propietats singulars',
      'una selecció acurada de propietats',
    ],
    notes: [
      'Ha de sonar natural en context Mallorca.',
      'Evitar calcs del castellà quan siguin artificials.',
      'Mantenir un registre sobri i premium.',
    ],
  },
  en: {
    locale: 'en',
    register: 'international-premium',
    avoid: [
      'unique properties',
      'We welcome your questions',
    ],
    prefer: [
      'selected properties',
      'distinctive properties',
      'curated selection',
      'Our team is available for any questions',
    ],
    notes: [
      'Keep concise and credible.',
      'Avoid generic luxury clichés.',
    ],
  },
  de: {
    locale: 'de',
    register: 'formal-premium',
    avoid: [
      'Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen',
      'einzigartige Eigenschaften',
      'fühlen Sie sich frei',
      'zögern Sie nicht',
    ],
    prefer: [
      'Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da',
      'ausgewählte Immobilien',
      'besondere Immobilien',
      'Unser Team steht Ihnen gerne zur Verfügung',
    ],
    notes: [
      'Use formal Sie register by default.',
      'Avoid literal English calques.',
      'Prefer precise premium real-estate German.',
    ],
  },
  fr: {
    locale: 'fr',
    register: 'premium-sobre',
    avoid: ['propriétés uniques', "n'hésitez pas", 'nous accueillons vos questions'],
    prefer: ['biens sélectionnés', 'propriétés singulières', 'Notre équipe reste à votre disposition'],
    notes: [
      'Use natural French, not literal English structure.',
      'Keep a sober premium tone.',
      'Avoid generic luxury overstatement.',
    ],
  },
  it: {
    locale: 'it',
    register: 'premium-sobrio',
    avoid: ['proprietà uniche', 'sentiti libero', 'accogliamo le tue domande'],
    prefer: ['immobili selezionati', 'proprietà distintive', 'Il nostro team è a disposizione'],
    notes: [
      'Use natural Italian with restrained premium tone.',
      'Avoid literal English formulas.',
      'Preserve claims and place names exactly.',
    ],
  },
  pt: {
    locale: 'pt',
    register: 'premium-sobrio',
    avoid: ['propriedades únicas', 'sinta-se livre', 'acolhemos as suas perguntas'],
    prefer: ['propriedades selecionadas', 'imóveis distintivos', 'A nossa equipa está à disposição'],
    notes: [
      'Use European Portuguese by default unless an app states otherwise.',
      'Avoid literal English or Spanish calques.',
      'Keep the copy sober and credible.',
    ],
  },
  sv: {
    locale: 'sv',
    register: 'premium-återhållsam',
    avoid: ['unika egenskaper', 'känn dig fri', 'vi välkomnar dina frågor'],
    prefer: ['utvalda fastigheter', 'särpräglade bostäder', 'Vårt team hjälper gärna till'],
    notes: [
      'Use concise, natural Swedish.',
      'Avoid literal luxury clichés.',
      'Keep the tone calm and premium.',
    ],
  },
  da: {
    locale: 'da',
    register: 'premium-rolig',
    avoid: ['unikke egenskaber', 'føl dig fri', 'vi byder dine spørgsmål velkommen'],
    prefer: ['udvalgte ejendomme', 'særlige boliger', 'Vores team står til rådighed'],
    notes: [
      'Use natural Danish with a sober premium register.',
      'Avoid word-for-word English phrasing.',
      'Keep UI copy concise.',
    ],
  },
  nl: {
    locale: 'nl',
    register: 'premium-ingetogen',
    avoid: ['unieke eigenschappen', 'voel je vrij', 'wij verwelkomen uw vragen'],
    prefer: ['geselecteerde woningen', 'onderscheidende eigendommen', 'Ons team staat voor u klaar'],
    notes: [
      'Use natural Dutch, not literal English.',
      'Keep a restrained premium tone.',
      'Avoid over-promising or generic luxury claims.',
    ],
  },
  no: {
    locale: 'no',
    register: 'premium-nøktern',
    avoid: ['unike egenskaper', 'føl deg fri', 'vi ønsker spørsmålene dine velkommen'],
    prefer: ['utvalgte eiendommer', 'særpregede boliger', 'Teamet vårt hjelper gjerne'],
    notes: [
      'Use generic Norwegian unless nb/nn is explicitly required.',
      'Avoid literal English formulas.',
      'Keep copy sober, clear and premium.',
    ],
  },
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/localizer.ts
================================================
import { AISDKProvider } from './ai-sdk-provider'
import { detectLiteralismRisk, type LiteralismSeverity } from './literalism-detector'
import {
  localeStyleGuides,
  normalizeSupportedLocale,
  type SupportedLocale,
} from './locale-style-guide'
import { runLanguageToolCheck } from './language-tool'

type WarningSeverity = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical'

export interface LocalizeCopyInput {
  sourceText: string
  selectedText?: string
  sourceLocale: SupportedLocale
  targetLocale: SupportedLocale
  surface?: string
  tone?: string
  appGroup?: 'ultra-premium' | 'premium' | 'internal' | 'portfolio'
  maxLength?: number
  glossary?: Record<string, string>
  preservePlaceholders?: boolean
}

export interface LocalizeCopyResult {
  locale: SupportedLocale
  text: string
  warnings: Array<{
    severity: WarningSeverity
    code: string
    message: string
    suggestion?: string
  }>
  naturalnessRisk: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
  autoApplySafe: boolean
}

const claimEscalationPatterns = [
  /exclusive off-market access/i,
  /acceso exclusivo off-market/i,
  /exklusiven off-market-zugang/i,
]

const canonicalSourcePattern =
  /explore our unique properties in andratx,\s*calvià,\s*son vida,?\s*and portals\.?\s*we welcome your questions!?/i

function stripWrappingQuotes(value: string) {
  return value.trim().replace(/^["'“”]+|["'“”]+$/g, '')
}

function extractPlaceholders(value: string) {
  return value.match(/\{[^{}]+\}|%\w+%|\$\{[^}]+\}/g) ?? []
}

function preservePlaceholders(source: string, target: string) {
  let next = target
  for (const placeholder of extractPlaceholders(source)) {
    if (!next.includes(placeholder)) {
      next = `${next} ${placeholder}`.trim()
    }
  }
  return next
}

function findMissingPlaceholders(source: string, target: string) {
  return extractPlaceholders(source).filter((placeholder) => !target.includes(placeholder))
}

function applyGlossary(text: string, glossary?: Record<string, string>) {
  if (!glossary) return text

  return Object.entries(glossary).reduce((current, [source, target]) => {
    if (!source || !target) return current
    return current.replace(new RegExp(source.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&'), 'g'), target)
  }, text)
}

function canonicalLocalization(input: LocalizeCopyInput) {
  const text = input.selectedText || input.sourceText
  if (!canonicalSourcePattern.test(text) && !canonicalSourcePattern.test(input.sourceText)) {
    return undefined
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'es') {
    return 'Descubre propiedades singulares en Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida y Portals. Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta.'
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'de') {
    return 'Entdecken Sie ausgewählte Immobilien in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida und Portals. Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da.'
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'ca') {
    return 'Descobreix propietats singulars a Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida i Portals. Som a la teva disposició per a qualsevol consulta.'
  }

  return 'Explore selected properties in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida, and Portals. Our team is available for any questions.'
}

function heuristicLocalization(input: LocalizeCopyInput) {
  const base = input.selectedText || input.sourceText
  const canonical = canonicalLocalization(input)
  if (canonical) return canonical

  if (input.targetLocale === input.sourceLocale) return base

  if (/hello\s+\{name\},?\s+your report is ready\.?/i.test(base)) {
    if (input.targetLocale === 'es') return 'Hola {name}, tu informe está listo.'
    if (input.targetLocale === 'de') return 'Hallo {name}, Ihr Bericht ist fertig.'
  }

  let localized = base

  if (input.targetLocale === 'es') {
    localized = localized
      .replace(/we welcome your questions/gi, 'Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta')
      .replace(/unique properties/gi, 'propiedades singulares')
      .replace(/explore our/gi, 'Descubre')
      .replace(/, and /gi, ' y ')
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'de') {
    localized = localized
      .replace(/we welcome your questions/gi, 'Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da')
      .replace(/unique properties/gi, 'ausgewählte Immobilien')
      .replace(/explore our/gi, 'Entdecken Sie')
      .replace(/, and /gi, ' und ')
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'ca') {
    localized = localized
      .replace(/we welcome your questions/gi, 'Som a la teva disposició per a qualsevol consulta')
      .replace(/unique properties/gi, 'propietats singulars')
      .replace(/explore our/gi, 'Descobreix')
      .replace(/, and /gi, ' i ')
  }

  if (input.targetLocale === 'en') {
    localized = localized
      .replace(/damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas/gi, 'Our team is available for any questions')
      .replace(/propiedades únicas/gi, 'selected properties')
      .replace(/wir begrüßen ihre fragen/gi, 'Our team is available for any questions')
      .replace(/einzigartige eigenschaften/gi, 'selected properties')
  }

  return localized
}

function mapLiteralismSeverity(severity: LiteralismSeverity): WarningSeverity {
  return severity
}

function calculateNaturalnessRisk(warnings: LocalizeCopyResult['warnings']) {
  if (warnings.some((warning) => warning.severity === 'critical' || warning.severity === 'high')) {
    return 'high'
  }

  if (warnings.some((warning) => warning.severity === 'medium')) {
    return 'medium'
  }

  return 'low'
}

async function tryLlmLocalization(input: LocalizeCopyInput) {
  if (!process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY) return undefined

  const guide = localeStyleGuides[input.targetLocale]
  const llm = new AISDKProvider()
  const prompt = [
    'Localize Anclora Group copy editorially. Do not translate word by word.',
    'Preserve intent, facts, names, places, formatting, placeholders and claims.',
    'Do not add commercial promises, guarantees, urgency, exclusivity, private/off-market access or new data.',
    input.maxLength ? `Keep within ${input.maxLength} characters if possible.` : '',
    `Target locale: ${input.targetLocale}`,
    `Register: ${guide.register}`,
    `Avoid: ${guide.avoid.join('; ')}`,
    `Prefer: ${guide.prefer.join('; ')}`,
    input.surface ? `Surface: ${input.surface}` : '',
    input.tone ? `Tone: ${input.tone}` : '',
    '',
    `Source locale: ${input.sourceLocale}`,
    'Source copy:',
    input.sourceText,
    '',
    'Selected copy to localize:',
    input.selectedText || input.sourceText,
    '',
    'Return only the localized copy.',
  ].filter(Boolean).join('\n')

  try {
    return stripWrappingQuotes(await llm.complete(prompt))
  } catch {
    return undefined
  }
}

export async function localizeCopyNaturally(input: LocalizeCopyInput): Promise<LocalizeCopyResult> {
  const warnings: LocalizeCopyResult['warnings'] = []
  const source = input.selectedText || input.sourceText
  const llmText = await tryLlmLocalization(input)
  let text = applyGlossary(llmText || heuristicLocalization(input), input.glossary)

  if (input.preservePlaceholders !== false) {
    const missingBeforeRepair = findMissingPlaceholders(source, text)
    text = preservePlaceholders(source, text)
    for (const placeholder of missingBeforeRepair) {
      warnings.push({
        severity: 'critical',
        code: 'placeholder_repaired',
        message: `La localización omitía el placeholder ${placeholder}; se ha restaurado automáticamente.`,
      })
    }
  }

  const targetLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(input.targetLocale) ?? input.targetLocale
  const literalismFindings = detectLiteralismRisk({
    text,
    locale: targetLocale,
    sourceText: input.sourceText,
  })

  for (const finding of literalismFindings) {
    warnings.push({
      severity: mapLiteralismSeverity(finding.severity),
      code: 'literalism_risk',
      message: finding.message,
      suggestion: finding.suggestion,
    })
  }

  for (const pattern of claimEscalationPatterns) {
    if (pattern.test(text) && !pattern.test(input.sourceText) && !pattern.test(source)) {
      warnings.push({
        severity: 'critical',
        code: 'claim_added',
        message: 'La localización introduce un claim comercial no presente en el texto original.',
      })
    }
  }

  if (input.maxLength && text.length > input.maxLength) {
    warnings.push({
      severity: 'medium',
      code: 'max_length_exceeded',
      message: `La localización supera el límite visual orientativo de ${input.maxLength} caracteres.`,
    })
  }

  const languageFindings = await runLanguageToolCheck({ text, locale: input.targetLocale })
  for (const finding of languageFindings) {
    warnings.push({
      severity: 'low',
      code: 'language_tool',
      message: finding.shortMessage || finding.message,
      suggestion: finding.replacements?.[0],
    })
  }

  const naturalnessRisk = calculateNaturalnessRisk(warnings)

  return {
    locale: input.targetLocale,
    text,
    warnings,
    naturalnessRisk,
    autoApplySafe: !warnings.some((warning) => warning.severity === 'high' || warning.severity === 'critical'),
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/multilingual-grouper.ts
================================================
import { CopyCuratorFinding, MultilingualCopyGroup } from './types';

export function groupFindingsBySemanticKey(findings: CopyCuratorFinding[]): MultilingualCopyGroup[] {
  const groupsMap = new Map<string, CopyCuratorFinding[]>();

  for (const finding of findings) {
    // Usar la ruta del archivo sin el locale como clave base, 
    // o intentar extraer una clave de i18n del ID
    let key = finding.filePath.replace(/\/(es|en|de|fr|it|pt|ca|nl|sv|no|da|fi|pl)\//, '/[locale]/');
    key = key.replace(/(es|en|de|fr|it|pt|ca|nl|sv|no|da|fi|pl)\.(json|ts|tsx)$/, '[locale].$2');
    
    // Si el ID contiene un path de objeto (ej: es.json:common.welcome)
    const idParts = finding.id.split(':');
    if (idParts.length > 1 && !idParts[1].startsWith('L')) {
      key += `:${idParts[1]}`;
    } else {
      // Si no hay clave semántica, usar el texto original normalizado como clave (heurística fallback)
      key += `:${finding.original.substring(0, 30).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]/g, '_')}`;
    }

    if (!groupsMap.has(key)) {
      groupsMap.set(key, []);
    }
    groupsMap.get(key)!.push(finding);
  }

  const groups: MultilingualCopyGroup[] = [];
  for (const [key, groupFindings] of groupsMap.entries()) {
    const locales = groupFindings.map(f => f.locale);
    
    groups.push({
      keyOrContext: key,
      locales,
      findings: groupFindings,
      semanticConsistency: 'unknown', // Requiere análisis posterior
      missingLocales: [],
      notes: []
    });
  }

  return groups;
}

export function detectMissingLocales(groups: MultilingualCopyGroup[], allLocales: string[]): void {
  for (const group of groups) {
    group.missingLocales = allLocales.filter(l => !group.locales.includes(l));
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/output-parser.ts
================================================
import { CopyVariation, CopyType } from './types';
import { calculateLengthDifferencePercent, estimateVisualRisk, countCharacters, countWords } from './visual-fit';

const VARIATION_SECTION_PATTERNS = {
  clearHuman: [
    /variaci[oó]n\s*a[\s\S]{0,80}clara/i,
    /variation\s*a[\s\S]{0,80}(?:clear|human)/i,
    /^a[\s\S]{0,80}(?:clear|human|clara)/i,
  ],
  premiumSober: [
    /variaci[oó]n\s*b[\s\S]{0,80}premium/i,
    /variation\s*b[\s\S]{0,80}premium/i,
    /^b[\s\S]{0,80}premium/i,
  ],
  conversionAction: [
    /variaci[oó]n\s*c[\s\S]{0,80}(?:conversi[oó]n|acci[oó]n)/i,
    /variation\s*c[\s\S]{0,80}(?:conversion|action)/i,
    /^c[\s\S]{0,80}(?:conversion|action|conversi[oó]n)/i,
  ],
};

function normalizeHeading(value: string) {
  return value
    .replace(/^#+\s*/, '')
    .replace(/[—–-]/g, ' ')
    .trim();
}

function extractVariationText(output: string, sectionPatterns: RegExp[]) {
  const sections = output.split(/\n(?=###\s+)/);
  const section = sections.find((block) => {
    const firstLine = normalizeHeading(block.split('\n')[0] || '');
    return sectionPatterns.some((pattern) => pattern.test(firstLine));
  });

  if (!section) return '';

  const quotedBlock = section.match(/>\s*([\s\S]*?)(?=\n(?:Motivo|Reason|Rationale)\s*:|\n###\s+|$)/i);
  const rawText = quotedBlock?.[1] || section.match(/\n(?!Motivo|Reason|Rationale)([\s\S]*?)(?=\n(?:Motivo|Reason|Rationale)\s*:|\n###\s+|$)/i)?.[1] || '';

  return rawText
    .split('\n')
    .map((line) => line.replace(/^>\s?/, '').trim())
    .filter(Boolean)
    .join(' ')
    .trim()
    .replace(/^["“”]+|["“”]+$/g, '');
}

export function parseCopyCuratorOutput(
  output: string,
  original: string,
  copyType: CopyType
): {
  diagnosis: { mainIssue: string; opportunity: string; editorialRisk: string; visualRisk: string };
  variations: { clearHuman: CopyVariation; premiumSober: CopyVariation; conversionAction: CopyVariation };
  recommendation: { selected: 'clearHuman' | 'premiumSober' | 'conversionAction'; reason: string };
} {
  const diagnosisMatch = output.match(/### Diagnóstico breve\n- Problema: (.*)\n- Oportunidad: (.*)/);
  
  const extractVariation = (patterns: RegExp[]): CopyVariation => {
    const parsedText = extractVariationText(output, patterns);
    const text = parsedText || original;
    
    return {
      text,
      characters: countCharacters(text),
      words: countWords(text),
      differencePercent: calculateLengthDifferencePercent(original, text),
      visualRisk: estimateVisualRisk({ copyType, original, variation: text })
    };
  };

  const recMatch = output.match(/### Recomendación\nElegiría: (.*)\nRazón: (.*)/);
  let selected: 'clearHuman' | 'premiumSober' | 'conversionAction' = 'clearHuman';
  const selectedStr = recMatch ? recMatch[1].trim().toLowerCase() : 'a';
  if (selectedStr.includes('b')) selected = 'premiumSober';
  if (selectedStr.includes('c')) selected = 'conversionAction';

  return {
    diagnosis: {
      mainIssue: diagnosisMatch ? diagnosisMatch[1].trim() : 'N/A',
      opportunity: diagnosisMatch ? diagnosisMatch[2].trim() : 'N/A',
      editorialRisk: 'medium', // Fallback value
      visualRisk: estimateVisualRisk({ copyType, original, variation: original }) // Risk of current copy
    },
    variations: {
      clearHuman: extractVariation(VARIATION_SECTION_PATTERNS.clearHuman),
      premiumSober: extractVariation(VARIATION_SECTION_PATTERNS.premiumSober),
      conversionAction: extractVariation(VARIATION_SECTION_PATTERNS.conversionAction)
    },
    recommendation: {
      selected,
      reason: recMatch ? recMatch[2].trim() : 'N/A'
    }
  };
}

export function parseGeneratedContentCurationOutput(output: string): {
  finalContent: string;
  appliedAdjustments: string[];
  rationale: string;
} {
  const contentMatch = output.match(/### Contenido final recomendado\n> ([\s\S]*?)\n\n### Ajustes aplicados/);
  const adjustmentsMatch = output.match(/### Ajustes aplicados\n([\s\S]*?)\n\n### Motivo/);
  const rationaleMatch = output.match(/### Motivo de la curación\n([\s\S]*)/);

  const adjustments = adjustmentsMatch 
    ? adjustmentsMatch[1].trim().split('\n').map(line => line.replace(/^-\s*/, '').trim())
    : [];

  return {
    finalContent: contentMatch ? contentMatch[1].trim() : '',
    appliedAdjustments: adjustments,
    rationale: rationaleMatch ? rationaleMatch[1].trim() : ''
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/prompt-builder.ts
================================================
import { contextDeemphasizesBuyers } from './context-alignment';
import { AncloraAppGroup, CopyType, GeneratedContentCurationInput } from './types';

const TARGET_LANGUAGE_NAMES: Record<string, string> = {
  es: 'Spanish',
  en: 'English',
  de: 'German',
  fr: 'French',
  ca: 'Catalan',
};

function getTargetLanguageName(locale: string) {
  return TARGET_LANGUAGE_NAMES[locale.toLowerCase()] || locale;
}

export function buildCopyCuratorPrompt(params: {
  group: AncloraAppGroup;
  copyType: CopyType;
  original: string;
  locale: string;
  repo: string;
  context?: string;
}): string {
  const { group, copyType, original, locale, context } = params;
  const targetLanguage = getTargetLanguageName(locale);
  const buyerDeemphasisInstruction = contextDeemphasizesBuyers(context)
    ? `
RESTRICCIÓN DERIVADA DEL BRIEFING:
- El briefing pide no centrar el copy en compradores.
- No uses "buyers", "qualified buyers", "purchasers", "compradores" ni equivalentes como eje principal.
- Sustituye ese enfoque por un ángulo amplio: owners, sellers, investors, partners, qualified profiles, private mandates o discreet real estate opportunities, según encaje.
`
    : '';

  let brandInstructions = '';
  switch (group) {
    case 'ultra-premium':
      brandInstructions = 'Tono: Ultra Premium. Sobrio, elegante, humano, confianza máxima, sin exageraciones.';
      break;
    case 'premium':
      brandInstructions = 'Tono: Premium. Profesional, directo, accionable, estratégico, claro.';
      break;
    case 'internal':
      brandInstructions = 'Tono: Internal. Operativo, útil, preciso, sin marketing innecesario.';
      break;
    case 'portfolio':
      brandInstructions = 'Tono: Portfolio. Atractivo, visual, fácil de entender, humano.';
      break;
    default:
      brandInstructions = 'Tono: Profesional y neutro.';
  }

  return `
Actúa como Hermes Copy Curator Agent.
${brandInstructions}

Tu tarea es revisar el siguiente copy de una aplicación y proponer 3 variaciones mejoradas en el idioma de destino: ${targetLanguage} (${locale}).

REGLA CRÍTICA DE IDIOMA:
- Todas las variaciones A, B y C deben estar escritas en ${targetLanguage}.
- Si el copy original está en otro idioma, tradúcelo y adáptalo al ${targetLanguage}; no conserves el idioma original.
- No mezcles idiomas en las variaciones.
- Mantén nombres propios, marcas, ubicaciones y zonas como Mallorca, Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida o Portals sin traducir.
- El diagnóstico y los motivos pueden mantenerse en español, pero el texto entre comillas de cada variación debe estar en ${targetLanguage}.

REGLA CRÍTICA DE VARIACIÓN:
- No devuelvas el copy original como alternativa.
- Las 3 variaciones deben ser semánticamente distintas entre sí.
- Cada variación debe representar su estrategia: A claridad humana, B premium sobria, C conversión/acción.
- Conserva la intención, pero cambia formulación, enfoque y estructura.
${buyerDeemphasisInstruction}

Copy original: "${original}"
Tipo de copy: ${copyType}
${context?.trim() ? `
Restricciones obligatorias del briefing:
"""
${context.trim()}
"""

Estas restricciones son vinculantes, no contexto opcional:
- Respeta restricciones negativas como "no centrar en", "evitar" o "no solo".
- Respeta las audiencias indicadas y conserva su amplitud cuando el briefing sea multi-audiencia.
- Evita cualquier alternativa que contradiga el briefing.
- Si el briefing pide amplitud de audiencia, prefiere un enfoque neutral e inclusivo.
- No inventes claims, públicos, promesas ni beneficios no aportados por el copy original o el briefing.
` : ''}

Reglas:
1. Variación A (Clara y humana): Máxima comprensión, lenguaje natural, baja fricción.
2. Variación B (Premium y sobria): Percepción de valor, confianza, elegancia refinada.
3. Variación C (Conversión / acción): Orientada a resultado, persuasiva pero no agresiva.

RESTRICCIÓN DE ESPACIO VISUAL:
- Las variaciones deben tener una longitud similar al original para no romper el layout.
- Máximo de expansión permitido para ${copyType}: ${getMaxExpansionPercent(copyType)}%.

Formato de respuesta (Markdown):
Usa exactamente estos encabezados en español. No traduzcas los encabezados ni las etiquetas "Motivo", "Elegiría" y "Razón"; solo traduce/adapta el texto de cada variación.

### Diagnóstico breve
- Problema: 
- Oportunidad: 

### Variación A — Clara y humana
> [Texto A]
Motivo: [Breve explicación]

### Variación B — Premium y sobria
> [Texto B]
Motivo: [Breve explicación]

### Variación C — Conversión / acción
> [Texto C]
Motivo: [Breve explicación]

### Recomendación
Elegiría: [A|B|C]
Razón: [Explicación práctica]
`.trim();
}

function getMaxExpansionPercent(type: CopyType): number {
  const budgets: Record<string, number> = {
    cta: 10,
    headline: 15,
    subtitle: 20,
    'form-label': 10,
    placeholder: 10,
    'error-message': 10,
    'empty-state': 15,
    'dashboard-copy': 15,
    'modal-copy': 15,
    'legal-copy': 20,
    other: 15,
  };
  return budgets[type] || 15;
}

export function buildGeneratedContentCurationPrompt(input: GeneratedContentCurationInput): string {
  return `
Actúa como Hermes Copy Curator Agent (Final Curator Mode).
Tu tarea es revisar y optimizar el contenido generado por un pipeline de IA para asegurar que cumple con los estándares de calidad de Anclora Group.

Contenido generado:
"""
${input.generatedContent}
"""

Contexto original:
- Objetivo: ${input.originalInput.contentObjective || 'N/A'}
- Audiencia: ${input.originalInput.targetAudience || 'N/A'}
- Canal: ${input.originalInput.channel || 'N/A'}
- Tono solicitado: ${input.originalInput.tone || 'N/A'}

Reglas de curación:
1. Devuelve una ÚNICA versión final optimizada.
2. No cambies la intención, el idioma ni los datos aportados.
3. Mejora la claridad, naturalidad y elegancia.
4. Reduce tecnicismos innecesarios.
5. Asegura coherencia con el posicionamiento de marca.

Formato de respuesta (Markdown):
### Contenido final recomendado
> [Versión final optimizada]

### Ajustes aplicados
- [Ajuste 1]
- [Ajuste 2]

### Motivo de la curación
[Explicación breve]
`.trim();
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/repo-groups.ts
================================================
import { AncloraAppGroup } from './types';

export const ANCLORA_REPO_GROUPS: Record<string, AncloraAppGroup> = {
  'anclora-private-estates': 'ultra-premium',
  'anclora-private-estates-landing': 'ultra-premium',

  'anclora-synergi': 'premium',
  'anclora-data-lab': 'premium',
  'anclora-impulso': 'premium',
  'anclora-talent': 'premium',
  'anclora-command-center': 'premium',

  'anclora-nexus': 'internal',
  'anclora-advisor-ai': 'internal',
  'anclora-content-generator-ai': 'internal',
  'anclora-group': 'internal',

  'anclora-portfolio': 'portfolio',
  'anclora-porflolio': 'portfolio',
  'anclora-azure-bay-landing': 'portfolio',
  'anclora-playa-viva-uniestate': 'portfolio',
};

export function resolveAncloraAppGroup(repoName: string): AncloraAppGroup {
  if (!repoName) return 'unknown';

  // Limpiar el nombre del repo (manejar owner/repo y extensiones)
  const cleanName = repoName
    .split('/')
    .pop()!
    .replace(/\.git$/, '')
    .toLowerCase();

  return ANCLORA_REPO_GROUPS[cleanName] || 'unknown';
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/report-renderer.ts
================================================
import { CopyCuratorFinding, MultilingualCopyGroup } from './types';

export function renderMarkdownReport(findings: CopyCuratorFinding[], groups?: MultilingualCopyGroup[]): string {
  let report = '# Hermes Copy Curator Report\n\n';

  if (groups && groups.length > 0) {
    report += '# Multilingual Groups\n\n';
    for (const group of groups) {
      report += `## Group: ${group.keyOrContext}\n`;
      report += `- Locales: ${group.locales.join(', ')}\n`;
      report += `- Consistency: ${group.semanticConsistency}\n`;
      if (group.missingLocales.length > 0) {
        report += `- Missing Locales: ${group.missingLocales.join(', ')}\n`;
      }
      report += '\n';
      
      for (const finding of group.findings) {
        report += renderFinding(finding, 3);
      }
    }
  }

  report += '# Individual Findings\n\n';
  for (const finding of findings) {
    // Only render if not part of a group already rendered above
    if (!groups?.some(g => g.findings.some(f => f.id === finding.id))) {
      report += renderFinding(finding, 2);
    }
  }

  return report;
}

function renderFinding(finding: CopyCuratorFinding, level: number): string {
  const h = '#'.repeat(level);
  const h2 = '#'.repeat(level + 1);
  
  return `
${h} Copy: ${finding.original.substring(0, 50)}${finding.original.length > 50 ? '...' : ''}
**Repo:** \`${finding.repo}\` | **Group:** \`${finding.group}\` | **Locale:** \`${finding.locale}\`
**File:** \`${finding.filePath}${finding.line ? `:L${finding.line}` : ''}\`
**Type:** \`${finding.copyType}\` | **Impact:** \`${finding.impact}\`

${h2} Original
> ${finding.original}
**Length:** ${finding.originalLength.characters} chars | ${finding.originalLength.words} words

${h2} Diagnosis
- **Problem:** ${finding.diagnosis.mainIssue}
- **Opportunity:** ${finding.diagnosis.opportunity}

${h2} Variations

#### A — Clara y humana
> ${finding.variations.clearHuman.text}
**Len:** ${finding.variations.clearHuman.characters} (${finding.variations.clearHuman.differencePercent > 0 ? '+' : ''}${finding.variations.clearHuman.differencePercent}%) | **Risk:** ${finding.variations.clearHuman.visualRisk}

#### B — Premium y sobria
> ${finding.variations.premiumSober.text}
**Len:** ${finding.variations.premiumSober.characters} (${finding.variations.premiumSober.differencePercent > 0 ? '+' : ''}${finding.variations.premiumSober.differencePercent}%) | **Risk:** ${finding.variations.premiumSober.visualRisk}

#### C — Conversión / acción
> ${finding.variations.conversionAction.text}
**Len:** ${finding.variations.conversionAction.characters} (${finding.variations.conversionAction.differencePercent > 0 ? '+' : ''}${finding.variations.conversionAction.differencePercent}%) | **Risk:** ${finding.variations.conversionAction.visualRisk}

${h2} Recommendation
**Selected:** ${finding.recommendation.selected}
**Reason:** ${finding.recommendation.reason}

---
`.trim() + '\n\n';
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/translator.ts
================================================
import { localizeCopyNaturally } from './localizer';
import { normalizeSupportedLocale } from './locale-style-guide';

export async function translateCopyLiterally(
  text: string,
  sourceLanguage: string,
  targetLanguages: string[],
) {
  // Legacy API retained for existing callers. The implementation now delegates
  // to controlled editorial localization instead of literal translation.
  const translations: Record<string, string> = {};
  const uniqueTargets = Array.from(new Set(targetLanguages.filter((lang) => lang !== sourceLanguage)));
  if (uniqueTargets.length === 0) return translations;

  for (const targetLanguage of uniqueTargets) {
    const sourceLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(sourceLanguage);
    const targetLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(targetLanguage);

    if (!sourceLocale || !targetLocale) {
      continue;
    }

    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: text,
      sourceLocale,
      targetLocale,
      preservePlaceholders: true,
    });

    translations[targetLanguage] = result.text;
  }

  return translations;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/types.ts
================================================
export type AncloraAppGroup =
  | 'ultra-premium'
  | 'premium'
  | 'internal'
  | 'portfolio'
  | 'unknown';

export type CopyType =
  | 'headline'
  | 'title'
  | 'subtitle'
  | 'cta'
  | 'form-label'
  | 'form_label'
  | 'placeholder'
  | 'form_helper'
  | 'error-message'
  | 'empty-state'
  | 'dashboard-copy'
  | 'modal-copy'
  | 'legal-copy'
  | 'email_subject'
  | 'email_body'
  | 'card_title'
  | 'card_description'
  | 'navbar_item'
  | 'legal'
  | 'other';

export type VisualRisk = 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';

export interface CopyCandidate {
  id: string;
  text: string;
  repo: string;
  filePath: string;
  line?: number;
  type: CopyType;
  locale: string;
  context?: string;
}

export interface CopyVariation {
  text: string;
  characters: number;
  words: number;
  differencePercent: number;
  visualRisk: VisualRisk;
}

export interface CopyCuratorFinding {
  id: string;
  repo: string;
  group: AncloraAppGroup;
  filePath: string;
  line?: number;
  copyType: CopyType;
  locale: string;
  impact: 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
  original: string;
  originalLength: {
    characters: number;
    words: number;
  };
  visualContext: {
    probableContainer: string;
    maxRecommendedExpansionPercent: number;
    initialVisualRisk: VisualRisk;
  };
  diagnosis: {
    mainIssue: string;
    editorialRisk: string;
    visualRisk: string;
    opportunity: string;
  };
  variations: {
    clearHuman: CopyVariation;
    premiumSober: CopyVariation;
    conversionAction: CopyVariation;
  };
  recommendation: {
    selected: 'clearHuman' | 'premiumSober' | 'conversionAction';
    reason: string;
  };
  implementationNotes: string[];
}

export interface MultilingualCopyGroup {
  keyOrContext: string;
  locales: string[];
  findings: CopyCuratorFinding[];
  semanticConsistency: 'correct' | 'partial' | 'inconsistent' | 'unknown';
  missingLocales: string[];
  notes: string[];
}

export interface GeneratedContentCurationInput {
  generatedContent: string;
  originalInput: {
    topic?: string;
    title?: string;
    userPrompt?: string;
    contentType?: string;
    channel?: string;
    language?: string;
    targetAudience?: string;
    contentObjective?: string;
    tone?: string;
    constraints?: string[];
  };
  metadata?: {
    repo?: string;
    locale?: string;
  };
}

export interface GeneratedContentCurationResult {
  finalContent: string;
  appliedAdjustments: string[];
  rationale: string;
  warnings: string[];
  editorialRisk: VisualRisk;
  claimsRisk: VisualRisk;
}

export interface HermesPlaygroundRequest {
  sourceText: string;
  context?: string;
  surface: CopyType;
  primaryLanguage: string;
  additionalLanguages?: string[];
  tone?: string;
  maxLength?: number;
  notes?: string;
}

export interface HermesPlaygroundAlternative {
  label: 'conservative' | 'premium' | 'conversion';
  text: string;
  length: {
    characters: number;
    words: number;
  };
  visualRisk: VisualRisk;
  warnings: string[];
  localization?: {
    naturalnessRisk: VisualRisk;
    autoApplySafe: boolean;
    suggestedReplacement?: string;
    warnings: Array<{
      severity: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'critical';
      code: string;
      message: string;
      suggestion?: string;
    }>;
  };
  /**
   * Valoración SEO/GEO de la alternativa frente al texto base, aportada por el
   * Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian (solo evaluación). `autoApplySafe` es false cuando
   * la alternativa reduce keywords críticas, entidades principales o cambia
   * claims sensibles: en ese caso NO debe aplicarse automáticamente.
   */
  seoGeo?: {
    seoScore: number;
    geoScore: number;
    autoApplySafe: boolean;
    keywordsDropped: string[];
    entitiesDropped: string[];
    sensitiveClaimsChanged: boolean;
    blockReasons: string[];
    /**
     * Evaluación de Brand Fit (capa de identidad de marca). `status === 'FAIL'`
     * fuerza `autoApplySafe = false`. `SKIPPED` cuando no hay contrato.
     */
    brandFit?: {
      score: number;
      status: 'PASS' | 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS' | 'FAIL' | 'SKIPPED';
      productId?: string;
      productName?: string;
      blockReasons: string[];
      warnings: string[];
    };
  };
}

export interface HermesPlaygroundLanguageResult {
  language: string;
  diagnosis: {
    mainIssue: string;
    opportunity: string;
  };
  alternatives: HermesPlaygroundAlternative[];
}

export interface HermesPlaygroundResponse {
  summary: string;
  results: HermesPlaygroundLanguageResult[];
  globalWarnings: string[];
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/visual-fit.ts
================================================
import { CopyType, VisualRisk } from './types';

export const VISUAL_BUDGET_BY_COPY_TYPE: Record<CopyType, number> = {
  cta: 10,
  headline: 15,
  title: 15,
  subtitle: 20,
  'form-label': 10,
  form_label: 10,
  placeholder: 10,
  form_helper: 10,
  'error-message': 10,
  'empty-state': 15,
  'dashboard-copy': 15,
  'modal-copy': 15,
  'legal-copy': 20,
  email_subject: 15,
  email_body: 20,
  card_title: 15,
  card_description: 20,
  navbar_item: 10,
  legal: 20,
  other: 15,
};

export function countCharacters(value: string): number {
  return value?.length || 0;
}

export function countWords(value: string): number {
  if (!value) return 0;
  return value.trim().split(/\s+/).length;
}

export function calculateLengthDifferencePercent(original: string, variation: string): number {
  const origLen = countCharacters(original);
  if (origLen === 0) return 0;
  const varLen = countCharacters(variation);
  return Math.round(((varLen - origLen) / origLen) * 100);
}

export function estimateVisualRisk(input: {
  copyType: CopyType;
  original: string;
  variation: string;
}): VisualRisk {
  const diffPercent = calculateLengthDifferencePercent(input.original, input.variation);
  const budget = VISUAL_BUDGET_BY_COPY_TYPE[input.copyType] || 15;

  if (diffPercent <= budget) {
    return 'low';
  }

  if (diffPercent <= budget * 1.5) {
    return 'medium';
  }

  return 'high';
}

export function isVariationWithinVisualBudget(input: {
  copyType: CopyType;
  original: string;
  variation: string;
}): boolean {
  return estimateVisualRisk(input) === 'low';
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/copy-audit-script.test.ts
================================================
import fs from 'fs'
import os from 'os'
import path from 'path'
import { execFileSync } from 'child_process'
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'

describe('anclora-copy-audit script', () => {
  it('detects literalisms and writes the localization report', () => {
    const fixtureDir = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'anclora-copy-audit-'))
    fs.writeFileSync(
      path.join(fixtureDir, 'fixture.ts'),
      'export const copy = "Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas";',
    )

    execFileSync(
      path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/.bin/tsx'),
      ['scripts/anclora-copy-audit.ts', '--path', fixtureDir, '--locale', 'es', '--mode', 'suggest'],
      { cwd: process.cwd(), stdio: 'pipe' },
    )

    const reportPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'reports/anclora-copy-localization/copy-localization-report.md')
    const report = fs.readFileSync(reportPath, 'utf8')
    expect(report).toContain('Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas')
    expect(report).toContain('Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta')
  })

  it('honors exclude patterns', () => {
    const fixtureDir = fs.mkdtempSync(path.join(os.tmpdir(), 'anclora-copy-audit-exclude-'))
    const excludedDir = path.join(fixtureDir, 'ignored')
    fs.mkdirSync(excludedDir)
    fs.writeFileSync(
      path.join(excludedDir, 'fixture.ts'),
      'export const copy = "Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas";',
    )

    execFileSync(
      path.join(process.cwd(), 'node_modules/.bin/tsx'),
      [
        'scripts/anclora-copy-audit.ts',
        '--path',
        fixtureDir,
        '--locale',
        'es',
        '--mode',
        'audit',
        '--exclude',
        `${path.relative(process.cwd(), excludedDir).replaceAll(path.sep, '/')}/**`,
      ],
      { cwd: process.cwd(), stdio: 'pipe' },
    )

    const reportPath = path.join(process.cwd(), 'reports/anclora-copy-localization/copy-localization-report.md')
    const report = fs.readFileSync(reportPath, 'utf8')
    expect(report).toContain('Findings: 0')
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/copy-detector.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import {
  isUserFacingCopy,
  classifyCopyType,
  extractCopyCandidatesFromFile
} from '../copy-detector';

describe('copy-detector', () => {
  describe('isUserFacingCopy', () => {
    it('should identify user-facing copy', () => {
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('Bienvenido a Anclora Group')).toBe(true);
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('This is a descriptive text for the user')).toBe(true);
    });

    it('should reject technical strings', () => {
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('Button_Primary_Variant')).toBe(false);
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('primary.button.label')).toBe(false);
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('text-blue-500')).toBe(false);
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('<div>Content</div>')).toBe(false);
    });

    it('should reject very short or very long strings', () => {
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('Hi')).toBe(false);
      expect(isUserFacingCopy('A'.repeat(700))).toBe(false);
    });
  });

  describe('classifyCopyType', () => {
    it('should classify CTA', () => {
      expect(classifyCopyType('Click here', 'button')).toBe('cta');
      expect(classifyCopyType('Get started', 'cta-label')).toBe('cta');
    });

    it('should classify headline', () => {
      expect(classifyCopyType('The future of luxury', 'h1')).toBe('headline');
      expect(classifyCopyType('Experience the power', 'title')).toBe('headline');
    });

    it('should classify placeholder', () => {
      expect(classifyCopyType('Enter your email', 'placeholder')).toBe('placeholder');
    });
  });

  describe('extractCopyCandidatesFromFile', () => {
    it('should extract from JSON i18n files', () => {
      const content = JSON.stringify({
        common: {
          welcome: 'Bienvenido a nuestra plataforma',
          cta: 'Comenzar ahora'
        }
      });
      const candidates = extractCopyCandidatesFromFile('es.json', content, 'repo-a');
      expect(candidates.length).toBe(2);
      expect(candidates[0].text).toBe('Bienvenido a nuestra plataforma');
      expect(candidates[1].type).toBe('cta');
    });

    it('should extract from TSX files', () => {
      const content = `
        export const Hero = () => (
          <div>
            <h1>The Ultimate Experience</h1>
            <p title="Click to see more">Learn more about us</p>
            <button label="Sign up today">Join us</button>
          </div>
        );
      `;
      const candidates = extractCopyCandidatesFromFile('Hero.tsx', content, 'repo-a');
      // Should find: <h1> content, title prop, Learn more content, label prop, Join us content
      // Some might be filtered by isUserFacingCopy (length)
      expect(candidates.some(c => c.text === 'The Ultimate Experience')).toBe(true);
      expect(candidates.some(c => c.text === 'Learn more about us')).toBe(true);
      expect(candidates.some(c => c.text === 'Sign up today')).toBe(true);
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/i18n-key-detector.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import {
  extractI18nTextEntries,
  normalizeI18nResourceKey,
} from '../i18n-key-detector'

describe('i18n-key-detector', () => {
  it('extracts JSON entries grouped by top-level locale', () => {
    const entries = extractI18nTextEntries(
      'src/locales/common.json',
      JSON.stringify({
        es: { hero: { title: 'Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas' } },
        en: { hero: { title: 'We welcome your questions' } },
      }),
    )

    expect(entries).toEqual(
      expect.arrayContaining([
        expect.objectContaining({
          locale: 'es',
          keyPath: 'hero.title',
          text: 'Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas',
        }),
        expect.objectContaining({
          locale: 'en',
          keyPath: 'hero.title',
          text: 'We welcome your questions',
        }),
      ]),
    )
  })

  it('normalizes parallel locale files to the same resource key', () => {
    expect(normalizeI18nResourceKey('src/locales/es/common.json', 'hero.title', 'es')).toBe(
      normalizeI18nResourceKey('src/locales/en/common.json', 'hero.title', 'en'),
    )
  })

  it('extracts TypeScript object entries with locale context', () => {
    const entries = extractI18nTextEntries(
      'src/messages.ts',
      `
      export const messages = {
        es: { cta: { contact: 'No dudes en contactarnos' } },
        de: { cta: { contact: 'Zögern Sie nicht' } }
      }
      `,
    )

    expect(entries).toEqual(
      expect.arrayContaining([
        expect.objectContaining({
          locale: 'es',
          keyPath: 'cta.contact',
          text: 'No dudes en contactarnos',
        }),
        expect.objectContaining({
          locale: 'de',
          keyPath: 'cta.contact',
          text: 'Zögern Sie nicht',
        }),
      ]),
    )
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/literalism-detector.test.ts

import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { detectLiteralismRisk } from '../literalism-detector'

describe('detectLiteralismRisk', () => {
  it('blocks artificial Spanish literalism', () => {
    const findings = detectLiteralismRisk({
      locale: 'es',
      text: 'Explora nuestras propiedades únicas en Andratx. ¡Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas!',
    })

    expect(findings.some((finding) => finding.pattern === 'Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas')).toBe(true)
    expect(findings.some((finding) => finding.suggestion === 'Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta')).toBe(true)
  })

  it('blocks artificial German literalism', () => {
    const findings = detectLiteralismRisk({
      locale: 'de',
      text: 'Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen zu unseren Immobilien.',
    })

    expect(findings.some((finding) => finding.pattern === 'Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen')).toBe(true)
    expect(findings.some((finding) => finding.suggestion === 'Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da')).toBe(true)
  })

  it('marks English luxury clichés without making them critical', () => {
    const findings = detectLiteralismRisk({
      locale: 'en',
      text: 'Explore our unique properties. We welcome your questions!',
    })

    expect(findings.every((finding) => finding.severity === 'medium')).toBe(true)
  })
})

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/locale-detector.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import {
  detectLocaleFromPath,
  detectLocalesFromFiles,
  detectLocaleFromContent,
  normalizeLocale
} from '../locale-detector';

describe('locale-detector', () => {
  describe('detectLocaleFromPath', () => {
    it('should detect locale from directory structure', () => {
      expect(detectLocaleFromPath('src/locales/es/common.json')).toBe('es');
      expect(detectLocaleFromPath('src/i18n/en/navigation.ts')).toBe('en');
    });

    it('should detect locale from filename', () => {
      expect(detectLocaleFromPath('src/messages/de.json')).toBe('de');
      expect(detectLocaleFromPath('public/locales/fr.yaml')).toBe('fr');
    });

    it('should return undefined for non-locale paths', () => {
      expect(detectLocaleFromPath('src/components/Button.tsx')).toBe(undefined);
    });
  });

  describe('detectLocalesFromFiles', () => {
    it('should collect locales from multiple files', () => {
      const files = [
        { path: 'src/locales/es.json' },
        { path: 'src/locales/en.json' },
        { path: 'src/locales/de.json' },
      ];
      const locales = detectLocalesFromFiles(files);
      expect(locales).toContain('es');
      expect(locales).toContain('en');
      expect(locales).toContain('de');
      expect(locales.length).toBe(3);
    });

    it('should detect locales from JSON content keys', () => {
      const files = [
        {
          path: 'src/i18n.json',
          content: JSON.stringify({
            es: { title: 'Hola' },
            en: { title: 'Hello' }
          })
        }
      ];
      const locales = detectLocalesFromFiles(files);
      expect(locales).toContain('es');
      expect(locales).toContain('en');
    });
  });

  describe('detectLocaleFromContent', () => {
    it('should detect Spanish content', () => {
      const result = detectLocaleFromContent('El perro corre por la calle con su dueño para jugar.');
      expect(result.locale).toBe('es');
      expect(result.confidence).toBe('high');
    });

    it('should detect English content', () => {
      const result = detectLocaleFromContent('The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog in the park.');
      expect(result.locale).toBe('en');
      expect(result.confidence).toBe('high');
    });

    it('should return unknown for very short text', () => {
      const result = detectLocaleFromContent('Hello');
      expect(result.confidence).toBe('low');
    });
  });

  describe('normalizeLocale', () => {
    it('should normalize complex locale strings', () => {
      expect(normalizeLocale('es-ES')).toBe('es');
      expect(normalizeLocale('en_US')).toBe('en');
      expect(normalizeLocale('DE')).toBe('de');
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/localizer.test.ts
================================================
import { beforeEach, describe, expect, it } from 'vitest'
import { localizeCopyNaturally } from '../localizer'
import { supportedLocales } from '../locale-style-guide'

const canonical =
  'Explore our unique properties in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida, and Portals. We welcome your questions!'

describe('localizeCopyNaturally', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    delete process.env.OPENROUTER_API_KEY
  })

  it('localizes Spanish naturally and blocks the literal rejected phrase', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: canonical,
      sourceLocale: 'en',
      targetLocale: 'es',
    })

    expect(result.text).not.toContain('Damos la bienvenida a tus preguntas')
    expect(result.text).toContain('Estamos a tu disposición para cualquier consulta')
    expect(result.autoApplySafe).toBe(true)
  })

  it('localizes German naturally and blocks the literal rejected phrase', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: canonical,
      sourceLocale: 'en',
      targetLocale: 'de',
    })

    expect(result.text).not.toContain('Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen')
    expect(result.text).toContain('Bei Fragen sind wir gerne für Sie da')
  })

  it('localizes Catalan with a Mallorca-aware premium register', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: canonical,
      sourceLocale: 'en',
      targetLocale: 'ca',
    })

    expect(result.text).toContain('Som a la teva disposició')
    expect(result.text).not.toContain('Benvingudes les teves preguntes')
  })

  it('does not add unprovided claims', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: 'Discover selected properties in Mallorca.',
      sourceLocale: 'en',
      targetLocale: 'es',
    })

    expect(result.text.toLowerCase()).not.toContain('exclusive off-market access')
    expect(result.warnings.some((warning) => warning.code === 'claim_added')).toBe(false)
  })

  it('preserves placeholders', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: 'Hello {name}, your report is ready.',
      sourceLocale: 'en',
      targetLocale: 'es',
    })

    expect(result.text).toContain('{name}')
  })

  it('marks high naturalness risk as unsafe for auto-apply', async () => {
    const result = await localizeCopyNaturally({
      sourceText: 'Wir begrüßen Ihre Fragen',
      sourceLocale: 'de',
      targetLocale: 'de',
    })

    expect(result.naturalnessRisk).toBe('high')
    expect(result.autoApplySafe).toBe(false)
  })

  it('recognizes expanded Language Toggle Governance locales', () => {
    expect(supportedLocales).toEqual(['es', 'ca', 'en', 'de', 'fr', 'it', 'pt', 'sv', 'da', 'nl', 'no'])
  })
})

import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { resolveAncloraAppGroup } from '../repo-groups';

describe('repo-groups', () => {
  it('should resolve ultra-premium repos', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-private-estates')).toBe('ultra-premium');
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-private-estates-landing')).toBe('ultra-premium');
  });

  it('should resolve premium repos', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-synergi')).toBe('premium');
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-data-lab')).toBe('premium');
  });

  it('should resolve internal repos', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-nexus')).toBe('internal');
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-content-generator-ai')).toBe('internal');
  });

  it('should resolve portfolio repos', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-portfolio')).toBe('portfolio');
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-porflolio')).toBe('portfolio'); // handle typo
  });

    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('anclora-group/anclora-nexus')).toBe('internal');
  });

  it('should handle case insensitivity', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('Anclora-Nexus')).toBe('internal');
  });

  it('should return unknown for unknown repos', () => {
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('random-repo')).toBe('unknown');
    expect(resolveAncloraAppGroup('')).toBe('unknown');
  });
});
