FILE: src/lib/hermes/copy-curator/__tests__/visual-fit.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import {
  calculateLengthDifferencePercent,
  estimateVisualRisk,
  isVariationWithinVisualBudget
} from '../visual-fit';

describe('visual-fit', () => {
  describe('calculateLengthDifferencePercent', () => {
    it('should calculate correct percentage', () => {
      expect(calculateLengthDifferencePercent('Hello', 'Hello World')).toBe(120);
      expect(calculateLengthDifferencePercent('Longer text here', 'Short')).toBe(-69);
      expect(calculateLengthDifferencePercent('Same', 'Same')).toBe(0);
    });
  });

  describe('estimateVisualRisk', () => {
    it('should mark CTA with >10% expansion as medium/high risk', () => {
      const original = 'Join Now'; // 8 chars
      const variationLow = 'Join Us'; // 7 chars, -12.5%
      const variationMed = 'Join Our Team'; // 13 chars, +62.5% (very high)
      
      expect(estimateVisualRisk({ copyType: 'cta', original, variation: variationLow })).toBe('low');
      expect(estimateVisualRisk({ copyType: 'cta', original, variation: variationMed })).toBe('high');
    });

    it('should mark headline with >15% expansion as risk', () => {
      const original = 'The Future of Real Estate'; // 25 chars
      const variationLow = 'Real Estate Future'; // 18 chars, -28%
      const variationHigh = 'Discover the Absolute Best Future of Premium Real Estate'; // 56 chars, +124%
      
      expect(estimateVisualRisk({ copyType: 'headline', original, variation: variationLow })).toBe('low');
      expect(estimateVisualRisk({ copyType: 'headline', original, variation: variationHigh })).toBe('high');
    });
  });

  describe('isVariationWithinVisualBudget', () => {
    it('should return true if risk is low', () => {
      expect(isVariationWithinVisualBudget({
        copyType: 'subtitle',
        original: 'A long sentence that describes something important.',
        variation: 'An important description of a long sentence.'
      })).toBe(true);
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/apply-copy-change.ts
================================================
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { getRepoTarget, validateRepoPath } from './repo-registry';
import { findCopyInFile, searchCopyInRepo, CopyLocation } from './copy-locator';
import { getGitStatus, createBranch, generateBranchName, commitChanges } from './git-branch-manager';
import { applyChangeViaGitHub, buildCopyReplacement } from './github-adapter';
import { localizeCopyNaturally } from '../copy-curator/localizer';
import { normalizeSupportedLocale } from '../copy-curator/locale-style-guide';
import {
  extractI18nTextEntries,
  normalizeI18nResourceKey,
} from '../copy-curator/i18n-key-detector';

export interface ApplyCopyRequest {
  repoId: string;
  sourceText: string;
  newText: string;
  selectedLanguage?: string;
  filePath?: string; // Opcional
  commit?: boolean;
  warnings?: string[];
}

export interface ApplyCopyResponse {
  success: boolean;
  repoId?: string;
  repoLabel?: string;
  remoteRepo?: string;
  branchName?: string;
  filePath?: string;
  diff?: string;
  commitHash?: string;
  pullNumber?: number;
  prUrl?: string;
  previewUrl?: string;
  productionUrl?: string;
  mode?: 'local' | 'cloud';
  error?: string;
  candidates?: CopyLocation[];
  syncedLanguages?: string[];
  localizationWarnings?: string[];
}

const LOCAL_SYNC_EXTENSIONS = new Set(['.json', '.ts', '.tsx', '.js', '.jsx']);
const LOCAL_SYNC_EXCLUDED_DIRS = new Set(['node_modules', '.git', '.next', 'dist', 'build', 'coverage']);

function walkLocalI18nFiles(root: string): string[] {
  const entries = fs.readdirSync(root, { withFileTypes: true });
  const files: string[] = [];

  for (const entry of entries) {
    if (entry.isDirectory() && LOCAL_SYNC_EXCLUDED_DIRS.has(entry.name)) continue;
    const fullPath = path.join(root, entry.name);
    if (entry.isDirectory()) {
      files.push(...walkLocalI18nFiles(fullPath));
    } else if (LOCAL_SYNC_EXTENSIONS.has(path.extname(entry.name))) {
      files.push(fullPath);
    }
  }

  return files;
}

function findSourceI18nKey(input: {
  filePath: string;
  content: string;
  sourceText: string;
  selectedLanguage?: string;
}) {
  const selectedLocale = input.selectedLanguage ? normalizeSupportedLocale(input.selectedLanguage) : undefined;
  const entries = extractI18nTextEntries(input.filePath, input.content);
  const sourceEntry = entries.find((entry) =>
    entry.text === input.sourceText && (!selectedLocale || entry.locale === selectedLocale)
  );

  if (!sourceEntry) return undefined;

  return normalizeI18nResourceKey(input.filePath, sourceEntry.keyPath, sourceEntry.locale);
}

function buildLocalMultilingualSync(input: {
  repoPath: string;
  sourceFilePath: string;
  sourceContent: string;
  sourceText: string;
  selectedLanguage?: string;
  translations: Record<string, string>;
}) {
  const sourceKey = findSourceI18nKey({
    filePath: input.sourceFilePath,
    content: input.sourceContent,
    sourceText: input.sourceText,
    selectedLanguage: input.selectedLanguage,
  });

  if (!sourceKey) {
    return {
      updates: [] as Array<{ filePath: string; updatedContent: string; locale: string }>,
      syncedLanguages: input.selectedLanguage ? [input.selectedLanguage] : [],
    };
  }

  const updates: Array<{ filePath: string; updatedContent: string; locale: string }> = [];
  const syncedLanguages = new Set<string>(input.selectedLanguage ? [input.selectedLanguage] : []);
  const i18nFiles = walkLocalI18nFiles(input.repoPath);

  for (const filePath of i18nFiles) {
    const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
    const entries = extractI18nTextEntries(filePath, content);

    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (!entry.locale || !input.translations[entry.locale]) continue;

      const entryKey = normalizeI18nResourceKey(filePath, entry.keyPath, entry.locale);
      if (entryKey !== sourceKey) continue;

      const replacement = buildCopyReplacement(content, entry.text, input.translations[entry.locale]);
      if (replacement.matches === 1 && replacement.updatedContent) {
        updates.push({
          filePath,
          updatedContent: replacement.updatedContent,
          locale: entry.locale,
        });
        syncedLanguages.add(entry.locale);
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    updates,
    syncedLanguages: Array.from(syncedLanguages),
  };
}

export async function applyCopyChange(req: ApplyCopyRequest): Promise<ApplyCopyResponse> {
  // 0. Validar warnings críticos
  if (req.warnings?.some(w => w === 'context_constraint_mismatch')) {
    return { 
      success: false, 
      error: 'La alternativa seleccionada incumple una restricción crítica de contexto y no puede ser aplicada automáticamente.' 
    };
  }

  // 1. Validar configuración de repositorio
  const target = getRepoTarget(req.repoId);
  if (!target) {
    return { success: false, error: 'Repositorio no soportado o no permitido.' };
  }
  const targetMeta = {
    repoId: target.id,
    repoLabel: target.label,
    remoteRepo: target.remoteRepo,
  };
  const activeLanguages = target.activeLanguages || [];
  const requiresMultilingualSync = activeLanguages.length > 1;

  if (requiresMultilingualSync && !req.selectedLanguage) {
    return {
      success: false,
      ...targetMeta,
      error: `El repositorio "${target.label}" tiene ${activeLanguages.length} idiomas activos (${activeLanguages.join(', ')}). Selecciona el idioma del copy para sincronizar el resto automáticamente.`,
    };
  }

  if (req.selectedLanguage && activeLanguages.length > 0 && !activeLanguages.includes(req.selectedLanguage)) {
    return {
      success: false,
      ...targetMeta,
      error: `El idioma seleccionado (${req.selectedLanguage}) no está configurado en "${target.label}". Idiomas activos: ${activeLanguages.join(', ')}.`,
    };
  }

  const translations: Record<string, string> = {};
  const localizationWarnings: string[] = [];
  if (requiresMultilingualSync && req.selectedLanguage) {
    const sourceLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(req.selectedLanguage);
    if (!sourceLocale) {
      return {
        success: false,
        ...targetMeta,
        error: `Locale no soportado para localización editorial: ${req.selectedLanguage}.`,
      };
    }

    for (const targetLanguage of activeLanguages.filter((lang) => lang !== req.selectedLanguage)) {
      const targetLocale = normalizeSupportedLocale(targetLanguage);
      if (!targetLocale) continue;

      const localization = await localizeCopyNaturally({
        sourceText: req.sourceText,
        selectedText: req.newText,
        sourceLocale,
        targetLocale,
        preservePlaceholders: true,
      });

      if (!localization.autoApplySafe) {
        return {
          success: false,
          ...targetMeta,
          error: `La localización a ${targetLanguage} requiere revisión humana antes de aplicar: ${localization.warnings.map((warning) => warning.message).join(' ')}`,
          localizationWarnings: localization.warnings.map((warning) => `${targetLanguage}:${warning.code}`),
        };
      }

      translations[targetLanguage] = localization.text;
      localizationWarnings.push(...localization.warnings.map((warning) => `${targetLanguage}:${warning.code}`));
    }
  }

  // 2. Determinar Modo (Local o Cloud)
  const validation = validateRepoPath(target);
  
  if (!validation.valid) {
    console.log(`[Hermes] Local repo not found. Attempting Cloud Mode for ${target.id}...`);

    const githubResult = await applyChangeViaGitHub({
      owner: target.githubOwner,
      repo: target.githubRepo,
      filePath: req.filePath,
      sourceText: req.sourceText,
      newText: req.newText,
      selectedLanguage: req.selectedLanguage,
      activeLanguages,
      translations: Object.keys(translations).length > 0 ? translations : undefined,
    });

    if (githubResult.success) {
      return {
        success: true,
        ...targetMeta,
        mode: 'cloud',
        branchName: githubResult.branchName,
        pullNumber: githubResult.pullNumber,
        prUrl: githubResult.prUrl,
        previewUrl: githubResult.previewUrl,
        productionUrl: target.productionUrl,
        filePath: githubResult.filePath || req.filePath,
        syncedLanguages: githubResult.syncedLanguages,
        localizationWarnings,
      };
    } else {
      return {
        success: false,
        ...targetMeta,
        error: `Error en Modo Cloud: ${githubResult.error}`,
        candidates: githubResult.candidates?.map((candidate) => ({
          filePath: candidate.filePath,
          line: 1,
          content: `${candidate.matches} coincidencia(s)`,
        })),
      };
    }
  }

  // 3. Modo Local (Si el repo existe en el disco duro)
  const gitStatus = getGitStatus(target.localPath);
  if (!gitStatus.isClean) {
    return { 
      success: false, 
      ...targetMeta,
      error: 'El repositorio destino tiene cambios locales. Revisa o limpia el working tree antes de aplicar cambios locales.' 
    };
  }

  let locations: CopyLocation[] = [];
  if (req.filePath) {
    const fullPath = path.isAbsolute(req.filePath) 
      ? req.filePath 
      : path.join(target.localPath, req.filePath);

    const relativePath = path.relative(target.localPath, fullPath);
    if (relativePath.startsWith('..') || path.isAbsolute(relativePath)) {
      return { success: false, ...targetMeta, error: 'La ruta indicada no pertenece al repositorio permitido.' };
    }

    locations = findCopyInFile(fullPath, req.sourceText);
  } else {
    locations = searchCopyInRepo(target.localPath, req.sourceText);
  }

  if (locations.length === 0) {
    return { success: false, ...targetMeta, error: 'No se encontró el copy original en el repositorio local.' };
  }

  if (locations.length > 1) {
    return { 
      success: false, 
      ...targetMeta,
      error: 'Se encontraron varias coincidencias locales. Indica el archivo exacto.',
      candidates: locations.map(loc => ({
        ...loc,
        filePath: path.relative(target.localPath, loc.filePath)
      }))
    };
  }

  const location = locations[0];
  const relativeFilePath = path.relative(target.localPath, location.filePath);
  const content = fs.readFileSync(location.filePath, 'utf-8');
  const replacement = buildCopyReplacement(content, req.sourceText, req.newText);

  if (replacement.matches !== 1 || !replacement.updatedContent) {
    return {
      success: false,
      ...targetMeta,
      error:
        replacement.matches === 0
          ? 'No se encontró el copy original en el archivo seleccionado.'
          : `El copy original aparece ${replacement.matches} veces. Selecciona una coincidencia concreta antes de aplicar el cambio.`,
    };
  }

  try {
    const branchName = generateBranchName();
    createBranch(target.localPath, branchName);

    fs.writeFileSync(location.filePath, replacement.updatedContent);
    const multilingualSync = buildLocalMultilingualSync({
      repoPath: target.localPath,
      sourceFilePath: location.filePath,
      sourceContent: content,
      sourceText: req.sourceText,
      selectedLanguage: req.selectedLanguage,
      translations,
    });

    for (const update of multilingualSync.updates) {
      fs.writeFileSync(update.filePath, update.updatedContent);
    }

    let commitHash: string | undefined;
    if (req.commit) {
      commitHash = commitChanges(target.localPath, 'copy: update text with Hermes suggestion');
    }

    return {
      success: true,
      ...targetMeta,
      mode: 'local',
      branchName,
      filePath: relativeFilePath,
      commitHash,
      syncedLanguages: multilingualSync.syncedLanguages,
      localizationWarnings,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error applying local copy change:', error);
    return { 
      success: false, 
      ...targetMeta,
      error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : 'Error desconocido al aplicar el cambio local.' 
    };
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/copy-locator.ts
================================================
import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import { countCopyMatches } from './github-adapter';

export interface CopyLocation {
  filePath: string;
  line: number;
  content: string;
}

const EXCLUDED_DIRS = [
  'node_modules',
  '.git',
  'dist',
  'build',
  '.next',
  'coverage',
  '.env',
  '.env.local',
  'test-results',
];

const ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = [
  '.ts',
  '.tsx',
  '.js',
  '.jsx',
  '.json',
  '.md',
  '.mdx',
  '.css',
  '.html',
  '.vue',
  '.svelte',
  '.astro',
];

export function findCopyInFile(filePath: string, sourceText: string): CopyLocation[] {
  if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) return [];
  
  const content = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8');
  const lines = content.split('\n');
  const locations: CopyLocation[] = [];

  const matches = countCopyMatches(content, sourceText);
  if (matches > 0) {
    let currentLine = -1;
    for (let i = 0; i < lines.length; i++) {
      if (lines[i].includes(sourceText)) {
        currentLine = i + 1;
        locations.push({
          filePath,
          line: currentLine,
          content: lines[i],
        });
      }
    }

    if (locations.length === 0) {
      locations.push({
        filePath,
        line: 1,
        content: matches === 1 ? '(Coincidencia normalizada)' : `${matches} coincidencia(s) normalizada(s)`,
      });
    }
  }

  return locations;
}

export function searchCopyInRepo(repoPath: string, sourceText: string): CopyLocation[] {
  const locations: CopyLocation[] = [];

  function walk(dir: string) {
    const files = fs.readdirSync(dir);
    for (const file of files) {
      const fullPath = path.join(dir, file);
      const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);

      if (stat.isDirectory()) {
        if (!EXCLUDED_DIRS.includes(file)) {
          walk(fullPath);
        }
      } else {
        const ext = path.extname(file);
        if (ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS.includes(ext)) {
          const fileLocations = findCopyInFile(fullPath, sourceText);
          locations.push(...fileLocations);
        }
      }
    }
  }

  walk(repoPath);
  return locations;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/git-branch-manager.ts
================================================
import { execSync } from 'child_process';

export interface GitStatus {
  isClean: boolean;
  currentBranch: string;
}

export function getGitStatus(repoPath: string): GitStatus {
  try {
    const status = execSync('git status --short', { cwd: repoPath }).toString().trim();
    const branch = execSync('git branch --show-current', { cwd: repoPath }).toString().trim();
    
    return {
      isClean: status === '',
      currentBranch: branch,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error getting git status in ${repoPath}:`, error);
    throw new Error('No se pudo obtener el estado de Git del repositorio destino.');
  }
}

export function createBranch(repoPath: string, branchName: string): void {
  try {
    // Primero nos aseguramos de estar en una base limpia (usualmente main)
    // Para esta fase, asumimos que el usuario está en una rama desde la que quiere partir.
    // Pero el requisito dice "No se debe modificar main directamente" y "Crear rama de trabajo".
    
    execSync(`git checkout -b ${branchName}`, { cwd: repoPath });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error creating branch ${branchName} in ${repoPath}:`, error);
    throw new Error(`No se pudo crear la rama ${branchName}.`);
  }
}

export function generateBranchName(slug: string = 'copy-update'): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const timestamp = now.toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);
  return `hermes/${slug}-${timestamp}`;
}

export function commitChanges(repoPath: string, message: string): string {
  try {
    execSync('git add .', { cwd: repoPath });
    execSync(`git commit -m "${message}"`, { cwd: repoPath });
    const hash = execSync('git rev-parse --short HEAD', { cwd: repoPath }).toString().trim();
    return hash;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(`Error committing changes in ${repoPath}:`, error);
    throw new Error('No se pudo realizar el commit en el repositorio destino.');
  }
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/github-adapter.ts
================================================
import { Octokit } from 'octokit';

export interface GitHubApplyRequest {
  owner: string;
  repo: string;
  sourceText: string;
  newText: string;
  selectedLanguage?: string;
  activeLanguages?: string[];
  translations?: Record<string, string>;
  filePath?: string;
}

export interface GitHubApplyResponse {
  success: boolean;
  branchName?: string;
  filePath?: string;
  pullNumber?: number;
  prUrl?: string;
  previewUrl?: string;
  error?: string;
  candidates?: Array<{ filePath: string; matches: number }>;
  syncedLanguages?: string[];
}

const EXCLUDED_DIRS = new Set([
  'node_modules',
  '.git',
  'dist',
  'build',
  '.next',
  'coverage',
  'test-results',
]);

const ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS = new Set([
  '.ts',
  '.tsx',
  '.js',
  '.jsx',
  '.json',
  '.md',
  '.mdx',
  '.css',
  '.html',
  '.vue',
  '.svelte',
  '.astro',
]);

const MAX_REMOTE_SCAN_FILES = 250;
const MAX_REMOTE_FILE_SIZE_BYTES = 1_000_000;
export const HERMES_COPY_BRANCH = 'hermes/copy-update';

export async function applyChangeViaGitHub(req: GitHubApplyRequest): Promise<GitHubApplyResponse> {
  const { owner, repo, filePath, sourceText, newText } = req;
  const token = process.env.HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN || process.env.GITHUB_PAT || process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN;

  if (!token) {
    return {
      success: false,
      error: 'Configuración incompleta: falta HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN, GITHUB_PAT o GITHUB_TOKEN en el servidor.',
    };
  }

  try {
    const octokit = new Octokit({ auth: token });
    const permissionCheck = await validateWriteAccess(octokit, owner, repo);
    if (!permissionCheck.ok) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: permissionCheck.error,
      };
    }

    const { data: mainRef } = await octokit.rest.git.getRef({
      owner,
      repo,
      ref: 'heads/main',
    }).catch(async () => {
      return await octokit.rest.git.getRef({ owner, repo, ref: 'heads/master' });
    });

    const mainSha = mainRef.object.sha;
    const baseBranch = mainRef.ref.replace('refs/heads/', '');
    const resolvedFile = filePath
      ? await getRemoteFileContent(octokit, owner, repo, filePath)
      : await findUniqueRemoteCopy(octokit, owner, repo, sourceText, baseBranch);

    if ('error' in resolvedFile) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: resolvedFile.error,
        candidates: resolvedFile.candidates,
      };
    }

    const replacement = buildCopyReplacement(resolvedFile.content, sourceText, newText);
    if (replacement.matches === 0) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: `No se pudo encontrar el texto original en el archivo remoto: ${resolvedFile.path}`,
      };
    }

    if (replacement.matches > 1 || !replacement.updatedContent) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: `El texto original aparece ${replacement.matches} veces en ${resolvedFile.path}. Selecciona una coincidencia concreta antes de aplicar el cambio.`,
        candidates: [{ filePath: resolvedFile.path, matches: replacement.matches }],
      };
    }

    const multilingualReplacement = buildMultilingualCopyReplacement({
      content: resolvedFile.content,
      updatedContent: replacement.updatedContent,
      sourceText,
      selectedLanguage: req.selectedLanguage,
      activeLanguages: req.activeLanguages,
      translations: req.translations,
    });

    if (!multilingualReplacement.ok) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: multilingualReplacement.error,
      };
    }

    const branchCheck = await prepareHermesCopyBranch(octokit, owner, repo, baseBranch, mainSha);
    if (!branchCheck.ok) {
      return {
        success: false,
        error: branchCheck.error,
      };
    }

    const branchName = HERMES_COPY_BRANCH;
    await octokit.rest.git.createRef({
      owner,
      repo,
      ref: `refs/heads/${branchName}`,
      sha: mainSha,
    });

    await octokit.rest.repos.createOrUpdateFileContents({
      owner,
      repo,
      path: resolvedFile.path,
      message: `copy: update text via Hermes Playground`,
      content: Buffer.from(multilingualReplacement.updatedContent).toString('base64'),
      sha: resolvedFile.sha,
      branch: branchName,
    });

    const syncedLanguages = multilingualReplacement.syncedLanguages;
    const languageNote = syncedLanguages.length > 1
      ? `\n\n### Sincronización multidioma\n\nIdiomas actualizados: ${syncedLanguages.map((lang) => `\`${lang}\``).join(', ')}.\n\nHermes ha localizado editorialmente el copy seleccionado al resto de idiomas activos del repositorio para evitar divergencias manuales sin caer en traducciones literales.`
      : '';
    const localizationNote = syncedLanguages.length > 1
      ? `\n\n### Anclora Locale Copy Guardian\n\nRevisa naturalidad, placeholders y claims antes de hacer merge. El modo seguro bloquea localizaciones de alto riesgo.`
      : '';

    const { data: pr } = await octokit.rest.pulls.create({
      owner,
      repo,
      title: `Hermes Copy Optimization: ${resolvedFile.path}`,
      head: branchName,
      base: baseBranch,
      body: `Esta Pull Request ha sido generada automáticamente por **Hermes Playground**.\n\n### Cambio aplicado\n\nArchivo: \`${resolvedFile.path}\`\n\nSe ha reemplazado una única coincidencia exacta del copy original por la alternativa seleccionada. Revisa el preview de Vercel antes de hacer merge.${languageNote}${localizationNote}`,
    });

    return {
      success: true,
      branchName,
      filePath: resolvedFile.path,
      pullNumber: pr.number,
      prUrl: pr.html_url,
      previewUrl: findPreviewUrlFromPullRequest(pr),
      syncedLanguages,
    };

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error en GitHub Adapter:', error);
    return {
      success: false,
      error: getSafeGitHubErrorMessage(error)
    };
  }
}

async function prepareHermesCopyBranch(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  baseBranch: string,
  baseSha: string,
) {
  const existingRef = await octokit.rest.git.getRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref: `heads/${HERMES_COPY_BRANCH}`,
  }).catch((error) => {
    if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'status' in error && error.status === 404) {
      return null;
    }
    throw error;
  });

  if (!existingRef) return { ok: true };

  const { data: openPulls } = await octokit.rest.pulls.list({
    owner,
    repo,
    state: 'open',
    head: `${owner}:${HERMES_COPY_BRANCH}`,
    base: baseBranch,
  });

  if (openPulls.length > 0) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error:
        `Ya existe una Pull Request Hermes abierta en ${owner}/${repo}. ` +
        'Fusiónala o descártala antes de crear otro cambio.',
    };
  }

  const { data: comparison } = await octokit.rest.repos.compareCommitsWithBasehead({
    owner,
    repo,
    basehead: `${baseBranch}...${HERMES_COPY_BRANCH}`,
  });

  if (comparison.ahead_by > 0) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error:
        `La rama ${HERMES_COPY_BRANCH} tiene cambios no fusionados en ${owner}/${repo}. ` +
        'Revísala manualmente antes de crear otro cambio Hermes.',
    };
  }

  await octokit.rest.git.deleteRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref: `heads/${HERMES_COPY_BRANCH}`,
  });

  return { ok: true, deletedStaleBranch: existingRef.data.object.sha !== baseSha };
}

async function validateWriteAccess(octokit: Octokit, owner: string, repo: string) {
  try {
    const { data } = await octokit.rest.repos.get({ owner, repo });
    const permissions = data.permissions;
    const canWrite =
      permissions?.admin ||
      permissions?.maintain ||
      permissions?.push;

    if (permissions && !canWrite) {
      return {
        ok: false,
        error:
          `El token de GitHub puede leer ${owner}/${repo}, pero no tiene permiso de escritura. ` +
          'Actualiza HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN para incluir este repositorio y permiso Contents: Read and write.',
      };
    }
  } catch {
    // Some token types do not expose repository permissions consistently.
    // Continue and let the write operation return the definitive GitHub error.
  }

  return { ok: true };
}

function getSafeGitHubErrorMessage(error: unknown) {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);

  if (/Resource not accessible by personal access token/i.test(message)) {
    return (
      'GitHub ha rechazado crear la rama con el token configurado. ' +
      'Revisa que HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN sea un fine-grained token con acceso al repo destino y permisos Contents: Read and write y Pull requests: Read and write.'
    );
  }

  if (/Bad credentials/i.test(message)) {
    return 'El token de GitHub configurado no es válido o ha caducado. Revisa HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN en Vercel y redepliega.';
  }

  return message || 'Error desconocido en la comunicación con GitHub.';
}

function findPreviewUrlFromPullRequest(pr: { head?: { repo?: { homepage?: string | null } | null } }) {
  return pr.head?.repo?.homepage || undefined;
}

export function countExactMatches(content: string, search: string) {
  if (!search) return 0;
  return content.split(search).length - 1;
}

export function countCopyMatches(content: string, search: string) {
  return findCopyMatches(content, search).length;
}

export function buildCopyReplacement(content: string, sourceText: string, newText: string) {
  const matches = findCopyMatches(content, sourceText);
  if (matches.length !== 1) {
    return { matches: matches.length, updatedContent: undefined as string | undefined };
  }

  const [match] = matches;
  const originalSlice = content.slice(match.start, match.end);
  const replacement = formatReplacementForSlice(newText, originalSlice);
  return {
    matches: 1,
    updatedContent: `${content.slice(0, match.start)}${replacement}${content.slice(match.end)}`,
  };
}

export function buildMultilingualCopyReplacement(input: {
  content: string;
  updatedContent?: string;
  sourceText: string;
  selectedLanguage?: string;
  activeLanguages?: string[];
  translations?: Record<string, string>;
}) {
  const activeLanguages = input.activeLanguages || [];
  if (activeLanguages.length <= 1) {
    return {
      ok: true as const,
      updatedContent: input.updatedContent || input.content,
      syncedLanguages: input.selectedLanguage ? [input.selectedLanguage] : [],
    };
  }

  if (!input.selectedLanguage) {
    return {
      ok: false as const,
      error: 'El repositorio tiene varios idiomas activos, pero no se ha indicado el idioma del copy seleccionado.',
    };
  }

  const translations = input.translations || {};
  const missingTranslations = activeLanguages.filter(
    (lang) => lang !== input.selectedLanguage && !translations[lang],
  );
  if (missingTranslations.length > 0) {
    return {
      ok: false as const,
      error: `No se han podido generar traducciones para: ${missingTranslations.join(', ')}.`,
    };
  }

  const sourceContext = findStructuredCopyContext(input.content, input.sourceText);
  if (!sourceContext) {
    return {
      ok: false as const,
      error:
        'No se pudo identificar la clave estructurada del copy para sincronizar el resto de idiomas. ' +
        'No se ha creado PR para evitar un cambio parcial.',
    };
  }

  let updatedContent = input.updatedContent || input.content;
  const syncedLanguages = new Set([input.selectedLanguage]);

  for (const language of activeLanguages) {
    if (language === input.selectedLanguage) continue;
    const translatedCopy = translations[language];
    const siblingReplacement = replaceStructuredLanguageCopy(
      updatedContent,
      sourceContext,
      language,
      translatedCopy,
    );

    if (!siblingReplacement.updated) {
      return {
        ok: false as const,
        error:
          `No se pudo sincronizar el idioma ${language} para la clave ${sourceContext.objectKey}.${sourceContext.propertyKey}. ` +
          'No se ha creado PR para evitar copys divergentes.',
      };
    }

    updatedContent = siblingReplacement.content;
    syncedLanguages.add(language);
  }

  return {
    ok: true as const,
    updatedContent,
    syncedLanguages: Array.from(syncedLanguages),
  };
}

function findStructuredCopyContext(content: string, sourceText: string) {
  const matches = findCopyMatches(content, sourceText);
  if (matches.length !== 1) return null;

  const match = matches[0];
  const literalStart = findStringLiteralStart(content, match.start);
  if (literalStart < 0) return null;

  const beforeLiteral = content.slice(Math.max(0, literalStart - 800), literalStart);
  const propertyMatch = beforeLiteral.match(/([A-Za-z_$][\w$]*)\s*:\s*$/);
  if (!propertyMatch) return null;

  const propertyKey = propertyMatch[1];
  const propertyStart = literalStart - propertyMatch[0].length;
  const objectStart = findNearestObjectStart(content, propertyStart);
  if (objectStart < 0) return null;

  const beforeObject = content.slice(Math.max(0, objectStart - 300), objectStart);
  const objectMatch = beforeObject.match(/([A-Za-z_$][\w$]*)\s*:\s*$/);
  if (!objectMatch) return null;

  const variableName = findLanguageVariableName(content, match.start);
  if (!variableName) return null;

  return {
    variableName,
    objectKey: objectMatch[1],
    propertyKey,
  };
}

function findStringLiteralStart(content: string, fromIndex: number) {
  for (let index = fromIndex; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
    const char = content[index];
    if ((char === '"' || char === "'" || char === '`') && !isEscaped(content, index)) {
      return index;
    }
  }
  return -1;
}

function isEscaped(content: string, index: number) {
  let slashCount = 0;
  for (let cursor = index - 1; cursor >= 0 && content[cursor] === '\\'; cursor -= 1) {
    slashCount += 1;
  }
  return slashCount % 2 === 1;
}

function findNearestObjectStart(content: string, beforeIndex: number) {
  let depth = 0;
  for (let index = beforeIndex; index >= 0; index -= 1) {
    const char = content[index];
    if (char === '}') depth += 1;
    if (char === '{') {
      if (depth === 0) return index;
      depth -= 1;
    }
  }
  return -1;
}

function findLanguageVariableName(content: string, beforeIndex: number) {
  const before = content.slice(0, beforeIndex);
  const matches = Array.from(before.matchAll(/(?:export\s+)?const\s+(siteCopy[A-Z][A-Za-z0-9_]*)\s*[:=]/g));
  return matches.at(-1)?.[1] || null;
}

function replaceStructuredLanguageCopy(
  content: string,
  sourceContext: { variableName: string; objectKey: string; propertyKey: string },
  language: string,
  newText: string,
) {
  const targetVariable = sourceContext.variableName.replace(/[A-Z][a-z]*$/, capitalizeLanguage(language));
  const variablePattern = new RegExp(`(?:export\\s+)?const\\s+${escapeRegExp(targetVariable)}\\s*[:=]`);
  const variableMatch = variablePattern.exec(content);
  if (!variableMatch) return { updated: false, content };

  const variableObjectStart = content.indexOf('{', variableMatch.index);
  const variableObjectEnd = findMatchingBrace(content, variableObjectStart);
  if (variableObjectStart < 0 || variableObjectEnd < 0) return { updated: false, content };

  const variableBlock = content.slice(variableObjectStart, variableObjectEnd + 1);
  const objectPattern = new RegExp(`${escapeRegExp(sourceContext.objectKey)}\\s*:\\s*{`);
  const objectMatch = objectPattern.exec(variableBlock);
  if (!objectMatch) return { updated: false, content };

  const objectStart = variableObjectStart + objectMatch.index + objectMatch[0].lastIndexOf('{');
  const objectEnd = findMatchingBrace(content, objectStart);
  if (objectEnd < 0 || objectEnd > variableObjectEnd) return { updated: false, content };

  const objectBlock = content.slice(objectStart, objectEnd + 1);
  const propertyPattern = new RegExp(`(${escapeRegExp(sourceContext.propertyKey)}\\s*:\\s*)(["'\`])([\\s\\S]*?)(\\2)`);
  const propertyMatch = propertyPattern.exec(objectBlock);
  if (!propertyMatch) return { updated: false, content };

  const propertyStart = objectStart + propertyMatch.index;
  const literalStart = propertyStart + propertyMatch[1].length + 1;
  const literalEnd = literalStart + propertyMatch[3].length;
  const originalSlice = content.slice(literalStart, literalEnd);
  const replacement = formatReplacementForSlice(newText, originalSlice);

  return {
    updated: true,
    content: `${content.slice(0, literalStart)}${replacement}${content.slice(literalEnd)}`,
  };
}

function findMatchingBrace(content: string, openBraceIndex: number) {
  if (openBraceIndex < 0 || content[openBraceIndex] !== '{') return -1;
  let depth = 0;
  let quote: string | null = null;

  for (let index = openBraceIndex; index < content.length; index += 1) {
    const char = content[index];
    if (quote) {
      if (char === quote && !isEscaped(content, index)) quote = null;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === '"' || char === "'" || char === '`') {
      quote = char;
      continue;
    }
    if (char === '{') depth += 1;
    if (char === '}') {
      depth -= 1;
      if (depth === 0) return index;
    }
  }

  return -1;
}

function capitalizeLanguage(language: string) {
  return language.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + language.slice(1).toLowerCase();
}

function escapeRegExp(value: string) {
  return value.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
}

function findCopyMatches(content: string, search: string) {
  const exactMatches = findExactRanges(content, search);
  if (exactMatches.length > 0) return exactMatches;

  const escapedNewlineSearch = search.replace(/\r?\n/g, '\\n');
  const escapedNewlineMatches =
    escapedNewlineSearch !== search ? findExactRanges(content, escapedNewlineSearch) : [];
  if (escapedNewlineMatches.length > 0) return escapedNewlineMatches;

  return findNormalizedRanges(content, search);
}

function findExactRanges(content: string, search: string) {
  if (!search) return [];

  const ranges: Array<{ start: number; end: number }> = [];
  let index = content.indexOf(search);
  while (index !== -1) {
    ranges.push({ start: index, end: index + search.length });
    index = content.indexOf(search, index + search.length);
  }
  return ranges;
}

function normalizeCopyChar(value: string) {
  if (/[\s"'“”‘’`]/.test(value)) return ' ';
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase();
}

function normalizeForCopySearch(value: string) {
  const normalized = value
    .replace(/\\n/g, ' ')
    .replace(/\\r/g, ' ')
    .split('')
    .map(normalizeCopyChar)
    .join('')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();
  return normalized;
}

function buildNormalizedIndex(value: string) {
  let normalized = '';
  const indexMap: number[] = [];

  for (let index = 0; index < value.length; index += 1) {
    const current = value[index];
    const next = value[index + 1];
    const normalizedChar = current === '\\' && (next === 'n' || next === 'r')
      ? ' '
      : normalizeCopyChar(current);

    if (current === '\\' && (next === 'n' || next === 'r')) {
      index += 1;
    }

    if (normalizedChar === ' ') {
      if (normalized.endsWith(' ')) continue;
      normalized += ' ';
      indexMap.push(index);
      continue;
    }

    normalized += normalizedChar;
    indexMap.push(index);
  }

  if (normalized.startsWith(' ')) {
    normalized = normalized.slice(1);
    indexMap.shift();
  }
  if (normalized.endsWith(' ')) {
    normalized = normalized.slice(0, -1);
    indexMap.pop();
  }

  return { normalized, indexMap };
}

function findNormalizedRanges(content: string, search: string) {
  const normalizedSearch = normalizeForCopySearch(search);
  if (!normalizedSearch) return [];

  const { normalized, indexMap } = buildNormalizedIndex(content);
  const ranges: Array<{ start: number; end: number }> = [];
  let normalizedIndex = normalized.indexOf(normalizedSearch);

  while (normalizedIndex !== -1) {
    const start = indexMap[normalizedIndex];
    const endIndex = normalizedIndex + normalizedSearch.length - 1;
    const end = (indexMap[endIndex] ?? start) + 1;
    ranges.push({ start, end });
    normalizedIndex = normalized.indexOf(normalizedSearch, normalizedIndex + normalizedSearch.length);
  }

  return ranges;
}

function formatReplacementForSlice(newText: string, originalSlice: string) {
  let replacement = newText;
  const shouldEscapeForStringLiteral = originalSlice.includes('\\"') || !originalSlice.includes('"');

  if (shouldEscapeForStringLiteral) {
    replacement = replacement.replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/"/g, '\\"');
  }

  if (originalSlice.includes('\\n')) {
    replacement = replacement.replace(/\r?\n/g, '\\n');
  }

  return replacement;
}

function isAllowedRemotePath(filePath: string) {
  const parts = filePath.split('/');
  if (parts.some((part) => EXCLUDED_DIRS.has(part))) return false;
  const extension = filePath.match(/\.[^.]+$/)?.[0] || '';
  return ALLOWED_EXTENSIONS.has(extension);
}

async function getRemoteFileContent(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  filePath: string,
) {
  const { data: fileData } = await octokit.rest.repos.getContent({
    owner,
    repo,
    path: filePath,
  });

  if (Array.isArray(fileData) || !('content' in fileData) || fileData.type !== 'file') {
    throw new Error('La ruta indicada no corresponde a un archivo válido.');
  }

  return {
    path: fileData.path,
    sha: fileData.sha,
    content: Buffer.from(fileData.content, 'base64').toString('utf-8'),
  };
}

async function findUniqueRemoteCopy(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  sourceText: string,
  baseBranch: string,
): Promise<
  | { path: string; sha: string; content: string }
  | { error: string; candidates?: Array<{ filePath: string; matches: number }> }
> {
  const { data: ref } = await octokit.rest.git.getRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref: `heads/${baseBranch}`,
  });
  const { data: tree } = await octokit.rest.git.getTree({
    owner,
    repo,
    tree_sha: ref.object.sha,
    recursive: 'true',
  });
  const files = tree.tree
    .filter((entry) => entry.type === 'blob' && entry.path && isAllowedRemotePath(entry.path))
    .filter((entry) => !entry.size || entry.size <= MAX_REMOTE_FILE_SIZE_BYTES)
    .slice(0, MAX_REMOTE_SCAN_FILES);

  const candidates: Array<{ filePath: string; matches: number; sha: string; content: string }> = [];
  for (const file of files) {
    const { data: blob } = await octokit.rest.git.getBlob({
      owner,
      repo,
      file_sha: file.sha || '',
    });
    if (blob.encoding !== 'base64') continue;

    const content = Buffer.from(blob.content, 'base64').toString('utf-8');
    const matches = countCopyMatches(content, sourceText);
    if (matches > 0) {
      candidates.push({
        filePath: file.path || '',
        matches,
        sha: file.sha || '',
        content,
      });
    }
  }

  if (candidates.length === 0) {
    return {
      error: 'No se encontró el copy original en los archivos permitidos del repositorio remoto. Puede estar escapado, fragmentado o generado dinámicamente.',
    };
  }

  const totalMatches = candidates.reduce((sum, candidate) => sum + candidate.matches, 0);
  if (candidates.length > 1 || totalMatches > 1) {
    return {
      error: 'Se encontraron varias coincidencias remotas. Selecciona una de las coincidencias detectadas para evitar cambiar el copy equivocado.',
      candidates: candidates.map((candidate) => ({
        filePath: candidate.filePath,
        matches: candidate.matches,
      })),
    };
  }

  const [candidate] = candidates;
  return {
    path: candidate.filePath,
    sha: candidate.sha,
    content: candidate.content,
  };
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/github-pr-control.ts

import { Octokit } from 'octokit';
import { applyChangeViaGitHub, HERMES_COPY_BRANCH } from './github-adapter';
import { getRepoTarget } from './repo-registry';

export interface CopyPrRequest {
  repoId: string;
  pullNumber: number;
  branchName?: string;
}

export interface CopyPrResponse {
  success: boolean;
  state?: 'open' | 'closed';
  merged?: boolean;
  mergeable?: boolean | null;
  branchName?: string;
  prUrl?: string;
  previewUrl?: string;
  supportsPreview?: boolean;
  productionUrl?: string;
  readyToMerge?: boolean;
  mergeBlockedReason?: string;
  revertedPrUrl?: string;
  error?: string;
}

export interface CopyPrRevertRequest extends CopyPrRequest {
  sourceText: string;
  newText: string;
  filePath: string;
}

function getToken() {
  return process.env.HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN || process.env.GITHUB_PAT || process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN;
}

function getClient() {
  const token = getToken();
  if (!token) {
    throw new Error('Configuración incompleta: falta HERMES_COPY_GITHUB_TOKEN en el servidor.');
  }
  return new Octokit({ auth: token });
}

function getAllowedTarget(repoId: string) {
  const target = getRepoTarget(repoId);
  if (!target) {
    throw new Error('Repositorio no soportado o no permitido.');
  }
  return target;
}

function assertHermesBranch(branchName?: string) {
  const isCurrentHermesBranch = branchName === HERMES_COPY_BRANCH;
  const isLegacyHermesBranch = branchName?.startsWith('hermes/copy-update-');
  if (!isCurrentHermesBranch && !isLegacyHermesBranch) {
    throw new Error('Sólo se pueden operar ramas creadas por Hermes Copy Playground.');
  }
}

function safeError(error: unknown) {
  const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
  if (/Resource not accessible by personal access token/i.test(message)) {
    return 'El token de GitHub no tiene permisos suficientes para esta operación sobre la PR.';
  }
  return message || 'Error desconocido en GitHub.';
}

async function getPullContext(req: CopyPrRequest) {
  const target = getAllowedTarget(req.repoId);
  const octokit = getClient();
  const { data: pull } = await octokit.rest.pulls.get({
    owner: target.githubOwner,
    repo: target.githubRepo,
    pull_number: req.pullNumber,
  });
  const branchName = req.branchName || pull.head.ref;
  assertHermesBranch(branchName);

  return { target, octokit, pull, branchName };
}

async function resolveReadyVercelUrl(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  ref: string,
) {
  const { data: combinedStatus } = await octokit.rest.repos.getCombinedStatusForRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref,
  });
  const vercelStatus = combinedStatus.statuses.find((status) =>
    /vercel/i.test(status.context || '') && status.target_url,
  );
  if (vercelStatus?.target_url && vercelStatus.state === 'success') return vercelStatus.target_url;

  const { data: checks } = await octokit.rest.checks.listForRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref,
  });
  const vercelCheck = checks.check_runs.find((check) =>
    /vercel/i.test(check.name || '') && check.details_url,
  );
  if (vercelCheck?.details_url && vercelCheck.status === 'completed' && vercelCheck.conclusion === 'success') {
    return vercelCheck.details_url;
  }
  return undefined;
}

async function resolveReadyProductionUrl(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  baseBranch: string,
  productionUrl?: string,
) {
  if (!productionUrl) return undefined;
  const { data: baseRef } = await octokit.rest.git.getRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref: `heads/${baseBranch}`,
  });
  const readyDeployment = await resolveReadyVercelUrl(octokit, owner, repo, baseRef.object.sha);
  return readyDeployment ? productionUrl : undefined;
}

export async function getCopyPrStatus(req: CopyPrRequest): Promise<CopyPrResponse> {
  try {
    const { target, octokit, pull, branchName } = await getPullContext(req);
    const isMerged = Boolean(pull.merged_at);
    const supportsPreview = Boolean(target.supportsPreview);
    const previewUrl = !isMerged && supportsPreview ? await resolveReadyVercelUrl(
      octokit,
      target.githubOwner,
      target.githubRepo,
      pull.head.sha,
    ).catch(() => undefined) : undefined;
    const productionUrl = isMerged ? await resolveReadyProductionUrl(
      octokit,
      target.githubOwner,
      target.githubRepo,
      pull.base.ref,
      target.productionUrl,
    ).catch(() => undefined) : undefined;
    const readiness = !isMerged && pull.state === 'open'
      ? await validatePrReadyToMerge(
          octokit,
          target.githubOwner,
          target.githubRepo,
          pull.head.sha,
          supportsPreview,
        )
      : { ok: false, error: undefined };

    return {
      success: true,
      state: pull.state as 'open' | 'closed',
      merged: isMerged,
      mergeable: pull.mergeable,
      branchName,
      prUrl: pull.html_url,
      previewUrl,
      supportsPreview,
      productionUrl,
      readyToMerge: readiness.ok,
      mergeBlockedReason: readiness.ok ? undefined : readiness.error,
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: safeError(error) };
  }
}

export async function mergeCopyPr(req: CopyPrRequest): Promise<CopyPrResponse> {
  try {
    const { target, octokit, pull, branchName } = await getPullContext(req);
    if (pull.state !== 'open') {
      throw new Error('La Pull Request no está abierta.');
    }
    const readiness = await validatePrReadyToMerge(
      octokit,
      target.githubOwner,
      target.githubRepo,
      pull.head.sha,
      Boolean(target.supportsPreview),
    );
    if (!readiness.ok) {
      throw new Error(readiness.error);
    }

    await octokit.rest.pulls.merge({
      owner: target.githubOwner,
      repo: target.githubRepo,
      pull_number: req.pullNumber,
      merge_method: 'squash',
      commit_title: `copy: publish Hermes copy update`,
    });

    await octokit.rest.git.deleteRef({
      owner: target.githubOwner,
      repo: target.githubRepo,
      ref: `heads/${branchName}`,
    }).catch(() => undefined);

    return {
      success: true,
      state: 'closed',
      merged: true,
      branchName,
      prUrl: pull.html_url,
      supportsPreview: Boolean(target.supportsPreview),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: safeError(error) };
  }
}

async function validatePrReadyToMerge(
  octokit: Octokit,
  owner: string,
  repo: string,
  ref: string,
  requirePreview: boolean,
) {
  const { data: combinedStatus } = await octokit.rest.repos.getCombinedStatusForRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref,
  }).catch(() => ({ data: { state: 'success', statuses: [] } }));

  if (combinedStatus.statuses.length > 0 && combinedStatus.state !== 'success') {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: `La PR todavía no está lista para merge. Estado de checks: ${combinedStatus.state}.`,
    };
  }

  const vercelStatus = combinedStatus.statuses.find((status) =>
    /vercel/i.test(status.context || ''),
  );

  const { data: checks } = await octokit.rest.checks.listForRef({
    owner,
    repo,
    ref,
  }).catch(() => ({ data: { check_runs: [] } }));

  const vercelCheck = checks.check_runs.find((check) => /vercel/i.test(check.name || ''));

  if (combinedStatus.statuses.length === 0 && checks.check_runs.length === 0) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: 'GitHub todavía no ha publicado checks para esta PR. Espera unos segundos y actualiza el estado.',
    };
  }

  if (requirePreview && !vercelStatus && !vercelCheck) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: 'No se ha encontrado un deployment de preview de Vercel para esta PR. Continúa manualmente desde GitHub/Vercel.',
    };
  }

  if (requirePreview && vercelStatus && vercelStatus.state !== 'success') {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: `El preview de Vercel no está listo para merge. Estado: ${vercelStatus.state}.`,
    };
  }

  if (requirePreview && vercelCheck && (vercelCheck.status !== 'completed' || vercelCheck.conclusion !== 'success')) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: `El preview de Vercel no está listo para merge. Estado: ${vercelCheck.status}${vercelCheck.conclusion ? `/${vercelCheck.conclusion}` : ''}.`,
    };
  }

  const pendingCheck = checks.check_runs.find((check) => check.status !== 'completed');
  if (pendingCheck) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: `La PR todavía tiene checks pendientes: ${pendingCheck.name}.`,
    };
  }

  const failedCheck = checks.check_runs.find((check) =>
    check.conclusion && !['success', 'neutral', 'skipped'].includes(check.conclusion),
  );
  if (failedCheck) {
    return {
      ok: false,
      error: `La PR tiene un check fallido: ${failedCheck.name}.`,
    };
  }

  return { ok: true };
}

export async function discardCopyPr(req: CopyPrRequest): Promise<CopyPrResponse> {
  try {
    const { target, octokit, pull, branchName } = await getPullContext(req);
    if (pull.merged_at) {
      throw new Error('La PR ya está fusionada. Usa revertir cambio para deshacerla.');
    }

    if (pull.state === 'open') {
      await octokit.rest.pulls.update({
        owner: target.githubOwner,
        repo: target.githubRepo,
        pull_number: req.pullNumber,
        state: 'closed',
      });
    }

    await octokit.rest.git.deleteRef({
      owner: target.githubOwner,
      repo: target.githubRepo,
      ref: `heads/${branchName}`,
    }).catch(() => undefined);

    return {
      success: true,
      state: 'closed',
      merged: false,
      branchName,
      prUrl: pull.html_url,
      supportsPreview: Boolean(target.supportsPreview),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: safeError(error) };
  }
}

export async function revertCopyPr(req: CopyPrRevertRequest): Promise<CopyPrResponse> {
  try {
    const { target, pull } = await getPullContext(req);
    if (!pull.merged_at) {
      throw new Error('La PR todavía no está fusionada. Puedes descartarla sin crear reversión.');
    }

    const result = await applyChangeViaGitHub({
      owner: target.githubOwner,
      repo: target.githubRepo,
      filePath: req.filePath,
      sourceText: req.newText,
      newText: req.sourceText,
    });

    if (!result.success) {
      return { success: false, error: result.error };
    }

    return {
      success: true,
      state: 'open',
      merged: false,
      branchName: result.branchName,
      prUrl: pull.html_url,
      revertedPrUrl: result.prUrl,
      supportsPreview: Boolean(target.supportsPreview),
    };
  } catch (error) {
    return { success: false, error: safeError(error) };
  }
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/repo-registry.ts

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import os from 'os';

export interface RepoTarget {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  localPath: string;
  remoteRepo: string;
  githubOwner: string;
  githubRepo: string;
  productionUrl?: string;
  supportsPreview?: boolean;
  activeLanguages?: string[];
  allowed: boolean;
}

const resolveHome = (filepath: string) => {
  if (filepath.startsWith('~/')) {
    return path.join(os.homedir(), filepath.slice(2));
  }
  return filepath;
};

function repoTarget(config: {
  id: string;
  label: string;
  githubRepo: string;
  productionUrl?: string;
  supportsPreview?: boolean;
  activeLanguages?: string[];
}): RepoTarget {
  return {
    id: config.id,
    label: config.label,
    localPath: resolveHome(`~/projects/${config.githubRepo}`),
    remoteRepo: `ToniIAPro73/${config.githubRepo}`,
    githubOwner: 'ToniIAPro73',
    githubRepo: config.githubRepo,
    productionUrl: config.productionUrl,
    supportsPreview: config.supportsPreview,
    activeLanguages: config.activeLanguages,
    allowed: true,
  };
}

export const SUPPORTED_REPO_TARGETS: Record<string, RepoTarget> = {

  'anclora-syncXML': repoTarget({
    id: 'anclora-syncXML',
    label: 'Anclora syncXML',
    githubRepo: 'anclora-syncXML',
  }),
};

export function getRepoTarget(id: string): RepoTarget | null {
  const target = SUPPORTED_REPO_TARGETS[id];
  if (!target || !target.allowed) return null;
  return target;
}

export function validateRepoPath(target: RepoTarget): { valid: boolean; error?: string } {
  const isVercel = process.env.VERCEL === '1' || process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production';
  
  if (!fs.existsSync(target.localPath)) {
    if (isVercel) {
      return { 
        valid: false, 
        error: `El repositorio "${target.label}" no es accesible desde el entorno cloud. Esta funcionalidad requiere ejecutar la aplicación localmente.` 
      };
    }
    return { valid: false, error: `No se pudo localizar el repositorio "${target.label}" en la ruta configurada.` };
  }

  const gitPath = path.join(target.localPath, '.git');
  if (!fs.existsSync(gitPath)) {
    return { valid: false, error: `La ruta configurada para "${target.label}" no parece un repositorio git válido.` };
  }

  return { valid: true };
}

import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from 'vitest';
import fs from 'fs';
import * as child_process from 'child_process';
import { applyCopyChange } from '../apply-copy-change';
import { applyChangeViaGitHub } from '../github-adapter';

vi.mock('fs', () => ({
  existsSync: vi.fn(),
  readdirSync: vi.fn(),
  statSync: vi.fn(),
  readFileSync: vi.fn(),
  writeFileSync: vi.fn(),
  default: {
    existsSync: vi.fn(),
    readdirSync: vi.fn(),
    statSync: vi.fn(),
    readFileSync: vi.fn(),
    writeFileSync: vi.fn(),
  }
}));

vi.mock('child_process', () => {
  const mockExecSync = vi.fn();
  return {
    execSync: mockExecSync,
    default: {
      execSync: mockExecSync,
    },
  };
});

vi.mock('../github-adapter', () => ({
  applyChangeViaGitHub: vi.fn(),
  countCopyMatches: (content: string, search: string) => content.split(search).length - 1,
  buildCopyReplacement: (content: string, search: string, replacement: string) => {
    const matches = content.split(search).length - 1;
    return {
      matches,
      updatedContent: matches === 1 ? content.replace(search, replacement) : undefined,
    };
  },
}));

vi.mock('../../copy-curator/translator', () => ({
  translateCopyLiterally: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({
    es: 'texto nuevo',
    de: 'neuer text',
  }),
}));

describe('applyCopyChange', () => {
  beforeEach(() => {
    vi.clearAllMocks();
  });

  it('should fail if repo is not supported', async () => {
    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'unsupported-repo',
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(false);
    expect(result.error).toContain('Repositorio no soportado');
  });

  it('should fail if repo working tree is dirty', async () => {
    // Mock valid repo path
    vi.mocked(fs.existsSync).mockReturnValue(true);
    
    // Mock dirty git status
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('M somefile.ts') as unknown as string); // git status --short
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('main') as unknown as string); // git branch --show-current

    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing',
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
      selectedLanguage: 'en',
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(false);
    expect(result.error).toContain('cambios locales');
  });

  it('should fail if copy is not found', async () => {
    // Mock valid repo path
    vi.mocked(fs.existsSync).mockReturnValue(true);
    
    // Mock clean git status
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('') as unknown as string); // clean status
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('main') as unknown as string); // branch
    
    // Mock empty directory
    vi.mocked(fs.readdirSync).mockReturnValue([] as unknown as ReturnType<typeof fs.readdirSync>);

    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing',
      sourceText: 'missing text',
      newText: 'new text',
      selectedLanguage: 'en',
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(false);
    expect(result.error).toContain('No se encontró el copy original');
  });

  it('should fail if critical context warning is present', async () => {
    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing',
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
      warnings: ['context_constraint_mismatch']
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(false);
    expect(result.error).toContain('incumple una restricción crítica de contexto');
  });

  it('should use GitHub cloud mode when the local repo is unavailable', async () => {
    vi.mocked(fs.existsSync).mockReturnValue(false);
    vi.mocked(applyChangeViaGitHub).mockResolvedValue({
      success: true,
      branchName: 'hermes/copy-update-2026-05-26T20-40-00',
      filePath: 'src/app/page.tsx',
      prUrl: 'https://github.com/ToniIAPro73/anclora-private-estates-landing/pull/12',
    });

    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing',
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
      selectedLanguage: 'en',
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(true);
    expect(result.mode).toBe('cloud');
    expect(result.filePath).toBe('src/app/page.tsx');
    expect(result.prUrl).toContain('/pull/12');
    expect(applyChangeViaGitHub).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.objectContaining({
      filePath: undefined,
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
    }));
  });

  it('should apply change and create branch if copy is found uniquely', async () => {
    // Mock valid repo path
    vi.mocked(fs.existsSync).mockReturnValue(true);
    
    // Mock clean git status
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('') as unknown as string); // clean status
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValueOnce(Buffer.from('main') as unknown as string); // branch
    
    // Mock branch creation and commit (if requested)
    vi.mocked(child_process.execSync).mockReturnValue(Buffer.from('') as unknown as string);
    
    // Simular búsqueda recursiva que encuentra un archivo
    vi.mocked(fs.readdirSync).mockReturnValueOnce(['file.ts'] as unknown as ReturnType<typeof fs.readdirSync>);
    vi.mocked(fs.statSync).mockReturnValue({ isDirectory: () => false } as unknown as fs.Stats);
    vi.mocked(fs.readFileSync).mockReturnValue('This is the old text.');
    
    const result = await applyCopyChange({
      repoId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing',
      sourceText: 'old text',
      newText: 'new text',
      selectedLanguage: 'en',
    });

    expect(result.success).toBe(true);
    expect(result.branchName).toContain('hermes/');
    expect(result.filePath).toBe('file.ts');
    
    // Verificar que se llamó a git checkout -b
    expect(child_process.execSync).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringContaining('git checkout -b hermes/'), expect.anything());
    // Verificar que se escribió el archivo
    expect(fs.writeFileSync).toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.stringContaining('file.ts'), 'This is the new text.');
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/repo-targets/__tests__/github-adapter.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, expect, it } from 'vitest';
import {
  buildCopyReplacement,
  buildMultilingualCopyReplacement,
  countCopyMatches,
  HERMES_COPY_BRANCH,
} from '../github-adapter';

describe('github-adapter copy matching', () => {
  it('uses a single reusable Hermes branch for copy updates', () => {
    expect(HERMES_COPY_BRANCH).toBe('hermes/copy-update');
  });

  it('matches rendered multiline copy against escaped newlines in source files', () => {
    const content = `export const hero = {
  subtitle:
    "Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\\nNo portals. Only qualified buyers.",
};`;
    const renderedCopy =
      'Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\nNo portals. Only qualified buyers.';

    expect(countCopyMatches(content, renderedCopy)).toBe(1);
  });

  it('replaces only the matched escaped string content', () => {
    const content = `export const hero = {
  title: "Exclusive access to high-net-worth buyers.",
  subtitle:
    "Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\\nNo portals. Only qualified buyers.",
};`;
    const renderedCopy =
      'Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\nNo portals. Only qualified buyers.';
    const newCopy = 'Discreet opportunities in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\nPrivate access for qualified profiles.';

    const result = buildCopyReplacement(content, renderedCopy, newCopy);

    expect(result.matches).toBe(1);
    expect(result.updatedContent).toContain(
      '"Discreet opportunities in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals.\\nPrivate access for qualified profiles."',
    );
    expect(result.updatedContent).toContain('title: "Exclusive access to high-net-worth buyers."');
  });

  it('matches copy despite extra whitespace and typographic quotes', () => {
    const content = `<h2>
      “Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià,
      Son Vida and Portals. No portals. Only qualified buyers.”
    </h2>`;
    const renderedCopy =
      '"Discreet sales in Andratx, Calvià, Son Vida and Portals. No portals. Only qualified buyers."';

    expect(countCopyMatches(content, renderedCopy)).toBe(1);
  });

  it('syncs sibling language values in structured site copy files', () => {
    const content = `const siteCopyEs = {
  hero: {
    title: "Acceso exclusivo.",
    description: "Venta discreta en Andratx.\\nSin portales.",
  },
};

const siteCopyEn = {
  hero: {
    ...siteCopyEs.hero,
    title: "Exclusive access.",
    description: "Discreet sales in Andratx.\\nNo portals.",
  },
};

const siteCopyDe = {
  hero: {
    ...siteCopyEs.hero,
    title: "Exklusiver Zugang.",
    description: "Diskreter Verkauf in Andratx.\\nKeine Portale.",
  },
};`;
    const replacement = buildCopyReplacement(
      content,
      'Discreet sales in Andratx.\nNo portals.',
      'Private opportunities in Andratx.\nNo portals.',
    );

    const result = buildMultilingualCopyReplacement({
      content,
      updatedContent: replacement.updatedContent,
      sourceText: 'Discreet sales in Andratx.\nNo portals.',
      selectedLanguage: 'en',
      activeLanguages: ['es', 'en', 'de'],
      translations: {
        es: 'Oportunidades privadas en Andratx.\nSin portales.',
        de: 'Private Möglichkeiten in Andratx.\nKeine Portale.',
      },
    });

    expect(result.ok).toBe(true);
    if (!result.ok) return;
    expect(result.syncedLanguages.sort()).toEqual(['de', 'en', 'es']);
    expect(result.updatedContent).toContain('description: "Oportunidades privadas en Andratx.\\nSin portales."');
    expect(result.updatedContent).toContain('description: "Private opportunities in Andratx.\\nNo portals."');
    expect(result.updatedContent).toContain('description: "Private Möglichkeiten in Andratx.\\nKeine Portale."');
  });
});
