FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/brand-contract-loader.ts
================================================
/**
 * Cargador del contrato canónico de marca (SOLO LECTURA).
 *
 * Este módulo es el ÚNICO de la capa Brand Fit que toca el sistema de archivos,
 * y exclusivamente para LEER. No escribe, no crea ramas, no hace commits/push.
 * Por aislar `fs`/`path` aquí, el resto de la capa (parser, detector, analyzer)
 * permanece puro y seguro para bundles cliente; este loader solo se importa
 * desde el CLI y rutas de servidor.
 */

import fs from 'fs';
import path from 'path';
import {
  BrandContract,
  BrandContractLoadResult,
  BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE,
} from './brand-types';
import { parseBrandContract } from './brand-contract-parser';

export { BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE };

export const DEFAULT_BRAND_CONTRACT_PATH =
  'contracts/core/ANCLORA_BRAND_IDENTITY_AND_SEO_GEO_CONTRACT.md';

export interface LoadBrandContractOptions {
  /** Ruta explícita (CLI `--brand-contract`). */
  contractPath?: string;
  /** Directorio base para resolver rutas relativas. Por defecto `process.cwd()`. */
  cwd?: string;
}

/**
 * Carga el contrato en modo seguro. Nunca lanza: ante ausencia o error de
 * lectura devuelve `found: false` con un warning explicativo.
 */
export function loadBrandContract(
  options: LoadBrandContractOptions = {},
): BrandContractLoadResult {
  const warnings: string[] = [];
  const cwd = options.cwd ?? process.cwd();
  const candidates = options.contractPath
    ? [options.contractPath]
    : [DEFAULT_BRAND_CONTRACT_PATH];

  for (const candidate of candidates) {
    const resolved = path.isAbsolute(candidate)
      ? candidate
      : path.resolve(cwd, candidate);
    try {
      if (fs.existsSync(resolved) && fs.statSync(resolved).isFile()) {
        const raw = fs.readFileSync(resolved, 'utf8');
        return { found: true, path: resolved, raw, warnings };
      }
    } catch (error) {
      warnings.push(
        `Failed to read brand contract at "${resolved}": ${(error as Error).message}`,
      );
    }
  }

  warnings.push(BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE);
  return { found: false, warnings };
}

/**
 * Carga y parsea el contrato en un solo paso. Devuelve `{ found, contract? }`.
 */
export function loadAndParseBrandContract(
  options: LoadBrandContractOptions = {},
): { found: boolean; contract?: BrandContract; load: BrandContractLoadResult } {
  const load = loadBrandContract(options);
  if (!load.found || !load.raw) {
    return { found: false, load };
  }
  const contract = parseBrandContract(load.raw, load.path);
  return { found: true, contract, load };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/brand-contract-parser.ts
================================================
/**
 * Parser mínimo y robusto del contrato canónico de marca (Markdown → estructura
 * tipada). No pretende ser un parser Markdown perfecto: extrae secciones y
 * fichas de producto de forma tolerante y mantenible.
 *
 * Módulo PURO (sin fs): recibe el texto crudo y devuelve un `BrandContract`.
 *
 * Formato esperado (tolerante a mayúsculas, acentos y orden de campos):
 *
 *   ## Global Claim Rules
 *   - regla
 *   ## Products
 *   ### <productId> — <Display Name>
 *   - Critical entities: A, B
 *   - Primary keywords: x, y
 *   - Prohibited claims: claim 1; claim 2
 *   ...
 */

import {
  BrandContract,
  BrandProductProfile,
  BrandClaimLevel,
} from './brand-types';

function normalizeLabel(value: string): string {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, ' ')
    .trim();
}

/** Divide una lista. Usa `;` si está presente, si no `,`. Limpia vacíos. */
function splitList(value: string): string[] {
  if (!value) return [];
  const sep = value.includes(';') ? ';' : ',';
  return value
    .split(sep)
    .map((v) => v.trim())
    .filter(Boolean);
}

function emptyProfile(productId: string, displayName: string): BrandProductProfile {
  return {
    productId,
    displayName,
    criticalEntities: [],
    primaryKeywords: [],
    secondaryKeywords: [],
    allowedClaims: [],
    cautionClaims: [],
    prohibitedClaims: [],
    sectorDisclaimers: [],
    passRules: [],
    warningRules: [],
    failRules: [],
    autoApplyFalseRules: [],
  };
}

// Mapa de etiqueta normalizada -> asignación al perfil.
const FIELD_ASSIGNERS: Array<{
  match: string[];
  assign: (p: BrandProductProfile, value: string) => void;
}> = [
  { match: ['ecosystem relation', 'relacion ecosistema', 'relacion con ecosistema'], assign: (p, v) => { p.ecosystemRelation = v.trim(); } },
  { match: ['category', 'categoria'], assign: (p, v) => { p.category = v.trim(); } },
  { match: ['languages', 'idiomas', 'locales'], assign: (p, v) => { p.languages = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['claim level', 'nivel de claim', 'nivel claim'], assign: (p, v) => { p.claimLevel = normalizeClaimLevel(v); } },
  { match: ['critical entities', 'entidades criticas'], assign: (p, v) => { p.criticalEntities = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['primary keywords', 'keywords principales'], assign: (p, v) => { p.primaryKeywords = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['secondary keywords', 'keywords secundarias'], assign: (p, v) => { p.secondaryKeywords = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['allowed claims', 'claims permitidos'], assign: (p, v) => { p.allowedClaims = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['caution claims', 'claims con precaucion', 'claims precaucion'], assign: (p, v) => { p.cautionClaims = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['prohibited claims', 'claims prohibidos'], assign: (p, v) => { p.prohibitedClaims = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['sector disclaimers', 'disclaimers sectoriales', 'disclaimers'], assign: (p, v) => { p.sectorDisclaimers = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['pass rules', 'reglas pass'], assign: (p, v) => { p.passRules = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['warning rules', 'pass with warnings rules', 'reglas warning'], assign: (p, v) => { p.warningRules = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['fail rules', 'reglas fail'], assign: (p, v) => { p.failRules = splitList(v); } },
  { match: ['autoapplyfalse rules', 'autoapply false rules', 'autoapplysafe false rules', 'reglas autoapplyfalse', 'reglas autoapply false'], assign: (p, v) => { p.autoApplyFalseRules = splitList(v); } },
];

function normalizeClaimLevel(value: string): BrandClaimLevel {
  const n = normalizeLabel(value);
  if (n.includes('very') || n.includes('muy')) return 'very_conservative';
  if (n.includes('conservative') || n.includes('conservador')) return 'conservative';
  if (n.includes('standard') || n.includes('estandar')) return 'standard';
  return value.trim();
}

function assignField(profile: BrandProductProfile, label: string, value: string): boolean {
  const norm = normalizeLabel(label);
  for (const assigner of FIELD_ASSIGNERS) {
    if (assigner.match.some((m) => norm === m || norm.startsWith(m))) {
      assigner.assign(profile, value);
      return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}

/** Extrae los bullets (`- ...`) inmediatamente bajo una cabecera de sección. */
function extractGlobalBullets(raw: string, headingPatterns: string[]): string[] {
  const lines = raw.split('\n');
  const out: string[] = [];
  let capturing = false;

  for (const line of lines) {
    const headingMatch = line.match(/^#{1,4}\s+(.*)$/);
    if (headingMatch) {
      const norm = normalizeLabel(headingMatch[1]);
      capturing = headingPatterns.some((p) => norm.includes(p));
      continue;
    }
    if (!capturing) continue;
    const bullet = line.match(/^\s*[-*]\s+(.*\S)\s*$/);
    if (bullet) {
      out.push(bullet[1].trim());
    }
  }
  return out;
}

/**
 * Parsea el contrato canónico desde su texto Markdown.
 * Nunca lanza: ante contenido inesperado devuelve lo que pueda con warnings.
 */
export function parseBrandContract(raw: string, sourcePath?: string): BrandContract {
  const warnings: string[] = [];
  const contract: BrandContract = {
    sourcePath,
    products: [],
    globalClaimRules: extractGlobalBullets(raw, ['global claim rules', 'reglas claim global', 'reglas de claim']),
    globalSeoRules: extractGlobalBullets(raw, ['global seo rules', 'reglas seo global']),
    globalGeoRules: extractGlobalBullets(raw, ['global geo rules', 'reglas geo global', 'reglas geo aeo']),
    agentConsumptionRules: extractGlobalBullets(raw, ['agent consumption rules', 'reglas de consumo', 'consumo por agentes']),
    warnings,
  };

  if (!raw || !raw.trim()) {
    warnings.push('Brand contract is empty.');
    return contract;
  }

  // Localizar la sección de productos.
  const productsSectionMatch = raw.match(/^#{1,3}\s+Products?\b[^\n]*$/im);
  const productsBlock = productsSectionMatch
    ? raw.slice(raw.indexOf(productsSectionMatch[0]) + productsSectionMatch[0].length)
    : raw;

  // Cada producto es un `### productId — Display Name` (también `- ` o `:`).
  const productHeadingRe = /^#{3,4}\s+(.+)$/gm;
  const matches: Array<{ header: string; start: number; end: number }> = [];
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((m = productHeadingRe.exec(productsBlock)) !== null) {
    matches.push({ header: m[1].trim(), start: m.index + m[0].length, end: productsBlock.length });
  }
  for (let i = 0; i < matches.length; i += 1) {
    matches[i].end = i + 1 < matches.length ? matches[i + 1].start : productsBlock.length;
  }

  for (const block of matches) {
    const { productId, displayName } = parseProductHeader(block.header);
    if (!productId) continue;
    const profile = emptyProfile(productId, displayName);
    const body = productsBlock.slice(block.start, block.end);
    const bulletRe = /^\s*[-*]\s+([^:]+):\s*(.*\S)\s*$/gm;
    let b: RegExpExecArray | null;
    let assignedAny = false;
    while ((b = bulletRe.exec(body)) !== null) {
      if (assignField(profile, b[1], b[2])) assignedAny = true;
    }
    if (!assignedAny) {
      warnings.push(`Product "${productId}" has no recognizable fields.`);
    }
    contract.products.push(profile);
  }

  if (contract.products.length === 0) {
    warnings.push('No products found in brand contract.');
  }

  return contract;
}

function parseProductHeader(header: string): { productId: string; displayName: string } {
  // Soporta "id — Name", "id – Name", "id - Name", "id: Name", o solo "Name".
  // El guion como separador EXIGE espacios alrededor para no romper ids con
  // guiones (p.ej. "anclora-content-generator-ai").
  const sepMatch =
    header.match(/^(.+?)\s+(?:—|–|-)\s+(.+)$/) ?? header.match(/^([^:]+):\s*(.+)$/);
  if (sepMatch) {
    const left = sepMatch[1].trim();
    const right = sepMatch[2].trim();
    // Si el lado izquierdo parece un id (sin espacios), úsalo como productId.
    if (/^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9._-]*$/i.test(left)) {
      return { productId: left, displayName: right };
    }
    return { productId: slugify(left), displayName: left };
  }
  return { productId: slugify(header), displayName: header.trim() };
}

function slugify(value: string): string {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/brand-fit-analyzer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Evaluador de Brand Fit (PURO, sin fs).
 *
 * Compara una página o una alternativa de copy contra la ficha de producto del
 * contrato canónico y produce un `BrandFitResult` (score 0..100 + estado +
 * razones de bloqueo). Es una capa PREVENTIVA: protege identidad, entidades,
 * claims y coherencia SEO/GEO. No garantiza posicionamiento ni cumplimiento
 * legal, y nunca aplica cambios.
 *
 * Reglas mínimas (del contrato):
 *  - Contrato no disponible            → SKIPPED.
 *  - Producto no detectado con confianza→ nunca PASS limpio (PASS_WITH_WARNINGS).
 *  - Claim prohibido presente          → FAIL.
 *  - Entidad crítica eliminada vs base  → FAIL (en curación de copy).
 *  - claim level very_conservative      → penaliza claims absolutos con dureza.
 *  - Mezcla clara de otro producto      → warning o FAIL.
 */

import {
  BrandFitResult,
  BrandProductProfile,
  DetectedProduct,
} from './brand-types';
import { containsTerm, normalizeForMatch } from './keyword-entity';
import { assessGenericAiContent } from './generic-ai-detector';
import { extractSensitiveClaims } from './sensitive-claims';

export interface BrandFitInput {
  /** Texto a evaluar (página o alternativa de copy). */
  text: string;
  /** Texto base; si se aporta, habilita la detección de entidades eliminadas. */
  baseline?: string;
  /** Ficha de producto del contrato. */
  profile?: BrandProductProfile;
  /** Producto detectado (para gestionar confianza). */
  detected?: DetectedProduct;
  /** ¿El contrato canónico está disponible? */
  contractAvailable: boolean;
  /** Resto de productos del contrato (para conflictos cross-product). */
  allProducts?: BrandProductProfile[];
}

const MIN_CONFIDENCE = 0.5;

function presentTerms(text: string, terms: string[]): { present: string[]; missing: string[] } {
  const present: string[] = [];
  const missing: string[] = [];
  for (const term of terms) {
    if (containsTerm(text, term)) present.push(term);
    else missing.push(term);
  }
  return { present, missing };
}

export function analyzeBrandFit(input: BrandFitInput): BrandFitResult {
  const base: BrandFitResult = {
    score: 0,
    status: 'SKIPPED',
    productId: input.detected?.productId,
    productName: input.detected?.displayName,
    missingCriticalEntities: [],
    preservedCriticalEntities: [],
    missingPrimaryKeywords: [],
    prohibitedClaimsFound: [],
    cautionClaimsFound: [],
    disclaimersMissing: [],
    crossProductConflicts: [],
    warnings: [],
    blockReasons: [],
  };

  // 1) Contrato no disponible → SKIPPED.
  if (!input.contractAvailable) {
    base.warnings.push('brand_contract_unavailable');
    return base;
  }

  // 2) Sin ficha de producto (no detectado / no en contrato) → nunca PASS limpio.
  if (!input.profile) {
    return {
      ...base,
      score: 60,
      status: 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS',
      warnings: ['product_not_detected'],
    };
  }

  const profile = input.profile;
  const text = input.text ?? '';
  const veryConservative = profile.claimLevel === 'very_conservative';
  const conservative = veryConservative || profile.claimLevel === 'conservative';

  const warnings: string[] = [];
  const blockReasons: string[] = [];

  // Confianza de detección baja → tope PASS_WITH_WARNINGS.
  const lowConfidence = Boolean(input.detected && input.detected.confidence < MIN_CONFIDENCE);
  if (lowConfidence) warnings.push('low_confidence_product_detection');

  // Entidades críticas.
  const entityCov = presentTerms(text, profile.criticalEntities);
  const preservedCriticalEntities = entityCov.present;
  const missingCriticalEntities = entityCov.missing;

  // Entidades eliminadas respecto al baseline (curación de copy).
  let removedCriticalEntities: string[] = [];
  if (typeof input.baseline === 'string') {
    const inBaseline = presentTerms(input.baseline, profile.criticalEntities).present;
    removedCriticalEntities = inBaseline.filter((e) => !containsTerm(text, e));
  }

  // Keywords principales.
  const missingPrimaryKeywords = presentTerms(text, profile.primaryKeywords).missing;

  // Claims prohibidos y con precaución.
  const prohibitedClaimsFound = profile.prohibitedClaims.filter((c) => containsTerm(text, c));
  const cautionClaimsFound = profile.cautionClaims.filter((c) => containsTerm(text, c));

  // Disclaimers: requeridos cuando hay claims sensibles o nivel conservador.
  const hasSensitiveClaim = extractSensitiveClaims(text).length > 0;
  const disclaimersRequired = profile.sectorDisclaimers.length > 0 && (hasSensitiveClaim || conservative);
  const disclaimersMissing = disclaimersRequired
    ? profile.sectorDisclaimers.filter((d) => !containsTerm(text, d))
    : [];

  // Conflictos cross-product: entidades de OTROS productos presentes aquí.
  const crossProductConflicts = detectCrossProductConflicts(text, profile, input.allProducts ?? []);

  // Tono genérico incompatible con marca conservadora.
  const generic = assessGenericAiContent(text);
  const genericIncompatible = conservative && generic.risk === 'high';
  if (genericIncompatible) warnings.push('brand_tone_generic_for_conservative_claim_level');

  // --- Scoring ---
  let score = 100;
  score -= Math.min(missingCriticalEntities.length, 4) * 12;
  score -= Math.min(missingPrimaryKeywords.length, 5) * 5;
  score -= prohibitedClaimsFound.length * 45;
  score -= cautionClaimsFound.length * (veryConservative ? 16 : 8);
  score -= Math.min(disclaimersMissing.length, 3) * 10;
  score -= Math.min(crossProductConflicts.length, 3) * 18;
  if (genericIncompatible) score -= 6;
  score = clamp(score);

  // --- Razones de bloqueo (playground → autoApplySafe=false) ---
  if (prohibitedClaimsFound.length > 0) {
    blockReasons.push(`brand_prohibited_claim:${prohibitedClaimsFound.join(', ')}`);
  }
  if (removedCriticalEntities.length > 0) {
    blockReasons.push(`brand_drops_critical_entity:${removedCriticalEntities.join(', ')}`);
  }

  // --- Estado ---
  const ownEntitiesMostlyAbsent =
    profile.criticalEntities.length > 0 && preservedCriticalEntities.length === 0;
  const hardConflict = crossProductConflicts.length > 0 && ownEntitiesMostlyAbsent;
  if (hardConflict) {
    blockReasons.push(`brand_cross_product_conflict:${crossProductConflicts.join(', ')}`);
  } else if (crossProductConflicts.length > 0) {
    warnings.push('brand_cross_product_conflict');
  }

  let status: BrandFitResult['status'];
  if (prohibitedClaimsFound.length > 0 || removedCriticalEntities.length > 0 || hardConflict) {
    status = 'FAIL';
  } else if (score >= 80) {
    status = 'PASS';
  } else if (score >= 55) {
    status = 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS';
  } else {
    status = 'FAIL';
  }

  // Topes que impiden un PASS limpio.
  const mustNotBeCleanPass =
    lowConfidence ||
    crossProductConflicts.length > 0 ||
    disclaimersMissing.length > 0 ||
    missingCriticalEntities.length > 0 ||
    missingPrimaryKeywords.length > 0 ||
    cautionClaimsFound.length > 0 ||
    genericIncompatible;
  if (status === 'PASS' && mustNotBeCleanPass) {
    status = 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS';
  }

  return {
    score,
    status,
    productId: profile.productId,
    productName: profile.displayName,
    missingCriticalEntities,
    preservedCriticalEntities,
    missingPrimaryKeywords,
    prohibitedClaimsFound,
    cautionClaimsFound,
    disclaimersMissing,
    crossProductConflicts,
    warnings,
    blockReasons,
  };
}

function detectCrossProductConflicts(
  text: string,
  profile: BrandProductProfile,
  allProducts: BrandProductProfile[],
): string[] {
  const ownMarkers = new Set(
    [...profile.criticalEntities, ...profile.primaryKeywords].map(normalizeForMatch),
  );
  const conflicts: string[] = [];
  const seen = new Set<string>();

  for (const other of allProducts) {
    if (normalizeForMatch(other.productId) === normalizeForMatch(profile.productId)) continue;
    for (const entity of other.criticalEntities) {
      const norm = normalizeForMatch(entity);
      // Marcador genérico "Anclora" no cuenta como conflicto.
      if (norm === 'anclora' || ownMarkers.has(norm)) continue;
      if (containsTerm(text, entity) && !seen.has(norm)) {
        seen.add(norm);
        conflicts.push(`${entity} (${other.productId})`);
      }
    }
  }
  return conflicts;
}

function clamp(value: number): number {
  if (value < 0) return 0;
  if (value > 100) return 100;
  return value;
}

/**
 * Combina varios resultados de Brand Fit (por archivo) en uno agregado.
 * El peor estado manda; las listas se fusionan sin duplicados.
 */
export function aggregateBrandFit(results: BrandFitResult[]): BrandFitResult {
  if (results.length === 0) {
    return {
      score: 0,
      status: 'SKIPPED',
      missingCriticalEntities: [],
      preservedCriticalEntities: [],
      missingPrimaryKeywords: [],
      prohibitedClaimsFound: [],
      cautionClaimsFound: [],
      disclaimersMissing: [],
      crossProductConflicts: [],
      warnings: [],
      blockReasons: [],
    };
  }

  const statusRank: Record<BrandFitResult['status'], number> = {
    FAIL: 0,
    PASS_WITH_WARNINGS: 1,
    PASS: 2,
    SKIPPED: 3,
  };
  const worst = results.reduce((acc, r) =>
    statusRank[r.status] < statusRank[acc.status] ? r : acc,
  );

  const mergeUnique = (pick: (r: BrandFitResult) => string[]) =>
    Array.from(new Set(results.flatMap(pick)));

  const considered = results.filter((r) => r.status !== 'SKIPPED');
  const avgScore = considered.length
    ? Math.round(considered.reduce((s, r) => s + r.score, 0) / considered.length)
    : 0;

  return {
    score: avgScore,
    status: worst.status,
    productId: worst.productId,
    productName: worst.productName,
    missingCriticalEntities: mergeUnique((r) => r.missingCriticalEntities),
    preservedCriticalEntities: mergeUnique((r) => r.preservedCriticalEntities),
    missingPrimaryKeywords: mergeUnique((r) => r.missingPrimaryKeywords),
    prohibitedClaimsFound: mergeUnique((r) => r.prohibitedClaimsFound),
    cautionClaimsFound: mergeUnique((r) => r.cautionClaimsFound),
    disclaimersMissing: mergeUnique((r) => r.disclaimersMissing),
    crossProductConflicts: mergeUnique((r) => r.crossProductConflicts),
    warnings: mergeUnique((r) => r.warnings),
    blockReasons: mergeUnique((r) => r.blockReasons),
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/brand-types.ts
================================================
/**
 * Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian — Brand Fit layer (read-only).
 *
 * Tipos para el consumo del contrato canónico de marca
 * (`contracts/core/ANCLORA_BRAND_IDENTITY_AND_SEO_GEO_CONTRACT.md`) y la
 * evaluación de Brand Fit. Esta capa es de SOLO LECTURA: interpreta reglas de
 * marca y enriquece el análisis; nunca aplica cambios.
 */

/** Mensaje canónico cuando no hay contrato disponible. */
export const BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE =
  'Brand contract not found; Brand Fit evaluation skipped.';

export type BrandClaimLevel =
  | 'standard'
  | 'conservative'
  | 'very_conservative'
  | string;

export type BrandFitStatus = 'PASS' | 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS' | 'FAIL' | 'SKIPPED';

/** Ficha de producto extraída del contrato canónico. */
export interface BrandProductProfile {
  productId: string;
  displayName: string;
  ecosystemRelation?: string;
  category?: string;
  languages?: string[];
  claimLevel?: BrandClaimLevel;
  criticalEntities: string[];
  primaryKeywords: string[];
  secondaryKeywords: string[];
  allowedClaims: string[];
  cautionClaims: string[];
  prohibitedClaims: string[];
  sectorDisclaimers: string[];
  passRules: string[];
  warningRules: string[];
  failRules: string[];
  autoApplyFalseRules: string[];
}

/** Contrato canónico de marca parseado. */
export interface BrandContract {
  sourcePath?: string;
  products: BrandProductProfile[];
  globalClaimRules: string[];
  globalSeoRules: string[];
  globalGeoRules: string[];
  agentConsumptionRules: string[];
  warnings: string[];
}

/** Resultado de la carga del contrato (no falla de forma destructiva). */
export interface BrandContractLoadResult {
  found: boolean;
  path?: string;
  raw?: string;
  warnings: string[];
}

/** Producto detectado para el repo/página auditada. */
export interface DetectedProduct {
  productId: string;
  displayName: string;
  /** 0..1 */
  confidence: number;
  evidence: string[];
}

/** Resultado de la evaluación de Brand Fit. */
export interface BrandFitResult {
  score: number;
  status: BrandFitStatus;
  productId?: string;
  productName?: string;
  missingCriticalEntities: string[];
  preservedCriticalEntities: string[];
  missingPrimaryKeywords: string[];
  prohibitedClaimsFound: string[];
  cautionClaimsFound: string[];
  disclaimersMissing: string[];
  crossProductConflicts: string[];
  warnings: string[];
  blockReasons: string[];
}

/** Subconjunto compatible con el playground (`seoGeo.brandFit`). */
export interface BrandFitPlaygroundSummary {
  score: number;
  status: BrandFitStatus;
  productId?: string;
  productName?: string;
  blockReasons: string[];
  warnings: string[];
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/extractor.ts
================================================
/**
 * Extractor read-only de señales SEO/GEO desde el contenido de un archivo.
 *
 * Sin dependencias de parsing externas (Fase 1): usa expresiones regulares
 * tolerantes para HTML, Markdown/MDX y JSX/TSX. El objetivo es producir una
 * `ExtractedPage` normalizada que los analizadores SEO y GEO consumen.
 */

import { ExtractedPage, FaqEntry, HreflangEntry, PageFormat } from './types';

export function detectFormat(filePath: string, content: string): PageFormat {
  const lower = filePath.toLowerCase();
  if (lower.endsWith('.html') || lower.endsWith('.htm')) return 'html';
  if (lower.endsWith('.md') || lower.endsWith('.mdx')) return 'markdown';
  if (lower.endsWith('.tsx') || lower.endsWith('.jsx')) return 'jsx';
  if (lower.endsWith('.json')) return 'json';
  if (/<html[\s>]|<!doctype html/i.test(content)) return 'html';
  return 'unknown';
}

function stripTags(html: string): string {
  return html
    .replace(/<script[\s\S]*?<\/script>/gi, ' ')
    .replace(/<style[\s\S]*?<\/style>/gi, ' ')
    .replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ' ')
    .replace(/&nbsp;/gi, ' ')
    .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
    .trim();
}

function decodeBasicEntities(value: string): string {
  return value
    .replace(/&amp;/gi, '&')
    .replace(/&lt;/gi, '<')
    .replace(/&gt;/gi, '>')
    .replace(/&quot;/gi, '"')
    .replace(/&#39;/gi, "'");
}

function matchAll(content: string, regex: RegExp, group = 1): string[] {
  const out: string[] = [];
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  regex.lastIndex = 0;
  while ((m = regex.exec(content)) !== null) {
    const value = (m[group] ?? '').trim();
    if (value) out.push(decodeBasicEntities(value));
  }
  return out;
}

function getMetaContent(html: string, attr: 'name' | 'property', key: string): string | undefined {
  const re = new RegExp(
    `<meta[^>]*${attr}=["']${key}["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["']`,
    'i',
  );
  const alt = new RegExp(
    `<meta[^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["'][^>]*${attr}=["']${key}["']`,
    'i',
  );
  const m = html.match(re) ?? html.match(alt);
  return m ? decodeBasicEntities(m[1].trim()) : undefined;
}

function extractOpenGraph(html: string): Record<string, string> {
  const og: Record<string, string> = {};
  const re = /<meta[^>]*property=["']og:([^"']+)["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["']/gi;
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((m = re.exec(html)) !== null) {
    og[m[1].toLowerCase()] = decodeBasicEntities(m[2].trim());
  }
  return og;
}

function extractTwitter(html: string): Record<string, string> {
  const tw: Record<string, string> = {};
  const re = /<meta[^>]*name=["']twitter:([^"']+)["'][^>]*content=["']([^"']*)["']/gi;
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((m = re.exec(html)) !== null) {
    tw[m[1].toLowerCase()] = decodeBasicEntities(m[2].trim());
  }
  return tw;
}

function extractHreflang(html: string): HreflangEntry[] {
  const entries: HreflangEntry[] = [];
  const re = /<link[^>]*rel=["']alternate["'][^>]*hreflang=["']([^"']+)["'][^>]*href=["']([^"']*)["']/gi;
  const reAlt = /<link[^>]*hreflang=["']([^"']+)["'][^>]*rel=["']alternate["'][^>]*href=["']([^"']*)["']/gi;
  for (const pattern of [re, reAlt]) {
    let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
    pattern.lastIndex = 0;
    while ((m = pattern.exec(html)) !== null) {
      entries.push({ lang: m[1].trim(), href: m[2].trim() });
    }
  }
  return entries;
}

export function extractJsonLd(content: string): unknown[] {
  const blocks: unknown[] = [];
  const re = /<script[^>]*type=["']application\/ld\+json["'][^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/script>/gi;
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((m = re.exec(content)) !== null) {
    const raw = m[1].trim();
    try {
      blocks.push(JSON.parse(raw));
    } catch {
      // JSON-LD malformado: lo registramos como objeto de error parseable.
      blocks.push({ __parseError: true, raw: raw.slice(0, 120) });
    }
  }
  return blocks;
}

/**
 * Extrae FAQs desde bloques JSON-LD (FAQPage) y desde patrones Q/A en texto.
 */
export function extractFaqs(content: string, jsonLd: unknown[], bodyText: string): FaqEntry[] {
  const faqs: FaqEntry[] = [];

  for (const block of jsonLd) {
    const items = collectFaqFromJsonLd(block);
    faqs.push(...items);
  }

  // Patrón markdown/heading: "## ¿...?" seguido de párrafo.
  const headingFaqRe = /(?:^|\n)#{2,4}\s+([^\n]*\?)\s*\n+([^\n#][^\n]*)/g;
  let m: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((m = headingFaqRe.exec(content)) !== null) {
    faqs.push({ question: m[1].trim(), answer: m[2].trim() });
  }

  if (faqs.length === 0 && bodyText) {
    // Heurística simple: frases que terminan en "?" seguidas de texto.
    const inlineRe = /([¿?][^?.!]{8,160}\?)\s+([A-ZÁÉÍÓÚÑ][^?]{15,240}[.!])/g;
    while ((m = inlineRe.exec(bodyText)) !== null) {
      faqs.push({ question: m[1].trim(), answer: m[2].trim() });
    }
  }

  // Deduplicar por pregunta.
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  return faqs.filter((f) => {
    const key = f.question.toLowerCase();
    if (seen.has(key)) return false;
    seen.add(key);
    return true;
  });
}

function collectFaqFromJsonLd(block: unknown): FaqEntry[] {
  const out: FaqEntry[] = [];
  const visit = (node: unknown): void => {
    if (!node || typeof node !== 'object') return;
    if (Array.isArray(node)) {
      node.forEach(visit);
      return;
    }
    const obj = node as Record<string, unknown>;
    const type = obj['@type'];
    const isQuestion =
      type === 'Question' || (Array.isArray(type) && type.includes('Question'));
    if (isQuestion && typeof obj.name === 'string') {
      const accepted = obj.acceptedAnswer as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
      const answer =
        accepted && typeof accepted.text === 'string' ? accepted.text : '';
      out.push({ question: obj.name, answer });
    }
    for (const value of Object.values(obj)) {
      if (value && typeof value === 'object') visit(value);
    }
  };
  visit(block);
  return out;
}

function extractHtmlLang(html: string): string | undefined {
  const m = html.match(/<html[^>]*lang=["']([^"']+)["']/i);
  return m ? m[1].trim() : undefined;
}

function extractHeadings(content: string, format: PageFormat): ExtractedPage['headings'] {
  const headings = { h1: [] as string[], h2: [] as string[], h3: [] as string[] };

  if (format === 'markdown') {
    const lines = content.split('\n');
    for (const line of lines) {
      const m = line.match(/^(#{1,3})\s+(.*\S)/);
      if (!m) continue;
      const level = m[1].length;
      const text = m[2].trim();
      if (level === 1) headings.h1.push(text);
      else if (level === 2) headings.h2.push(text);
      else headings.h3.push(text);
    }
    return headings;
  }

  // HTML y JSX comparten sintaxis de <hN>.
  headings.h1 = matchAll(content, /<h1[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h1>/gi).map(stripTags);
  headings.h2 = matchAll(content, /<h2[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h2>/gi).map(stripTags);
  headings.h3 = matchAll(content, /<h3[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/h3>/gi).map(stripTags);
  return headings;
}

function extractMarkdownFrontmatter(content: string): { title?: string; description?: string; lang?: string } {
  const m = content.match(/^---\n([\s\S]*?)\n---/);
  if (!m) return {};
  const fm = m[1];
  const get = (key: string) => {
    const r = new RegExp(`^${key}:\\s*["']?(.+?)["']?\\s*$`, 'im');
    const found = fm.match(r);
    return found ? found[1].trim() : undefined;
  };
  return { title: get('title'), description: get('description'), lang: get('lang') ?? get('locale') };
}

function bodyTextForFormat(content: string, format: PageFormat): string {
  if (format === 'markdown') {
    return content
      .replace(/^---\n[\s\S]*?\n---/, '')
      .replace(/```[\s\S]*?```/g, ' ')
      .replace(/^#{1,6}\s+/gm, '')
      .replace(/[*_`>#-]/g, ' ')
      .replace(/\[([^\]]+)\]\([^)]*\)/g, '$1')
      .replace(/\s+/g, ' ')
      .trim();
  }
  return stripTags(content);
}

/**
 * Convierte el contenido crudo de un archivo en una `ExtractedPage`.
 */
export function extractPage(filePath: string, content: string): ExtractedPage {
  const format = detectFormat(filePath, content);

  const jsonLd = format === 'json' ? [] : extractJsonLd(content);
  const bodyText = bodyTextForFormat(content, format);
  const headings = extractHeadings(content, format);

  let title: string | undefined;
  let metaDescription: string | undefined;
  let lang: string | undefined;

  if (format === 'html') {
    const tMatch = content.match(/<title[^>]*>([\s\S]*?)<\/title>/i);
    title = tMatch ? decodeBasicEntities(stripTags(tMatch[1])) : undefined;
    metaDescription = getMetaContent(content, 'name', 'description');
    lang = extractHtmlLang(content);
  } else if (format === 'markdown') {
    const fm = extractMarkdownFrontmatter(content);
    title = fm.title ?? headings.h1[0];
    metaDescription = fm.description;
    lang = fm.lang;
  } else if (format === 'jsx') {
    // Metadata de Next.js: export const metadata = { title, description }.
    const titleMatch = content.match(/title:\s*["'`]([^"'`]+)["'`]/);
    const descMatch = content.match(/description:\s*["'`]([^"'`]+)["'`]/);
    title = titleMatch ? titleMatch[1].trim() : headings.h1[0];
    metaDescription = descMatch ? descMatch[1].trim() : undefined;
  }

  const canonicalMatch = content.match(/<link[^>]*rel=["']canonical["'][^>]*href=["']([^"']*)["']/i);
  const robots = getMetaContent(content, 'name', 'robots');

  const images = matchAll(content, /<img\b([^>]*)>/gi, 1);
  const imagesMissingAlt = images.filter((attrs) => !/\balt=["'][^"']*\S[^"']*["']/i.test(attrs)).length;

  return {
    filePath,
    format,
    lang,
    title,
    metaDescription,
    canonical: canonicalMatch ? canonicalMatch[1].trim() : undefined,
    robots,
    headings,
    bodyText,
    openGraph: extractOpenGraph(content),
    twitter: extractTwitter(content),
    jsonLd,
    hreflang: extractHreflang(content),
    faqs: extractFaqs(content, jsonLd, bodyText),
    linkCount: (content.match(/<a\b[^>]*href=/gi) ?? []).length,
    imageCount: images.length,
    imagesMissingAlt,
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/gate.ts
================================================
/**
 * Lógica de gate final: PASS / PASS_WITH_WARNINGS / FAIL.
 *
 * El gate combina los scores SEO/GEO con la severidad de los riesgos
 * detectados. Es determinista para poder testearse.
 */

import { GateResult, SeoGeoRisk } from './types';
import { BrandFitStatus } from './brand-types';

export interface GateThresholds {
  seoFail: number;
  geoFail: number;
  seoWarn: number;
  geoWarn: number;
}

export const DEFAULT_GATE_THRESHOLDS: GateThresholds = {
  seoFail: 50,
  geoFail: 40,
  seoWarn: 75,
  geoWarn: 70,
};

export function computeGate(
  seoScore: number,
  geoScore: number,
  risks: SeoGeoRisk[],
  thresholds: GateThresholds = DEFAULT_GATE_THRESHOLDS,
): GateResult {
  const hasCritical = risks.some((r) => r.severity === 'critical');
  if (hasCritical || seoScore < thresholds.seoFail || geoScore < thresholds.geoFail) {
    return 'FAIL';
  }

  const hasHighOrMedium = risks.some((r) => r.severity === 'high' || r.severity === 'medium');
  if (hasHighOrMedium || seoScore < thresholds.seoWarn || geoScore < thresholds.geoWarn) {
    return 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS';
  }

  return 'PASS';
}

/**
 * Combina los gates de varios archivos en un gate global (el peor manda).
 */
export function aggregateGate(gates: GateResult[]): GateResult {
  if (gates.some((g) => g === 'FAIL')) return 'FAIL';
  if (gates.some((g) => g === 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS')) return 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS';
  return 'PASS';
}

/**
 * Aplica el resultado de Brand Fit al gate ya calculado.
 *
 *  - Brand Fit `FAIL`               → el gate pasa a `FAIL` (no puede ser PASS).
 *  - Brand Fit `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS` → el gate, como máximo, `PASS_WITH_WARNINGS`.
 *  - Brand Fit `SKIPPED`/`PASS`     → no modifica el gate (SKIPPED añade warning aparte).
 */
export function applyBrandFitToGate(
  gate: GateResult,
  brandFitStatus: BrandFitStatus,
): GateResult {
  if (brandFitStatus === 'FAIL') return 'FAIL';
  if (brandFitStatus === 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS' && gate === 'PASS') {
    return 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS';
  }
  return gate;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/generic-ai-detector.ts
================================================
/**
 * Detector de "contenido genérico generado por IA".
 *
 * Identifica muletillas y patrones de relleno típicos del copy generado sin
 * curar (frases vacías, superlativos huecos, conectores de IA). Devuelve una
 * puntuación de riesgo 0..1 y las frases detectadas, para penalizar el score
 * de contenido y avisar antes de aplicar copy de Hermes.
 */

import { tokenize } from './keyword-entity';

const GENERIC_PHRASES: RegExp[] = [
  // Español
  /\ben\s+el\s+mundo\s+(?:actual|de\s+hoy|digital)\b/gi,
  /\ben\s+la\s+era\s+(?:digital|actual|moderna)\b/gi,
  /\bhoy\s+en\s+d[íi]a\b/gi,
  /\bcada\s+vez\s+m[áa]s\b/gi,
  /\bsin\s+lugar\s+a\s+dudas\b/gi,
  /\bllevar\s+(?:tu|su)\s+\w+\s+al\s+(?:siguiente|próximo)\s+nivel\b/gi,
  /\bsoluci[óo]n\s+integral\b/gi,
  /\bexperiencia\s+[úu]nica\b/gi,
  /\ben\s+constante\s+evoluci[óo]n\b/gi,
  /\bpotenciar\s+(?:tu|su)\b/gi,
  /\bdescubre\s+el\s+poder\b/gi,
  // Inglés
  /\bin\s+today'?s\s+(?:fast[-\s]?paced\s+)?world\b/gi,
  /\bin\s+the\s+digital\s+age\b/gi,
  /\bunlock\s+the\s+(?:power|potential)\b/gi,
  /\belevate\s+your\b/gi,
  /\btake\s+(?:your|it)\s+\w+\s+to\s+the\s+next\s+level\b/gi,
  /\bseamlessly\s+integrate\b/gi,
  /\bgame[-\s]?chang(?:er|ing)\b/gi,
  /\bdelve\s+into\b/gi,
  /\bcutting[-\s]?edge\b/gi,
  /\bleverage\s+the\s+power\b/gi,
  /\bwhen\s+it\s+comes\s+to\b/gi,
  /\bbustling\b/gi,
  /\btapestry\b/gi,
  /\bin\s+conclusion\b/gi,
];

// Adjetivos/adverbios "huecos" frecuentes en relleno de IA.
const FILLER_WORDS = new Set<string>([
  'innovador', 'innovadora', 'revolucionario', 'revolucionaria', 'robusto',
  'robusta', 'potente', 'vanguardia', 'excepcional', 'increible', 'increíble',
  'innovative', 'revolutionary', 'robust', 'powerful', 'seamless',
  'cutting-edge', 'state-of-the-art', 'world-class', 'unparalleled',
  'unleash', 'empower', 'transformative', 'holistic',
]);

export interface GenericAiAssessment {
  /** 0 (humano/específico) .. 1 (muy genérico). */
  riskScore: number;
  risk: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
  matchedPhrases: string[];
  fillerCount: number;
}

export function assessGenericAiContent(text: string): GenericAiAssessment {
  if (!text || !text.trim()) {
    return { riskScore: 0, risk: 'low', matchedPhrases: [], fillerCount: 0 };
  }

  const matchedPhrases: string[] = [];
  for (const pattern of GENERIC_PHRASES) {
    pattern.lastIndex = 0;
    const matches = text.match(pattern);
    if (matches) {
      for (const m of matches) matchedPhrases.push(m.trim());
    }
  }

  const tokens = tokenize(text);
  const tokenCount = Math.max(tokens.length, 1);
  let fillerCount = 0;
  for (const token of tokens) {
    if (FILLER_WORDS.has(token)) fillerCount += 1;
  }

  // Densidad de relleno por cada 100 tokens.
  const fillerDensity = (fillerCount / tokenCount) * 100;

  // Combinamos frases genéricas (peso alto) y densidad de relleno.
  const phraseScore = Math.min(matchedPhrases.length * 0.22, 0.8);
  const fillerScore = Math.min(fillerDensity * 0.05, 0.4);
  const riskScore = Math.min(Number((phraseScore + fillerScore).toFixed(3)), 1);

  const risk: GenericAiAssessment['risk'] =
    riskScore >= 0.5 ? 'high' : riskScore >= 0.25 ? 'medium' : 'low';

  return {
    riskScore,
    risk,
    matchedPhrases: Array.from(new Set(matchedPhrases)),
    fillerCount,
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/geo-analyzer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Analizador GEO/AEO (Generative Engine Optimization / Answer Engine
 * Optimization). Evalúa la preparación del contenido para ser citado por
 * motores generativos: claridad definicional, entidades, estructura de
 * preguntas/respuestas y contenido citable.
 */

import { ExtractedPage, GeoAnalysis, SeoGeoRisk, QuickWin, SuggestedChange } from './types';
import { extractEntities } from './keyword-entity';

interface ScoreBucket {
  earned: number;
  possible: number;
}

function add(bucket: ScoreBucket, earned: number, possible: number): void {
  bucket.earned += earned;
  bucket.possible += possible;
}

// Frase definicional: "X es/son un...", "X is/are a...", "X ist ein...".
const DEFINITION_RE = /\b[\wÁÉÍÓÚÑáéíóúñ-]+(?:\s+[\wÁÉÍÓÚÑáéíóúñ-]+){0,4}\s+(?:es|son|is|are|ist|sind)\s+(?:un|una|unos|unas|el|la|a|an|the|ein|eine)\b/i;

// Cifras/datos citables con potencial de cita.
const CITABLE_STAT_RE = /\b\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?\s?(?:%|por\s?ciento|percent|€|\$|años?|years?|millones?|million|k|m)(?!\w)/i;

export function analyzeGeo(page: ExtractedPage): GeoAnalysis {
  const risks: SeoGeoRisk[] = [];
  const quickWins: QuickWin[] = [];
  const suggestedChanges: SuggestedChange[] = [];
  const bucket: ScoreBucket = { earned: 0, possible: 0 };

  const entities = extractEntities(page.bodyText);

  // --- Claridad definicional (20) ---
  const firstChunk = page.bodyText.slice(0, 600);
  const hasDefinition = DEFINITION_RE.test(firstChunk);
  if (hasDefinition) {
    add(bucket, 20, 20);
  } else {
    add(bucket, 4, 20);
    risks.push({
      id: 'geo.definition.missing',
      severity: 'high',
      category: 'geo',
      message: 'No hay una frase definicional clara al inicio ("X es un...").',
      recommendation: 'Abre con una definición autocontenida que un motor pueda citar literalmente.',
    });
    suggestedChanges.push({
      field: 'content.lead-definition',
      suggested: `${page.headings.h1[0] ?? page.title ?? 'El producto'} es un/una [categoría] que [beneficio principal] para [audiencia].`,
      reason: 'La respuesta directa al inicio mejora la citabilidad en motores generativos.',
      applied: false,
    });
  }

  // --- Entidades principales (20) ---
  if (entities.length >= 3) {
    add(bucket, 20, 20);
  } else if (entities.length > 0) {
    add(bucket, 10, 20);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'geo',
      effort: 'medium',
      message: `Pocas entidades nombradas (${entities.length}). Nombra productos, lugares y marcas explícitamente.`,
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 0, 20);
    risks.push({
      id: 'geo.entities.missing',
      severity: 'medium',
      category: 'geo',
      message: 'No se detectan entidades nombradas claras.',
      recommendation: 'Menciona entidades concretas (marca, ubicación, categoría) para anclar el contenido.',
    });
  }

  // --- Estructura de preguntas/respuestas (20) ---
  const questionHeadings = [...page.headings.h2, ...page.headings.h3].filter((h) => h.includes('?'));
  const faqCount = page.faqs.length;
  if (faqCount >= 2 || questionHeadings.length >= 2) {
    add(bucket, 20, 20);
  } else if (faqCount >= 1 || questionHeadings.length >= 1) {
    add(bucket, 11, 20);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'geo',
      effort: 'medium',
      message: 'Amplía la sección de preguntas/respuestas; las FAQs son altamente citables.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 0, 20);
    risks.push({
      id: 'geo.qa.missing',
      severity: 'medium',
      category: 'geo',
      message: 'No hay estructura de preguntas/respuestas (FAQ) que los motores puedan citar.',
      recommendation: 'Añade 3-5 preguntas reales de usuario con respuestas concisas y autocontenidas.',
    });
    suggestedChanges.push({
      field: 'content.faq',
      suggested: '## ¿Pregunta frecuente?\nRespuesta directa de 1-2 frases, autocontenida y verificable.',
      reason: 'Las FAQ aportan bloques de respuesta directamente citables por LLMs.',
      applied: false,
    });
  }

  // --- Contenido citable / datos (15) ---
  const hasStats = CITABLE_STAT_RE.test(page.bodyText);
  const sentences = page.bodyText.split(/(?<=[.!?])\s+/).filter((s) => s.trim().length > 0);
  const concise = sentences.filter((s) => s.split(/\s+/).length <= 28).length;
  const conciseRatio = sentences.length > 0 ? concise / sentences.length : 0;
  if (hasStats && conciseRatio >= 0.5) {
    add(bucket, 15, 15);
  } else if (hasStats || conciseRatio >= 0.5) {
    add(bucket, 9, 15);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'geo',
      effort: 'medium',
      message: 'Refuerza con datos verificables y frases concisas (≤ 28 palabras) para mejorar la citabilidad.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 3, 15);
    risks.push({
      id: 'geo.citable.weak',
      severity: 'low',
      category: 'geo',
      message: 'Contenido poco citable: faltan datos concretos y abundan frases largas.',
      recommendation: 'Incluye cifras con fuente y divide frases largas en afirmaciones autocontenidas.',
    });
  }

  // --- Datos estructurados JSON-LD (15) ---
  const validJsonLd = page.jsonLd.filter((b) => !isParseError(b));
  const hasAnswerSchema = validJsonLd.some((b) => hasSchemaType(b, ['FAQPage', 'QAPage', 'HowTo', 'Article', 'Organization']));
  if (validJsonLd.length > 0 && hasAnswerSchema) {
    add(bucket, 15, 15);
  } else if (validJsonLd.length > 0) {
    add(bucket, 8, 15);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'geo',
      effort: 'medium',
      message: 'Hay JSON-LD pero sin schema orientado a respuestas (FAQPage/Article); añádelo.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 0, 15);
    if (page.jsonLd.some(isParseError)) {
      risks.push({
        id: 'geo.jsonld.invalid',
        severity: 'medium',
        category: 'geo',
        message: 'Existe JSON-LD pero está malformado y no se puede parsear.',
        recommendation: 'Corrige el JSON-LD; un schema inválido no aporta señales.',
      });
    } else {
      risks.push({
        id: 'geo.jsonld.missing',
        severity: 'low',
        category: 'geo',
        message: 'No hay datos estructurados JSON-LD.',
        recommendation: 'Añade schema.org (FAQPage, Article u Organization) para reforzar las entidades.',
      });
    }
  }

  // --- hreflang/i18n (10) ---
  if (page.hreflang.length > 0) {
    add(bucket, 10, 10);
    const hasXDefault = page.hreflang.some((h) => h.lang.toLowerCase() === 'x-default');
    if (!hasXDefault) {
      quickWins.push({
        category: 'geo',
        effort: 'low',
        message: 'Define un hreflang x-default para usuarios fuera de los idiomas listados.',
      });
    }
  } else if (page.format === 'html') {
    add(bucket, 5, 10);
  } else {
    add(bucket, 7, 10);
  }

  const score = bucket.possible > 0 ? Math.round((bucket.earned / bucket.possible) * 100) : 0;

  return { score, risks, quickWins, suggestedChanges };
}

function isParseError(block: unknown): boolean {
  return Boolean(block && typeof block === 'object' && (block as Record<string, unknown>).__parseError);
}

function hasSchemaType(block: unknown, types: string[]): boolean {
  let found = false;
  const visit = (node: unknown): void => {
    if (found || !node || typeof node !== 'object') return;
    if (Array.isArray(node)) {
      node.forEach(visit);
      return;
    }
    const obj = node as Record<string, unknown>;
    const t = obj['@type'];
    if (typeof t === 'string' && types.includes(t)) found = true;
    else if (Array.isArray(t) && t.some((x) => typeof x === 'string' && types.includes(x))) found = true;
    for (const value of Object.values(obj)) {
      if (value && typeof value === 'object') visit(value);
    }
  };
  visit(block);
  return found;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/guardian.ts
================================================
/**
 * Orquestador del Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian (Fase 1, read-only).
 *
 * Recibe archivos (ruta + contenido), los normaliza con el extractor, ejecuta
 * los analizadores SEO y GEO, deriva keywords/entidades, calcula el gate por
 * archivo y agrega un informe global. No realiza ninguna escritura: la lectura
 * de disco se encapsula en helpers opcionales que SOLO leen.
 */

import { analyzeSeo } from './seo-analyzer';
import { analyzeGeo } from './geo-analyzer';
import { extractPage } from './extractor';
import { computeGate, aggregateGate, applyBrandFitToGate } from './gate';
import { extractEntities, extractKeywords } from './keyword-entity';
import { analyzeBrandFit, aggregateBrandFit } from './brand-fit-analyzer';
import {
  FileAuditResult,
  GuardianReport,
  GuardianBrandSection,
  QuickWin,
  SeoGeoRisk,
} from './types';
import {
  BrandFitResult,
  BrandProductProfile,
  DetectedProduct,
} from './brand-types';

export interface SourceFile {
  path: string;
  content: string;
}

/** Contexto de marca (read-only) que el caller resuelve y pasa al Guardian. */
export interface BrandAuditContext {
  contractAvailable: boolean;
  contractPath?: string;
  detectedProduct?: DetectedProduct;
  profile?: BrandProductProfile;
  allProducts?: BrandProductProfile[];
  /** Warnings de carga/parseo/detección a reflejar en el informe. */
  warnings?: string[];
}

const SEVERITY_RANK: Record<string, number> = {
  critical: 0,
  high: 1,
  medium: 2,
  low: 3,
};

/**
 * Audita un único archivo y devuelve su resultado.
 * Si se aporta `brand`, añade evaluación de Brand Fit y la integra en el gate.
 */
export function auditFile(file: SourceFile, brand?: BrandAuditContext): FileAuditResult {
  const page = extractPage(file.path, file.content);

  const seo = analyzeSeo(page);
  const geo = analyzeGeo(page);

  const risks = [...seo.risks, ...geo.risks];
  const quickWins = [...seo.quickWins, ...geo.quickWins];
  const suggestedChanges = [...seo.suggestedChanges, ...geo.suggestedChanges];

  const keywords = extractKeywords(`${page.title ?? ''} ${page.bodyText}`, 10);
  const entities = extractEntities(page.bodyText, 10);

  let gate = computeGate(seo.score, geo.score, risks);

  let brandFit: BrandFitResult | undefined;
  if (brand) {
    const pageText = [
      page.title ?? '',
      ...page.headings.h1,
      ...page.headings.h2,
      ...page.headings.h3,
      page.bodyText,
    ].join('\n');
    brandFit = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: pageText,
      profile: brand.profile,
      detected: brand.detectedProduct,
      contractAvailable: brand.contractAvailable,
      allProducts: brand.allProducts,
    });
    gate = applyBrandFitToGate(gate, brandFit.status);
  }

  return {
    filePath: file.path,
    format: page.format,
    seoScore: seo.score,
    geoScore: geo.score,
    gate,
    keywords,
    entities,
    risks,
    quickWins,
    suggestedChanges,
    brandFit,
  };
}

/**
 * Audita un conjunto de archivos y construye el informe global.
 */
export function auditFiles(
  files: SourceFile[],
  options: { generatedAt?: string; brand?: BrandAuditContext } = {},
): GuardianReport {
  const { brand } = options;
  const fileResults = files.map((file) => auditFile(file, brand));

  const filesAnalyzed = fileResults.length;
  const averageSeoScore = average(fileResults.map((f) => f.seoScore));
  const averageGeoScore = average(fileResults.map((f) => f.geoScore));

  const allRisks: SeoGeoRisk[] = fileResults.flatMap((f) =>
    f.risks.map((r) => ({ ...r, filePath: r.filePath ?? f.filePath })),
  );
  const criticalRisks = dedupeRisks(allRisks.filter((r) => r.severity === 'critical'));

  const topQuickWins = dedupeQuickWins(
    fileResults.flatMap((f) => f.quickWins),
  ).slice(0, 10);

  let gate = aggregateGate(fileResults.map((f) => f.gate));

  let brandSection: GuardianBrandSection | undefined;
  if (brand) {
    const perFileBrandFit = fileResults
      .map((f) => f.brandFit)
      .filter((b): b is BrandFitResult => Boolean(b));
    const aggregatedBrandFit = aggregateBrandFit(perFileBrandFit);
    gate = applyBrandFitToGate(gate, aggregatedBrandFit.status);

    const warnings = Array.from(new Set(brand.warnings ?? []));
    if (aggregatedBrandFit.status === 'SKIPPED' && !warnings.length) {
      warnings.push('Brand contract not found; Brand Fit evaluation skipped.');
    }

    brandSection = {
      contractFound: brand.contractAvailable,
      contractPath: brand.contractPath,
      detectedProduct: brand.detectedProduct,
      brandFit: aggregatedBrandFit,
      warnings,
    };
  }

  return {
    agent: 'Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian',
    phase: 1,
    mode: 'read-only',
    generatedAt: options.generatedAt ?? new Date().toISOString(),
    filesAnalyzed,
    averageSeoScore,
    averageGeoScore,
    gate,
    criticalRisks: sortBySeverity(criticalRisks),
    topQuickWins,
    fileResults,
    brand: brandSection,
  };
}

function average(values: number[]): number {
  if (values.length === 0) return 0;
  const sum = values.reduce((acc, v) => acc + v, 0);
  return Math.round(sum / values.length);
}

function sortBySeverity(risks: SeoGeoRisk[]): SeoGeoRisk[] {
  return [...risks].sort((a, b) => SEVERITY_RANK[a.severity] - SEVERITY_RANK[b.severity]);
}

function dedupeRisks(risks: SeoGeoRisk[]): SeoGeoRisk[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const out: SeoGeoRisk[] = [];
  for (const risk of risks) {
    const key = `${risk.filePath ?? ''}::${risk.id}`;
    if (seen.has(key)) continue;
    seen.add(key);
    out.push(risk);
  }
  return out;
}

function dedupeQuickWins(wins: QuickWin[]): QuickWin[] {
  const seen = new Set<string>();
  const out: QuickWin[] = [];
  for (const win of wins) {
    if (seen.has(win.message)) continue;
    seen.add(win.message);
    out.push(win);
  }
  return out;
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/keyword-entity.ts
