/**
 * Extracción heurística de keywords y entidades.
 *
 * Fase 1: implementación determinista, sin dependencias externas ni LLM,
 * para poder testear el scoring y la comparación entre alternativas de copy.
 */

const STOPWORDS = new Set<string>([
  // Español
  'el', 'la', 'los', 'las', 'un', 'una', 'unos', 'unas', 'y', 'o', 'u', 'de',
  'del', 'al', 'a', 'ante', 'con', 'por', 'para', 'sin', 'sobre', 'tras', 'que',
  'es', 'son', 'ser', 'su', 'sus', 'lo', 'le', 'les', 'se', 'no', 'si', 'mas',
  'pero', 'como', 'muy', 'ya', 'este', 'esta', 'estos', 'estas', 'ese', 'esa',
  'esto', 'eso', 'entre', 'cuando', 'donde', 'porque', 'desde', 'hasta', 'cada',
  // Inglés
  'the', 'a', 'an', 'and', 'or', 'of', 'to', 'in', 'on', 'for', 'with', 'without',
  'is', 'are', 'be', 'been', 'this', 'that', 'these', 'those', 'it', 'its', 'as',
  'at', 'by', 'from', 'your', 'you', 'we', 'our', 'us', 'they', 'their', 'but',
  'so', 'if', 'than', 'then', 'into', 'about', 'more', 'most', 'can', 'will',
  // Alemán
  'der', 'die', 'das', 'ein', 'eine', 'und', 'oder', 'mit', 'für', 'von', 'ist',
  'sind', 'dass', 'den', 'dem', 'des', 'im', 'zu', 'auf', 'auch', 'als', 'aus',
]);

const TOKEN_REGEX = /[\p{L}\p{N}][\p{L}\p{N}'-]*/gu;

export function tokenize(text: string): string[] {
  if (!text) return [];
  const matches = text.toLowerCase().match(TOKEN_REGEX);
  return matches ? matches : [];
}

function isMeaningfulToken(token: string): boolean {
  if (token.length < 3) return false;
  if (STOPWORDS.has(token)) return false;
  if (/^\d+$/.test(token)) return false;
  return true;
}

/**
 * Extrae las keywords más relevantes por frecuencia (unigramas + bigramas).
 */
export function extractKeywords(text: string, topN = 12): string[] {
  const tokens = tokenize(text);
  const counts = new Map<string, number>();

  for (const token of tokens) {
    if (!isMeaningfulToken(token)) continue;
    counts.set(token, (counts.get(token) ?? 0) + 1);
  }

  // Bigramas (dos tokens significativos consecutivos).
  for (let i = 0; i < tokens.length - 1; i += 1) {
    const a = tokens[i];
    const b = tokens[i + 1];
    if (!isMeaningfulToken(a) || !isMeaningfulToken(b)) continue;
    const bigram = `${a} ${b}`;
    // Los bigramas pesan un poco más por especificidad.
    counts.set(bigram, (counts.get(bigram) ?? 0) + 1.5);
  }

  return Array.from(counts.entries())
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1] || a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))
    .slice(0, topN)
    .map(([keyword]) => keyword);
}

/**
 * Detecta entidades nombradas mediante heurística de capitalización.
 * Reconoce secuencias de palabras capitalizadas y marcas Anclora.
 */
export function extractEntities(text: string, topN = 12): string[] {
  if (!text) return [];

  const entities = new Map<string, number>();
  const properRegex = /\b([A-ZÁÉÍÓÚÑ][\p{L}&-]+(?:\s+(?:[A-ZÁÉÍÓÚÑ][\p{L}&-]+|de|del|la|y))*)\b/gu;

  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((match = properRegex.exec(text)) !== null) {
    const raw = match[1].trim();
    // Ignorar palabras sueltas que solo están capitalizadas por inicio de frase.
    const words = raw.split(/\s+/);
    const isMultiWord = words.length > 1;
    const isKnownBrand = /anclora/i.test(raw);
    if (!isMultiWord && !isKnownBrand) continue;
    if (raw.length < 3) continue;
    entities.set(raw, (entities.get(raw) ?? 0) + 1);
  }

  return Array.from(entities.entries())
    .sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1] || a[0].localeCompare(b[0]))
    .slice(0, topN)
    .map(([entity]) => entity);
}

/**
 * Comprueba si un texto contiene una keyword/frase (case-insensitive,
 * tolerante a acentos para comparaciones de cobertura).
 */
export function containsTerm(text: string, term: string): boolean {
  if (!text || !term) return false;
  return normalizeForMatch(text).includes(normalizeForMatch(term));
}

export function normalizeForMatch(value: string): string {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .trim();
}

/**
 * Calcula qué términos de una lista están presentes/ausentes en un texto.
 */
export function termCoverage(
  text: string,
  terms: string[],
): { retained: string[]; dropped: string[] } {
  const retained: string[] = [];
  const dropped: string[] = [];
  for (const term of terms) {
    if (containsTerm(text, term)) {
      retained.push(term);
    } else {
      dropped.push(term);
    }
  }
  return { retained, dropped };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/playground-evaluation.ts
================================================
/**
 * Integración del guardián con el Hermes Copy Playground — SOLO evaluación.
 *
 * Cada alternativa de copy generada por Hermes recibe una valoración SEO/GEO
 * y un veredicto `autoApplySafe`. El guardián BLOQUEA la aplicación de una
 * alternativa cuando:
 *   - elimina keywords críticas presentes en el texto base,
 *   - elimina entidades principales,
 *   - cambia claims sensibles (garantías, cifras, superlativos, legal...).
 *
 * Fase 1: este módulo nunca aplica cambios; solo evalúa y recomienda.
 */

import {
  extractEntities,
  extractKeywords,
  termCoverage,
} from './keyword-entity';
import { compareSensitiveClaims, SensitiveClaim } from './sensitive-claims';
import { assessGenericAiContent } from './generic-ai-detector';
import { analyzeBrandFit } from './brand-fit-analyzer';
import {
  BrandFitPlaygroundSummary,
  BrandProductProfile,
  DetectedProduct,
} from './brand-types';

/** Contexto de marca opcional para evaluar Brand Fit en el playground. */
export interface CopyAlternativeBrandContext {
  contractAvailable: boolean;
  profile?: BrandProductProfile;
  detected?: DetectedProduct;
  allProducts?: BrandProductProfile[];
}

export interface CopyAlternativeEvaluationInput {
  /** Texto base / original sobre el que se compara la alternativa. */
  baseline: string;
  /** Alternativa de copy a evaluar. */
  alternative: string;
  /** Keywords críticas explícitas; si no se pasan, se derivan del baseline. */
  criticalKeywords?: string[];
  /** Entidades principales explícitas; si no se pasan, se derivan del baseline. */
  primaryEntities?: string[];
  /** Contexto de marca (opcional). Sin él, Brand Fit queda SKIPPED. */
  brand?: CopyAlternativeBrandContext;
}

export interface CopyAlternativeEvaluation {
  /** Score SEO 0..100 de la alternativa frente al baseline. */
  seoScore: number;
  /** Score GEO 0..100 de la alternativa frente al baseline. */
  geoScore: number;
  keywordsRetained: string[];
  keywordsDropped: string[];
  entitiesRetained: string[];
  entitiesDropped: string[];
  sensitiveClaimsChanged: boolean;
  removedClaims: SensitiveClaim[];
  addedClaims: SensitiveClaim[];
  /** false si la alternativa NO debe aplicarse automáticamente. */
  autoApplySafe: boolean;
  /** Motivos por los que se bloquea la auto-aplicación. */
  blockReasons: string[];
  warnings: string[];
  /** Evaluación de Brand Fit de la alternativa (si hay contexto de marca). */
  brandFit?: BrandFitPlaygroundSummary;
}

const SEO_WEIGHTS = {
  keywordRetention: 60,
  noGenericRegression: 25,
  lengthSanity: 15,
};

const GEO_WEIGHTS = {
  entityRetention: 60,
  claimIntegrity: 25,
  conciseness: 15,
};

export function evaluateCopyAlternative(
  input: CopyAlternativeEvaluationInput,
): CopyAlternativeEvaluation {
  const baseline = input.baseline ?? '';
  const alternative = input.alternative ?? '';

  const criticalKeywords =
    input.criticalKeywords && input.criticalKeywords.length > 0
      ? input.criticalKeywords
      : extractKeywords(baseline, 6);

  const primaryEntities =
    input.primaryEntities && input.primaryEntities.length > 0
      ? input.primaryEntities
      : extractEntities(baseline, 6);

  const keywordCov = termCoverage(alternative, criticalKeywords);
  const entityCov = termCoverage(alternative, primaryEntities);
  const claimsDiff = compareSensitiveClaims(baseline, alternative);

  const baseGeneric = assessGenericAiContent(baseline);
  const altGeneric = assessGenericAiContent(alternative);

  const blockReasons: string[] = [];
  const warnings: string[] = [];

  // --- Reglas de bloqueo (no aplicar) ---
  if (keywordCov.dropped.length > 0) {
    blockReasons.push(
      `drops_critical_keywords:${keywordCov.dropped.join(',')}`,
    );
  }
  if (entityCov.dropped.length > 0) {
    blockReasons.push(`drops_primary_entities:${entityCov.dropped.join(',')}`);
  }
  if (claimsDiff.changed) {
    blockReasons.push('changes_sensitive_claims');
  }

  // --- Avisos (no bloquean pero penalizan) ---
  if (altGeneric.riskScore > baseGeneric.riskScore + 0.1) {
    warnings.push('increases_generic_ai_risk');
  }

  // --- Brand Fit (solo evaluación) ---
  let brandFit: BrandFitPlaygroundSummary | undefined;
  if (input.brand) {
    const fit = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: alternative,
      baseline,
      profile: input.brand.profile,
      detected: input.brand.detected,
      contractAvailable: input.brand.contractAvailable,
      allProducts: input.brand.allProducts,
    });

    // Reglas: FAIL, claim prohibido o entidad crítica eliminada → no auto-aplicar.
    for (const reason of fit.blockReasons) {
      if (!blockReasons.includes(reason)) blockReasons.push(reason);
    }
    if (fit.status === 'FAIL' && !fit.blockReasons.length) {
      blockReasons.push('brand_fit_fail');
    }
    for (const w of fit.warnings) {
      if (!warnings.includes(`brand:${w}`)) warnings.push(`brand:${w}`);
    }

    brandFit = {
      score: fit.score,
      status: fit.status,
      productId: fit.productId,
      productName: fit.productName,
      blockReasons: fit.blockReasons,
      warnings: fit.warnings,
    };
  }

  // --- Score SEO ---
  const keywordRetentionRatio =
    criticalKeywords.length > 0
      ? keywordCov.retained.length / criticalKeywords.length
      : 1;
  const genericRegression = Math.max(0, altGeneric.riskScore - baseGeneric.riskScore);
  const lengthRatio = baseline.length > 0 ? alternative.length / baseline.length : 1;
  const lengthSanity = lengthRatio >= 0.6 && lengthRatio <= 1.6 ? 1 : 0.4;

  const seoScore = Math.round(
    SEO_WEIGHTS.keywordRetention * keywordRetentionRatio +
      SEO_WEIGHTS.noGenericRegression * (1 - Math.min(genericRegression * 2, 1)) +
      SEO_WEIGHTS.lengthSanity * lengthSanity,
  );

  // --- Score GEO ---
  const entityRetentionRatio =
    primaryEntities.length > 0
      ? entityCov.retained.length / primaryEntities.length
      : 1;
  const claimIntegrity = claimsDiff.changed ? 0 : 1;
  const altConcise = assessConciseness(alternative);

  const geoScore = Math.round(
    GEO_WEIGHTS.entityRetention * entityRetentionRatio +
      GEO_WEIGHTS.claimIntegrity * claimIntegrity +
      GEO_WEIGHTS.conciseness * altConcise,
  );

  return {
    seoScore: clamp(seoScore),
    geoScore: clamp(geoScore),
    keywordsRetained: keywordCov.retained,
    keywordsDropped: keywordCov.dropped,
    entitiesRetained: entityCov.retained,
    entitiesDropped: entityCov.dropped,
    sensitiveClaimsChanged: claimsDiff.changed,
    removedClaims: claimsDiff.removed,
    addedClaims: claimsDiff.added,
    autoApplySafe: blockReasons.length === 0,
    blockReasons,
    warnings,
    brandFit,
  };
}

function assessConciseness(text: string): number {
  if (!text.trim()) return 0;
  const words = text.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length;
  // Copy ideal: conciso. Penaliza textos muy largos.
  if (words <= 30) return 1;
  if (words <= 60) return 0.7;
  return 0.4;
}

function clamp(value: number): number {
  if (value < 0) return 0;
  if (value > 100) return 100;
  return value;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/product-detector.ts
================================================
/**
 * Detector de producto/repo auditado (PURO, sin fs).
 *
 * Combina señales (nombre de carpeta, `package.json`, README, contenido) para
 * identificar a qué producto del ecosistema Anclora pertenece lo auditado, y
 * así aplicar la ficha de marca correspondiente. Ante ambigüedad devuelve
 * `confidence` baja para que el Guardian añada un warning (nunca PASS limpio).
 */

import { BrandProductProfile, DetectedProduct } from './brand-types';
import { normalizeForMatch } from './keyword-entity';

export interface ProductDetectionSignals {
  /** Nombre de la carpeta del repo. */
  repoName?: string;
  /** Campo `name` de package.json. */
  packageJsonName?: string;
  /** Contenido del README. */
  readme?: string;
  /** Muestra de contenido agregado (títulos, body, etc.). */
  contentSample?: string;
}

interface KnownProduct {
  productId: string;
  displayName: string;
  /** Aliases de id/carpeta (slugs equivalentes). */
  idAliases: string[];
  /** Marcas/entidades que evidencian el producto en el contenido. */
  markers: string[];
}

/** Registro mínimo de los 13 productos del ecosistema. */
export const KNOWN_PRODUCTS: KnownProduct[] = [
  { productId: 'anclora-group', displayName: 'Anclora Group', idAliases: ['anclora-group', 'ancloragroup', 'anclora'], markers: ['anclora group'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-nexus', displayName: 'Anclora Nexus', idAliases: ['anclora-nexus', 'ancloranexus'], markers: ['anclora nexus'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-content-generator-ai', displayName: 'Anclora Content Generator AI', idAliases: ['anclora-content-generator-ai', 'anclora-content-generator', 'content-generator-ai'], markers: ['content generator', 'generación de contenido', 'hermes'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-private-estates', displayName: 'Anclora Private Estates', idAliases: ['anclora-private-estates', 'ancloraprivateestates'], markers: ['private estates', 'villas de lujo', 'real estate'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-private-estates-landing', displayName: 'Anclora Private Estates Landing', idAliases: ['anclora-private-estates-landing', 'private-estates-landing'], markers: ['private estates'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-data-lab', displayName: 'Anclora Data Lab', idAliases: ['anclora-data-lab', 'ancloradatalab', 'data-lab'], markers: ['data lab', 'datos', 'analytics'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-synergi', displayName: 'Anclora Synergi', idAliases: ['anclora-synergi', 'anclorasynergi', 'synergi'], markers: ['synergi'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-advisor-ai', displayName: 'Anclora Advisor AI', idAliases: ['anclora-advisor-ai', 'advisor-ai', 'ancloradvisor'], markers: ['advisor'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-energyscan', displayName: 'Anclora Energyscan', idAliases: ['anclora-energyscan', 'ancloraenergyscan', 'energyscan'], markers: ['energyscan', 'energy scan', 'eficiencia energética'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-syncxml', displayName: 'Anclora SyncXML', idAliases: ['anclora-syncxml', 'anclora_syncxml', 'ancloraSyncxml', 'syncxml'], markers: ['syncxml', 'sync xml', 'feeds xml', 'feed xml'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-linguo-cam', displayName: 'Anclora Linguo Cam', idAliases: ['anclora-linguo-cam', 'anclora_linguo_cam', 'linguo-cam', 'linguo'], markers: ['linguo'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-talent', displayName: 'Anclora Talent', idAliases: ['anclora-talent', 'ancloratalent', 'talent'], markers: ['talent', 'talento'] },
  { productId: 'anclora-impulso', displayName: 'Anclora Impulso', idAliases: ['anclora-impulso', 'ancloraimpulso', 'impulso'], markers: ['impulso'] },
];

function normalizeId(value: string): string {
  return value
    .normalize('NFD')
    .replace(/[̀-ͯ]/g, '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
}

/**
 * Detecta el producto a partir de las señales disponibles.
 * Confianza:
 *  - 0.95 si la id de carpeta/package coincide exactamente con un alias;
 *  - 0.6–0.85 si coincide por marcadores de contenido;
 *  - 0.0 si no hay coincidencia clara.
 */
export function detectProduct(
  signals: ProductDetectionSignals,
  contractProducts: BrandProductProfile[] = [],
): DetectedProduct {
  const evidence: string[] = [];
  const idCandidates = [signals.repoName, signals.packageJsonName]
    .filter((v): v is string => Boolean(v))
    .map((v) => normalizeId(v.replace(/^@[^/]+\//, '')));

  // 1) Coincidencia fuerte por id de carpeta / package.json.
  for (const known of KNOWN_PRODUCTS) {
    const aliasNorms = known.idAliases.map(normalizeId);
    for (const candidate of idCandidates) {
      if (aliasNorms.includes(candidate)) {
        evidence.push(`id match: "${candidate}" → ${known.productId}`);
        return finalize(known, 0.95, evidence, contractProducts);
      }
    }
  }

  // 2) Coincidencia parcial por id (contiene el slug del producto).
  for (const known of KNOWN_PRODUCTS) {
    const aliasNorms = known.idAliases.map(normalizeId);
    for (const candidate of idCandidates) {
      if (aliasNorms.some((a) => candidate.includes(a) && a.length >= 6)) {
        evidence.push(`partial id match: "${candidate}" ⊃ ${known.productId}`);
        return finalize(known, 0.8, evidence, contractProducts);
      }
    }
  }

  // 3) Coincidencia por marcadores de contenido (README + muestra).
  const haystack = normalizeForMatch(`${signals.readme ?? ''} ${signals.contentSample ?? ''}`);
  if (haystack.trim()) {
    const scored = KNOWN_PRODUCTS.map((known) => {
      const hits = known.markers.filter((mk) => haystack.includes(normalizeForMatch(mk)));
      return { known, hits };
    }).filter((s) => s.hits.length > 0);

    scored.sort((a, b) => b.hits.length - a.hits.length);

    if (scored.length === 1 || (scored.length > 1 && scored[0].hits.length > scored[1].hits.length)) {
      const best = scored[0];
      evidence.push(`content markers: ${best.hits.join(', ')}`);
      const confidence = Math.min(0.6 + best.hits.length * 0.1, 0.85);
      return finalize(best.known, confidence, evidence, contractProducts);
    }

    if (scored.length > 1) {
      // Empate → ambigüedad: baja confianza con el primero.
      const best = scored[0];
      evidence.push(
        `ambiguous content markers between ${scored.slice(0, 2).map((s) => s.known.productId).join(' / ')}`,
      );
      return finalize(best.known, 0.35, evidence, contractProducts);
    }
  }

  evidence.push('no product signal matched');
  return { productId: 'unknown', displayName: 'Unknown', confidence: 0, evidence };
}

function finalize(
  known: KnownProduct,
  confidence: number,
  evidence: string[],
  contractProducts: BrandProductProfile[],
): DetectedProduct {
  // Si el contrato define el producto con otro displayName, respétalo.
  const fromContract = contractProducts.find(
    (p) => normalizeId(p.productId) === normalizeId(known.productId),
  );
  return {
    productId: known.productId,
    displayName: fromContract?.displayName ?? known.displayName,
    confidence,
    evidence,
  };
}

/** Resuelve la ficha de producto del contrato para un producto detectado. */
export function resolveProductProfile(
  detected: DetectedProduct,
  contractProducts: BrandProductProfile[],
): BrandProductProfile | undefined {
  return contractProducts.find(
    (p) => normalizeId(p.productId) === normalizeId(detected.productId),
  );
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/report-renderer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Renderizado del informe Markdown del Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian (Fase 1).
 */

import {
  FileAuditResult,
  GuardianReport,
  GuardianBrandSection,
  QuickWin,
  SeoGeoRisk,
  SuggestedChange,
} from './types';
import { BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE } from './brand-types';

const GATE_BADGE: Record<string, string> = {
  PASS: '✅ PASS',
  PASS_WITH_WARNINGS: '⚠️ PASS_WITH_WARNINGS',
  FAIL: '❌ FAIL',
};

const SEVERITY_ORDER: Record<string, number> = {
  critical: 0,
  high: 1,
  medium: 2,
  low: 3,
};

export function renderGuardianReport(report: GuardianReport): string {
  const lines: string[] = [];

  lines.push('# Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian — Informe de Auditoría');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push('> Fase 1 · Modo **read-only**. El agente no modifica archivos, no crea ramas, no hace commits ni push. Todos los cambios se entregan como sugerencias.');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push(`- **Generado:** ${report.generatedAt}`);
  lines.push(`- **Archivos analizados:** ${report.filesAnalyzed}`);
  lines.push(`- **Score SEO medio:** ${report.averageSeoScore}/100`);
  lines.push(`- **Score GEO medio:** ${report.averageGeoScore}/100`);
  lines.push(`- **Gate final:** ${GATE_BADGE[report.gate] ?? report.gate}`);
  lines.push('');

  // Brand Identity / Brand Fit.
  lines.push(...renderBrandSection(report.brand));
  lines.push('');

  // Riesgos críticos.
  lines.push('## 🚨 Riesgos críticos');
  lines.push('');
  if (report.criticalRisks.length === 0) {
    lines.push('Sin riesgos críticos detectados.');
  } else {
    for (const risk of report.criticalRisks) {
      lines.push(renderRiskLine(risk, true));
    }
  }
  lines.push('');

  // Quick wins globales.
  lines.push('## ⚡ Quick wins');
  lines.push('');
  if (report.topQuickWins.length === 0) {
    lines.push('Sin quick wins destacados.');
  } else {
    for (const win of report.topQuickWins) {
      lines.push(renderQuickWinLine(win));
    }
  }
  lines.push('');

  // Detalle por archivo.
  lines.push('## 📄 Recomendaciones por archivo');
  lines.push('');
  for (const file of report.fileResults) {
    lines.push(...renderFileResult(file));
  }

  lines.push('---');
  lines.push('');
  lines.push('_Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian · Phase 1 · read-only. Las sugerencias requieren revisión humana antes de aplicarse._');
  lines.push('');

  return lines.join('\n');
}

function renderFileResult(file: FileAuditResult): string[] {
  const lines: string[] = [];
  lines.push(`### \`${file.filePath}\``);
  lines.push('');
  const brandBit = file.brandFit
    ? ` · **Brand Fit:** ${file.brandFit.score}/100 (${file.brandFit.status})`
    : '';
  lines.push(
    `**SEO:** ${file.seoScore}/100 · **GEO:** ${file.geoScore}/100 · **Gate:** ${GATE_BADGE[file.gate] ?? file.gate} · **Formato:** \`${file.format}\`${brandBit}`,
  );
  lines.push('');

  if (file.keywords.length > 0) {
    lines.push(`- **Keywords:** ${file.keywords.slice(0, 8).map((k) => `\`${k}\``).join(', ')}`);
  }
  if (file.entities.length > 0) {
    lines.push(`- **Entidades:** ${file.entities.slice(0, 8).map((e) => `\`${e}\``).join(', ')}`);
  }
  lines.push('');

  const sortedRisks = [...file.risks].sort(
    (a, b) => SEVERITY_ORDER[a.severity] - SEVERITY_ORDER[b.severity],
  );
  if (sortedRisks.length > 0) {
    lines.push('**Riesgos:**');
    lines.push('');
    for (const risk of sortedRisks) {
      lines.push(renderRiskLine(risk));
    }
    lines.push('');
  }

  if (file.quickWins.length > 0) {
    lines.push('**Quick wins:**');
    lines.push('');
    for (const win of file.quickWins) {
      lines.push(renderQuickWinLine(win));
    }
    lines.push('');
  }

  if (file.suggestedChanges.length > 0) {
    lines.push('**Cambios sugeridos (no aplicados):**');
    lines.push('');
    for (const change of file.suggestedChanges) {
      lines.push(...renderSuggestedChange(change));
    }
    lines.push('');
  }

  return lines;
}

function renderBrandSection(brand?: GuardianBrandSection): string[] {
  const lines: string[] = [];
  lines.push('## Brand Identity / Brand Fit');
  lines.push('');

  if (!brand) {
    lines.push(BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE);
    return lines;
  }

  if (!brand.contractFound) {
    lines.push(BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE);
    if (brand.contractPath) {
      lines.push('');
      lines.push(`- Contract path (expected): \`${brand.contractPath}\``);
    }
    return lines;
  }

  const fit = brand.brandFit;
  const product = brand.detectedProduct;
  const list = (values: string[]) => (values.length ? values.join(', ') : '—');

  lines.push('- Contract: found');
  lines.push(`- Contract path: ${brand.contractPath ? `\`${brand.contractPath}\`` : '—'}`);
  lines.push(`- Detected product: ${product ? `${product.displayName} (\`${product.productId}\`)` : '—'}`);
  lines.push(`- Confidence: ${product ? `${Math.round(product.confidence * 100)}%` : '—'}`);
  lines.push(`- Evidence: ${product && product.evidence.length ? product.evidence.join('; ') : '—'}`);
  lines.push(`- Brand Fit score: ${fit.score}/100`);
  lines.push(`- Brand Fit status: ${GATE_OR_STATUS_BADGE(fit.status)}`);
  lines.push(`- Preserved critical entities: ${list(fit.preservedCriticalEntities)}`);
  lines.push(`- Missing critical entities: ${list(fit.missingCriticalEntities)}`);
  lines.push(`- Missing primary keywords: ${list(fit.missingPrimaryKeywords)}`);
  lines.push(`- Prohibited claims found: ${list(fit.prohibitedClaimsFound)}`);
  lines.push(`- Caution claims found: ${list(fit.cautionClaimsFound)}`);
  lines.push(`- Missing disclaimers: ${list(fit.disclaimersMissing)}`);
  lines.push(`- Cross-product conflicts: ${list(fit.crossProductConflicts)}`);
  lines.push(`- Block reasons: ${list(fit.blockReasons)}`);
  lines.push(`- Warnings: ${list([...fit.warnings, ...brand.warnings])}`);

  return lines;
}

function GATE_OR_STATUS_BADGE(status: string): string {
  return GATE_BADGE[status] ?? status;
}

function renderRiskLine(risk: SeoGeoRisk, withFile = false): string {
  const sev = risk.severity.toUpperCase();
  const file = withFile && risk.filePath ? ` \`${risk.filePath}\` —` : '';
  const evidence = risk.evidence ? ` _(evidencia: ${truncate(risk.evidence, 80)})_` : '';
  const rec = risk.recommendation ? ` → ${risk.recommendation}` : '';
  return `- \`${sev}\`${file} [${risk.category}] ${risk.message}${evidence}${rec}`;
}

function renderQuickWinLine(win: QuickWin): string {
  return `- [${win.category}/${win.effort}] ${win.message}`;
}

function renderSuggestedChange(change: SuggestedChange): string[] {
  const out: string[] = [];
  out.push(`- **${change.field}** — ${change.reason}`);
  if (change.current) {
    out.push(`  - Actual: \`${truncate(change.current, 120)}\``);
  }
  out.push(`  - Sugerido: \`${truncate(change.suggested, 160)}\``);
  out.push('  - Aplicado: `false` (requiere revisión humana)');
  return out;
}

function truncate(value: string, max: number): string {
  if (value.length <= max) return value;
  return `${value.slice(0, max - 1)}…`;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/sensitive-claims.ts
================================================
/**
 * Detección de "claims sensibles": afirmaciones que no deben alterarse
 * silenciosamente al curar copy (garantías, cifras, rendimiento financiero,
 * superlativos absolutos, lenguaje regulado, etc.).
 *
 * El guardián usa esto para BLOQUEAR la aplicación de cualquier alternativa
 * de copy que cambie un claim sensible respecto al texto base.
 */

import { normalizeForMatch } from './keyword-entity';

export interface SensitiveClaim {
  type:
    | 'guarantee'
    | 'superlative'
    | 'financial'
    | 'legal'
    | 'numeric'
    | 'certification';
  text: string;
}

const CLAIM_PATTERNS: Array<{ type: SensitiveClaim['type']; regex: RegExp }> = [
  // Garantías / promesas absolutas.
  { type: 'guarantee', regex: /\b(garantizad[oa]s?|garantizamos|guarantee[ds]?|guaranteed|sin\s+riesgo|risk[-\s]?free|aseguramos)\b/gi },
  // Superlativos absolutos.
  { type: 'superlative', regex: /\b(el\s+mejor|la\s+mejor|los\s+mejores|n[ºo]\s?1|number\s?one|the\s+best|l[íi]der(?:es)?\s+(?:mundial|del\s+mercado|en)|world[-\s]?leading|#1|[úu]nic[oa]\s+en\s+el\s+mundo)\b/gi },
  // Financiero / rendimiento.
  { type: 'financial', regex: /\b(rentabilidad|retorno\s+garantizado|roi|rendimiento\s+(?:anual|garantizado)|revalorizaci[óo]n|plusval[íi]a|returns?|yields?)\b/gi },
  // Lenguaje legal / regulado.
  { type: 'legal', regex: /\b(certificad[oa]s?|regulad[oa]s?|conforme\s+a\s+la\s+ley|legalmente|compliant|gdpr|rgpd|licencia|licensed|notari[ao])\b/gi },
  // Certificaciones / sellos.
  { type: 'certification', regex: /\b(iso\s?\d{3,5}|aenor|certified|acreditad[oa]s?|sello\s+de\s+calidad)\b/gi },
  // Cifras y porcentajes (claims cuantitativos). El cierre usa un lookahead
  // negativo en vez de \b porque %, € y $ son caracteres no-word.
  { type: 'numeric', regex: /\b\d+(?:[.,]\d+)?\s?(?:%|por\s?ciento|percent|€|\$|eur|usd|años?|years?|x|veces)(?!\w)/gi },
];

/**
 * Extrae los claims sensibles presentes en un texto.
 */
export function extractSensitiveClaims(text: string): SensitiveClaim[] {
  if (!text) return [];
  const found: SensitiveClaim[] = [];
  const seen = new Set<string>();

  for (const { type, regex } of CLAIM_PATTERNS) {
    regex.lastIndex = 0;
    let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
    while ((match = regex.exec(text)) !== null) {
      const value = match[0].trim();
      const key = `${type}:${normalizeForMatch(value)}`;
      if (seen.has(key)) continue;
      seen.add(key);
      found.push({ type, text: value });
    }
  }

  return found;
}

export function hasSensitiveClaims(text: string): boolean {
  return extractSensitiveClaims(text).length > 0;
}

export interface SensitiveClaimDiff {
  changed: boolean;
  removed: SensitiveClaim[];
  added: SensitiveClaim[];
}

/**
 * Compara los claims sensibles entre un texto base y una alternativa.
 * `changed` es true si la alternativa elimina o introduce un claim sensible.
 */
export function compareSensitiveClaims(
  baseline: string,
  alternative: string,
): SensitiveClaimDiff {
  const baseClaims = extractSensitiveClaims(baseline);
  const altClaims = extractSensitiveClaims(alternative);

  const altKeys = new Set(altClaims.map((c) => `${c.type}:${normalizeForMatch(c.text)}`));
  const baseKeys = new Set(baseClaims.map((c) => `${c.type}:${normalizeForMatch(c.text)}`));

  const removed = baseClaims.filter(
    (c) => !altKeys.has(`${c.type}:${normalizeForMatch(c.text)}`),
  );
  const added = altClaims.filter(
    (c) => !baseKeys.has(`${c.type}:${normalizeForMatch(c.text)}`),
  );

  return {
    changed: removed.length > 0 || added.length > 0,
    removed,
    added,
  };
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/seo-analyzer.ts
================================================
/**
 * Analizador SEO. Produce un score 0..100, riesgos, quick wins y cambios
 * sugeridos (sin aplicarlos). Determinista y testeable.
 */

import { ExtractedPage, SeoAnalysis, SeoGeoRisk, QuickWin, SuggestedChange } from './types';
import { assessGenericAiContent } from './generic-ai-detector';
import { containsTerm, extractKeywords } from './keyword-entity';

export const TITLE_MIN = 30;
export const TITLE_MAX = 60;
export const DESC_MIN = 70;
export const DESC_MAX = 160;

interface ScoreBucket {
  earned: number;
  possible: number;
}

function add(bucket: ScoreBucket, earned: number, possible: number): void {
  bucket.earned += earned;
  bucket.possible += possible;
}

export function analyzeSeo(page: ExtractedPage): SeoAnalysis {
  const risks: SeoGeoRisk[] = [];
  const quickWins: QuickWin[] = [];
  const suggestedChanges: SuggestedChange[] = [];
  const bucket: ScoreBucket = { earned: 0, possible: 0 };

  const keywords = extractKeywords(`${page.title ?? ''} ${page.bodyText}`, 10);
  const primaryKeyword = keywords[0];

  // --- Title (20) ---
  if (!page.title) {
    add(bucket, 0, 20);
    risks.push({
      id: 'seo.title.missing',
      severity: 'critical',
      category: 'seo',
      message: 'Falta el título de la página (title/metadata).',
      recommendation: 'Añade un <title> descriptivo de 30-60 caracteres con la keyword principal.',
    });
    suggestedChanges.push({
      field: 'meta.title',
      suggested: primaryKeyword
        ? `${capitalize(primaryKeyword)} | Anclora`
        : 'Título descriptivo de la página | Anclora',
      reason: 'No existe título; es la señal SEO on-page más importante.',
      applied: false,
    });
  } else {
    const len = page.title.length;
    if (len >= TITLE_MIN && len <= TITLE_MAX) {
      add(bucket, 20, 20);
    } else if (len > 0 && len < TITLE_MIN) {
      add(bucket, 12, 20);
      quickWins.push({
        category: 'seo',
        effort: 'low',
        message: `El título es corto (${len} chars). Amplíalo hacia ${TITLE_MIN}-${TITLE_MAX} para más contexto.`,
      });
    } else {
      add(bucket, 10, 20);
      risks.push({
        id: 'seo.title.length',
        severity: 'medium',
        category: 'seo',
        message: `El título tiene ${len} caracteres y puede truncarse en SERP (> ${TITLE_MAX}).`,
        evidence: page.title,
        recommendation: `Reduce a ${TITLE_MIN}-${TITLE_MAX} caracteres priorizando la keyword principal.`,
      });
    }
  }

  // --- Meta description (15) ---
  if (!page.metaDescription) {
    add(bucket, 0, 15);
    risks.push({
      id: 'seo.description.missing',
      severity: 'high',
      category: 'seo',
      message: 'Falta la meta description.',
      recommendation: `Escribe una descripción de ${DESC_MIN}-${DESC_MAX} caracteres orientada a click-through.`,
    });
    suggestedChanges.push({
      field: 'meta.description',
      suggested: page.bodyText
        ? truncate(page.bodyText, 155)
        : 'Descripción persuasiva de 70-160 caracteres con la propuesta de valor.',
      reason: 'Sin meta description el buscador genera un snippet arbitrario.',
      applied: false,
    });
  } else {
    const len = page.metaDescription.length;
    if (len >= DESC_MIN && len <= DESC_MAX) {
      add(bucket, 15, 15);
    } else {
      add(bucket, 8, 15);
      quickWins.push({
        category: 'seo',
        effort: 'low',
        message: `Ajusta la meta description (${len} chars) al rango ${DESC_MIN}-${DESC_MAX}.`,
      });
    }
  }

  // --- H1 (15) ---
  const h1Count = page.headings.h1.length;
  if (h1Count === 1) {
    add(bucket, 15, 15);
  } else if (h1Count === 0) {
    add(bucket, 0, 15);
    risks.push({
      id: 'seo.h1.missing',
      severity: 'high',
      category: 'seo',
      message: 'No se detecta un H1 en la página.',
      recommendation: 'Añade exactamente un H1 que resuma el tema principal.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 6, 15);
    risks.push({
      id: 'seo.h1.multiple',
      severity: 'medium',
      category: 'seo',
      message: `Se detectaron ${h1Count} H1. Debe existir uno solo.`,
      evidence: page.headings.h1.join(' | '),
      recommendation: 'Deja un único H1 y degrada el resto a H2.',
    });
  }

  // --- Jerarquía de encabezados (10) ---
  if (page.headings.h2.length > 0 || page.headings.h3.length === 0) {
    add(bucket, 10, 10);
  } else {
    add(bucket, 4, 10);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'seo',
      effort: 'low',
      message: 'Hay H3 sin H2 que los agrupe; revisa la jerarquía de encabezados.',
    });
  }

  // --- Keyword en title/H1 (10) ---
  if (primaryKeyword) {
    const inTitle = page.title ? containsTerm(page.title, primaryKeyword) : false;
    const inH1 = page.headings.h1.some((h) => containsTerm(h, primaryKeyword));
    if (inTitle && inH1) add(bucket, 10, 10);
    else if (inTitle || inH1) add(bucket, 6, 10);
    else {
      add(bucket, 2, 10);
      quickWins.push({
        category: 'seo',
        effort: 'medium',
        message: `La keyword principal ("${primaryKeyword}") no aparece en título ni H1.`,
      });
    }
  } else {
    add(bucket, 5, 10);
  }

  // --- Canonical (8) ---
  if (page.canonical) {
    add(bucket, 8, 8);
  } else if (page.format === 'html') {
    add(bucket, 0, 8);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'seo',
      effort: 'low',
      message: 'Añade <link rel="canonical"> para evitar contenido duplicado.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 6, 8);
  }

  // --- Robots no bloqueante (7) ---
  if (page.robots && /noindex/i.test(page.robots)) {
    add(bucket, 0, 7);
    risks.push({
      id: 'seo.robots.noindex',
      severity: 'critical',
      category: 'seo',
      message: 'La página está marcada como noindex y no será indexada.',
      evidence: page.robots,
      recommendation: 'Elimina noindex si la página debe posicionar.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 7, 7);
  }

  // --- Open Graph (7) ---
  const ogComplete = Boolean(page.openGraph.title && page.openGraph.description);
  if (ogComplete) {
    add(bucket, 7, 7);
  } else if (page.format === 'html') {
    add(bucket, page.openGraph.title || page.openGraph.description ? 3 : 0, 7);
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'seo',
      effort: 'low',
      message: 'Completa Open Graph (og:title, og:description, og:image) para mejor share en redes.',
    });
  } else {
    add(bucket, 5, 7);
  }

  // --- Twitter cards (3) ---
  if (page.twitter.card || page.twitter.title) {
    add(bucket, 3, 3);
  } else if (page.format === 'html') {
    add(bucket, 0, 3);
  } else {
    add(bucket, 2, 3);
  }

  // --- Cuerpo / profundidad (5) ---
  const wordCount = page.bodyText ? page.bodyText.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean).length : 0;
  if (wordCount >= 120) {
    add(bucket, 5, 5);
  } else {
    add(bucket, wordCount >= 40 ? 3 : 1, 5);
    if (wordCount < 40) {
      quickWins.push({
        category: 'content',
        effort: 'medium',
        message: `Contenido visible escaso (${wordCount} palabras); amplía para dar contexto al buscador.`,
      });
    }
  }

  // --- Imágenes con alt (penalización suave fuera del bucket principal) ---
  if (page.imageCount > 0 && page.imagesMissingAlt > 0) {
    quickWins.push({
      category: 'seo',
      effort: 'low',
      message: `${page.imagesMissingAlt}/${page.imageCount} imágenes sin atributo alt.`,
    });
  }

  // --- Riesgo de contenido genérico generado por IA ---
  const generic = assessGenericAiContent(page.bodyText);
  if (generic.risk !== 'low') {
    risks.push({
      id: 'content.generic-ai',
      severity: generic.risk === 'high' ? 'high' : 'medium',
      category: 'content',
      message: `Riesgo de contenido genérico de IA (score ${generic.riskScore}).`,
      evidence: generic.matchedPhrases.slice(0, 5).join(' · '),
      recommendation: 'Sustituye muletillas por datos concretos, ejemplos y propuesta de valor específica.',
    });
  }

  const score = bucket.possible > 0 ? Math.round((bucket.earned / bucket.possible) * 100) : 0;

  return { score, risks, quickWins, suggestedChanges };
}

function capitalize(value: string): string {
  return value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1);
}

function truncate(value: string, max: number): string {
  if (value.length <= max) return value;
  return `${value.slice(0, max - 1).trimEnd()}…`;
}



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/types.ts
================================================
/**
 * Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian — Phase 1 (read-only).
 *
 * Tipos compartidos para la auditoría SEO, GEO/AEO y de contenido de los
 * repositorios del ecosistema Anclora. En Fase 1 el agente nunca modifica
 * archivos: todos los cambios sugeridos se entregan con `applied: false`.
 */

import { BrandFitResult, DetectedProduct } from './brand-types';

export type GateResult = 'PASS' | 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS' | 'FAIL';

export type RiskSeverity = 'critical' | 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';

export type RiskCategory = 'seo' | 'geo' | 'content' | 'claims';

export type PageFormat = 'html' | 'markdown' | 'jsx' | 'json' | 'unknown';

export interface SeoGeoRisk {
  id: string;
  severity: RiskSeverity;
  category: RiskCategory;
  message: string;
  evidence?: string;
  recommendation?: string;
  /** Archivo de origen; se rellena al agregar riesgos a nivel de informe. */
  filePath?: string;
}

export interface QuickWin {
  category: RiskCategory;
  effort: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high';
  message: string;
}

export interface SuggestedChange {
  /** Campo lógico afectado, p.ej. `meta.title`, `h1`, `jsonld.FAQPage`. */
  field: string;
  current?: string;
  suggested: string;
  reason: string;
  /** Siempre `false` en Fase 1: el agente no aplica cambios. */
  applied: false;
}

export interface FaqEntry {
  question: string;
  answer: string;
}

export interface HreflangEntry {
  lang: string;
  href: string;
}

/**
 * Representación normalizada de una página/archivo lista para analizar.
 */
export interface ExtractedPage {
  filePath: string;
  format: PageFormat;
  lang?: string;
  title?: string;
  metaDescription?: string;
  canonical?: string;
  robots?: string;
  headings: {
    h1: string[];
    h2: string[];
    h3: string[];
  };
  bodyText: string;
  openGraph: Record<string, string>;
  twitter: Record<string, string>;
  jsonLd: unknown[];
  hreflang: HreflangEntry[];
  faqs: FaqEntry[];
  linkCount: number;
  imageCount: number;
  imagesMissingAlt: number;
}

export interface FileAuditResult {
  filePath: string;
  format: PageFormat;
  seoScore: number;
  geoScore: number;
  gate: GateResult;
  keywords: string[];
  entities: string[];
  risks: SeoGeoRisk[];
  quickWins: QuickWin[];
  suggestedChanges: SuggestedChange[];
  /** Evaluación de Brand Fit del archivo (si hay contrato/producto). */
  brandFit?: BrandFitResult;
}

/** Sección de identidad de marca / Brand Fit del informe global. */
export interface GuardianBrandSection {
  contractFound: boolean;
  contractPath?: string;
  detectedProduct?: DetectedProduct;
  brandFit: BrandFitResult;
  warnings: string[];
}

export interface GuardianReport {
  agent: 'Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian';
  phase: 1;
  mode: 'read-only';
  generatedAt: string;
  filesAnalyzed: number;
  averageSeoScore: number;
  averageGeoScore: number;
  gate: GateResult;
  criticalRisks: SeoGeoRisk[];
  topQuickWins: QuickWin[];
  fileResults: FileAuditResult[];
  /** Capa Brand Fit; presente siempre, con estado SKIPPED si no hay contrato. */
  brand?: GuardianBrandSection;
}

/** Resultado del análisis SEO de una página individual. */
export interface SeoAnalysis {
  score: number;
  risks: SeoGeoRisk[];
  quickWins: QuickWin[];
  suggestedChanges: SuggestedChange[];
}

/** Resultado del análisis GEO/AEO de una página individual. */
export interface GeoAnalysis {
  score: number;
  risks: SeoGeoRisk[];
  quickWins: QuickWin[];
  suggestedChanges: SuggestedChange[];
}

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/brand-contract-loader.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import {
  loadBrandContract,
  loadAndParseBrandContract,
  DEFAULT_BRAND_CONTRACT_PATH,
  BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE,
} from '../brand-contract-loader';

describe('brand-contract-loader', () => {
  it('loads the canonical contract from the default path (read-only)', () => {
    const result = loadBrandContract({ cwd: process.cwd() });
    // El contrato seed existe en el repo en la ruta por defecto.
    expect(result.found).toBe(true);
    expect(result.path).toContain(DEFAULT_BRAND_CONTRACT_PATH.replace(/\//g, '/'));
    expect(result.raw).toContain('Brand Identity');
  });

  it('parses products from the canonical contract', () => {
    const { found, contract } = loadAndParseBrandContract({ cwd: process.cwd() });
    expect(found).toBe(true);
    expect(contract!.products.length).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(13);
  });

  it('does not fail destructively when the contract is missing', () => {
    const result = loadBrandContract({
      cwd: process.cwd(),
      contractPath: 'contracts/core/__does_not_exist__.md',
    });
    expect(result.found).toBe(false);
    expect(result.raw).toBeUndefined();
    expect(result.warnings).toContain(BRAND_CONTRACT_MISSING_MESSAGE);
  });

  it('returns found=false from loadAndParse when missing', () => {
    const { found, contract } = loadAndParseBrandContract({
      cwd: process.cwd(),
      contractPath: 'nope/missing-contract.md',
    });
    expect(found).toBe(false);
    expect(contract).toBeUndefined();
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/brand-contract-parser.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { parseBrandContract } from '../brand-contract-parser';

const FIXTURE = `# Anclora — Brand Contract

## Global Claim Rules
- No absolute superlatives without evidence.

## Global SEO Rules
- One H1 per page.

## Products

### anclora-content-generator-ai — Anclora Content Generator AI
- Category: SaaS de contenido
- Languages: es, en
- Claim level: standard
- Critical entities: Anclora, Hermes
- Primary keywords: generación de contenido, SEO
- Prohibited claims: posicionamiento garantizado; tráfico garantizado
- Sector disclaimers: Los resultados de SEO dependen de factores externos.

### anclora-private-estates — Anclora Private Estates
- Category: Real estate
- Claim level: very_conservative
- Critical entities: Anclora Private Estates
- Primary keywords: villas de lujo, Costa del Sol
- Prohibited claims: rentabilidad garantizada; inversión sin riesgo
- Sector disclaimers: La inversión conlleva riesgos.
`;

describe('brand-contract-parser', () => {
  it('parses global rules', () => {
    const contract = parseBrandContract(FIXTURE, '/x.md');
    expect(contract.sourcePath).toBe('/x.md');
    expect(contract.globalClaimRules.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    expect(contract.globalSeoRules.some((r) => r.includes('H1'))).toBe(true);
  });

  it('parses at least two products with their fields', () => {
    const contract = parseBrandContract(FIXTURE);
    expect(contract.products).toHaveLength(2);

    const cg = contract.products.find((p) => p.productId === 'anclora-content-generator-ai');
    expect(cg).toBeDefined();
    expect(cg!.displayName).toBe('Anclora Content Generator AI');
    expect(cg!.claimLevel).toBe('standard');
    expect(cg!.languages).toEqual(['es', 'en']);
    expect(cg!.criticalEntities).toContain('Hermes');
    expect(cg!.prohibitedClaims).toContain('posicionamiento garantizado');

    const pe = contract.products.find((p) => p.productId === 'anclora-private-estates');
    expect(pe!.claimLevel).toBe('very_conservative');
    expect(pe!.prohibitedClaims).toContain('rentabilidad garantizada');
  });

  it('does not throw on empty input and warns', () => {
    const contract = parseBrandContract('');
    expect(contract.products).toHaveLength(0);
    expect(contract.warnings.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/brand-fit-analyzer.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { analyzeBrandFit, aggregateBrandFit } from '../brand-fit-analyzer';
import { parseBrandContract } from '../brand-contract-parser';
import { BrandProductProfile } from '../brand-types';

const contract = parseBrandContract(`## Products
### anclora-content-generator-ai — Anclora Content Generator AI
- Claim level: standard
- Critical entities: Anclora, Hermes
- Primary keywords: generación de contenido, SEO
- Prohibited claims: posicionamiento garantizado; tráfico garantizado
- Sector disclaimers: Los resultados de SEO dependen de factores externos.
### anclora-private-estates — Anclora Private Estates
- Claim level: very_conservative
- Critical entities: Anclora Private Estates
- Primary keywords: villas de lujo, Costa del Sol
- Caution claims: la mejor inversión
- Prohibited claims: rentabilidad garantizada
- Sector disclaimers: La inversión conlleva riesgos.
`);

const cgProfile = contract.products.find((p) => p.productId === 'anclora-content-generator-ai') as BrandProductProfile;
const peProfile = contract.products.find((p) => p.productId === 'anclora-private-estates') as BrandProductProfile;

describe('brand-fit-analyzer', () => {
  it('SKIPPED when the contract is unavailable', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({ text: 'cualquier cosa', contractAvailable: false });
    expect(r.status).toBe('SKIPPED');
    expect(r.warnings).toContain('brand_contract_unavailable');
  });

  it('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS (never clean PASS) when product not detected', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({ text: 'texto', contractAvailable: true });
    expect(r.status).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
    expect(r.warnings).toContain('product_not_detected');
  });

  it('PASS when entities, keywords present and no prohibited claims', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Anclora Content Generator AI usa Hermes para la generación de contenido optimizado para SEO.',
      profile: cgProfile,
      contractAvailable: true,
      allProducts: contract.products,
    });
    expect(r.status).toBe('PASS');
    expect(r.preservedCriticalEntities).toEqual(expect.arrayContaining(['Anclora', 'Hermes']));
  });

  it('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS when a critical entity is missing', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Generación de contenido optimizado para SEO con Anclora.',
      profile: cgProfile,
      contractAvailable: true,
    });
    expect(r.status).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
    expect(r.missingCriticalEntities).toContain('Hermes');
  });

  it('FAIL when a prohibited claim is present', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Anclora y Hermes: generación de contenido con posicionamiento garantizado y SEO.',
      profile: cgProfile,
      contractAvailable: true,
    });
    expect(r.status).toBe('FAIL');
    expect(r.prohibitedClaimsFound).toContain('posicionamiento garantizado');
    expect(r.blockReasons.some((b) => b.startsWith('brand_prohibited_claim'))).toBe(true);
  });

  it('FAIL when a critical entity present in baseline is removed', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Generación de contenido para SEO con Anclora.',
      baseline: 'Anclora y Hermes ofrecen generación de contenido para SEO.',
      profile: cgProfile,
      contractAvailable: true,
    });
    expect(r.status).toBe('FAIL');
    expect(r.blockReasons.some((b) => b.startsWith('brand_drops_critical_entity'))).toBe(true);
  });

  it('penalizes absolute caution claims harder under very_conservative', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Anclora Private Estates: villas de lujo en Costa del Sol, la mejor inversión.',
      profile: peProfile,
      contractAvailable: true,
    });
    expect(r.cautionClaimsFound).toContain('la mejor inversión');
    expect(r.status).not.toBe('PASS');
  });

  it('flags cross-product conflicts', () => {
    const r = analyzeBrandFit({
      text: 'Anclora SyncXML ahora ofrece villas de lujo de Anclora Private Estates.',
      profile: contract.products.find((p) => p.productId === 'anclora-content-generator-ai'),
      contractAvailable: true,
      allProducts: contract.products,
    });
    expect(r.crossProductConflicts.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
  });

  it('aggregates worst status across files', () => {
    const pass = analyzeBrandFit({ text: 'Anclora Hermes generación de contenido SEO', profile: cgProfile, contractAvailable: true });
    const fail = analyzeBrandFit({ text: 'posicionamiento garantizado', profile: cgProfile, contractAvailable: true });
    const agg = aggregateBrandFit([pass, fail]);
    expect(agg.status).toBe('FAIL');
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/extractor.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { extractPage, detectFormat, extractJsonLd } from '../extractor';

const SAMPLE_HTML = `<!doctype html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <title>Villas de lujo en Marbella | Anclora Private Estates</title>
  <meta name="description" content="Descubre villas exclusivas en Marbella con vistas al mar y servicio premium de Anclora." />
  <meta name="robots" content="index,follow" />
  <link rel="canonical" href="https://anclora.com/marbella" />
  <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://anclora.com/en/marbella" />
  <meta property="og:title" content="Villas de lujo en Marbella" />
  <meta property="og:description" content="Propiedades exclusivas" />
  <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
  <script type="application/ld+json">
  {"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"¿Dónde están las villas?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"En Marbella."}}]}
  </script>
</head>
<body>
  <h1>Villas de lujo en Marbella</h1>
  <h2>Ubicación privilegiada</h2>
  <p>Anclora Private Estates es una agencia inmobiliaria especializada en propiedades premium.</p>
  <img src="villa.jpg" alt="Villa con piscina" />
  <img src="map.jpg" />
</body>
</html>`;

describe('extractor', () => {
  describe('detectFormat', () => {
    it('detects formats by extension', () => {
      expect(detectFormat('page.html', '')).toBe('html');
      expect(detectFormat('readme.md', '')).toBe('markdown');
      expect(detectFormat('Hero.tsx', '')).toBe('jsx');
      expect(detectFormat('messages.json', '')).toBe('json');
    });
  });

  describe('extractPage (html)', () => {
    const page = extractPage('marbella.html', SAMPLE_HTML);

    it('extracts title and description', () => {
      expect(page.title).toContain('Villas de lujo en Marbella');
      expect(page.metaDescription).toContain('villas exclusivas');
    });

    it('extracts headings', () => {
      expect(page.headings.h1).toEqual(['Villas de lujo en Marbella']);
      expect(page.headings.h2).toContain('Ubicación privilegiada');
    });

    it('extracts canonical, robots, hreflang, lang', () => {
      expect(page.canonical).toBe('https://anclora.com/marbella');
      expect(page.robots).toBe('index,follow');
      expect(page.hreflang).toHaveLength(1);
      expect(page.lang).toBe('es');
    });

    it('extracts open graph and twitter', () => {
      expect(page.openGraph.title).toBe('Villas de lujo en Marbella');
      expect(page.twitter.card).toBe('summary_large_image');
    });

    it('extracts JSON-LD and FAQs', () => {
      expect(page.jsonLd).toHaveLength(1);
      expect(page.faqs[0].question).toContain('¿Dónde están las villas?');
    });

    it('counts images missing alt', () => {
      expect(page.imageCount).toBe(2);
      expect(page.imagesMissingAlt).toBe(1);
    });
  });

  describe('extractPage (markdown)', () => {
    const md = `---\ntitle: Guía de inversión\ndescription: Cómo invertir en la Costa del Sol\n---\n\n# Guía de inversión\n\n## ¿Es rentable?\nSí, históricamente la zona se revaloriza.\n`;
    const page = extractPage('guia.md', md);

    it('reads frontmatter title/description', () => {
      expect(page.title).toBe('Guía de inversión');
      expect(page.metaDescription).toBe('Cómo invertir en la Costa del Sol');
    });

    it('extracts markdown headings and faqs', () => {
      expect(page.headings.h1).toContain('Guía de inversión');
      expect(page.faqs.some((f) => f.question.includes('¿Es rentable?'))).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('extractJsonLd', () => {
    it('marks malformed json-ld as parse error', () => {
      const blocks = extractJsonLd(
        '<script type="application/ld+json">{invalid}</script>',
      );
      expect(blocks).toHaveLength(1);
      expect((blocks[0] as { __parseError?: boolean }).__parseError).toBe(true);
    });
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/gate.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { computeGate, aggregateGate } from '../gate';
import { SeoGeoRisk } from '../types';

function risk(severity: SeoGeoRisk['severity']): SeoGeoRisk {
  return { id: `r-${severity}`, severity, category: 'seo', message: 'test' };
}

describe('gate', () => {
  describe('computeGate', () => {
    it('returns PASS for high scores and no risks', () => {
      expect(computeGate(90, 85, [])).toBe('PASS');
    });

    it('returns FAIL on any critical risk', () => {
      expect(computeGate(95, 95, [risk('critical')])).toBe('FAIL');
    });

    it('returns FAIL when scores are below the fail thresholds', () => {
      expect(computeGate(40, 80, [])).toBe('FAIL');
      expect(computeGate(80, 30, [])).toBe('FAIL');
    });

    it('returns PASS_WITH_WARNINGS for high/medium risks', () => {
      expect(computeGate(90, 90, [risk('high')])).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
      expect(computeGate(90, 90, [risk('medium')])).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
    });

    it('returns PASS_WITH_WARNINGS when scores are in the warn band', () => {
      expect(computeGate(70, 90, [])).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
    });

    it('ignores low risks for PASS', () => {
      expect(computeGate(90, 85, [risk('low')])).toBe('PASS');
    });
  });

  describe('aggregateGate', () => {
    it('returns the worst gate', () => {
      expect(aggregateGate(['PASS', 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS', 'FAIL'])).toBe('FAIL');
      expect(aggregateGate(['PASS', 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS'])).toBe('PASS_WITH_WARNINGS');
      expect(aggregateGate(['PASS', 'PASS'])).toBe('PASS');
    });

    it('returns PASS for empty input', () => {
      expect(aggregateGate([])).toBe('PASS');
    });
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/generic-ai-detector.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { assessGenericAiContent } from '../generic-ai-detector';

describe('generic-ai-detector', () => {
  it('rates concrete, specific copy as low risk', () => {
    const result = assessGenericAiContent(
      'La villa de 320 m² en Marbella tiene 4 dormitorios y piscina climatizada.',
    );
    expect(result.risk).toBe('low');
    expect(result.riskScore).toBeLessThan(0.25);
  });

  it('rates filler-heavy AI copy as higher risk', () => {
    const result = assessGenericAiContent(
      'In today\'s fast-paced world, unlock the power of our cutting-edge, ' +
        'game-changing solution to elevate your business to the next level.',
    );
    expect(result.risk).not.toBe('low');
    expect(result.matchedPhrases.length).toBeGreaterThan(1);
  });

  it('returns zero risk for empty input', () => {
    const result = assessGenericAiContent('');
    expect(result.riskScore).toBe(0);
    expect(result.risk).toBe('low');
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/geo-analyzer.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { analyzeGeo } from '../geo-analyzer';
import { extractPage } from '../extractor';
import { ExtractedPage } from '../types';

function basePage(overrides: Partial<ExtractedPage> = {}): ExtractedPage {
  return {
    filePath: 'test.html',
    format: 'html',
    headings: { h1: [], h2: [], h3: [] },
    bodyText: '',
    openGraph: {},
    twitter: {},
    jsonLd: [],
    hreflang: [],
    faqs: [],
    linkCount: 0,
    imageCount: 0,
    imagesMissingAlt: 0,
    ...overrides,
  };
}

const GEO_READY_HTML = `<html><head>
<script type="application/ld+json">
{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[
{"@type":"Question","name":"¿Qué es Anclora Private Estates?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Una agencia inmobiliaria premium."}},
{"@type":"Question","name":"¿Dónde opera?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"En Marbella y Costa del Sol."}}]}
</script>
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://anclora.com/en" />
</head><body>
<h1>Anclora Private Estates</h1>
<p>Anclora Private Estates es una agencia inmobiliaria de lujo. Opera en Marbella y Costa del Sol. El mercado se revaloriza un 8% anual. Costa del Sol atrae a inversores internacionales.</p>
<h2>¿Qué es la inversión premium?</h2>
<p>Es la compra de activos exclusivos.</p>
<h2>¿Cómo empezar?</h2>
<p>Contacta con Anclora.</p>
</body></html>`;

describe('geo-analyzer', () => {
  it('rewards definitional clarity, entities, FAQ and JSON-LD', () => {
    const page = extractPage('geo.html', GEO_READY_HTML);
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.score).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(75);
  });

  it('flags missing definitional sentence', () => {
    const page = basePage({
      bodyText: 'Bienvenido. Tenemos muchas opciones para ti. Contáctanos pronto.',
    });
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.definition.missing')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('flags missing FAQ structure', () => {
    const page = basePage({
      bodyText: 'Anclora Group es una empresa. Trabajamos en bienes raíces.',
      headings: { h1: ['Anclora'], h2: ['Servicios'], h3: [] },
    });
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.qa.missing')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('rewards present JSON-LD answer schema (no jsonld.missing risk)', () => {
    const page = extractPage('geo.html', GEO_READY_HTML);
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.jsonld.missing')).toBe(false);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.jsonld.invalid')).toBe(false);
  });

  it('flags absent JSON-LD (geo.jsonld.missing)', () => {
    const page = basePage({
      bodyText:
        'Anclora Group es una empresa inmobiliaria. Opera en Marbella. Ofrece villas exclusivas.',
      headings: { h1: ['Anclora Group'], h2: ['¿Qué hace?'], h3: [] },
      jsonLd: [],
    });
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.jsonld.missing')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('flags malformed JSON-LD', () => {
    const page = extractPage(
      'bad.html',
      '<html><body><h1>X</h1><p>Anclora Group es una empresa.</p><script type="application/ld+json">{bad}</script></body></html>',
    );
    const result = analyzeGeo(page);
    expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.id === 'geo.jsonld.invalid')).toBe(true);
  });

  it('produces a low score for thin content', () => {
    const result = analyzeGeo(basePage({ bodyText: 'Hola.' }));
    expect(result.score).toBeLessThan(50);
  });
});



================================================
FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/guardian-brand.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { auditFiles } from '../guardian';
import { renderGuardianReport } from '../report-renderer';
import { parseBrandContract } from '../brand-contract-parser';
import { detectProduct, resolveProductProfile } from '../product-detector';
import { BrandAuditContext } from '../guardian';

const contract = parseBrandContract(`## Products
### anclora-content-generator-ai — Anclora Content Generator AI
- Claim level: standard
- Critical entities: Anclora, Hermes
- Primary keywords: generación de contenido, SEO
- Prohibited claims: posicionamiento garantizado
`);

const STRONG_PAGE = `<!doctype html><html lang="es"><head>
<title>Anclora Content Generator AI — generación de contenido para SEO</title>
<meta name="description" content="Anclora y Hermes potencian la generación de contenido optimizado para SEO con flujos asistidos por IA para equipos de marketing exigentes." />
<meta name="robots" content="index,follow" />
<link rel="canonical" href="https://x.com/" />
</head><body>
<h1>Anclora Content Generator AI</h1>
<h2>¿Qué es?</h2>
<p>Anclora Content Generator AI es una plataforma que, junto a Hermes, automatiza la generación de contenido optimizado para SEO. Procesa cientos de piezas y mantiene la voz de marca.</p>
<h2>¿Cómo empezar?</h2>
<p>Conecta tu fuente y genera contenido.</p>
</body></html>`;

const PROHIBITED_PAGE = `<!doctype html><html lang="es"><head>
<title>Anclora Content Generator AI — generación de contenido para SEO</title>
<meta name="description" content="Anclora y Hermes ofrecen generación de contenido con posicionamiento garantizado en buscadores para tu negocio digital hoy mismo." />
<meta name="robots" content="index,follow" />
</head><body>
<h1>Anclora Content Generator AI</h1>
<p>Con Anclora y Hermes obtienes generación de contenido con posicionamiento garantizado en SEO.</p>
</body></html>`;

function brandContext(): BrandAuditContext {
  const detected = detectProduct({ repoName: 'anclora-content-generator-ai' }, contract.products);
  return {
    contractAvailable: true,
    contractPath: '/contracts/core/contract.md',
    detectedProduct: detected,
    profile: resolveProductProfile(detected, contract.products),
    allProducts: contract.products,
  };
}

describe('guardian + brand fit', () => {
  it('does not fail and produces no brand section when no brand context is given', () => {
    const report = auditFiles([{ path: 'a.html', content: STRONG_PAGE }]);
    expect(report.brand).toBeUndefined();
    expect(report.gate).toBeDefined();
  });

  it('keeps working when the contract is unavailable (SKIPPED) and notes it in the report', () => {
    const report = auditFiles([{ path: 'a.html', content: STRONG_PAGE }], {
      brand: { contractAvailable: false },
    });
    expect(report.brand?.brandFit.status).toBe('SKIPPED');
    const md = renderGuardianReport(report);
    expect(md).toContain('Brand Identity / Brand Fit');
    expect(md).toContain('Brand contract not found; Brand Fit evaluation skipped.');
  });

  it('includes the Brand Fit section and detected product when contract is available', () => {
    const report = auditFiles([{ path: 'a.html', content: STRONG_PAGE }], { brand: brandContext() });
    expect(report.brand?.contractFound).toBe(true);
    expect(report.brand?.detectedProduct?.productId).toBe('anclora-content-generator-ai');
    const md = renderGuardianReport(report);
    expect(md).toContain('Detected product: Anclora Content Generator AI');
    expect(md).toContain('Brand Fit score:');
  });

  it('forces the aggregated gate to FAIL when brand fit FAILs (prohibited claim)', () => {
    const report = auditFiles([{ path: 'a.html', content: PROHIBITED_PAGE }], { brand: brandContext() });
    expect(report.brand?.brandFit.status).toBe('FAIL');
    expect(report.gate).toBe('FAIL');
    expect(report.brand?.brandFit.prohibitedClaimsFound).toContain('posicionamiento garantizado');
  });
});

FILE: src/lib/hermes/seo-geo-guardian/__tests__/guardian.test.ts
================================================
import { describe, it, expect } from 'vitest';
import { auditFile, auditFiles } from '../guardian';
import { renderGuardianReport } from '../report-renderer';

const GOOD_HTML = `<!doctype html><html lang="es"><head>
<title>Villas de lujo en Marbella con vistas al mar | Anclora</title>
<meta name="description" content="Descubre villas de lujo exclusivas en Marbella con vistas al mar y el servicio premium de Anclora Private Estates para inversores internacionales exigentes." />
<meta name="robots" content="index,follow" />
<link rel="canonical" href="https://anclora.com/marbella" />
<link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://anclora.com/en/marbella" />
<meta property="og:title" content="Villas de lujo en Marbella" />
<meta property="og:description" content="Propiedades exclusivas" />
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
<script type="application/ld+json">{"@context":"https://schema.org","@type":"FAQPage","mainEntity":[{"@type":"Question","name":"¿Dónde están?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"En Marbella."}},{"@type":"Question","name":"¿Precio?","acceptedAnswer":{"@type":"Answer","text":"Desde 2M."}}]}</script>
</head><body>
<h1>Villas de lujo en Marbella</h1>
<h2>Ubicación</h2>
<p>Anclora Private Estates es una agencia inmobiliaria premium. Opera en Marbella y Costa del Sol. El mercado se revaloriza un 8% anual.</p>
<h2>¿Qué incluye?</h2>
<p>Piscina y vistas al mar.</p>
</body></html>`;

const BAD_HTML = `<html><head><meta name="robots" content="noindex"></head><body><p>texto corto</p></body></html>`;

describe('guardian', () => {
  describe('auditFile', () => {
    it('produces scores, gate, keywords and entities', () => {
      const result = auditFile({ path: 'marbella.html', content: GOOD_HTML });
      expect(result.seoScore).toBeGreaterThan(0);
      expect(result.geoScore).toBeGreaterThan(0);
      expect(['PASS', 'PASS_WITH_WARNINGS', 'FAIL']).toContain(result.gate);
      expect(result.keywords.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
    });

    it('FAILs a page with a noindex robots tag', () => {
      const result = auditFile({ path: 'bad.html', content: BAD_HTML });
      expect(result.gate).toBe('FAIL');
      expect(result.risks.some((r) => r.severity === 'critical')).toBe(true);
    });
  });

  describe('auditFiles', () => {
    it('aggregates a report and renders markdown', () => {
      const report = auditFiles(
        [
          { path: 'good.html', content: GOOD_HTML },
          { path: 'bad.html', content: BAD_HTML },
        ],
        { generatedAt: '2026-06-02T00:00:00.000Z' },
      );

      expect(report.filesAnalyzed).toBe(2);
      expect(report.gate).toBe('FAIL'); // worst-of aggregation
      expect(report.criticalRisks.length).toBeGreaterThan(0);
      expect(report.mode).toBe('read-only');

      const md = renderGuardianReport(report);
      expect(md).toContain('Hermes SEO/GEO Guardian');
      expect(md).toContain('Gate final');
      expect(md).toContain('good.html');
      expect(md).toContain('Aplicado: `false`');
    });

    it('handles an empty file list', () => {
      const report = auditFiles([]);
      expect(report.filesAnalyzed).toBe(0);
      expect(report.gate).toBe('PASS');
      expect(report.averageSeoScore).toBe(0);
    });
  });
});
